Solarian Archetype

Knight of Golarion

Witchwarper Archetype
folders.Starfinder Field Agent:
星际探险家战地特工
Starfinder Field Agent

Disciple of the Cycle.name: 循环门徒 Disciple of the Cycle
Disciple of the Cycle.description:
尽管这与真正的星辉武者的力量相比相形见绌，你却是循环的虔诚门徒，能够暂时显现出对宇宙之力的掌控。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kR5A0h2a9hY41wav]{Entropy Strike} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VmtQlZqeraTv0Eer]{Skyfire Wings}，作为3环神秘先天法术。你每天可以各施放一次这些神秘先天法术。

While it pales in comparison to the powers of a true solarian, you are a devoted disciple of the Cycle and can temporarily manifest control over the powers of the cosmos. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kR5A0h2a9hY41wav]{Entropy Strike} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VmtQlZqeraTv0Eer]{Skyfire Wings} as 3rd-rank occult innate spells. You can cast each of these occult innate spells once per day.

Legendary Troll.name: 传奇巨魔 Legendary Troll
Legendary Troll.description:
需求 你或你的目标正在使用通讯装置、数据板或其他计算机。

对 60 尺内一个目标的意志 DC 进行一次 @Check[deception|against:will] 检定。若成功，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续 1 轮；若大成功，则其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}，持续 1 轮。目标的反应会像你使用适当的技能尝试 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}，并且你的掷骰结果相同一样，为你提供关于它的信息。此后，该目标会在 24 小时内暂时免疫你的 Legendary Troll 尝试。

Requirements You or your target are using a comm unit, datapad, or other computer.

Attempt a @Check[deception|against:will] check against the Will DC of a target within 60 feet. On a success, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round, and on a critical success, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round. The target's reaction gives you information about it as though you'd attempted to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} using an appropriate skill and received the same result on your roll. The target is then temporarily immune to your Legendary Troll attempts for 24 hours.

Burst Fire.name: 扫射射击 Burst Fire
Burst Fire.description:
你扣下扳机，释放出一阵经过精准计算的火力爆发。如果你使用同一把枪进行来自 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.l5v7SnMbgsVGCsMA]{Double Tap} 的第二次打击，则在计算你的多重攻击减值时，Double Tap 视为一次攻击，并且你将来自 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} 的精准伤害加值同时应用于两次打击。

You squeeze the trigger and release a calculated burst of fire. If you make your second Strike from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.l5v7SnMbgsVGCsMA]{Double Tap} with the same gun, Double Tap counts as one attack when calculating your multiple attack penalty, and you apply your precision damage bonus from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} to both Strikes.

Combat Climber.name: 战斗攀爬 Combat Climber
Combat Climber.description: 你拥有一边攀爬一边战斗的技术。你在攀爬期间不会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，并且能够在一只手被占用的情况下攀爬。你在攀爬时仍然必须用上另一只手和双腿。

Siphon Solar Vitality.name: 虹吸太阳活力 Siphon Solar Vitality
Siphon Solar Vitality.description:
你的星芒纹路会储存太阳能量，你可以汲取这些能量来恢复身体活力，并以魔法治疗你的伤口。你恢复等同于 @Damage[(@actor.level+ 1d6)[healing]]（1d6 加上你的角色等级）的生命值。如果你处于自然阳光区域内，则你改为恢复等同于 @Damage[((2*@actor.level)+1d6)[healing]] （1d6 加上你角色等级的两倍）的生命值。

Your starburst markings store solar energy that you can tap into to revitalize your body and magically heal your wounds. You regain Hit Points equal to @Damage[(@actor.level+ 1d6)[healing]](1d6 plus your character level). If you're in an area of natural sunlight, you instead regain Hit Points equal to @Damage[((2*@actor.level)+1d6)[healing]] (1d6 plus twice your character level).

Legend Weaver.name: 传说编织者 Legend Weaver
Legend Weaver.description:
你是一位才华横溢的讲述者，能让传奇栩栩如生。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Ucf8eynbZMfUucjE]{幻景}，作为一个6环神秘先天法术。你每天可以施放这个法术一次。当你以这种方式施放幻景时，该法术会自动调整以适应其受众。目睹该幻象的失聪生物还会看见场景中的角色以视觉手语传达他们的对白。目睹该幻象的失明生物还会听到对该场景的音频描述。目睹该幻象的聋盲生物还会在其心中额外接收到关于该场景及其对白的灵能印象。

You're an incredibly talented storyteller, making legends come to life. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Ucf8eynbZMfUucjE]{Illusory Scene} as a 6th-rank occult innate spell. You can cast this spell once per day. When you cast illusory scene in this way, the spell automatically adapts to suit its audience. A deaf creature that witnesses the illusion additionally sees the characters in the scene visually signing their dialogue. A blind creature that witnesses the illusion additionally hears an audio description of the scene. A deafblind creature that witnesses the illusion additionally receives a psychic impression of the scene and its dialogue in their mind.

Infodump.name: 信息转储 Infodump
Infodump.description:
你汇聚无数细枝末节，随后用这些毫无意义的琐碎知识压垮一个生物的心智。对60英尺内一个你已知晓其存在的生物的意志DC进行一次回忆知识检定；你可以使用任何可用于回忆知识的技能，而不只是与目标特征相关联的技能。你并非回想起有用的信息，而是对目标背诵各种事实。不论你的结果如何，60英尺内的生物在24小时内都会暂时免疫你以该技能进行的“信息倾倒”尝试。

大成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}，持续[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}，持续[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。

失败 目标不受影响。

大失败 你的思绪把自己绊住了，使你陷入迟钝 1，直到你的下个回合开始。

特殊 你可以通过言语或有限心灵感应来进行“信息倾倒”。如果你通过言语进行“信息倾倒”，此能力获得听觉特征。

You muster myriad minutiae that you subsequently use to overwhelm a creature's mind with pointless trivia. Attempt a check to Recall Knowledge against the Will DC of a creature you're aware of within 60 feet; you can use any skill for which you can Recall Knowledge, not just a skill associated with the target's traits. Rather than remembering useful information, you recite facts at the target. Regardless of your result, the creatures within 60 feet become temporarily immune to your attempts to Infodump with that skill for 24 hours.

Critical Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Failure The target is unaffected.

Critical Failure You trip over your own thoughts, becoming stupefied 1 until the beginning of your next turn.

Special You can Infodump using speech or limited telepathy. If you Infodump through speech, this ability gains the auditory trait.

Encode Presence.name: 编码存在感 Encode Presence
Encode Presence.description:
频率 每小时一次

你会本能地对自身存在进行编码，模糊你的身份，并扰乱你在科技视觉传感器中的视觉外观。对于所有科技视觉传感器，例如安保摄像头、眼部电控机械植入体，以及科技构装体的视觉处理器，你会进入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，持续1分钟。由于该效果的性质仍会使你的位置显而易见，因此你不能利用这种隐蔽来躲藏或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}。

Frequency once per hour

You instinctively encode your presence, obscuring your identity and scrambling your visual appearance to technological visual sensors. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to all technological visual sensors, such as security cameras, ocular cybernetic augmentations, and the visual processors of technological constructs, for 1 minute. As the nature of this effect still leaves your location obvious, you can't use this concealment to Hide or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}.

Surface Strider.name: 地表疾行者 Surface Strider
Surface Strider.description:
通过勤勉的训练，你已经学会在离开水的情况下延长停留时间。你获得两栖特征。

Through diligent training, you've learned to stretch your ability to remain out of the water for extended periods. You gain the amphibious trait.

Digital Diversion.name: 数字干扰 Digital Diversion
Digital Diversion.description:
需求 你正持有或穿戴一套黑客工具包，且有一只空闲手。

无论是突如其来的通讯器提示音，还是装备显示屏上的警报声，你都可以对一个携带、穿戴或持用科技物品的相邻目标使用计算机而非欺瞒来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造牵制}。

[[/act create-a-diversion variant=distracting-words skill=computers]]

[[/act create-a-diversion variant=gesture skill=computers]]

[[/act create-a-diversion variant=trick skill=computers]]

Requirements You are holding or wearing a hacking toolkit and have a free hand.

Whether it's a sudden comm unit ping or a warning alarm on an equipment display, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} by using Computers instead of Deception on an adjacent target carrying, wearing, or wielding a tech item.

[[/act create-a-diversion variant=distracting-words skill=computers]]

[[/act create-a-diversion variant=gesture skill=computers]]

[[/act create-a-diversion variant=trick skill=computers]]

Mind Over Matter.name: 心胜于物 Mind Over Matter
Mind Over Matter.description:
你的念动力能力不止于让自己漂浮，还能让你精确地操控附近的物体。你的念动力赋予你相当于额外两只手的能力，遵循《Starfinder Player Core》中关于拥有超过两只手角色的规则。然而，这两只念动力之手各自只能持用总体积为 1 Bulk 或以下的物品。当你切换到或离开你的念动力之手时，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oW81CfM9ebxXnrw3]{Switch Hands} 动作获得默思族特征。

Your telekinetic capabilities extend beyond personal levitation, allowing you to handle nearby objects with precision. Your telekinesis grants you the equivalent of two additional hands, following the rules for characters with more than two hands as detailed in Starfinder Player Core. However, each of the telekinetic hands can wield only items of 1 Bulk or less. The @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oW81CfM9ebxXnrw3]{Switch Hands} action gains the contemplative trait when you switch to or from your telekinetic hands.

Mental Deflection.name: 精神偏斜 Mental Deflection
Mental Deflection.description:
触发条件 一个生物施放具有心灵特征的法术。

需求 你至少拥有 1 点专注点。

当一个敌人施放具有心灵特征的法术，且你能看见或以其他方式察觉其显现时，你运用自己的灵能来扰乱它。你消耗 1 点专注点来反制触发生物对该法术的施放。然后，你以你的施法属性调整值加上你的施法熟练加值作为反制调整值，并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制位阶，来尝试反制该触发法术。

Trigger A creature Casts a Spell with the mental trait.

Requirements You have at least 1 Focus Point.

When a foe Casts a Spell that has the mental trait and you can see or otherwise detect its manifestations, you use your psychic powers to disrupt it. You expend 1 Focus Point to counter the triggering creature's casting of the spell. You then attempt to counteract the triggering spell using your spellcasting attribute modifier plus your spellcasting proficiency bonus as your counteract modifier and half your level, rounded up, as your counteract rank.

Scatter Thoughts.name: 散乱思绪 Scatter Thoughts
Scatter Thoughts.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你成为一个精神效果的目标。

你可以运用与你的祖先曾掌握、用以逃离虫群的相似技巧来保护自己的心智。你通过分散思绪来阻挡侵入的效果，使自己在接下来1分钟内免疫于触发该能力的精神效果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're targeted by a mental effect.

You can shield your mind by using similar techniques that your ancestors once mastered to escape the Swarm. You block the intruding effect by scattering your thoughts, making you immune to the triggering mental effect for the next minute.

Mission Briefing.name: 任务简报 Mission Briefing
Mission Briefing.description:
在任务简报前做好准备，会让你有额外时间提出问题，并研究一个与你下一次冒险相关的主题。你受训于任务传闻学，这是一项特殊的传闻学技能，只能用于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}，但可针对任何与代表其他个人或组织执行的委派、任务或探险相关的主题。如果你使用任务传闻学进行回忆知识检定失败，除非该问题已经在任务简报期间得到解答，否则你会获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.1Bt7uCW2WI4sM84P]{可疑知识} 技能专长的效果。如果你在社群上具有传奇熟练度，你在任务传闻学上获得专家熟练度，但你不能以任何其他方式提高你在任务传闻学上的熟练等级。

Coming prepared to mission briefings gives you extra time to ask questions and research a topic relevant to your next adventure. You are trained in Mission Lore, a special Lore skill that can be used only to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}, but on any topic related to an assignment, mission, or quest performed on behalf of another individual or organization. If you fail a check to Recall Knowledge with Mission Lore, you get the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.1Bt7uCW2WI4sM84P]{Dubious Knowledge} skill feat unless the question was already answered during a mission briefing. If you have legendary proficiency in Society, you gain expert proficiency in Mission Lore, but you can't increase your proficiency rank in Mission Lore by any other means.

Scrub Psyche.name: 净化心灵 Scrub Psyche
Scrub Psyche.description:
触发条件 你或一名盟友在你的量子场内对一个精神效果的豁免检定失败。

你将目标心智中所有引发该反应的效果痕迹尽数抹除。目标对该引发效果重新进行一次豁免检定，并且必须使用第二次结果，即使结果更差也是如此。

Trigger You or an ally fail a save against a mental effect while within your quantum field.

You scrub all traces of the triggering effect from the target's mind. The target rerolls their saving throw against the triggering effect and must use the second result, even if it's worse.

Operative Resiliency.name: 特工韧性 Operative Resiliency
Operative Resiliency.description:
你每拥有一个特工原型职业专长，便额外获得 3 点生命值。随着你继续选择特工原型职业专长，你也会继续以这种方式获得额外生命值。

You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each operative archetype class feat you have. As you continue selecting operative archetype class feats, you continue to gain additional Hit Points in this way.

Expanded Connection.name: 扩展连接 Expanded Connection
Expanded Connection.description:
你的法术库中的法术数量，以及你从秘学者原型专长获得的法术位数量，对于除你最高两个秘学者法术位环阶之外的每一个法术环阶，均增加 1。

Increase the number of spells in your repertoire and number of spell slots you gain from mystic archetype feats by 1 for each spell rank other than your two highest mystic spell slots.

Child of the Red Planet.name: 红色星球之子 Child of the Red Planet
Child of the Red Planet.description:
你呼唤自己作为绍巴德人的与生俱来的权利，引导祖先故乡星球阿基顿的精神，将自己包裹在一道令人生畏的灵光之中，使你的敌人因恐惧而畏缩退避。披覆着这颗红色星球的荣光，无人能够屹立于你面前！你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yrZA4k2VAqEP8xx7]{Repulsion} 施放一次，作为原始先天法术。来自阿基顿的生物对抗此效果的意志豁免检定承受 –2 减值。

Calling upon your birthright as a shobhad, you channel the spirit of your ancestral home world of Akiton to encase you in a forbidding aura that causes your enemies to shy away from you in fear. Clad in the glory of the red planet, none can stand before you! You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yrZA4k2VAqEP8xx7]{Repulsion} once per day as a primal innate spell. Creatures from Akiton take a –2 penalty to their Will saves against this effect.

Heightened Thoughtsense.name: 高阶思维感应 Heightened Thoughtsense
Heightened Thoughtsense.description:
你的灵能力知觉扩展，使你在近距离拥有更敏锐的感知，并总体上获得更宽广的感官范围。你的模糊思想感应范围增加 10 尺。此外，你获得思想感应，作为一种范围为 5 尺的不精确感官。

在 9 级时，你的模糊思想感应变为不精确感官。

Your psychic awareness expands, granting you sharper perception at close range and a wider sensory field overall. Increase the range of your vague thoughtsense by 10 feet. In addition, you gain thoughtsense as an imprecise sense with a range of 5 feet.

At 9th level, your vague thoughtsense becomes an imprecise sense.

Got 'Em.name: 逮到他们了 Got 'Em
Got 'Em.description:
频率 每轮一次

触发条件 一名盟友的打击命中了你“干掉他！”的目标

你对自己正在进行的训令作出一次迅速的后续响应，在盟友成功命中你指定的目标时鼓舞他们。你的盟友获得等同于你魅力调整值的伤害状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.73I9yj9XlxcBLXfa]{效果：得手了！}

Frequency once per round

Trigger An ally's Strike hits the target of your Get 'Em!

You provide a quick follow-up to your ongoing directive, encouraging your ally when they successfully hit your designated target. Your ally gains a status bonus to damage equal to your Charisma modifier.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.73I9yj9XlxcBLXfa]{Effect: Got 'Em}

Void Sight.name: 虚空视觉 Void Sight
Void Sight.description:
你已经习惯在一片漆黑中生活或工作，双眼也已适应昏暗。你获得更强的黑暗视觉。

You're accustomed to living or working in utter darkness, and your eyes have adjusted to the gloom. You gain greater darkvision.

Advanced First Aid.name: 进阶急救 Advanced First Aid
Advanced First Aid.description: 你利用自己接受的医疗训练来缓解病痛或消除恐惧。在你用医疗技能进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}时，可以降低一个盟友的2点@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}状态值，以替代让其稳定伤势或停止流血，大成功时则可完全移除其中一个状态值。你每次只能移除一种状态值。医疗检定DC通常等于导致该状态的效果DC。

Dubious Knowledge.name: 可疑知识 Dubious Knowledge
Dubious Knowledge.description: 你是信息的宝库，但它们的来源并非全都可靠。当你使用任何技能进行的回忆知识检定失败（但没有大失败）时，你会得到一个正确的答案和一个错误的答案，但你不会知道哪个是正确的。也可能是知道某件事情非常重要，但不知道它是好是坏。

Seasoned.name: 老厨子 Seasoned
Seasoned.description:
你已精通多种食物与饮品的制作准备。你在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制作}食物和饮品的检定上获得+1环境加值，若你拥有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.VRLHQPDkjy0gbxBY]{血清制作}，则也包括血清。若你在前置技能之一中达到大师熟练，这个加值提高为+2。

You've mastered the preparation of many types of food and drink. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} food and drink, including serums if you have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.VRLHQPDkjy0gbxBY]{Serum Crafting}. If you are a master in one of the prerequisite skills, this bonus increases to +2.

Broadside Charge.name: 舷侧冲锋 Broadside Charge
Broadside Charge.description:
需求 你正分别以不同的手持握一把枪械，以及一把具有灵巧特征的近战武器或一把相位弯刀。

你手持刀刃与手枪推进，进行一次远程打击，移动最多等同于你的速度，然后进行一次近战打击；两者都使用你当前的多重攻击减值，且都必须以同一目标为对象。在计算你的多重攻击减值时，这算作两次攻击。

Requirements You are wielding a gun and a melee weapon with the agile trait or a phase cutlass, each in a different hand.

Advancing with blade and pistol in hand, you make a ranged Strike, move up to your Speed, and make a melee Strike, each using your current multiple attack penalty and both at the same target. This counts as two attacks when calculating your multiple attack penalty.

Red Eye.name: 红眼 Red Eye
Red Eye.description:
你的双眼泛起红色光芒，并在黑暗或阴影区域中如余烬般发亮。你获得黑暗视觉。

Your eyes burn with a red hue and glow like embers when in areas of darkness or shade. You gain darkvision.

Internal Chemistry.name: 内在化学 Internal Chemistry
Internal Chemistry.description:
你会调整自己的解剖结构与身体系统，以更高效地代谢药物。当你使用具有治疗特征的消耗品为自己恢复生命值时，额外恢复等同于你等级一半的生命值。

You tweak your anatomy and bodily systems to metabolize pharmaceuticals more efficiently. Regain additional Hit Points equal to half your level when you restore Hit Points to yourself using a consumable item with the healing trait.

Distant Feint.name: 远程佯攻 Distant Feint
Distant Feint.description:
你是一位令人惊叹的演员，并且你可以用自己夸张过头的小段子和戏剧化的手势来扰乱敌人的状态。如果你正持用一把远程武器，你可以对100英尺内的对手使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻}，而不再仅限于近战触及范围内。如果你成功，该对手会对你的近战和远程攻击都处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，而不再仅仅是对你的近战攻击如此。

You're an incredible actor, and you can use your over-the-top bits and dramatic gestures to throw a foe off its game. If you're wielding a ranged weapon, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} against an opponent at a range of 100 feet, rather than just within melee reach. If you succeed, the opponent is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against your melee and ranged attacks, rather than only your melee attacks.

Too Stubborn to Die.name: 倔强到死不了 Too Stubborn to Die
Too Stubborn to Die.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你将会死亡。

你从死亡边缘归来，拖着自己穿过疲惫与痛苦，重新恢复意识。若你具有濒死或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 状态，你失去濒死和失去意识状态。若你的生命值为 0，则你的生命值变为 1。你的受伤和厄运状态值各增加 1。你可以在失去意识时使用此反应。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You would die.

You return from the brink of death, hauling yourself back to consciousness through exhaustion and pain. If you have the dying or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} conditions, you lose the dying and unconscious conditions. If you're at 0 Hit Points, you have 1 Hit Point. Increase the value of your wounded and doomed conditions by 1. You can use this reaction while unconscious.

Solarian Dedication.name: 星辉武者奉献 Solarian Dedication
Solarian Dedication.description:
你获得恒星谐调职业特性，但当你掷先攻时，你不会以自由动作进行谐调。你在日焰、日耀武器和星辉武者职业DC上成为受训。

你可以显现一把日耀武器。你的武器具有谐调和星辉武者特征，但你不能选择额外特征，且它不会因你的谐调而获得任何益处。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{重铸日耀武器}动作。

You gain the stellar attunement class feature, but you do not Attune as a free action when you roll initiative. You become trained in solar flare, solar weapon, and solarian class DC.

You can manifest a solar weapon. Your weapon has the attuned and solarian traits, but you can't select additional traits and it gains no benefits based on your attunement. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{Re-Forge Solar Weapon} action.

Bullet Typhoon.name: 弹幕台风 Bullet Typhoon
Bullet Typhoon.description:
你的破坏力已成为第二天性，敌人会对你压倒性的火力心生敬畏。你可以将区域射击或自动射击作为单个动作使用。然而，在同一轮中，你永远不能进行超过两次此类攻击。

Your destructive power has become second nature as enemies stand in awe of your overwhelming firepower. You can use the Area Fire or Auto-Fire attacks as a single action. However, you can never make more than two such attacks in the same round.

Revivification Protocol.name: 复苏协议 Revivification Protocol
Revivification Protocol.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你拥有濒死状态，且正在进行复苏检定。

你的纳米机械被编程来自动为你进行复苏。你的生命值将恢复到1点，失去濒死和失去意识状态，且本轮可以如常行动。当你以这种方式失去濒死状态时，你会如常获得或增加受伤状态。

Android Lore.name: 仿生人学识 Android Lore
Android Lore.description:
你对你的族群起源有着浓厚的兴趣。你在制造和盗窃上获得受训熟练等级。若你本会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（例如通过你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项自选技能上成为受训。

你还获得用于安卓体传识的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}泛用专长。

You have a keen interest in the origins of your people. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Crafting and Thievery. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Android Lore.

Shirren Lore.name: 史里仁传承知识 Shirren Lore
Shirren Lore.description:
你适应各种信念的能力，使你掌握了许多文化的知识。你在外交和社群上获得受训熟练等级。如果你本会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你自选的一项技能上成为受训。

你还获得用于希伦知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 通用专长。

Your ability to adapt to various beliefs instills you with knowledge of many cultures. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Diplomacy and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Shirren Lore.

Solar Flare.name: 日炎冲击波 Solar Flare
Solar Flare.description:
你可以制造并维持一团太阳耀斑，但你不能将你的力量调整值加到你的太阳耀斑的伤害掷骰中，也不能获得任何基于你的调谐的额外益处。

You can create and maintain a solar flare, but do not add your Strength modifier to damage rolls with your solar flare or any additional benefits based on your attunement.

Exceptional Reach.name: 超常触及 Exceptional Reach
Exceptional Reach.description:
你可以利用自己的体型与力量，配合又长又重的武器，打击那些原本通常在你攻击范围外的敌人。处于此架势时，当你持用一把需要双手且不具有触及的近战武器时，你可以用一个交互动作，在典型的双手握持与延伸的双手握持之间切换。以你延伸的双手握持方式持用的武器具有10英尺的触及。

You can leverage your size and strength alongside lengthy and heavy weapons to strike foes who would normally be safe from you. While in this stance, when you wield a melee weapon that requires two hands and doesn't have reach, you can change between a typical two-handed grip and an extended two-handed grip using an Interact action. Weapons wielded in your extended two-handed grip have a reach of 10 feet.

Take the Wheel.name: 掌控方向 Take the Wheel
Take the Wheel.description:
你登上并控制一辆相邻的载具。

You Board and Take Control of an adjacent vehicle.

Unstable Flare.name: 不稳定闪焰 Unstable Flare
Unstable Flare.description:
你为自己的太阳耀斑超充能，并向区域内所有敌人同时释放多道爆击。以你的太阳耀斑第一距离增量内任意一点为中心、范围为 @Template[type:burst|distance:15] 的爆发区域内，对每个敌人各进行一次太阳耀斑打击，但每次攻击都带有 –2 的情境减值。每次攻击都计入你的多重攻击减值，但在你完成所有攻击之前，你的减值不会增加。

引力子调谐 你可以在进行这些攻击前或后立即以一个自由动作进行一次疾奔，移动距离最多为你速度的一半。

光子调谐 在你的下个回合开始前，你对本次攻击的每个目标都处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

You supercharge your solar flare and unleash multiple simultaneous blasts at all foes in an area. Make a solar flare Strike with a –2 circumstance penalty against each enemy in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15] centered on any point within your solar flare's first range increment. Each attack counts toward your multiple attack penalty, but you don't increase your penalty until you've made all your attacks.

Graviton-Attuned You can Stride up to half your speed once as a free action immediately before or after making your attacks.

Photon-Attuned You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to each target of this attack until the start of your next turn.

Folded Paradoxes.name: 折叠悖论 Folded Paradoxes
Folded Paradoxes.description:
你的悖论本质已变得多面。进行每日准备时，你可以将自己的一个悖论法术替换为另一种悖论的法术，前提是该悖论会赋予你对应前置悖论技能的受训。

Your paradoxical nature has become multifaceted. During daily preparations, you can replace one of your paradox spells with a spell of another paradox that grants training in the prerequisite paradox skill.

Incredible Initiative.name: 惊奇先攻 Incredible Initiative
Incredible Initiative.description: 你的反应比他人更迅速。你的先攻检定获得+2环境加值。

Spread the Love.name: 传播爱意 Spread the Love
Spread the Love.description:
要求 你正持用一把区域或全自动武器。

你熟练地调整攻击角度，以同等致命的威力骚扰爆炸区域内的两个目标。你进行区域射击或全自动射击时，可选择两个不同的主要目标，而非一个。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

You skillfully line up your attack to harry two targets within your blast zone with equal lethality. You Area Fire or Auto-Fire, selecting two different primary targets, rather than one.

Quick Recognition.name: 迅速认知 Quick Recognition
Quick Recognition.description: 你可以快速认知法术。每轮一次，你能够以自由动作用熟练度达到大师的技能来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.MjQyTcV8Jiv1Jtln]{认知法术 Recognize Spell}。

Master Witchwarper Spellcasting.name: 巫战扭曲者大师施法 Master Witchwarper Spellcasting
Master Witchwarper Spellcasting.description:
你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#master-spellcasting-feat]{大师施法} 的收益。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#master-spellcasting-feat]{Master Spellcasting} benefits.

Go to Ground!.name: 就地卧倒！ Go to Ground!
Go to Ground!.description:
你简洁地指挥你的盟友不惜一切代价寻找掩护。直到你下个回合开始前，你和60英尺内的所有盟友都将任何形式的轻度掩护视为标准掩护。

以身作则 如果你使用了两个动作，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}。60英尺内的任何盟友都可以以反应进行掩护。

You succinctly direct your allies to find cover by any means necessary. You and all allies within 60 feet count any form of lesser cover as standard cover until the start of your next turn.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}. Any allies within 60 feet can Take Cover as a reaction.

Squirt Blood.name: 喷射鲜血 Squirt Blood
Squirt Blood.description:
你从自己的一只眼睛中向30尺内的一个生物喷射血液。目标必须针对你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，其结果如下。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标因这番景象而感到恶心，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

失败 目标被击中面部，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮，或者直到其进行1次交互以擦去血液为止。

大失败 目标被击中面部，陷入目眩2轮，或者直到其进行2次交互以擦去血液为止。

You squirt blood from one of your eyes at a creature within 30 feet. The target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher, with the following results.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is disgusted by the display, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The target is struck in the face, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round, or until they Interact once to clean the blood away.

Critical Failure The target is struck in the face, becoming dazzled for 2 rounds, or until they Interact twice to clean the blood away.

Dragon's Tenacity.name: 巨龙的坚韧 Dragon's Tenacity
Dragon's Tenacity.description:
你的心智与身体拥有龙族先祖的坚韧。你在对抗恐惧效果、睡眠效果，以及会使你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 的效果时，获得 +1 情况加值的豁免检定。对具有这些效果的法术和魔法物品时，此加值提升为 +2。

Your mind and body have the resilience of your dragon progenitors. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against fear effects, sleep effects, and effects that would cause you to become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. This bonus increases to +2 against spells and magic items that have these effects.

Quick Squeeze.name: 迅速穿行 Quick Squeeze
Quick Squeeze.description: 你每轮可以在挤入（Squeeze）狭窄空间时移动5尺（大成功10尺）。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到传奇，你可以在挤入狭窄空间时全速移动。

Star Brand.name: 星痕 Star Brand
Star Brand.description:
需求 你的上一个动作是对一个生物进行了一次成功的太阳耀斑或太阳武器打击。

你用强效的太阳能量为该生物打上烙印，使其保持可见并吸引你的太阳耀斑。当你以被烙印的生物为目标时，你的太阳耀斑的射程增量增加 60 尺。如果被烙印的生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形} 状态，或之后变为隐形，则它改为处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。如果被烙印的生物因任何其他原因已经处于隐蔽状态，则它不再处于隐蔽状态。

该烙印持续 10 分钟，但如果被烙印的生物被杀死，或你对另一个生物施加星辰烙印，则会立即结束。

Requirements Your last action was a successful solar flare or solar weapon Strike against a creature.

You brand the creature with potent solar energy that keeps it visible and attracts your solar flare. When targeting the branded creature, increase the range increment of your solar flare by 60 feet. If the branded creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, or later becomes invisible, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead. If the branded creature was already concealed for any other reason, it's no longer concealed.

The brand lasts 10 minutes but ends immediately if the branded creature is slain or you Star Brand a different creature.

Xenodruid Bond.name: 异种德鲁伊纽带 Xenodruid Bond
Xenodruid Bond.description:
你加入了一个与自然以及物质宇宙生物多样性相关联的异星德鲁伊原始教团，例如异星卫士。选择以下异星德鲁伊教团之一。

教团 动物；技能 动物学识；法术 1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]{Pest Form}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.n5a3t5Qnx5AU8auy]{Carcinization}

教团 植物；技能 植物学识；法术 1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jSRAyd57kd4WZ4yE]{Summon Plant or Fungus}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.hk2mTLH9DIvNqDuS]{Verdant Code}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zCcfPS4y5SrZzU2x]{Plant Form}

教团 病毒；技能 谱系学识；法术 1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QqxwHeYEVylkYjsO]{Detect Poison}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MlpbeZ61Euhl0d60]{Toxic Cloud}

你在所选教团对应的列出技能上变为受训，并将列出的法术作为特征法术加入你的法术列表和法术库。若你已经在该列出技能上受训，则改为在你自选的另一项技能上变为受训。

You join a primal order of xenodruids with ties to nature and the biodiversity of the Universe, such as the Xenowardens. Choose one of the following xenodruid orders.

Order Animal; Skill Animal Lore; Spells 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]{Pest Form}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.n5a3t5Qnx5AU8auy]{Carcinization}

Order Plant; Skill Plant Lore; Spells 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jSRAyd57kd4WZ4yE]{Summon Plant or Fungus}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.hk2mTLH9DIvNqDuS]{Verdant Code}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zCcfPS4y5SrZzU2x]{Plant Form}

Order Viral; Skill Genealogy Lore; Spells 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QqxwHeYEVylkYjsO]{Detect Poison}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MlpbeZ61Euhl0d60]{Toxic Cloud}

You become trained in the listed skill associated with the order and add the listed spells to your spell list and spell repertoire as signature spells. If you were already trained in the listed skill, you instead become trained in another skill of your choice.

Weakening Shot.name: 虚弱射击 Weakening Shot
Weakening Shot.description:
需求 你正持握一把枪。

你瞄准一个生物的四肢或承重附肢以削弱它们。你进行瞄准，然后对你的标记进行一次远程打击。若此次打击命中，该生物在你的下个回合结束前变为由你选择的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}（若为重击命中，则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}）。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You target a creature's limbs or load-bearing appendages to weaken them. You Aim and then make a ranged Strike against your mark. If the Strike hits, the creature becomes your choice of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of your next turn (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} on a critical hit).

Influence.name: 影响 Influence
Influence.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你即将进行一次欺瞒、交涉或威吓检定，但尚未掷骰。

凭借精妙的时机把握和谨慎的措辞，你能够操纵他人的情绪与想法。你对触发的那次欺瞒、交涉或威吓检定掷两次骰，并使用较高的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're about to roll a Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check, but you haven't rolled yet.

With masterful timing and a careful choice of words, you can manipulate the emotions and thoughts of others. You roll the triggering Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check twice, and use the higher result.

Energy Consumption.name: 能量消耗 Energy Consumption
Energy Consumption.description:
你的身体已经适应，能够消耗它用来保护自身的多余能量，使其可以中和其他可能伤害它的能量形式。当你使用你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.hvWJRc0dGF3ivrb6]{Energy Deflection} 反应时，如果该攻击为失败或严重失败，你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值；你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.lmowZWTzJaZfM3bb]{Energy Shielding} 专长（选择一种不同类型的能量）。这些临时生命值和 Energy Shielding 专长持续 1 分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.g1J6DOxBQkacvbyE]{效果：能量摄取}

Your body has adapted over to consume the excess energy it uses to shield itself, allowing it to neutralize other forms of energy that could harm it. When you use your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.hvWJRc0dGF3ivrb6]{Energy Deflection} reaction, if the attack was a failure or critical failure, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level; you also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.lmowZWTzJaZfM3bb]{Energy Shielding} feat (selecting a different type of energy). These temporary Hit Points and the Energy Shielding feat last 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.g1J6DOxBQkacvbyE]{Effect: Energy Consumption}

Infernal Bulwark.name: 炼狱壁垒 Infernal Bulwark
Infernal Bulwark.description:
你所穿戴的护甲获得壁垒特征。你获得重甲的受训熟练度；如果你已经受训，则改为获得重甲的专家熟练度。当你穿戴你的地狱骑士礼装时，它会根据你所选择的地狱骑士修会，赋予你等于你等级一半的抗性。

Armor you wear gains the bulwark trait. You become trained in heavy armor, or become an expert in heavy armor if you were already trained. Your Hellknight regalia grants you resistance equal to half your level when you wear it, determined by your chosen Hellknight order.

Robust Recovery.name: 健体医疗 Robust Recovery
Robust Recovery.description: 你掌握了能够帮助祛病解毒的民间偏方，对这种医术的身体力行使你变得非常坚韧。当你治疗疾病（Treat Disease）和治疗中毒（Treat Poison）时，或者别人对你执行这些行动时，检定成功所提供的环境加值提高到+4，并且，如果接受治疗者的豁免检定结果为成功，改为获得大成功。

Really Get Em!.name: 真给我上！ Really Get Em!
Really Get Em!.description:
你为你的“集火！”训令获得“以身作则”的增益，但你和你的盟友在初次及后续的打击上，伤害都获得+2状态加值。

You gain the Lead by Example benefit for your Get 'Em! directive, except you and your allies get a +2 status bonus to damage on both the initial and subsequent Strikes.

Elusive Target.name: 难以锁定的目标 Elusive Target
Elusive Target.description:
触发条件 以你为目标的打击失败。

你在躲避攻击者时闪身避开。你进行一步移动。

Trigger A Strike targeting you fails.

You move out of the way as you elude your attackers. You Step.

Bring it On!.name: 放马过来！ Bring it On!
Bring it On!.description:
要求 你正持用一把双手武器。

尽管你行事鲁莽，但你十足的勇气仍强化了你的防御。直到你下个回合开始前，你的 AC 承受 –2 状况减值，并获得等于你等级一半的对所有伤害的抗性。若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{护甲风暴} 战斗风格，则此抗性对受压制生物发动的攻击加倍。

Requirements You're wielding a two-handed weapon.

Your sheer bravado bolsters your defenses despite your recklessness. Until the start of your next turn, you take a –2 circumstance penalty to AC and gain resistance to all damage equal to half your level. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{Armor Storm} fighting style, this resistance is doubled against attacks made by suppressed creatures.

Animal Skins.name: 兽皮 Animal Skins
Animal Skins.description:
每天一次，当你变形时，你可以改为获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{动物形态}的效果，升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整），持续1分钟或直到你变回原形，以先发生者为准。

Once per day, when you Change Shape, you can instead gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form}, heightened to half your level rounded up, for 1 minute or until you shift back, whichever comes first.

Ready Reload.name: 准备装填 Ready Reload
Ready Reload.description:
需求 你正持用一把装填值为2或更高的双手远程武器，且你的上一个动作是一次从该武器中消耗了弹药的攻击。

你知道，给武器装填可能是个需要精细操作的过程，但你已掌握了如何在战斗中进行装填，甚至能在仍处于开火动作中的时候就开始装填。你执行两次交互以装填你的武器。与大多数交互动作不同，你无需空闲手也能以这种方式装填你的远程武器。

Requirements You're wielding a two-handed ranged weapon with a reload of 2 or more, and your last action was an attack that expended ammo from the weapon.

You know that reloading a weapon can be a delicate process, but you've mastered how to do so in the middle of combat, starting while still in the act of firing your weapon. You Interact to reload your weapon twice. Unlike most Interact actions, you don't need a free hand to reload your ranged weapon in this way.

Overwhelming Ego.name: 压倒性的自我意识 Overwhelming Ego
Overwhelming Ego.description:
你能以真正具有毁灭性精确度的方式集中你的心灵打击。每当你使用 psychic shock 徒手打击造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。每轮第一次你用 psychic shock 打击命中一个你能通过 thoughtsense 感知到的敌人时，你会对目标额外造成 @Damage[1d4[persistent,mental]] 伤害。

You can focus your mental Strikes with truly devastating precision. Whenever you critically hit using your psychic shock unarmed Strike, you get its critical specialization effect. The first time each round you hit an enemy you can sense with your thoughtsense using a psychic shock Strike, you deal an additional @Damage[1d4[persistent,mental]] damage to your target.

Ferocious Recovery.name: 凶猛恢复 Ferocious Recovery
Ferocious Recovery.description:
当你从死亡边缘挣扎归来时，你会经历一阵肾上腺素激增，使你能够无视重伤。每当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.gD7l0iYrsdKMCmyV]{Shobhad Ferocity} 时，你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续 1 分钟。

When you bounce back from the brink of death, you experience a spike of adrenaline that allows you to ignore grievous injury. Whenever you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.gD7l0iYrsdKMCmyV]{Shobhad Ferocity}, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for 1 minute.

Down to the Wire.name: 紧要关头 Down to the Wire
Down to the Wire.description:
触发条件 你回合中的最后一个动作是一个1动作训令。

你迅速行动，向队友准确示范该怎么做。将你刚刚发出的训令视为2动作版本而非你所使用的1动作版本来结算。

Trigger The final action on your turn is a 1-action directive.

You act quickly to show your teammates exactly how it's done. Resolve the directive you just issued as though it was a 2-action version instead of the 1-action that you used.

Legendary Performer.name: 传奇艺者 Legendary Performer
Legendary Performer.description:
你的名声已传遍整个银河系。凡是在社群中拥有任何已列出技能的生物都听说过你，并且通常对你的态度会比平常好一级，这取决于你的声誉以及该生物的性情。例如，如果你以残酷且苛刻的行为而闻名，生物可能会被你震慑，而不是对你友善。当你以表演进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{谋生} 时，你会吸引到比你所在地点通常所能容纳的更高等级的观众，因为观众会蜂拥而至来看你。例如，著名的社交名流和幽影可能会旅行到偏远港口的一家低档酒吧，只为听你表演。通常，这会将可获得的观众等级提高到与你同级，或提高两个等级，以较高者为准。

Your fame has spread throughout the galaxy. Creatures who have any listed skill in Society have heard of you and usually have an attitude toward you one step better than normal, depending on your reputation and the creature's disposition. For instance, if you're well-known for cruel and demanding behavior, creatures might be intimidated by you, rather than be friendly toward you. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income} with Performance, you attract higher-level audiences than your location would allow, as audiences flock to see you. For instance, famous socialites and spectra might travel to a dive bar in a backwater port to hear you perform. Typically, this increases the audiences available to your level or by two levels, whichever is higher.

Blend In.name: 融入其中 Blend In
Blend In.description:
你知道如何融入人群，成为其中一张令人过目即忘的面孔。当你处于至少有另外10个生物的人群中时，在使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{避免引起注意} 探索活动以判断敌人是否注意到你时，你可以以一次社群检定代替隐匿检定。在定居点中，当你冒充某个非特定个体时，你可以使用 [[/act impersonate skill=society]]{社群} 代替欺瞒。

You know how to blend in and become a forgettable face in the crowd. While in a crowd of at least 10 other creatures, you can roll a Society check in place of a Stealth check when using the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice} exploration activity to see if enemies notice you. While in a settlement, you can use [[/act impersonate skill=society]]{Society} in place of Deception when Impersonating a non-specific individual.

Voidstrong.name: 虚空强健 Voidstrong
Voidstrong.description:
你惊人的韧性让你即使身处太空真空之中也能存活——至少能撑一段时间。你可以屏住呼吸 10 分钟。你获得等于你等级一半的寒冷抗性。

特殊 如果你拥有冰川裔绍巴德传承，你的寒冷抗性改为等于你的等级。如果你拥有异星绍巴德传承，你还会额外获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.aJUXbe9HJVvv0Mxa]{呼吸控制} 通用专长。

Your unbelievable resilience allows you to survive even in the vacuum of space—at least for a while. You can hold your breath for 10 minutes. You have cold resistance equal to half your level.

Special If you have the glacierborn shobhad heritage, your cold resistance is instead equal to your level. If you have the offworld shobhad heritage, you additionally gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.aJUXbe9HJVvv0Mxa]{Breath Control} general feat.

Hobnobber.name: 飞短流长 Hobnobber
Hobnobber.description: 你善于通过交流取得情报。你采取探索行动@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{搜集信息 Gather Information}时只需花费一半时间（通常可将时间降低到1小时）。若你在交涉技能上的熟练度达到大师，并且在搜集信息中骰出大失败，则改为获得失败。你通过搜集信息取得的传言仍然未必是准确的。

Shattering Impact.name: 碎裂冲击 Shattering Impact
Shattering Impact.description:
你将全部力量倾注于用你的太阳武器发动一次攻击，这一击威力强大到足以将武器击碎。用你的太阳武器进行一次打击。此次打击额外造成一个武器伤害骰的伤害。你的太阳武器会碎裂，必须再次显化后才能继续使用。

引力谐调 若命中，目标的速度会受到 –10 尺的状态减值，直到你的下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Ll3uZdiSqaszP3fn]{效果：碎裂冲击}

光子谐调 若命中，你还会额外造成等于你等级一半（向上取整）的持续火焰伤害。

You pour all your effort into making a single attack with your solar weapon that's so powerful it shatters the weapon. Strike with your solar weapon. The Strike deals one additional weapon damage die. Your solar weapon shatters and must be manifested to continue using it.

Graviton-Attuned On a hit, the target takes a –10-foot status penalty to Speed until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Ll3uZdiSqaszP3fn]{Effect: Shattering Impact}

Photon-Attuned On a hit, you additionally deal persistent fire damage equal to half your level, rounded up.

Iomedae's Sword.name: 艾奥梅黛之剑 Iomedae's Sword
Iomedae's Sword.description:
你受过训练，能够与失落的戈拉里昂的古老敌人作战。当你用武器对恶魔、魔鬼、龙类或不死生物造成伤害时，你还会造成具有圣洁特征的持续灵魂伤害，数值等于武器伤害骰的数量。当你用一个没有持续时间、且由法术位施放的法术对这些生物之一造成伤害时，你还会造成具有圣洁特征的持续灵魂伤害，数值等于该法术的环阶。

You've trained to fight the ancient enemies of lost Golarion. When you deal damage to a demon, devil, dragon, or undead with a weapon, you deal persistent spirit damage with the holy trait equal to the number of weapon damage dice. When you deal damage to one of these creatures with a spell cast from a spell slot that does not have a duration, you deal persistent spirit damage with the holy trait equal to the spell's rank.

Keep Them in Your Sights.name: 将他们保持在你的瞄准线内 Keep Them in Your Sights
Keep Them in Your Sights.description:
你总能将一个目标保持为已标记并锁定在瞄具中，即使其移动也是如此。当你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}时，若你的标记位于你武器的第一或第二距离增量内，而非仅在第一距离增量内，你便可获得其加值。

You always keep a target marked and in your sights, even if they move. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim}, the benefits apply if your mark is within your weapon's first or second range increment, rather than only within the first.

Corpsefolk Lore.name: 尸族知识 Corpsefolk Lore
Corpsefolk Lore.description:
成为不死生物让你获得了独特的洞察。你学会说和理解死灵语，并且你在不死生物学识上变为受训；这是一项技能，使你能够 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 来辨识所有种类的不死生物，而不受亚种影响。到5级时，你在不死生物学识上的熟练度提升为专家。

Becoming undead has given you unique insight. You learn how to speak and understand the Necril language, and you become trained in Undead Lore, a skill that allows you to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about all kinds of undead regardless of subtype. At 5th level, your proficiency in Undead Lore increases to expert.

Hero's Perseverance.name: 英雄的坚毅 Hero's Perseverance
Hero's Perseverance.description:
如同那些激励你的英雄一样，你鼓舞自己，在死亡本身面前坚持下去。当你使用英雄般的最后抵抗时，你获得等同于你等级两倍的临时生命值，持续1分钟，而非等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续1分钟。

Like the heroes who inspire you, you rally yourself to persevere against death itself. When you use Heroic Last Stand, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to twice your level for 1 minute, rather than equal to your level for 1 minute.

Network Attunement.name: 网络调谐 Network Attunement
Network Attunement.description:
目标 120尺内任意数量与你建立纽带的盟友

感受到你们强大共同纽带所涌现的力量，你暂时将自己的活力网络调谐至与你盟友的灵性波长一致。每名盟友都可以立刻选择将至多20点生命值从你的活力网络转移到自己体内，或将自身至多20点生命值转移到该活力网络中。

Target any number of your bonded allies within 120 feet

Feeling the surge of your strong communal bond, you temporarily attune your vitality network to the spiritual wavelength of your allies. Each ally can immediately choose to transfer up to 20 Hit Points from your vitality network into themselves or up to 20 Hit Points from themselves into the vitality network.

Gifted Mentor.name: 天赋导师 Gifted Mentor
Gifted Mentor.description:
你很擅长指导他人。每当你成功协助一名盟友时，你将原本会给予他们的境况加值提高 +1；若为严重成功，则提高 +2。每当一名盟友 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{跟随专家}，且他们选择跟随的专家是你时，他们基于你的熟练度获得的技能检定境况加值提高 +1。

You have a knack for mentoring others. Whenever you successfully Aid an ally, you increase the circumstance bonus that you would grant them by +1, or by +2 on a critical success. Whenever an ally @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follows the Expert}, and the expert they choose to follow is you, the circumstance bonus they gain to their skill check based on your proficiency is increased by +1.

Terrain Expertise.name: 地形专家 Terrain Expertise
Terrain Expertise.description:
你在穿越某一类地形方面的经验，让你在这样做时充满自信。你在以下一种地形中的生存检定获得+1环境加值，于你选择此专长时选定：水域、极地、沙漠、森林、山地、平原、天空、太空、沼泽或地下。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长，每次选择一种不同的地形。

Your experience in navigating a certain type of terrain makes you supremely confident while doing so. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Survival checks in one of the following types of terrain, chosen when you select this feat: aquatic, arctic, desert, forest, mountain, plains, sky, space, swamp, or underground.

Special You can select this feat more than once, choosing a different type of terrain each time.

Tactical Bully.name: 战术恶霸 Tactical Bully
Tactical Bully.description:
要求 你的上一动作是一次成功的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}。

你运用自己的体型与力量，在战场上推挤并调整敌人的位置。你尝试对你成功推撞过的生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}，即使目标已不在你的触及范围内也是如此。若你拥有尾巴攻击，则你的绊摔检定获得 +2 处境加值。

Requirements Your last action was a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}.

You use your size and strength to push and position your enemies around the battlefield. You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} the creature you successfully Shoved, even if the target is no longer in your reach. If you have a tail attack, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Trip attempt.

Black Hole.name: 黑洞 Black Hole
Black Hole.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 你处于引力谐调状态。

你将注意力集中在周围的引力上，模仿黑洞将物质拉向自己。选择30英尺内任意数量的生物。每个受影响的生物受到 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level / 2)d8)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage,forced-movement] 伤害，并且必须针对你的职业DC进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并被向你方向拖拽5英尺。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，被向你方向拖拽15英尺，并且在你当前回合结束前，你下一次对其进行的近战攻击检定中，它处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，被向你方向拖拽30英尺，并被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

等级（+2） 伤害提高1d8。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements You're graviton-attuned.

You concentrate on the gravitational forces around you, pulling matter toward you in emulation of a black hole. Select any number of creatures within 30 feet. Each affected creature takes @Damage[(floor(@actor.level / 2)d8)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage,forced-movement] damage and must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is pulled 5 feet toward you.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is pulled 15 feet toward you, and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the next melee attack that you attempt against it before the end of your current turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is pulled 30 feet toward you, and is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Level (+2) Increase the damage by 1d8.

Stubborn Persistence.name: 顽强毅力 Stubborn Persistence
Stubborn Persistence.description: 人类以能够经受最严苛试炼的能力而闻名。当你将要陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}时，尝试一次@Check[flat|dc:17]检定。若成功，你就不会陷入疲乏。若你未能解决产生疲乏状态的根本原因，比如缺乏休息，则你必须在一段间隔时间（由GM决定）后再次尝试该纯骰检定，直至你在检定失败或者解决了根本原因为止。

Speed of Thought.name: 思维速度 Speed of Thought
Speed of Thought.description:
你已磨练出更精湛的念动力机动能力，从而能够实现更强的速度爆发。你的飞行速度增加5英尺。此外，你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.r1bUsyDwcwuN3MUG]{念动力冲刺}动作。

You have honed your telekinetic maneuverability, enabling greater bursts of speed. Increase your fly Speed by 5 feet. In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.r1bUsyDwcwuN3MUG]{Telekinetic Sprint} action.

Nimble Crawl.name: 灵巧爬行 Nimble Crawl
Nimble Crawl.description: 你可以极为迅速地@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Tj055UcNm6UEgtCg]{爬行 Crawl}，至多达到你速度的一半，而非正常的5尺速度。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到大师，你可以全速爬行；若达到传奇，你在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}期间不会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Large Reach.name: 大型触及 Large Reach
Large Reach.description:
利用你的大型体型，你可以延伸你的触及来攻击更远处的目标。当你持用一把需要双手且不具有触及的近战武器时，你可以用一个交互动作在典型的双手握持和延伸的双手伸展之间切换。以延伸伸展方式持用的武器获得10英尺的触及。

Using your large size, you can extend your reach to attack targets that are farther away. When you wield a melee weapon that requires two hands and doesn't have reach, you can change between a typical two-handed grip and an extended two-handed stretch using an Interact action. Weapons wielded in your extended stretch gain a reach of 10 feet.

Soldier Dedication.name: 士兵献身 Soldier Dedication
Soldier Dedication.description:
你获得威吓技能的受训熟练度。如果你已经受训于威吓，则改为在你选择的一项技能中获得受训熟练度。你的最大和负重 Bulk 上限增加 2。你获得士兵职业 DC 的受训熟练度。

你获得轻甲和中甲的受训熟练度。如果你已经受训于轻甲和中甲，则你也获得重甲的受训熟练度。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在任意一种护甲类型上获得专家或更高的熟练度时（但不包括无甲防御），你也会在此专长赋予你的护甲类型上获得相同熟练度。如果你拥有一项职业特性，使你在无甲防御上获得专家熟练度，且你的等级为 13 级或更高，你也会在此专长赋予你的护甲类型上成为专家。

You become trained in Intimidation. If you were already trained in Intimidation, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. Increase your maximum and encumbered Bulk limits by 2. You become trained in soldier class DC.

You become trained in light armor and medium armor. If you already were trained in light armor and medium armor, you gain training in heavy armor as well. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in any type of armor (but not unarmored defense), you also gain that proficiency in the armor types granted to you by this feat. If you have a class feature that grants you expert proficiency in unarmored defense and you're 13th level or higher, you also become an expert in the armor types granted to you by this feat.

Relentless Aim.name: 无情瞄准 Relentless Aim
Relentless Aim.description:
你会小心瞄准自己的射击，让子弹从坚固表面上跳弹。判定你是否对自己已瞄准的目标具有效果线时，你可以选择你武器第一个射程增量内的一个坚固表面，让你的射击先跳弹再击中目标；效果线从所选的跳弹表面而非你所在的位置来判定。如果该生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉} 状态，GM 仍会秘密进行一次平检来判定你是否射失，但该平检变为 DC 5。

You take careful aim with your shots so that your bullets ricochet off solid surfaces. When determining if you have line of effect to a target you've aimed at, you can choose one solid surface within your weapon's first range increment to ricochet your shot to hit your target; determine line of effect from the chosen ricochet surface, rather than your location. If the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, the GM still rolls a flat check in secret to see if you missed, but the flat check becomes DC 5.

Supernatural Soothing.name: 超自然抚慰 Supernatural Soothing
Supernatural Soothing.description:
当言语失效、怒火升腾时，你会先稳定自己的情绪，然后以抚慰心神的灵能平静释放出你安宁的思绪。每天一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.b515AZlB0sridKSq]{Calm} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF]{Clear Mind} 作为天生神秘法术施放，其升阶至你等级的一半，向上取整。

When words fail and tempers flare, you center your emotions and then release your peaceful thoughts in a soothing, psychic calm. Once per day, you can cast either @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.b515AZlB0sridKSq]{Calm} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF]{Clear Mind} as an occult innate spell, heightened to half your level rounded up.

Convert Tempo.name: 转换节奏 Convert Tempo
Convert Tempo.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你在战场上舞动，以魔法将你身体的动能转化为魔法潜能。进行等同于你所用动作数的若干次大步移动。你的活力网络每进行一次大步移动，便恢复 10 点生命值。

Frequency once per minute

You dance across the battlefield, magically converting your body's kinetic energy into magical potential. Stride a number of times equal to the actions you used. Your vitality network regains 10 Hit Points per Stride you took.

Enlightened Rivener.name: 启明铆接匠 Enlightened Rivener
Enlightened Rivener.description:
你已经掌控了自己的怒火，并且可以无限期地维持裂河者变形。你的体型永久变为大型，且你的触及增加 5 英尺。你可以每小时使用一次“进入裂河者状态”，而不是每天一次。当你进入裂河者状态时，你的体型和触及不会增加，你不会陷入迟钝状态，并且当变形结束时，你不会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}。你仍然会获得伤害加值。

You've mastered your anger and can maintain the rivener transformation indefinitely. You permanently become Large, and your reach increases by 5 feet. You can use Enter Rivener State once per hour, rather than once per day. When you Enter Rivener State, your size and reach don't increase, you don't become stupefied, and you don't become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} when the transformation ends. You still gain the bonus to damage.

Bargain Hunter.name: 二道贩子 Bargain Hunter
Bargain Hunter.description:
你可以使用外交 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{谋生}，花费你的日子四处搜寻便宜货并转售获利。你也可以专门花时间为某件物品寻找极佳的便宜货；其运作方式如同你使用外交进行谋生，但你不是获得金钱，而是以相当于你本可赚取的金钱数额的折扣购入该物品；如果你赚取的收入等于或超过其价格，你便可免费获得该物品。最后，如果你在1级角色创建期间选择“Bargain Hunter”，你在游戏开始时会额外拥有20信用点。

You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income} using Diplomacy, spending your days hunting for bargains and reselling at a profit. You can also spend time specifically seeking a great bargain on an item; this works as if you were using Earn Income with Diplomacy, except instead of gaining money, you purchase the item at a discount equal to the money you would have gained, gaining the item for free if your earned income equals or exceeds its cost. Finally, if you select Bargain Hunter during character creation at 1st level, you start play with an additional 20 credits.

Expansive Verse.name: 宽宏诗句 Expansive Verse
Expansive Verse.description:
你的歌谣变得更加复杂，并染上了更强大的魔法。每天在你进行每日准备时，你可以从神秘法术列表中选择一个普通的2环法术。在你下一次每日准备之前，你可以将该法术作为一个神秘先天法术施放一次。

Your songs become more complex and tinged with greater magic. Each day during your daily preparations, you can choose one common 2nd-rank spell from the occult spell list. You can cast this spell as an occult innate spell once before your next daily preparations.

Uncontrollable.name: 无法控制 Uncontrollable
Uncontrollable.description:
你拒绝让任何人控制你。每当你尝试对会使你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{受控} 状况的法术或效果进行一次意志豁免时，掷两次并采用较高的结果。如果你会在自己的回合开始时处于困惑或受控状态，你可以立即尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:5]。若成功，你会与那种精神控制对抗，于你的回合结束前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}，而非违背自己的意志行动。如果你在此次检定中掷出 20，你会立即结束困惑或受控状况。

You refuse to let anyone control you. Whenever you attempt a Will save against a spell or effect that would give you the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition, roll twice and use the higher result. If you would start your turn confused or controlled, you can immediately attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5]. On a success, you fight that mental control, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} until the end of your turn rather than acting against your will. If you roll a 20 on this check, you immediately end the confused or controlled condition.

Coronal Flare.name: 日冕耀斑 Coronal Flare
Coronal Flare.description:
环境中的太阳能量在你的攻击中显现。你获得一种星辰打击徒手攻击，使用它需要一只空闲手，除非你已显化能量之翼。它是一种灵巧、灵敏的徒手攻击，属于烈焰武器组，造成1d6火焰伤害。

Ambient solar energy manifests in your attacks. You gain a solar strike unarmed attack that requires a free hand to use unless you have manifested energy wings. This is an agile, finesse, unarmed attack in the flame weapon group that deals 1d6 fire damage.

Watch Out.name: 当心 Watch Out
Watch Out.description:
触发条件 一个生物以 60 英尺内的一名盟友为目标进行一次攻击，且你能看见攻击者和你的盟友。

你向盟友发出警告信号，使其对抗该触发攻击的 AC 获得 +2 处境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8eqdNadBEcXMvjng]{效果：当心}

Trigger A creature targets an ally within 60 feet with an attack, and you can see both the attacker and your ally.

You signal a warning to your ally, granting them a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8eqdNadBEcXMvjng]{Effect: Watch Out}

Seedling Reincarnation.name: 幼苗转生 Seedling Reincarnation
Seedling Reincarnation.description:
当你死亡时，一粒种子会从你的身体中发芽。这株幼苗是你的一个复制体，但不具备你的任何记忆，不过它对你的人际关系有模糊的印象，可能会对你的盟友感到亲近，或对你的敌人抱有不信任。经过 1d6 周，这株幼苗会成长为一个微型的你，具有相同的属性和能力（但体型为小型而非中型）。经过 1d6 个月，你会长到原本的体型。一株新的幼苗会在你体内于 10 年间萌生；如果你在那之前再次死亡，这株幼苗也会一同死去。

When you die, a seed sprouts from your body. The seedling is a copy of you lacking any of your memories, though it has vague memories of your relationships and might feel fond of your allies or distrustful of your enemies. Over 1d6 weeks, the seedling grows into a miniature version of you with the same attributes and abilities (but Small instead of Medium). Over 1d6 months, you grow to your original size. A new seedling germinates in you over 10 years; if you die again before then, the seedling dies too.

Double Draw.name: 双重拔枪 Double Draw
Double Draw.description:
卡萨萨，斯基特曼德 你对手臂的日常运用让你能够快速移动手持装备。你进行两次交互，每次可用于拔出、收起或交换你所持有的物品，总共最多两次。

绍巴德 你可以高效地在四条手臂之间移动手持装备。你进行两次交互，每次可用于拔出、收起或交换你所持有的物品。

Kasatha, Skittermander Routine use of your arms allows you to quickly move held equipment around. You Interact twice to draw, stow, or swap items you have up to twice.

Shobhad You can efficiently move held equipment between your four arms. You Interact twice, using each to draw, stow, or swap items you have.

Improv Workshop.name: 即兴工坊 Improv Workshop
Improv Workshop.description:
你的舞台经验教会了你几乎能在任何情况下随机应变，而且你也知道如何将自己的见解分享给他人。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9jGaBxLUtevZYcZO]{未受训即兴发挥} 通用专长。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QQSO7DzeNKCWf9XW]{再来一次，更有感觉} 动作。

Your stage experience has taught you how to improvise in just about any situation, and you know how to share your insight with others. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9jGaBxLUtevZYcZO]{Untrained Improvisation} general feat. In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QQSO7DzeNKCWf9XW]{Once More with Feeling} action.

Infused Spell.name: 灌注法术 Infused Spell
Infused Spell.description:
你将生命能量注入你的魔法之中，以强化你法术的目标。选择一个法术，并将你的活力网络总值减少一个等于该法术环阶两倍的数值。如果你的下一个动作是施放该法术，则你以该法术为目标的一名缔盟盟友会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，直到你下个回合结束，并且只能将该额外动作用于Strike和Stride动作。

You infuse your magic with vital energy that empowers the target of your spell. Pick a spell and reduce your vitality network's total by a number equal to twice the spell's rank. If your next action is to cast that spell, one bonded ally you target with that spell becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} until the end of your next turn and can use the extra action for only Strike and Stride actions.

Concentrated Shot.name: 蓄能射击 Concentrated Shot
Concentrated Shot.description:
需求 你正持用一把自动武器。

集中火力使你能够锁定一个敌人并立即将其摧毁。使用一把自动武器进行一次远程打击，消耗三倍弹药，并获得 +4 环境加值的伤害。该加值在11级时提高至 +6，在15级时提高至 +8。

Requirements You're wielding an automatic weapon.

Focusing your fire enables you to target an enemy for immediate destruction. Make a ranged Strike with an automatic weapon, expending three times the ammo and gaining a +4 circumstance bonus to damage. This bonus increases to +6 at 11th level and +8 at 15th level.

Bone Shards.name: 骨片 Bone Shards
Bone Shards.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你折断自己身体的一部分，向敌人掷出锋利的骨片。你获得一种骨片徒手攻击，造成1d8穿刺伤害。你的骨片属于投射物组，并具有区域（锥形）特性，射程为15英尺。此效果持续1分钟。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You break off a piece of your anatomy and fling sharp bone shards at your enemies. You gain a bone shards unarmed attack that deals 1d8 piercing damage. Your bone shards are in the projectile group and have the area (cone) trait with a range of 15 feet. This effect lasts 1 minute.

Plant Rumor.name: 植物传闻 Plant Rumor
Plant Rumor.description:
触发条件 你察觉到一个生物正试图对另一个生物的意志DC进行一次使用欺骗、交涉或威吓的检定。

你介入谈话，巧妙地损害他人的名声，并让其论点显得没那么有说服力。被该触发检定针对的生物在此次检定中其意志DC获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.7tSTaSqLPYwPzbMx]{效果：散布谣言}

Trigger You perceive a creature attempting a check using Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation against another creature's Will DC.

You intercede in a conversation to subtly damage another's reputation and make their argument less compelling. The creature targeted by the triggering check gains a +2 circumstance bonus to its Will DC for that check.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.7tSTaSqLPYwPzbMx]{Effect: Plant Rumor}

Meyel's Melody.name: 梅耶尔的旋律 Meyel's Melody
Meyel's Melody.description:
神圣的节奏在你的血液中脉动，而你的生命便是这乐曲。你获得表现检定的 +2 状态加值。此外，你可以使用表现来[[/act create-a-diversion skill=performance]]{制造牵制}、[[/act demoralize skill=performance]]{威吓}，或[[/act make-an-impression skill=performance]]{留下印象}。如果你在休息时聆听音乐，你会额外恢复等同于你等级数量的生命值。

Divine rhythm pulses through your blood, and your life is the music. You gain a +2 status bonus to Performance checks. In addition, you can use Performance to [[/act create-a-diversion skill=performance]]{Create a Diversion}, [[/act demoralize skill=performance]]{Demoralize}, or [[/act make-an-impression skill=performance]]{Make an Impression}. If you listen to music while resting, you regain a number of additional Hit Points equal to your level.

No Cause for Alarm.name: 无需惊慌 No Cause for Alarm
No Cause for Alarm.description:
你尝试平定他人的惊恐情绪。尝试一次@Check[diplomacy]检定，与@Template[emanation|distance:10]范围内处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}状态的生物的意志DC相比较。这些生物都会在1小时内暂时免疫此效果。

大成功 生物的惊惧值降低2。

成功 生物的惊惧值降低1。

Cloaking Field.name: 隐形力场 Cloaking Field
Cloaking Field.description:
频率 每小时一次

你通过专长或一点技术巧思，扭曲自身周围的光线与背景振动，使自己能够避免被侦测。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形} 状态，持续10分钟。这会使你对所有生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉} 状态，不过生物仍可尝试找到你，从而使你改为处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽} 状态。若你使用敌对动作，则该效果会在该敌对动作完成后结束。当你的 Cloaking Field 生效时，安保摄像头、哨戒装置及其他监控设备都无法侦测到你，除非它们拥有通常能看穿隐形的特殊感官。

Frequency once per hour

You bend light and background vibrations around yourself, either through expertise or a bit of technological ingenuity, allowing you to avoid detection. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} for 10 minutes. This makes you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though creatures can attempt to find you, making you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} instead. If you use a hostile action, the effect ends after that hostile action is completed. While your Cloaking Field is active, security cameras, sentries, and other surveillance don't detect you unless they possess special senses that normally see through invisibility.

Song of My People.name: 吾族之歌 Song of My People
Song of My People.description:
你演奏一首带有超自然悲痛色彩的哀伤挽歌，迫使一名失落同伴的灵魂回到其身体中。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life} 施放一次，作为一个7环原始先天法术。它获得听觉特征。

You perform a mournful dirge tinged with supernatural grief that compels the soul of a lost comrade to return to its body. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life} once per day as a 7th-rank primal innate spell. It gains the auditory trait.

Uncanny Comprehension.name: 超凡领悟 Uncanny Comprehension
Uncanny Comprehension.description:
你观察周遭环境，立刻让自己的思维向四周隐藏的答案以及它们留下的线索敞开。你立即进行至多三次回忆知识动作。若你拥有任何通常会在你回忆知识时触发的特殊能力或自由动作，则你不能将它们用于这些动作。第一次在这些回忆知识尝试中使用你通过额外学识选择的一个传说技能时，你为对应的回忆知识检定掷两次并取较高结果。该次回忆知识检定获得幸运特征。

You take in your surroundings, instantly opening your mind up to the answers hidden all around you and the clues their presence has left behind. You instantly use up to three Recall Knowledge actions. If you have any special abilities or free actions that would normally be triggered when you Recall Knowledge, you can't use them for these actions. The first time one of these attempts to Recall Knowledge uses a Lore skill you selected with Additional Lore, you roll the associated Recall Knowledge check twice and use the higher result. That Recall Knowledge check gains the fortune trait.

Confabulator.name: 天花乱坠 Confabulator
Confabulator.description:
你谎上加谎。将目标因你先前对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{声东击西} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎} 而获得的环境加值从 +4 降低为 +2。若你的欺瞒达到大师，将该加值降低为 +1；若你达到传奇，你的目标则完全不会获得这些加值。

You pile lie upon lie. Reduce the circumstance bonus a target gains for your previous attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie} to it from +4 to +2. If you're a master in Deception, reduce the bonus to +1, and if you're legendary, your targets don't get these bonuses at all.

Unseen Tides.name: 无形浪潮 Unseen Tides
Unseen Tides.description:
卡洛-马霍伊永不停息的潮汐奔涌于你的血液之中，无论你去往何处，都能感受到它们的牵引。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{行动无拘}，作为一个你每天可以施放一次的4环原始先天法术。

The surge of Kalo-Mahoi's ever-present tides courses in your blood, and you can feel their pull wherever you go. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Unfettered Movement} as a 4th-rank primal innate spell that you can cast once per day.

Offensive Subroutine.name: 攻击子单元 Offensive Subroutine
Offensive Subroutine.description: 纳米机械增强你的攻击能力。当你尝试进行攻击检定时，你可以选择激活@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.JS24EjgLYcHB9E3T]{纳米机械激增 Nanite Surge}，而不是当你尝试技能检定时。你在触发该反应的攻击检定时获得+1状态加值。

Well of Vitality.name: 活力之井 Well of Vitality
Well of Vitality.description:
你的盛放蕴藏着惊人的生命活力能量。每天一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life} 作为原初先天法术施放。

Your flowering is a reservoir of incredible vitality energy. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life} as a primal innate spell.

Follow-Up Fire.name: 火力跟进 Follow-Up Fire
Follow-Up Fire.description:
频率 每轮一次

要求 你正持用两把枪，且你的上一个动作是一次未命中的远程打击。

如果一开始没有成功，那就再开一枪。使用你当前持用、且先前未用来射击的武器进行第二次远程打击。此次打击不计算前次攻击造成的多重攻击减值，但会计入之后的多重攻击减值。

Frequency once per round

Requirements You're wielding two guns, and your last action was a ranged Strike that missed.

When at first you don't succeed, shoot again. Make a second ranged Strike using the weapon you're wielding that you didn't fire with. This Strike doesn't count the multiple attack penalty from the prior attack but does count toward future multiple attack penalties.

Two Minds, One Soul.name: 双心一魂 Two Minds, One Soul
Two Minds, One Soul.description:
触发 你、你的联结伙伴，或你和你的联结伙伴双方将要针对一个可能施加 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 或受控状态的法术或效果进行一次意志豁免检定。

需求 你和你的联结伙伴彼此位于60英尺内，且双方都是自愿的。

你和你的联结伙伴是同一灵魂的两半，分别交织于不同的身体之中。你和你的联结伙伴都进行此次触发的意志豁免检定。触发生物（或多个触发生物）采用较高的结果。你和你的联结伙伴都会受到该触发法术或效果的影响，即使它通常只会影响你们中的一方。

Trigger You, your bonded partner, or both you and your bonded partner would roll a Will saving throw against a spell or effect that could impose the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} or controlled condition.

Requirements You and your bonded partner are within 60 feet of one another, and are willing.

You and your bonded partner are two halves of the same spirit, entwined together in different bodies. Both you and your bonded partner roll the triggering Will saving throw. The triggering creature (or creatures) uses the higher result. Both you and your bonded partner are affected by the triggering spell or effect, even if it would normally only affect one of you.

Electrical Shielding.name: 电能护盾 Electrical Shielding
Electrical Shielding.description:
你的身体与电流攻击绝缘。你获得等同于你等级一半的电击抗性。此外，你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.mrcKklMzhRG4WcbH]{引导电流}反应。

Your body is insulated from electrical attacks. You gain electricity resistance equal to half your level. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.mrcKklMzhRG4WcbH]{Redirect Current} reaction.

Transcended Existence.name: 超越存在 Transcended Existence
Transcended Existence.description:
你对自身连接的理解超越了其他凡人的极限，使你得以获得最强大的法术。你获得一个额外的10环法术位。

Your understanding of your connection transcends the limits of other mortals, granting you access to the most powerful spells. You gain an additional 10th-rank spell slot.

Lasting Coercion.name: 持久威胁 Lasting Coercion
Lasting Coercion.description: 你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{胁迫 Coerce}某人成功时，对方服从命令的时间上限提高到一星期，具体时长依然由GM判断。若你在威吓技能上的熟练度达到传奇，时间上限提高到一个月。

Supernova.name: 超新星 Supernova
Supernova.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 你处于光子谐调状态。

你释放积蓄的能量，使其如同孕育与终结恒星的星体事件般喷发。你可以选择影响 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{15-foot} 或 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的生物。每个受影响的生物受到 @Damage[(@actor.level)d8[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害，且必须针对你的职业 DC 进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:solarian|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] 豁免。如果你选择30-foot选项，则改为造成 @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1轮。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并失明1分钟。

等级（+1） 伤害增加1d8（若为30-foot选项则为1d6）。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements You're photon-attuned.

You unleash your pent-up energy, causing it to erupt like the stellar events that birth and end stars. You can choose to affect creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{15-foot} or @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. Each affected creature takes @Damage[(@actor.level)d8[fire]|options:area-damage] damage and must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:solarian|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save against your class DC. If you choose the 30-foot option, you instead deal @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is blinded for 1 minute.

Level (+1) Increase the damage by 1d8 (or 1d6 for the 30-foot option).

Starfinder Provisions.name: 《星际探索者补给品》 Starfinder Provisions
Starfinder Provisions.description:
寻星者协会会为你提供补给，以协助你进行冒险。每天当你在聚居地进行每日准备时，一架寻星者协会的配送无人机会送来两件物品等级不高于你等级一半的消耗品。若你身处偏远地区，或由 GM 自行裁定，该无人机可能无法送达。若你收到后续配送，而你手中仍留有上一次配送的物品，则你必须先将任何未使用的消耗品归还给无人机，才能领取新一批补给。

The Starfinder Society provides you with provisions to aid you on your adventures. Each day during your daily preparations while you're in a settlement, a Starfinder Society delivery drone delivers two consumable items with an item level no higher than half your level. The drone might not be able to arrive if you're in a remote location or based on GM's discretion. If you receive a subsequent delivery and have items remaining from the prior delivery, you must return any unused consumables to the drone before receiving new stock.

Universal Translator.name: 通用翻译器 Universal Translator
Universal Translator.description:
通过激活你的奥术感官器官，并分析祖先记忆与奥术知识，你能够与各种各样的人、动物，甚至植物交流。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{与动物交谈}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qvwIwJ9QBihy8R0t]{与植物交谈} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY]{通晓语言}，作为3环奥术先天法术。你每天可以施放每个法术一次。

By activating your arcane sensory organ and analyzing ancestral memories and arcane lore, you can communicate with all kinds of people, animals, and even plants. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{Speak with Animals}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qvwIwJ9QBihy8R0t]{Speak with Plants}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY]{Translate} as 3rd-rank arcane innate spells. You can cast each spell once per day.

Percussive Maintenance.name: 敲打式维护 Percussive Maintenance
Percussive Maintenance.description:
需求 你正持有一个具有故障状态的科技物品。

你试图通过把物品猛砸在坚硬表面上来修理它。进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:10]。

大成功 将故障状态减少 2。

成功 将故障状态减少 1。

Requirements You're holding a tech item that has the glitching condition.

You try to repair an item by smashing it against a hard surface. Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:10].

Critical Success Reduce the glitching condition by 2.

Success Reduce the glitching condition by 1.

Sidestep.name: 侧滑瞬步 Sidestep
Sidestep.description:
触发条件 以你为目标的一次打击的攻击检定失败。

你敏捷地闪开一次攻击，让这一击继续打向你身旁的生物。你将这次攻击转向一个由你选择的生物，该生物必须与你相邻，且位于触发此次攻击的攻击的射程或触及范围内。攻击者对新目标重骰此次打击的攻击检定。

Trigger The attack roll for a Strike targeting you fails.

You deftly step out of the way of an attack, letting the blow continue to the creature next to you. You redirect the attack to a creature of your choice that's adjacent to you and within range or reach of the triggering attack. The attacker rerolls the Strike's attack roll against the new target.

Climbing Claws.name: 攀爬猫爪 Climbing Claws
Climbing Claws.description:
你可以伸出爪子来帮助自己攀爬。你获得等同于你陆地速度的攀爬速度。

You can extend your claws to aid you in climbing. You gain a climb Speed equal to your land Speed.

Quick Unlock.name: 迅速开锁 Quick Unlock
Quick Unlock.description: 你能够以1个动作@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁 Pick a Lock}，而非正常情况的2个。

Fascinating Performance.name: 迷魂表演 Fascinating Performance
Fascinating Performance.description:
在你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{演出 Perform}时，将检定结果与一个观众的意志DC相比较。若你的检定胜出，目标被你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂 Fascinated}1轮。若观众正处于需要立即集中注意的场合，比如战斗当中，你必须取得大成功才能将其迷魂，且本次演出行动获得失能特征。你必须在检定之前选择要迷魂的生物，之后目标将在1小时内暂时免疫此效果。

若你在表演技能上的熟练度达到专家，你可以迷魂至多四个观众；若达到大师，可以迷魂至多十个观众；若达到传奇，可以同时迷魂任意数量的观众。

Triune's Chosen.name: 三贤一体的天选者 Triune's Chosen
Triune's Chosen.description:
三贤一特意选择了你成为一名棱光信徒。你将全码圣主珍藏于心，并珍视它传授给你的数据。你在宗教和三贤一学识上变为受训。你熟悉脉冲拳套，且在判定你的熟练度时，脉冲拳套视为一种简易武器。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在简易武器上获得专家或更高的熟练度时，你也会同时获得脉冲拳套的该熟练度。

Triune chose you specifically to become a prismeni. You hold the All-Code close in your heart and cherish the data it's imparted upon you. You become trained in Religion and Triune Lore. You have familiarity with the pulse gauntlet, and for the purpose of determining your proficiency, the pulse gauntlet is a simple weapon. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in simple weapons, you also gain that proficiency in the pulse gauntlet.

Shifter's Feint.name: 变形者佯攻 Shifter's Feint
Shifter's Feint.description:
你突然改变自己的外貌，为你的下一次攻击创造破绽。变形并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻}。你进行用于佯攻的欺瞒检定时，会获得等同于你变形时尺寸差距等级数的境况加值（如果你小或大一个尺寸则为+1，小或大两个尺寸则为+2，依此类推）。无论你的检定结果如何，每个观察到你变形的生物都会在1分钟内暂时免疫“变形者佯攻”。

You suddenly change your appearance to create an opening for your next attack. Change Shape and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint}. You gain a circumstance bonus to your Deception check to Feint equal to the number of steps between your sizes when you Change Shape (+1 if you are one size smaller or larger, +2 if you are two sizes smaller or larger, and so on). Regardless of the results of your check, each creature who observes you Change Shape is temporarily immune to Shifter's Feint for 1 minute.

Dead Nerves.name: 麻木神经 Dead Nerves
Dead Nerves.description:
由于没有神经末梢，你可以让身体顶着危险和障碍物前进，而不必在意碰撞造成的淤伤。疾行两次。在此次移动期间的一次，如果你穿过一扇门、窗、墙，或在其旁边结束移动，或经过类似的障碍物旁边，你可以尝试进行一次运动学检定，以 [[/act force-open options=dead-nerves]] 该障碍物，并对此次掷骰获得 +1 处境加值。若失败，你的移动立即结束。

Without nerve endings, you can put your body up against hazards and obstacles without caring about bruising. Stride twice. Once during this movement, if you pass through or end adjacent to a door, window, wall, or similar obstacle, you can attempt an Athletics check to [[/act force-open options=dead-nerves]] that obstacle with a +1 circumstance bonus to the roll. On a failure, your movement immediately ends.

Ready For Trouble.name: 准备好迎接麻烦了 Ready For Trouble
Ready For Trouble.description:
在经历了太多次与致命机关和设有陷阱的遗迹的遭遇后，你吸取了教训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.FnAzJ4DIRPJJaGv7]{危险感知} 专长。你可以使用地城探索学识来解除来自外星或具有历史意义地点的陷阱。

You learned your lesson after one-too-many encounters with deadly mechanisms and rigged ruins. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.FnAzJ4DIRPJJaGv7]{Danger Awareness} feat. You can use Delve Lore to disarm traps from alien or historically significant locations.

Mystic Dedication.name: 秘学者献身 Mystic Dedication
Mystic Dedication.description:
选择一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.68j2yQ0lamRuR6oF]{连接}。你在该连接的技能上成为受训；如果你已经受训，则改为在你自选的一项技能上成为受训。你不会从所选连接中获得任何其他能力。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvyqzqiWsIrBZt6h]{秘学纽带}职业特性。

你像秘学者一样施放法术，并获得“施放法术”活动。你获得一个法术库，其中包含两个常见戏法；这些戏法来自你的连接所赋予的法术列表、你的连接所赋予的法术，或你学会或发现的该传统的任何其他戏法。你在法术攻击调整值和法术DC统计上成为受训。你用于秘学者原型法术施法的关键属性是感知，且这些法术属于你连接传统的秘学者法术。

Choose a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.68j2yQ0lamRuR6oF]{Connection}. You become trained in the connection's skill or, if you were already trained, you become trained in a skill of your choice. You don't gain any other abilities from your choice of connection. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvyqzqiWsIrBZt6h]{Mystic Bond} class feature.

You cast spells like a mystic and gain the Cast a Spell activity. You gain a spell repertoire with two common cantrips from the spell list granted by your connection, from the spells granted by your connection, or any other cantrips of that tradition you learn or discover. You're trained in the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics. Your key spellcasting attribute for mystic archetype spells is Wisdom, and they are mystic spells of your connection's tradition.

Stellar Rush.name: 星际猛冲 Stellar Rush
Stellar Rush.description:
你以一股恒星能量爆发向前猛冲，轻松切入战斗中心。疾行两次。在这些移动期间，你的速度获得 +10 尺的环境加值。

引力调谐 当你完成这些疾行后，你 15 尺内的敌人必须尝试一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|options:area-effect,forced-movement] 豁免。若失败，它们会被直接拖拽向你，并在可能的情况下于与你相邻的方格结束移动。你来选择这些敌人被移动的顺序。

光子调谐 当你完成这些疾行后，你以自己为中心在一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:15] 内创造一个光子场。直到你下个回合开始前，位于光子场外的生物对于位于场内的生物而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

You rush forward with a blast of stellar energy, getting into the thick of combat with ease. Stride twice. You gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed during these moves.

Graviton-Attuned When you finish your Strides, enemies within 15 feet of you must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|options:area-effect,forced-movement] save against your class DC. On a failure, they're pulled directly toward you, ending in an adjacent square if possible. You select the order these enemies are moved.

Photon-Attuned When you finish your Strides, you create a photon field in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15] centered on you. Until the start of your next turn, creatures outside the photon field are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to creatures inside the field.

Basic Leadership.name: 基础领导力 Basic Leadership
Basic Leadership.description:
你获得一个你自选的1级或2级特使专长。

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level envoy feat of your choice.

Damoritosh's Grip.name: 戴莫力图斯之握 Damoritosh's Grip
Damoritosh's Grip.description:
你已成为与戴莫力图斯的圣徒比肩的传奇士兵，无需在你的火器的破坏力与个人武装的荣耀之间做出选择。你可以单手挥舞双手武器。

You have become a legendary soldier on par with the saints of Damoritosh and need not choose between the destructive power of your firearm and the honor of your personal armament. You can wield two-handed weapons in one hand.

Corrosive Venting.name: 腐蚀性排气 Corrosive Venting
Corrosive Venting.description:
你可以在排放气体时控制其腐蚀性。当你排放气体时，将你的散发范围增大至10英尺。你可以选择让你排放的气体具有腐蚀性。如果你这么做，任何进入该散发区域或在该区域内开始其回合的非飞螅族生物都会受到 @Damage[3d6[acid]] 伤害，并需以你的职业 DC 或法术 DC（取较高者）进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免。若重度失败，该生物还会额外受到 @Damage[1d4[persistent,acid]] 伤害。到17级时，酸性伤害提高2d6，持续性酸性伤害提高1d4。

You can control causticity as you vent your gases. When you Vent Gas, increase the area of your emanation to 10 feet. You can choose to make the gas you vent caustic.
