If you do, any non-barathu creature that enters the emanation or starts its turn in the area takes @Damage[3d6[acid]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher. On a critical failure, a creature additionally takes @Damage[1d4[persistent,acid]] damage. At 17th level, the acid damage increases by 2d6, and the persistent acid damage increases by 1d4.

Soldier's Resiliency.name: 士兵的坚韧 Soldier's Resiliency
Soldier's Resiliency.description:
你每拥有一个士兵原型职业专长，就额外获得3点生命值。随着你继续选择士兵原型职业专长，你也会继续以这种方式获得额外的生命值。

You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each soldier archetype class feat you have. As you continue selecting soldier archetype class feats, you continue to gain additional Hit Points in this way.

Hammer the Nail.name: 钉下钉子 Hammer the Nail
Hammer the Nail.description:
你调整齐射的角度，以最大化弹药对生物身体的冲击。将你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.fSqUeSAFhvBfq4sE]{推撞射击} 推动生物的距离提高为：成功时 5 尺，失败时 10 尺，严重失败时 20 尺。此外，在严重失败时，目标还会被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{伏地}。

You adjust the angle of your barrage to maximize the ammunition's impact on creatures' bodies. Increase the distance creatures are pushed by your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.fSqUeSAFhvBfq4sE]{Shoving Shot} to 5 feet on a success, 10 feet on a failure, and 20 feet on a critical failure. In addition, on a critical failure, the target is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Restorative Shapeshifting.name: 再生变形 Restorative Shapeshifting
Restorative Shapeshifting.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发条件 你使用变形。

你用新形态的要素更新并强化自己的身体。你获得等同于你等级一半的临时生命值（最低为1点），持续至你下个回合结束。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger You use Change Shape.

You renew and reinforce your body with elements of your new form. You gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to half your level (minimum 1) that last until the end of your next turn.

Switch Target.name: 切换目标 Switch Target
Switch Target.description:
触发条件 你当前已对其 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 的生物获得了 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 状态。

需求 你正持握一把枪械。

当你的目标倒下时，你会立刻锁定下一个目标。你对另一个生物进行瞄准。

Trigger The creature you've currently @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aimed} at gains the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} condition.

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

As your target falls, you immediately home in on the next. You Aim at a different creature.

Predict Outcome.name: 预测结果 Predict Outcome
Predict Outcome.description:
频率 每小时一次

你花费 10 分钟，通过窥视不同时间线或分析概率模拟，向自己敞开多元宇宙的奥秘。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]{Augury} 的效果，但你只会得知前方的危险；任何“good”的结果改为“nothing”，而“mixed”的结果改为“bad”。

如果你的奥秘学或神秘学达到传奇，你只需 1 分钟即可预测结果。

Frequency once per hour

You spend 10 minutes opening yourself to the mysteries of the multiverse by peering across different timelines or analyzing probability simulations. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]{Augury}, except you learn only about the dangers ahead; any results of "good" are instead "nothing," and results of "mixed" are instead "bad."

If you're legendary in Arcana or Occultism, you take only 1 minute to Predict Outcome.

Master Plan.name: 总体规划 Master Plan
Master Plan.description:
在你进行每日准备期间，你可以与至多五名盟友一起研讨谋略。之后，你可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ygvLiQmneqp1pjWb]{新计划} 反应，迅速就你的计划向这些盟友逐一提出建议。

During your daily preparations, you can review stratagems with up to five allies. Later, you can quickly advise each of these allies on your schemes using the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ygvLiQmneqp1pjWb]{New Plan} reaction.

Take 'Em Alive!.name: 活捉他们！ Take 'Em Alive!
Take 'Em Alive!.description:
你激励盟友在不造成任何生命损失的情况下击倒敌人。直到你下个回合开始前，你和你的盟友可以为你们的武器攻击附加非致命特征（且不承受通常的减值），并为你们造成伤害且不具有死亡或虚能特征的法术附加非致命特征。

以身作则 如果你用了两个动作，以一次非致命攻击对一个目标进行打击。若成功，你获得等同于你魅力调整值的伤害状态加值。若重击成功，30尺内的一名盟友可以以反应对该目标进行一次非致命攻击的打击。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.fa4T1oR8S0lF5888]{效果：活捉他们}

You urge your allies to take down your enemies without incurring any loss of life. Until the beginning of your next turn, you and your allies can add the nonlethal trait to your attacks with weapons (without taking the normal penalty), and to your spells that deal damage and don't have the death or void trait.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Strike a target with a nonlethal attack. On a success, you gain a status bonus to damage equal to your Charisma modifier. On a critical success, an ally within 30 feet can Strike the target as a reaction using a nonlethal attack.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.fa4T1oR8S0lF5888]{Effect: Take 'Em Alive}

Reflexive Hypotheses.name: 反身性假说 Reflexive Hypotheses
Reflexive Hypotheses.description:
无论你多么专注于其他事务，你的部分心神都忍不住会对周围环境保持好奇。

你在一个关于特定环境、行星、位面或聚居地的学识技能上成为受训。你在使用调查活动时，可以以完整速度移动。

从以下选一项：奥秘学、自然、神秘学、宗教，或社群。进行任何其他探索活动时，你也会调查周围环境，但仅限于使用所选技能以及你拥有的任何学识技能来回忆知识。

No matter how engrossed you are in other tasks, part of your mind can't help but stay curious about your surroundings.

You become trained in a Lore skill about a specific environment, planet, plane, or settlement. You can move at full Speed while using the Investigate activity.

Choose one of the following: Arcana, Nature, Occultism, Religion, or Society. While using any other exploration activity, you also Investigate your surroundings, though only to Recall Knowledge using the chosen skill and any Lore skills you have.

Intimidating Taunt.name: 威吓嘲讽 Intimidating Taunt
Intimidating Taunt.description:
你毫不留情地嘲讽你的敌人，迫使其承认你是迫在眉睫的威胁。进行一次 @Check[intimidation|against:will] 检定，并将结果与60英尺内一名敌方生物的意志DC进行比较。此动作具有听觉（特征）或视觉（特征），取决于你如何嘲讽你的敌人。

大成功 你的嘲讽刺痛难当。直到你的下个回合开始前，该生物采取的任何敌对行动都必须将你作为目标，或将你包含在区域内；否则，该生物在这些敌对行动的攻击检定和豁免DC上承受 –2 处境减值。

成功 如大成功，但只有该生物采取的第一个敌对行动会受到影响。

失败 该生物不受影响。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.B0ZDwyk4qOr7hp4e]{效果：威吓嘲讽}

You taunt your enemy mercilessly, forcing them to acknowledge you as an immediate threat. Attempt an @Check[intimidation|against:will] check and compare it to the Will DC of one enemy creature within 60 feet. This action has the auditory trait or visual trait, depending on how you taunt your enemy.

Critical Success Your taunts sting hard. Until the start of your next turn, any hostile actions that the creature takes must include you as a target or include you in the area; otherwise, the creature takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and to its save DC for those hostile actions.

Success As critical success, but only the first hostile action that the creature takes is affected.

Failure The creature is unaffected.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.B0ZDwyk4qOr7hp4e]{Effect: Intimidating Taunt}

Run, Cowards!.name: 快跑，懦夫们！ Run, Cowards!
Run, Cowards!.description:
你用武器来协助驱赶惊慌失措的敌人。对你的区域射击或自动射击的豁免检定大失败的敌人会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃离} 状态，持续 1 轮。

You use your weapon to help corral panicked enemies. An enemy who critically fails a save against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Prop Closet.name: 道具储藏间 Prop Closet
Prop Closet.description:
你已经用道具复制武器练习得足够多，因此能在真正的战斗中借鉴这些经验。选择一种常见的先进或军用武器。为了熟练项的目的，你获得对此武器的熟悉度，并且你将这种先进武器视为军用武器，或将军用武器视为简易武器。

在5级时，每当你用此武器造成一次重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

You've practiced enough with prop replica weapons that you can draw on these experiences in a real fight. Select a common advanced or martial weapon. You have familiarity with this weapon for the purposes of proficiency, and you treat this advanced weapon as a martial weapon, or martial weapon as a simple weapon.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with this weapon, you get its critical specialization effect.

Space Pirate Dedication.name: 太空海盗奉献 Space Pirate Dedication
Space Pirate Dedication.description:
作为一名寻求掠夺战利品的太空航行者，你在驾驶上变为受训；如果你已受训，则改为变为专家。你熟悉所有弯刀、连枷、刺剑，以及具有拆毁特征的武器。就熟练度而言，将其中任何属于军用武器的武器视为简易武器，而将任何属于先进武器的武器视为军用武器。如果你至少为专家，你获得该武器的重击专精效果。

此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.8zWFGKRXg1SxIwFH]{Holo-Roger} 动作。

As a plunder-seeking spacefarer, you become trained in Piloting, or become an expert in it if you were already trained. You have familiarity with all cutlasses, flails, rapiers, and weapons with the razing trait. For the purposes of proficiency, treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons. If you are at least expert, you gain that weapon's critical specialization effect.

Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.8zWFGKRXg1SxIwFH]{Holo-Roger} action.

Ward Medic.name: 医护长 Ward Medic
Ward Medic.description: 你曾在大型病房学习过，能够同时照料多个病患，满足他们的所有需求。当你使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病 Treat Disease}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势 Treat Wounds}时，你可以同时治疗至多两个目标。若你在医疗技能上的熟练度达到大师，可以同时治疗至多四个目标；若达到传奇，可以同时治疗至多八个目标。

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你与一具在过去一天内死亡的小型或更大体型生物的尸体相邻。

你的不死生物新陈代谢以某些方式进化了，使你能够通过食用最近死去者来获得少许滋养与治疗。这可能是吃掉他们的血肉、将他们的骨骼与你的骨骼融合，或其他一些你的同伴可能会觉得很骇人的行为的组合。不管怎样，这都会滋养并恢复你。你每拥有1级，就恢复1d6生命值（@Damage[(@actor.level)d6[healing]]）。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You are adjacent to the corpse of a Small or larger creature who has died in the last day.

Your undead metabolism has evolved in ways that allow you to gain some small measure of sustenance and healing from the consumption of the recently dead. This might be the act of eating their flesh, fusing their bones with yours, or a combination of other activities that your companions might find to be gruesome. Regardless, it nourishes and replenishes you. You regain 1d6 Hit Points for every level you have (@Damage[(@actor.level)d6[healing]]).

Drop Tail.name: 断尾 Drop Tail
Drop Tail.description:
触发条件你将被降至 0 生命值。

需求你有一条尾巴。

在一种令人尴尬的绝望之举中，你牺牲自己的尾巴来保住性命。你改为降至 1 生命值，而不是 0 生命值，并且不会获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 或受伤状态。你的尾巴脱落下来并疯狂地抽动，分散敌人的注意力。你进行一次 Stride，最多移动至你的速度，且这次移动不会触发反应。你的尾巴会在 24 小时内重新长出。在尾巴重新长出期间，你没有尾巴，你的速度减少 5 尺，并且你的特技检定承受 –2 状态减值。

Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Requirements You have a tail.

In an embarrassing act of desperation, you sacrifice your tail to save your life. You're reduced to 1 Hit Point, rather than 0 Hit Points, and don't gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} or wounded conditions. Your tail falls off and flails around wildly, distracting your foes. You Stride up to your Speed, and don't trigger reactions due to this movement. Your tail grows back over 24 hours. While your tail is regrowing, you don't have a tail, your Speed is reduced by 5 feet, and you take a –2 status penalty to Acrobatics checks.

Void Blood.name: 虚空之血 Void Blood
Void Blood.description:
在你血管中搏动的体液灌注着虚空能量，它保护你的身体与灵魂，使其免受同样邪恶力量的侵害。你获得等同于你等级一半的虚空抗性。

The ichor pulsing through your veins is infused with void energy, and it protects your body and soul from the same sinister power. You have void resistance equal to half your level.

Kill Steal.name: 抢人头 Kill Steal
Kill Steal.description:
触发条件 一名盟友在其回合结束时，对一个生物命中两次或更多次，或对一个生物造成重击。

需求 你正持握一把枪。

你对你的盟友正集中攻击的敌人快速射出一枪。你对触发此反应的盟友所命中的生物执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对该生物进行一次远程打击。

Trigger An ally ends their turn after hitting a creature two or more times or critically hitting a creature.

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You fire a quick shot at a foe your ally is focusing their attacks on. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} at the creature your triggering ally hit and then make a ranged Strike against that creature.

Offensive Defense.name: 进攻性防御 Offensive Defense
Offensive Defense.description:
需求 你的护甲中装有力场升级，或正持有一个科技护盾。

你过载一个护盾，制造出将附近敌人击退的震荡爆发。你使用你的力场或护盾进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击}，在你所占据的一个方格角上为中心，造成一个以你自身为排除对象的 @Template[burst|distance:5]{5英尺半径爆发}，造成 @Damage[2d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage,forced-movement] 伤害。此次攻击具有追踪 +1特征，且属于护盾武器组。豁免失败的生物会被向后推开5英尺。如果你拥有主要目标职业特性，则主要目标打击使用你的力场或护盾。

特殊 如果你使用的是卓越（型）或更高的力场或护盾，则追踪特征提升为 +2；如果是终极（型）或更高，则提升为 +3。同样地，如果它是菁英（型）或更高，伤害提升为 @Damage[3d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage,forced-movement|shortLabel]；如果是完美（型），则提升为 @Damage[4d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage,forced-movement|shortLabel]。

Requirements You have a force field upgrade in your armor or are holding a tech shield.

You overcharge a shield to create a concussive blast that repulses nearby foes. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} using your force field or shield, dealing @Damage[2d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage,forced-movement] damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5]{5-foot radius burst} excluding yourself centered on one corner of a square you occupy. This attack has the tracking +1 trait and is in the shield weapon group. A creature that fails its save is pushed back 5 feet. If you have the primary target class feature, the primary target Strike uses your force field or shield.

Special If you're using a force field or shield that's superior or better, the tracking trait increases to +2, or +3 if ultimate or better. Likewise, if it's elite or better, the damage increases to @Damage[3d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage,forced-movement|shortLabel], or @Damage[4d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage,forced-movement|shortLabel] if paragon.

Aerial Master.name: 空中大师 Aerial Master
Aerial Master.description:
你凭借自身力量翱翔天际的能力无与伦比。你的飞行速度增加 10 英尺。

Your ability to fly through the skies under your own power is unparalleled. Your fly Speed increases by 10 feet.

Baleful Presence.name: 恶意存在 Baleful Presence
Baleful Presence.description:
你已经学会将自己一生与不安亡灵生涯中积累的愤怒与恶意同时释放到多个敌人身上，在自身周围制造出一种强大的效果。你可以选择将 Baleful Gaze 作为一个 2 动作活动来使用，而非 1 动作。如此一来，Baleful Gaze 获得神术（特征），失去视觉（特征），并影响 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的每个活体生物，而非单个活体生物。

You've learned to unleash the anger and malice you've built up over the course of your life and restless undeath against multiple foes at once, creating a potent effect around yourself. You can choose to use Baleful Gaze as a 2-action activity, rather than 1. When you do, Baleful Gaze gains the divine trait, loses the visual trait, and affects each living creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30], rather than a single living creature.

Vector Reflector.name: 矢量反射器 Vector Reflector
Vector Reflector.description:
触发条件 一名 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 生物以一次打击对你造成伤害。

你的护甲吸收了对手攻击中的部分动能。你获得对触发伤害的抗性，数值等于你等级的一半（若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{Armor Storm} 战斗风格，则改为等于你的等级）。若触发该效果的生物在你的触及范围内，则尝试进行一次运动检定以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} 该生物。

Trigger A @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} creature damages you with a Strike.

Your armor absorbs some of the kinetic energy of your opponent's attack. You gain resistance equal to half your level against the triggering damage (or equal to your level if you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{Armor Storm} fighting style). If the triggering creature is within reach, attempt an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} it.

Covering Flare.name: 掩护照明弹 Covering Flare
Covering Flare.description:
你在逼近敌人时用你的太阳耀斑掩护自己。你进行两次Stride；在此次移动期间的任意时点，你都可以进行一次太阳耀斑Strike。若命中，目标还会受到压制，直到其下个回合结束。

You use your solar flare to cover yourself as you close in on your foes. You Stride twice; at any point during this movement, you can make a solar flare Strike. On a hit, the target is also suppressed until the end of its next turn.

Bullet Fever.name: 子弹热 Bullet Fever
Bullet Fever.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 你受到会使你降至 0 生命值的伤害。

你陷入狂热，而不是接受败北。你不会陷入昏迷，而是生命值降至 1，获得等于你等级一半的临时生命值，持续 1 分钟，受伤值增加 1，并进入持续 1 分钟的狂热状态。你不能自愿结束你的狂热状态。当你处于由 Bullet Fever 导致的狂热状态时，你会受到以下影响。

  • 你自动对所有目标施加精密伤害，如同你正在瞄准一般。
  • 你的 AC 承受 –1 状况减值。
  • 你的意志豁免承受 –1 状况减值。

  • 你不能执行不具有攻击或移动特征的动作，但为你的武器进行装填除外。

当 Bullet Fever 结束时，你失去来自 Bullet Fever 的所有剩余临时生命值。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You take damage that would reduce you to 0 Hit Points.

You fly into a frenzy instead of accepting defeat. Instead of being knocked out, you're reduced to 1 Hit Point, gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to your half you level for 1 minute, increase your wounded value by 1, and enter a frenzy that lasts for 1 minute. You can't voluntarily end your frenzy. While in a frenzy caused by Bullet Fever, you're affected as follows.

  • You automatically apply precision damage to all targets as though you were Aiming.
  • You take a –1 circumstance penalty to AC.
  • You take a –1 circumstance penalty to Will saves.

  • You can't take actions that don't have the attack or move traits except to Reload your weapons.

When Bullet Fever ends, you lose any remaining temporary Hit Points from Bullet Fever.

Barricade.name: 路障 Barricade
Barricade.description:
你利用附近的物品、废料或残骸匆忙搭起一道路障。该路障为你和另一名盟友提供次级掩护，不过你可以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} 以将此增益提升为标准掩护。该路障很脆弱，并会在你的下一回合结束时散架。

You hastily create a barricade using nearby items, junk, or debris. The barricade provides lesser cover for you and one other ally, though you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} to increase this benefit to standard cover. The barricade is flimsy and falls apart at the end of your next turn.

Underwater Combatant.name: 水下战斗员 Underwater Combatant
Underwater Combatant.description:
你已学会如何在水下有效地挥使几乎任何武器。你在水下进行近战挥砍或钝击打击时，不会承受 –2 减值。你的远程攻击不会因处于水下而受到影响。你可以在水下使用造成火焰伤害的武器。

You've learned how to wield nearly any weapon effectively while underwater. You don't take the –2 penalty for making melee slashing or bludgeoning Strikes while underwater. Your ranged attacks aren't affected by being underwater. You can use weapons that deal fire damage underwater.

Untrained Improvisation.name: 即兴发挥 Untrained Improvisation
Untrained Improvisation.description: 你学会了如何处理超出自己能力范围的状况。你在未受训技能检定上的熟练度加值等于你的等级-2。达到5级后，熟练度加值变为你的等级-1，达到7级后，等于你的完整等级。本专长不会让你能够使用技能的受训行动。

Bizarre Magic.name: 怪异魔法 Bizarre Magic
Bizarre Magic.description: 无论你是否能够施展异能法术，都可以在施法时加入奇诡的变化。对于你施放的法术，认知法术和辨识魔法的DC提高5点。

Basic Mysticism.name: 基础秘术 Basic Mysticism
Basic Mysticism.description:
你获得一个1级或2级秘学者专长。

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level mystic feat.

Pinpoint Thoughtsense.name: 精准思维感应 Pinpoint Thoughtsense
Pinpoint Thoughtsense.description:
你能够以惊人的精确度追踪周围的心智。你的心灵感应感知变为精确感官。

You can track the minds around you with astonishing precision. Your thoughtsense becomes a precise sense.

Legendary Negotiation.name: 传奇交涉者 Legendary Negotiation
Legendary Negotiation.description: 你可以在不利情况下以极快速度陈诉利害关系。你对敌人尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{建立印象 Make an Impression}，然后@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求 Request}以让他们取消当前行动，进行谈判。你在这些交涉检定上承受-5减值。检定DC通常为目标生物的意志DC，但GM可能会根据情况作出调整。无论个人意愿如何，某些生物可能不会停战，即便是已同意停战的生物，最终也仍然可能认为你的论点缺乏说服力，因而再度动武。

Expanded Senses.name: 扩展感官 Expanded Senses
Expanded Senses.description:
你知道，在危险情境中求生时，分秒必争。为此，你经过了长期而刻苦的训练，以提升你天生的感官，并将其推至能力的极限。选择你拥有的一种不精确感官，例如听觉或嗅觉。所选不精确感官的范围增加至120英尺。

特殊：你可以多次选择此专长。每次如此做时，选择一种你拥有的不同不精确感官。

You know that when it comes to surviving a dangerous situation, every moment counts. To that end, you've trained long and hard to improve your natural senses, pushing them to the limits of their ability. Select an imprecise sense you have, such as hearing or scent. The range of the selected imprecise sense increases to 120 feet.

Special: You can select this feat more than once. Each time you do, select a different imprecise sense you possess.

Life Bond.name: 生命联结 Life Bond
Life Bond.description:
你可以与动物和植物交谈。你召唤的任何活体生物都被视为你的羁绊的一部分，并且不计入你羁绊中生物的最大数量。在你的每日准备期间，从以下法术中选择一个：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{召唤动物}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.lpT6LotUaQPfinjj]{召唤元素生物}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.hs7h8f4Z1ZNdUt3s]{召唤精类}，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jSRAyd57kd4WZ4yE]{召唤植物或真菌}。你将所选法术加入你的法术 repertory 和招牌法术，直到你的下一次每日准备。

You can speak with animals and plants. Any living creature you summon is considered part of your bond and doesn't count against the maximum number of creatures in your bond. During your daily preparations, choose one of the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.lpT6LotUaQPfinjj]{Summon Elemental}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.hs7h8f4Z1ZNdUt3s]{Summon Fey}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jSRAyd57kd4WZ4yE]{Summon Plant or Fungus}. You add the selected spell to your spell repertoire and signature spells until your next daily preparations.

Advanced Atmospheric Flight.name: 先进大气飞行 Advanced Atmospheric Flight
Advanced Atmospheric Flight.description:
你已经更擅长在大气层内使用你的能量之翼。@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.wZyBTTRM2BjC93gg]{大气飞行} 不再具有频率，并且可以随意使用任意次数。当你使用大气飞行时，你的翅膀会保持显现，直到你花费一个单动作主动将其解除。

You've become more adept at using your energy wings within an atmosphere. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.wZyBTTRM2BjC93gg]{Atmospheric Flight} no longer has a frequency and can be used as often as desired. When you use Atmospheric Flight, your wings remain manifested until you spend a single action to purposefully dismiss them.

Bond Spell.name: 联结法术 Bond Spell
Bond Spell.description:
触发 30尺内的一名盟友施放一个法术。

当你的盟友施放法术时，你通过你们之间的纽带激荡能量，以以下一种方式强化其法术。

  • 如果其法术造成伤害或恢复生命值，且没有持续时间，你令该法术获得等同于其环阶的状态加值，用于伤害或治疗。

    @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.WNCJ8ZgkqU7LhJNk]{效果：纽带法术}

  • 如果其法术未受任何法术塑形效果影响，则将你所知的任意一个法术塑形专长的效果应用于该法术。该法术塑形专长必须是能够应用于该触发法术的专长，且你必须能够使用它（例如，如果该法术塑形专长每天只能使用有限次数）。

Trigger An ally within 30 feet Casts a Spell.

You pulse energy through your bond as your ally casts a spell, empowering their spell in one of the following ways.

  • If their spell deals damage or heals Hit Points and doesn't have a duration, you grant that spell a status bonus to damage or healing equal to its rank.

    @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.WNCJ8ZgkqU7LhJNk]{Effect: Bond Spell}

  • If their spell doesn't have a spellshape effect applied to it, apply the effects of any one spellshape feat you know to the spell. The spellshape feat must be one that can be applied to the triggering spell, and you must be able to use it (for instance, if the spellshape feat is usable only a limited number of times per day).

Quick Repair.name: 迅速修理 Quick Repair
Quick Repair.description: 对你而言，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{修理 Repair}行动失去探索特征，只需花费1分钟而非正常情况的10分钟。若你在手艺技能上的熟练度达到大师，只需花费3个动作；若达到传奇，只需1个动作。

Encyclopedic Recall.name: 百科回忆 Encyclopedic Recall
Encyclopedic Recall.description:
频率 每轮一次

你迅速进行计算，并同时交叉比对多个主题。你立即进行至多三次回忆知识动作。若你拥有任何通常会在你回忆知识时触发的特殊能力或自由动作，你不能将它们用于这些动作。13级时，你改为可以进行至多四次回忆知识动作。17级时，你改为可以进行至多五次回忆知识动作。

Frequency once per round

You swiftly calculate and cross-reference several subjects at once. You instantly use up to three Recall Knowledge actions. If you have any special abilities or free actions that would normally be triggered when you Recall Knowledge, you can't use them for these actions. At 13th level, you can instead use up to four Recall Knowledge actions. At 17th level, you can instead use up to five Recall Knowledge actions.

Sarcesian Lore.name: 萨瑟蝶人知识 Sarcesian Lore
Sarcesian Lore.description:
你已将族人的教诲铭记于心。你获得奥秘和驾驶的受训熟练等级。若你本会自动在这些技能中的一项上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你自选的一项技能上成为受训。你还获得关于萨瑟蝶人知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 通用专长。

You've taken the lessons of your people to heart. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Arcana and Piloting. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Sarcesian Lore.

Sensitive Antennae.name: 敏感触角 Sensitive Antennae
Sensitive Antennae.description:
你的触角上覆盖着细小的绒毛，使其比大多数人的触角对灵能振动更为敏感。你获得30英尺范围的思想感知，作为一种模糊感官。这意味着你可以使用触角来判断一个生物是否位于范围内。你的思想感知只能侦测会思考的生物，因此，无法思考或以其他方式免疫精神效果的生物，无法通过你的思想感知被察觉。这并不会赋予你读取或理解其思想的能力。

在9级时，这会变为一种不精确感官。

Your antennae are covered in fine hairs that make them more sensitive to psychic vibrations than most. You gain thoughtsense as a vague sense with a range of 30 feet. This means you can use your antennae to determine if a creature is within range. Your thoughtsense detects only thinking creatures, so a creature that's unthinking or otherwise immune to mental effects can't be perceived using your thoughtsense. This doesn't give you the ability to read or understand their thoughts.

At 9th level, this becomes an imprecise sense.

Glimpse the Pattern.name: 窥见模式 Glimpse the Pattern
Glimpse the Pattern.description:
你现在看见了；你明白了。你的力量伴随着代价，而你的命运并不属于你自己。你是某种更伟大事物的一部分——是浩瀚而复杂的格局中一个行动着的棋子，执行着那些早已谋划、并被预见了两次的命令。你受制于更高的力量，而它对你另有安排。

如果你的天生法术属于神圣，你可以每天施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sX2o0HH4RjJDAZ8C]{Divine Decree}，将其作为一个7环神圣天生法术。

如果你的天生法术属于秘奥，你可以每天施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind}，将其作为一个7环秘奥天生法术。

You see now; you understand. Your powers come with a price, and your fate is not your own. You're a part of something greater—a pawn in motion within a vast and complex pattern, executing commands long planned and twice foreseen. You're beholden to a higher power, and it has plans for you.

If your innate spells are divine, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sX2o0HH4RjJDAZ8C]{Divine Decree} once per day as a 7th-rank divine innate spell.

If your innate spells are occult, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind} once per day as a 7th-rank occult innate spell.

Toughness.name: 健壮 Toughness
Toughness.description: 在支撑到极限前，你的身体可以经受比大多数人更沉重的损伤。你的最大生命值提高等于你的等级的数值。你的恢复检定DC降低1点。

Cyclone.name: 旋风 Cyclone
Cyclone.description:
需求 你并非身处真空。

你从成群捕猎的蝠鲼那里获得灵感，制造出一道涡流，在出击前将敌人拉向你。你原地旋转，并可以对你20英尺内的所有生物（如果你和目标都在水中，则为40英尺内）分别尝试一次针对其强韧DC的 @Check[athletics|against:fortitude] 检定。若成功，该生物被移动到与你相邻的位置。若大成功，它还会被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。若此检定结算后某个生物仍在你的近战触及范围内，你可以对该生物进行一次打击。

Requirements You aren't in a vacuum.

You take inspiration from schools of hunting manta rays, creating a vortex to draw in your foe before striking. You spin in place and can attempt an @Check[athletics|against:fortitude] check against the Fortitude DC of all creatures within 20 feet of you (or 40 feet if you and the target are in water). On a success, that creature is moved adjacent to you. On a critical success, it's also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If a creature is within melee reach of you after this check is resolved, you can Strike that creature.

Tech Familiarity.name: 科技熟悉 Tech Familiarity
Tech Familiarity.description:
你对计算机、机器以及其他技术设备有着直觉性的理解。你获得计算机和制作的受训熟练度。如果你本会自动获得这些技能之一的受训熟练度（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为获得你自选的一项技能的受训熟练度。

You have an intuitive understanding of computers, machines, and other technological devices. You become trained in Computers and Crafting. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

Breach.name: 突破口 Breach
Breach.description:
你像一头跃出海面的鲸鱼般将自己向上推进，随后以雷霆万钧之势重重砸落。@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃}。当你落地时，你周围 10 英尺内的所有对手都必须成功通过一次对抗你的职业 DC 或法术 DC（取较高者）的 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，否则便会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

特殊 如果你拥有“快速跳跃”专长，则在使用“跃击”时，你可以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳高} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远}。

You propel yourself up like a whale breaching the surface of the ocean, then crash back down with thunderous force. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}. When you land, all opponents within 10 feet of you must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher, or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Special If you have the Quick Jump feat, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump} when using Breach.

Four-Armed Climber.name: 四臂攀爬者 Four-Armed Climber
Four-Armed Climber.description:
你额外的肢体使你在垂直移动时格外娴熟。你获得 10 尺的攀爬速度。若你在失重环境中使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.FF5KgZHj345s2moq]{蹬离}，且你未在使用中的手没有持握任何物品，你会漂浮最多等同于你速度的距离，而非你速度的一半。

特殊 若你拥有冰川裔绍巴德传承，此专长赋予的攀爬速度改为等同于你速度的一半。若你拥有异界绍巴德传承，则你在失重环境中蹬离时，速度获得 +5 尺的状态加值。

Your additional limbs make you exceptionally adept at vertical movement. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet. If you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.FF5KgZHj345s2moq]{Push Off} in zero gravity while your inactive hands are not holding anything, you float up to your Speed instead of half your Speed.

Special If you have the glacierborn shobhad heritage, the climb Speed granted by this feat is instead equal to half your Speed. If you have the offworld shobhad heritage, you gain a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed when you Push Off in zero gravity.

Ikeshti Lore.name: 异客蜥人知识 Ikeshti Lore
Ikeshti Lore.description:
阿基顿上的生活很艰难，但多亏了你的育巢监护者，你学会了生存所需的技能。你在制造和生存上变为受训。如果你本会自动在这些技能中的一项上变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上变为受训。你还获得用于异客蜥人学识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 泛用专长。

Life on Akiton is hard, but thanks to your brood-minder, you learned the skills necessary to thrive. You become trained in Crafting and Survival. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Ikeshti Lore.

Widen Area.name: 扩大区域 Widen Area
Widen Area.description:
需求 你正持用一把区域武器或自动武器。

你调整你的区域武器，以影响更多目标。如果你的下一个动作是在爆发、锥形或线形范围内进行区域射击或自动射击，或者你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xND8wnEdnGSq84kn]{Whirling Swipe}，则你增加该次攻击的区域。对通常半径至少为10英尺的爆发，其半径增加5英尺（半径更小的爆发不受影响）。对通常长度为15英尺或更短的锥形或线形，其长度增加5英尺；对更大的锥形或线形，其长度增加10英尺。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

You set up your area weapon to affect more targets. If the next action you use is to Area Fire or Auto-Fire in a burst, cone, or line, or if you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xND8wnEdnGSq84kn]{Whirling Swipe}, you increase the area of that attack. Add 5 feet to the radius of a burst that normally has a radius of at least 10 feet (a burst with a smaller radius isn't affected). Add 5 feet to the length of a cone or line that's normally 15 feet or smaller, and add 10 feet to the length of a larger cone or line.

Charming Liar.name: 蛊惑人心 Charming Liar
Charming Liar.description: 凭借魅力，你能够将欺骗对象笼络为你的支持者。当你用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎 Lie}行动取得大成功时，目标对你的态度改善一级，如同你用交涉技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{建立印象 Make an Impression}成功。每次交流，这个效果只会生效一次，如果你用相同结果对多个目标取得大成功，则选择一个生物的态度得到改善。你的谎言必须要透露看似重要的信息、鼓吹自己的地位、或巴结奉承对方，无关紧要的谎言无法起到作用。

Basic Gunner.name: 基础炮手 Basic Gunner
Basic Gunner.description:
你获得一个1级或2级特工专长。

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level operative feat.

New Epiphany.name: 新顿悟 New Epiphany
New Epiphany.description:
通过奉献或机缘巧合，你已拓展出去，探索宇宙基本构成要素的其他连接。你学会一个连接的初始顿悟法术，该连接会授予你其前置连接技能的受训。

Through dedication or serendipity, you've branched out to explore other connections to the fundamental building blocks of the cosmos. You learn the initial epiphany spell of a connection that grants training in the prerequisite connection skill.

Muzzle Flash.name: 枪口焰 Muzzle Flash
Muzzle Flash.description:
要求 你正持握一把枪。

你的攻击分散敌人的注意力。你先@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对你的标记目标进行一次远程打击。若此次打击命中，且该生物位于你的第一距离增量内，则其直到你下个回合结束前变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

Your attack distracts your foe. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make a ranged Strike against your mark. If the Strike hits, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of your next turn if it's within your first range increment.

Cut 'Em Deep.name: 重创他们 Cut 'Em Deep
Cut 'Em Deep.description:
你的侮辱和威胁几乎总能切中要害。当你进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓} 动作并掷出失败时，改为获得成功。你仍然可能严重失败。

当你成功对你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{狠狠干他！} 的目标进行威吓时，该目标不会对你之后进一步威吓它的尝试获得免疫。

Your insults and threats almost always hit the mark. When you roll a failure on a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} action, you get a success instead. You can still critically fail.

When you successfully Demoralize the target of your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!}, the target doesn't become immune to your further attempts to Demoralize them.

Advanced Mysticism.name: 先进秘术 Advanced Mysticism
Advanced Mysticism.description:
你获得一个秘学者专长。为了满足其先决条件，你的秘学者等级视为你角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次这样做时，你都会再获得一个秘学者专长。

You gain one mystic feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your mystic level is half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you do, you gain another mystic feat.

Shifter's Shove.name: 变形者的推撞 Shifter's Shove
Shifter's Shove.description:
你利用变形时的爆发性动能来帮助将一个生物从你身边推开。变形为更大的体型并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}。你进行推撞的运动检定时，获得一个环境加值，其数值等于你变形时两个体型之间相差的级数（如果你大一级则为+1，如果你大两级则为+2，依此类推）。

You use the explosive momentum of shifting to help push a creature away from you. Change Shape into a larger size and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}. You gain a circumstance bonus to your Athletics check to Shove equal to the number of steps between your sizes when you Change Shape (+1 if you are one size larger, +2 if you are two sizes larger, and so on).

Armor Proficiency.name: 护甲擅长 Armor Proficiency
Armor Proficiency.description:
你的轻型护甲熟练度变为受训。若你已在轻型护甲上受训，则中型护甲熟练度变为受训。若轻型和中型护甲都已受训，则重型护甲熟练度变为受训。达到13级后，你在这种护甲类型上的熟练度变为专家。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长。每次都会按照上文所述，在更重一档的护甲上受训。

Draconic Senses.name: 龙族感官 Draconic Senses
Draconic Senses.description:
你拥有敏锐的嗅觉，这是由龙类祖先代代相传而来。你获得40尺范围的模糊嗅觉。GM可以自行裁定：如果你位于该生物的下风处，则将此范围加倍；如果你位于上风处，则将此范围减半。

You have an impressive sense of smell, passed down through the generations from a dragon ancestor. You gain imprecise scent with a range of 40 feet. The GM might double the range if you're downwind from the creature or halve the range if you're upwind, at their discretion.

Extend Directive.name: 延长训令 Extend Directive
Extend Directive.description:
触发条件 你的回合开始，且你在上一个回合中下达了一个2动作训令。

凭借非凡的风采，你只需一个词语或手势便能重复你的命令。你立即下达你在上一个回合中所下达训令的1动作版本。

Trigger Your turn begins, and you issued a 2-action directive on your last turn.

With exceptional flair, you can repeat your orders with a single word or gesture. You immediately issue the 1-action version of the directive that you issued on your previous turn.

Impressive Lungs.name: 令人印象深刻的肺活量 Impressive Lungs
Impressive Lungs.description:
你的肺活量极佳。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.aJUXbe9HJVvv0Mxa]{呼吸控制}泛用专长。离开真空环境后，你最多 10 分钟内无需呼吸。

You have excellent lung capacity. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.aJUXbe9HJVvv0Mxa]{Breath Control} general feat. You do not need to breathe for up to 10 minutes after leaving a vacuum.

Melodic Adaptation.name: 旋律适应 Melodic Adaptation
Melodic Adaptation.description:
你能够听见魔法的嗡鸣，仿佛那是一枚旋绕的音符、一段变幻的旋律、一个和谐的和弦，或是一记打击乐节拍，随着你的心跳同调脉动。你能够察觉魔法的存在，如同你始终在施放一个 1环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法} 法术。此能力可在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内侦测魔法。

在13级时，侦测魔法的环阶提升至3环。在17级时，侦测魔法的环阶提升至4环。

You can hear the thrum of magic as if it were a swirling note, a shifting melody, a harmonic chord, or a percussive beat, pulsing in tune with your heart. You can detect the presence of magic as though you were always using a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{Detect Magic} spell. This detects magic within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30].

At 13th level, the rank of detect magic increases to 3rd. At 17th level, the rank of detect magic increases to 4th.

Digital Ambassador.name: 数字大使 Digital Ambassador
Digital Ambassador.description:
只要你在使用通讯装置、数据板或电脑进行交流，当你试图对一个不理解你所用语言的生物使用带有语言（特征）的技能动作时，掷一次 @Check[flat|dc:15]。若成功，该效果如同该生物理解你所用的语言一般生效。如果你的社群达到传奇，DC为10（@Check[flat|dc:10]）。

As long as you're using a comm unit, datapad, or computer to communicate, when you attempt to use a skill action with the linguistic trait on a creature that doesn't understand the language you're using, roll a @Check[flat|dc:15]. On a success, the effect works as if the creature understood the language you're using. If you're Legendary in Society, the DC is 10 (@Check[flat|dc:10]).

Additional Lore.name: 额外学识 Additional Lore
Additional Lore.description:
你的知识扩展到了新的领域。选择一个学识技能的子类别，你对其受训。在3级、7级、15级时，你获得额外的技能提升，仅能用于提升所选的学识。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长。每次都必须选择不同的学识子类别，在列出的等级，你同样会获得针对该学识的额外技能提升。

Leading Role.name: 主导角色 Leading Role
Leading Role.description:
频率 每小时一次

你曾在一部长期上演且广受欢迎的作品中担任主角，并且你经常喜欢依靠这个角色来度过困难处境。你可以以表演检定代替技能检定，以完成任何其他任务。

Frequency once per hour

You played a leading role in a long-running, popular production, and you frequently like to fall back on this character to get through difficult situations. You can roll a Performance check in place of a skill check to accomplish any other task.

Veteran Trap Finder.name: 老练陷阱探查者 Veteran Trap Finder
Veteran Trap Finder.description:
你可以使用 [[/act disable-device skill=mission-lore]]{任务学识} 代替计算机或巧偷，来在你通过任务简报研究过的地点解除陷阱。你可以解除那些要求在计算机或巧偷上拥有专家熟练等级的陷阱。如果你在计算机或巧偷上拥有专家熟练度，则你可以改为解除那些要求该技能具有传奇熟练等级的陷阱，并将你从危险感知获得的境况加值提高至 +2。

You can use [[/act disable-device skill=mission-lore]]{Mission Lore} instead of Computers or Thievery to disable traps in locations you researched using Mission Briefing. You can disable traps that require a proficiency rank of master in Computers or Thievery. If you have master proficiency in Computers or Thievery, you can disable traps that require a proficiency rank of legendary in that skill instead, and increase the circumstance bonus you gain from Danger Awareness to +2.

Psychic Mastery.name: 灵能精通 Psychic Mastery
Psychic Mastery.description:
你的灵能能力变得更加强大，使你能够触及灵能力量的全新维度。从秘奥法术列表中选择一个常见的2环法术。你每天可以将该法术作为一个秘奥先天法术施放一次。

Your psychic abilities have grown stronger, allowing you to tap into entirely new dimensions of psychic power. Choose one common 2nd-rank spell from the occult spell list. You can cast that spell as an occult innate spell once per day.

Unstoppable Directives.name: 势不可挡的训令 Unstoppable Directives
Unstoppable Directives.description:
你的自信如同一块电池，让你的盟友持续奋战。当你使用一项授予临时生命值的训令时，使获得的临时生命值增加等同于你等级的数值。当你使用一项不授予临时生命值的训令时，你可以使一名受该训令影响的盟友获得等同于你等级一半的临时生命值。这些临时生命值持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.HB8lDFxU86aAl50M]{效果：势不可挡的训令}

Your confidence is a battery that keeps your allies going. When you use a directive that grants temporary Hit Points, increase the temporary Hit Points by your level. When you use a directive that doesn't grant temporary Hit Points, you can grant one ally affected by that directive temporary Hit Points equal to half your level. These temporary Hit Points last for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.HB8lDFxU86aAl50M]{Effect: Unstoppable Directives}

Masked.name: 面具的 Masked
Masked.description:
你戴着面具的脸使他人无法仔细审视你的外貌，而你也学会了在社交场合中利用这种不确定性为自己谋利。只要你的嘴被遮住，任何针对你进行的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{洞悉动机} 察觉检定的 DC 提高 2。你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 时，获得 +1 环境加值。

Your masked face prevents others from scrutinizing your appearance, and you've learned to leverage this uncertainty to your advantage in social situations. While your mouth is covered, increase the DC of any Perception check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} against you by 2. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie}, make a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}.

Hefty Hauler.name: 体健负重 Hefty Hauler
Hefty Hauler.description: 你能够携带的东西超出你的身形看起来所能负担的程度。将你的最大负载和超载上限提高2。

Multitalented.name: 多才多艺 Multitalented
Multitalented.description:
你已经学会轻松地在多个职业之间分配你的专注。你获得一个 2 级的多职专精献身专长，即使按通常规则，在你从当前原型获得更多专长之前，你本来不能再选择另一个献身专长。

You've learned to split your focus between multiple classes with ease. You gain a 2nd-level multiclass dedication feat, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype.

Intensified Psychic Shock.name: 强化心灵震荡 Intensified Psychic Shock
Intensified Psychic Shock.description:
你进一步聚焦自己的心灵感应攻击，以更远的距离和更大的范围广播你的灵能力量。你的灵能震击徒手攻击获得增幅（1d6）特征，无需电池即可增幅你的攻击。通过花费 10 分钟进行高度专注，你可以重构自己的心智，为你的灵能震击附加以下一种增益。该增益会持续，直到你重构为另一种增益。

  • 延伸震击：你的灵能震击的距离增量提高 15 尺。
  • 心智粉碎者：你的灵能震击获得致命 d8 特征。
  • 同侪压力：你的灵能震击获得电弧特征，但它造成的是精神伤害而非电击伤害。
  • 灵能波：你的灵能震击获得溅射特征。

You focus your telepathic attacks further, broadcasting your psychic power with greater range and area. Your psychic shock unarmed attack gains the boost (1d6) trait, requiring no battery to boost your attack. By spending 10 minutes in intense concentration, you can reconfigure your mind to apply one of the following benefits to your psychic shock. This benefit lasts until you reconfigure to another benefit.

  • Extended Shock: Increase the range increment of your psychic shock by 15 feet.
  • Mind Crusher: Your psychic shock gains the fatal d8 trait.
  • Peer Pressure: Your psychic shock gains the arc trait, but it deals mental damage rather than electricity damage.
  • Psychic Wave: Your psychic shock gains the splash trait.

Hero's Edge.name: 英雄锋芒 Hero's Edge
Hero's Edge.description:
当局势最为危急、死亡的阴影笼罩着你时，你战斗得最为顽强。只要你拥有来自 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.a9ER2amvCuQEJODm]{Heroic Last Stand} 的临时生命值，你的打击和法术便会造成额外伤害。你的打击伤害获得等同于武器伤害骰数量的状态加值。你从法术位施放的法术获得等同于该法术等级的伤害状态加值；此加值仅适用于造成伤害且没有持续时间的法术。

You fight hardest when the odds are at their most dire, and the specter of death looms over you. As long as you have temporary Hit Points from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.a9ER2amvCuQEJODm]{Heroic Last Stand}, your Strikes and spells deal additional damage. You gain a status bonus to damage with your Strikes equal to the number of weapon damage dice. Spells you cast from spell slots gain a status bonus to damage equal to the level of the spell; this bonus applies only to spells that deal damage and don't have a duration.

Only Slightly Dead.name: 只是稍微死了点 Only Slightly Dead
Only Slightly Dead.description:
你活生生的身体充满生命力，轻易就能将你充满灵浆的血脉隐藏起来，不被看见。你不必对生物的察觉DC进行欺瞒检定，也能成功将自己伪装成你的族裔中的活体成员，或隐藏你的活尸裔血统；进行此类伪装时，你也不需要伪装工具包。这是一个非魔法效果，不能防止侦测、揭示或探知效果。此外，当某个生物主动对你进行察觉检定时，你的欺瞒DC获得+4环境加值，但仅限于对方试图看穿你的伪装时，且你正将自己伪装成你的族裔中的活体成员，或以其他方式试图隐藏你的活尸裔血统。

Your living body is flush with vitality, which easily hides your ichor-filled veins from sight. You don't have to attempt Deception checks against a creature's Perception DC to successfully Impersonate yourself as a living member of your ancestry or hide your borai heritage, nor do you require a disguise kit for such Impersonations. This is a non-magical effect that doesn't protect against detection, revelation, or scrying effects. Additionally, when a creature actively attempts a Perception check against you, you gain a +4 circumstance bonus to your Deception DC, but only for the purposes of seeing through your disguise when you're Impersonating yourself as a living member of your ancestry or otherwise attempting to hide your borai heritage.

Molecular Modification.name: 分子改造 Molecular Modification
Molecular Modification.description:
你改造自己身体的基因，以抵御特定类型的伤害。你获得对酸蚀、钝击、寒冷、电击、火焰、穿刺、毒素、挥砍或音波伤害的抗性，数值等于你等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次如此选择时，选择一种不同的伤害类型。

You modify your body's genetics to resist certain damage types. You gain resistance to acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, piercing, poison, slashing, or sonic damage equal to half your level.

Special You can take this feat multiple times. Each time you do so, select a different damage type.

Smug Affirmation.name: 自鸣得意的肯定 Smug Affirmation
Smug Affirmation.description:
在你崛起掌权的过程中克服了无数挑战之后，你的自信不再只是虚张声势和聪明才智；它还有经验证据作为支撑！你的“护持傲慢”反应现在还可以在以下情况触发：当一个位于你思维感知范围内的敌人对你发动攻击时大失败，或对你进行的技能检定大失败时（例如对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓} 以使你恐慌的威吓检定，或为了在你周围 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{翻滚} 的特技检定）。你从 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.wI0g2nRfu2d0YFAd]{护持傲慢} 获得的临时生命值数量提高为 [[/r 2d8]] + 你的角色等级。你在13级时将其再提高 [[/r 1d8]]，并在17级时额外再提高 [[/r 1d8]]。

Having overcome countless challenges in your rise to power, your self-confidence isn't just bluster and brains; it's supported by empirical evidence! Your Shielding Arrogance reaction can now also trigger whenever a foe within range of your thoughtsense critically fails an attack against you or critically fails a skill check attempted against you (such as an Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you or an Acrobatics check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble} around you). Increase the number of temporary Hit Points you gain from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.wI0g2nRfu2d0YFAd]{Shielding Arrogance} to [[/r 2d8]] plus your character level. Increase this by [[/r 1d8]] at 13th level and by an additional [[/r 1d8]] at 17th level.

Natural Camouflage.name: 天生伪装 Natural Camouflage
Natural Camouflage.description:
你的鳞片与母星上的岩石和碎石融为一体。当你在阿基顿或类似的星球上处于户外，并且位于沙漠、山地或平原地形时，你无需掩护，便可对至少距离你10英尺的生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}。

Your scales blend in with the rocks and rubble of your home world. While you're outdoors on Akiton or a similar planet, and you're in a desert, mountain, or plains terrain, you don't need cover to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} from creatures at least 10 feet away from you.

Frightening Display.name: 骇人展示 Frightening Display
Frightening Display.description:
你将自己的胃从口中呕出，以一种令人不安的方式展现出你异常血统。进行一次单独的威吓检定，以对30英尺内的每个敌人执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫败士气}。无论你的检定结果如何，随后每个生物都会在1分钟内暂时免疫“惊骇展示”。

You disgorge your stomach out of your mouth in a disturbing display of your aberrant heritage. Attempt a single Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} each enemy within 30 feet. Regardless of the results of your check, each creature is then temporarily immune to Frightening Display for 1 minute.

Pungent Astrazoan.name: 刺鼻星变体 Pungent Astrazoan
Pungent Astrazoan.description:
当你吐出自己的胃时，你会散发出腐烂肉块般的恶臭。虽然你可以通过变形，像其他物种那样进食来彻底掩盖这种气味，但在你试图吓退捕食者时——无论是饥饿的野兽还是凶残的暴徒——吐出自己的胃以刻意散发这种污秽恶臭会很有用。你在欺瞒技能上成为受训，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.HEBXaS656MZTiWFu]{冗长佯动} 技能专长作为额外专长，即使你不满足其先决条件。

You emit the reeking smell of rotting meat when you disgorge your stomach. While you can thoroughly mask the scent by shapeshifting to eat like other species, disgorging your stomach to intentionally emit this vile odor can come in handy when you are trying to dissuade predators, whether they are hungry beasts or murderous mobsters. You become trained in Deception and gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.HEBXaS656MZTiWFu]{Lengthy Diversion} skill feat as a bonus feat, even if you don't meet its prerequisites.

Coagulation.name: 凝血 Coagulation
Coagulation.description:
你的血液凝结成淤浆，使你的身体在面对撕裂与割碎的攻击时更具韧性。你获得等同于你等级的流血与精准伤害抗性。你为从持续性流血伤害中恢复而进行的平检DC为13而非15。在获得适当协助时，该DC降为8而非10。

Your blood coagulates into sludge, making your body more resilient against attacks that rip and shred. You gain resistance to bleed and precision damage equal to your level. The DC of your flat checks to recover from persistent bleed damage is 13 rather than 15. This reduces to 8 rather than 10 when receiving appropriate assistance.

Friendly Face.name: 友善面孔 Friendly Face
Friendly Face.description:
你可以使用变形来变成某个特定的个体。只要你至少观察过该个体 10 分钟，与你没有互动的生物就不会怀疑你的伪装，除非你的行为明显不同，或者该生物对该个体非常熟悉。

You can use Change Shape to transform into a specific individual. As long as you have studied the individual for at least 10 minutes, creatures you do not interact with will not suspect your disguise unless your behavior is markedly different, or the creature has an intimate familiarity with the individual.

Metabolic Manipulation.name: 代谢操控 Metabolic Manipulation
Metabolic Manipulation.description:
通过谨慎的实验与选择性的适应，你操控了自己的免疫系统和体内化学机制，以更好地对抗疾病与感染。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.N8Xz5fuW6o7GW124]{快速恢复}技能专长以及@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VIv5Gt3yndrk0qgb]{定向免疫}动作。

Through careful experimentation and selective adaptation, you've manipulated your immune system and internal chemistry to better fight off illness and infection. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.N8Xz5fuW6o7GW124]{Fast Recovery} skill feat and the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VIv5Gt3yndrk0qgb]{Targeted Immunization} action.

Disarming Shot.name: 缴械射击 Disarming Shot
Disarming Shot.description:
需求 你正持握一把枪。

你尝试用一记瞄准精准的射击来缴械你的敌人。你先@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对你的目标进行一次远程打击。若此次打击命中，则使用同一次远程攻击检定对抗目标的反射DC来尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械}该目标，而非进行一次运动学检定。一次缴械射击在计算你的多重攻击减值时视为两次攻击，但该减值直到你使用完缴械射击后才会增加。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You attempt to disarm your foe with a well-aimed shot. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make a ranged Strike against your mark. If the Strike hits, attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} the target using the same ranged attack roll against the target's Reflex DC, instead of attempting an Athletics check. A Disarming Shot counts as two attacks for your multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after you've used Disarming Shot.

Biting Corpsefolk.name: 噬咬尸族 Biting Corpsefolk
Biting Corpsefolk.description:
死后的变异扭曲了你的身体，使你的牙齿拉长成獠牙，或让你的肢体末端锐化为利爪。选择此专长时，你获得以下徒手攻击之一，由你任选：爪击或颚击。这两种攻击都属于搏击武器组，并具有所列的伤害骰和特性。

爪击 1d6 挥砍（灵巧，灵活，徒手）

颚击 1d6 穿刺（擒抱，徒手）

到5级时，每当你用这些攻击之一造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

特殊 你可以选择此专长两次。每次如此做时，从上述选项中选择一种不同的攻击。

A transformation after death twisted your body, elongating your teeth into fangs or sharpening your appendages into claws. When you select this feat, you gain one of the following unarmed attacks of your choice: claw or jaws. Both of these attacks are in the brawling weapon group and have the listed damage die and traits.

Claw 1d6 slashing (agile, finesse, unarmed)

Jaws 1d6 piercing (grapple, unarmed)

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these attacks, you get its critical specialization effect.

Special You can select this feat two times. Each time you do, select a different attack from the options listed above.

Mindrender.name: 精神撕裂者 Mindrender
Mindrender.description:
你已将自己的思绪锤炼成一件致命武器，足以粉碎敌人的心智。你获得一种灵能冲击远程徒手攻击，射程增量为30英尺，并具有灵巧特征。该武器造成1d4点精神伤害，属于精神武器组。

You've honed your thoughts into a deadly weapon that can shatter a foe's mind. You gain a psychic shock ranged unarmed attack with a range increment of 30 feet and the agile trait. The weapon deals 1d4 mental damage and is in the mental weapon group.

Quantum Recycle.name: 量子回收 Quantum Recycle
Quantum Recycle.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你施放一个2环或更高环阶的法术，且该法术以你的量子场内的一个生物或区域为目标。

你熟练地操控量子场的效果，确保你的法术中的部分能量得以保留并能够再次加以利用。你恢复一个已消耗的法术位，其环阶比触发该能力的法术低1环。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You cast a 2nd-rank or higher spell, and the spell targets a creature or area within your quantum field.

You expertly manipulate the effects of your quantum field to ensure that some of the energy from your spell is preserved and can be harnessed again. You regain an expended spell slot one spell rank lower than the triggering spell.

Natural Empathy.name: 天生共情 Natural Empathy
Natural Empathy.description:
你对自然有一种共情式的理解，并且可以使用你的有限心灵感应与植物和真菌交流，即使你们没有共同语言。你可以向植物和真菌提问、接收它们的回答，并对植物和真菌使用外交技能。在大多数情况下，野生植物和真菌会给你时间来陈述你的理由。你对植物和真菌进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 的检定获得 +1 情境加值。

You have an empathic understanding of nature and can use your limited telepathy to communicate with plants and fungi, even if you don't share a common language. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with plants and fungi. In most cases, wild plants and fungi will give you time to make your case. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on plants and fungi.

Defiant Liberation.name: 无畏解放 Defiant Liberation
Defiant Liberation.description:
你可以运用你本能的魔法能力来解放身心。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF]{清明心智} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{无拘行动}，作为4环奥术天生法术。你每天可以将这些法术中的每一个各施放一次，且均作为奥术天生法术施放。

You can leverage your instinctive magical abilities to liberate the body and mind. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF]{Clear Mind} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Unfettered Movement} as 4th-rank arcane innate spells. You can cast each of these spells as arcane innate spells once per day.

Thick Skins.name: 厚实皮肤 Thick Skins
Thick Skins.description:
你的每种形态都拥有异常厚实的皮肤。你为终止持续性流血伤害而进行的平检 DC 从 15 降低为 10；若在接受特别恰当的协助后，则从 10 降低为 5。

特殊 你可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.7yIxWfNZ7yEKs0Fd]{恢复性变形} 专长来尝试一次额外的平检，以终止持续性流血伤害，但这不被视为特别恰当的协助。

Each of your forms has unusually thick skin. Your DC on flat checks to end persistent bleed damage is reduced from 15 to 10, or from 10 to 5 after receiving especially appropriate assistance.

Special You can use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.7yIxWfNZ7yEKs0Fd]{Restorative Shapeshifting} feat to attempt an additional flat check to end persistent bleed damage, but this is not considered especially appropriate assistance.

Telekinetic Titan.name: 念动巨人 Telekinetic Titan
Telekinetic Titan.description:
你竭尽每一个神经元的力量，短暂地为你的念动力能力超充。激活此能力时，选择魅力、智力或感知。在 1 分钟内，你在变为负重前可携带等于 7 + 所选属性调整值的负载值，且你总共可持有并携带 12 + 所选属性调整值的负载值。你的念动力之手可以持握和挥使重于 1 负载值的物体，且你忽略自身萎缩能力的效果。最后，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.gNUrQ8jimAvAA0xg]{念动力举 lifting} 动作。持续时间结束时，你会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}，持续 1 分钟，且你的念动力之手会丢下任何它们无法继续持有的物体。

Straining every neuron, you briefly supercharge your telekinetic abilities. Choose Charisma, Intelligence, or Wisdom when you activate this ability. For 1 minute, you can carry Bulk equal to 7 + the chosen attribute modifier before becoming encumbered, and you can hold and carry a total Bulk of 12 + the chosen attribute modifier. Your telekinetic hands can hold and wield objects heavier than 1 Bulk, and you ignore the effects of your atrophied ability. Finally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.gNUrQ8jimAvAA0xg]{Telekinetic Lift} action. When the duration ends, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 1 minute, and your telekinetic hands drop any objects they can no longer hold.

Fly Anything.name: 飞任何东西 Fly Anything
Fly Anything.description:
你能够直觉地理解哪怕最有趣的载具是如何运作的。即使某艘飞船在生理上对你来说根本不可能驾驶，你也能驾驶它，包括那些需要心灵感应或其他超自然能力的载具。只要你手头有合适的零件可用，你就可以用驾驶替代制作，对载具、星舰或机甲的一个部件进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{修理}，但要承受–2情境减值。你可以用驾驶替代计算机来入侵载具、星舰或机甲，但要承受–2情境减值。

You can intuit how even the most interesting vehicles function. You can pilot a ship even if it would be physiologically impossible for you, including those that require telepathy or other supernatural abilities. You can use Piloting instead of Crafting to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{Repair} a part of a vehicle, starship, or mech with a –2 circumstance penalty as long as you have the appropriate parts available to you. You can use Piloting instead of Computers to Hack a vehicle, starship, or mech with a –2 circumstance penalty.

Damoritosh's Claw.name: 戴莫力图斯之爪击 Damoritosh's Claw
Damoritosh's Claw.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你正在战斗中。

你向戴莫力图斯（或一位战斗圣者）祈求战斗中的祝福——而他回应了。你恢复1点专注点数，最多恢复到你的通常上限。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You're engaged in combat.

You pray to Damoritosh (or a battle saint) for a blessing in the heat of battle—and he answers. You regain 1 Focus Point, up to your usual maximum.

Steady Balance.name: 四平八稳 Steady Balance
Steady Balance.description: 即使在恶劣的条件下，你也能轻易保持平衡。每当你成功使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}行动时，改为大成功。你在狭窄平面和不稳地面尝试保持平衡时不会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

Eldritch Bond.name: 奥术纽带 Eldritch Bond
Eldritch Bond.description:
你从此现实之外引导诡异的力量，赋予你羁绊中的生物将其身体重塑为强大、畸异形态的能力。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Y8Y0LS6sh4pkxPsq]{Eldritch Bond} 顿悟法术。

You channel strange power from beyond this reality, granting creatures in your bond the power to reform their bodies into powerful, aberrant shapes. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Y8Y0LS6sh4pkxPsq]{Eldritch Bond} epiphany spell.

Acquire Asset.name: 获取资产 Acquire Asset
Acquire Asset.description:
你通过观察敌人对你攻击的反应，在激烈战斗中评估对手。对一个并非你目标的生物进行一次近战或远程打击（Strike）。命中时，你的目标成为你的目标，如同你已使用过 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.iHzfiebxLxN3ogpH]{评估敌情（Size Up）}。重击时，你还可以立即尝试一次检定，以对该目标进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识（Recall Knowledge）}。

You assess a foe while in the thick of battle by observing their reactions to your attack. Make a melee or ranged Strike against a creature that isn't your asset. On a hit, your target becomes your asset as if you'd used @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.iHzfiebxLxN3ogpH]{Size Up}. On a critical hit, you can also immediately attempt a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about the target.

Shifter's Squeeze.name: 变形者的紧缩 Shifter's Squeeze
Shifter's Squeeze.description:
你可以轻松地扭曲并调整四肢的大小，以挤入更狭小的空间。你获得 Acrobatics 的受训熟练等级。如果你已经在 Acrobatics 上受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你自选的一项技能上变为受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.3G8xUlgCjRmRJNfP]{快速挤压} 专长。

You can easily contort and resize your limbs to squeeze into smaller spaces. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Acrobatics. If you are already trained in Acrobatics (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.3G8xUlgCjRmRJNfP]{Quick Squeeze} feat.

General Training.name: 通用训练 General Training
General Training.description:
你的适应力体现在你掌握了一系列实用的能力。你获得一个1级通用专长。你必须满足该专长的先决条件，但如果你是在创建角色时选取的本专长，那么你可以将选取事实延后到创建过程的稍后阶段，以便你满足心仪通用专长的先决条件。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长，但每次都要选择一个不同的通用专长。

Swift Reposition.name: 迅捷重新定位 Swift Reposition
Swift Reposition.description:
触发条件 你即将进行一次反射豁免检定，但你尚未掷骰。

感知到危险时，你可以跃起并扭转身体以避开威胁。你可以调整或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}，并在你的反射豁免上获得+2环境加值。即使此能力使你移出触发效果的范围，你仍必须进行该反射豁免检定。

Trigger You're about to roll a Reflex saving throw, but you haven't rolled yet.

Sensing danger, you can leap and twist your body away from the threat. You Step or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} and gain a +2 circumstance bonus on your Reflex save. You must still roll the Reflex save even if this ability moves you out of range of the triggering effect.

Improved Conductivity.name: 强化导电性 Improved Conductivity
Improved Conductivity.description:
通过模仿你祖先的饮食、服用合成补剂，或用魔法释放你的基因潜能，你强化了自己的生物电网络。你所有造成电击伤害且具有攻击特征的打击或法术都获得电弧特征。如果你正在使用一个已激活的力场，它在你用一次电弧攻击命中敌人后，会在1轮内以正常值两倍的HP恢复。

By imitating your ancestors' diet, taking synthetic supplements, or unlocking your genetic potential with magic, you've enhanced your bioelectrical network. All your Strikes or spells with the attack trait that deal electricity damage gain the arc trait. If you're wielding an active forcefield, it regenerates twice its normal HP for 1 round after you hit an enemy with an arc attack.

Adaptive Adept.name: 适应调整 Adaptive Adept
Adaptive Adept.description: 你继续调整你的魔法，以将所选根源同你的职业根源融汇合流。从你在调整戏法（Adapted Cantrip）专长中所选的魔法根源中选择一个戏法或是一个1环级法术。你获得该法术，并如同调整戏法中所得到的戏法一样将其加入到你的法术选项当中。在施放该戏法时，你可以将其视作你职业所具备的根源内的法术。如果你选择调整一个1环级法术，你不会获得该法术升阶版本的许可。这就意味着如果你时准备施法者，你无法在准备该法术升阶版本，而如果你拥有法术库，你不能将其选为你的标志性法术。

I'm the Real One!.name: 我才是真的！ I'm the Real One!
I'm the Real One!.description:
触发 你被另一生物@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}，或者你擒抱或束缚了另一生物。

需求 你可以使用变形来伪装成该生物的外貌。

你使用变形来伪装成另一生物的外貌。其他所有生物都必须使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{寻找}动作，尝试进行一次对抗你欺瞒DC的察觉检定，以判断哪个生物是真的，哪个是模仿体。不知道你是哪一个生物的生物，在以你们任意一方为目标发动攻击、施放法术或造成其他效果时，都必须成功通过一次@Check[flat|dc:11]。若检定失败，则该攻击、法术或效果会改为以另一生物为目标。

诸如心灵感应或秘学者的群聊特性之类的能力，可能会自动让某个生物判断出哪个生物是谁，但知情的生物仍必须使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sn2hIy1iIJX9Vpgj]{指出}动作，向其他人表明哪个生物是谁。被模仿的生物可能有某种信号或短语，用来向其盟友表明哪个生物是谁，但在战斗的喧嚣中这样做是一个具有听觉或视觉特征的动作。

Trigger You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by another creature or you grab or restrain another creature.

Requirements You can use Change Shape to assume the appearance of that creature.

You Change Shape to assume the appearance of the other creature. All other creatures must use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action to attempt a Perception check against your Deception DC to determine which creature is real and which is an imitation. A creature who doesn't know which creature you are must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:11] when targeting either of you with an attack, spell, or other effect. If the check fails, the attack, spell, or effect targets the other creature instead.

Abilities such as telepathy or the mystic's group chat feature may automatically allow a creature to determine which creature is which, but an aware creature must still use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sn2hIy1iIJX9Vpgj]{Point Out} action to indicate to others which creature is which. An imitated creature might have a signal or phrase that indicates to their allies which creature is which, but doing so in the din of battle is an action with the auditory or visual trait.

Kick it Into Overdrive.name: 全速狂飙 Kick it Into Overdrive
Kick it Into Overdrive.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 你的回合开始时。

你以一口稳定的呼吸和片刻的高度专注，逼迫自己超越极限，在短时间内获得惊人的速度。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速} 状态，直到你的回合结束，并且你只能将该额外动作用于疾行。当你使用此能力时，你也可以选择改为获得加速状态，直到你的下个回合结束；但在该持续时间结束时，你会在身体恢复期间获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态，持续 2 轮。你仍然只能将加速给予的额外动作用于以此效果进行疾行。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger Your turn begins.

With a steadying breath and a moment of intense focus, you push yourself beyond your limits, gaining incredible speed for a short period of time. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} until the end of your turn, and you can use the extra action only to Stride. When you use this ability, you can instead choose to become quickened until the end of your next turn, but at the end of this duration, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 2 rounds as your body recovers. You can still only use the extra action from quickened to Stride with this effect.

Spectra Transmission.name: 光谱传输 Spectra Transmission
Spectra Transmission.description:
频率 每小时一次

你可以通过无线传输投射你的言语，而不是大声说话，使你的话语以音频、文本或两者兼具的形式从未受保护的科技装置中发出。例如，你的声音可以从内部通话器中可听地传出，或以文本形式显示在视讯屏幕或全息标牌上。选择一个100英尺内未受保护的科技装置。持续1分钟，你可以选择将你所说的任何内容通过该输出装置传输，而不是大声说出来。你可以用单一动作改变你用作输出的装置。这样做不会延长持续时间。

Frequency once per hour

You can project your speech through wireless transmission, rather than speaking aloud, causing your words to emit from unsecured technological devices as either audio, text, or both. For example, your voice could emit audibly from an intercom or appear as text on a vidscreen or holosign. Select an unsecured technological device within 100 feet. For 1 minute, you can choose to transmit anything you say through that output device, rather than say it aloud. You can change which device you use as an output as a single action. Doing so doesn't extend the duration.

Aspiring Necrovite.name: 渴望成为死灵活尸者的人 Aspiring Necrovite
Aspiring Necrovite.description:
你并不打算死去——相反，你要作为一名死灵维特永远存在。你遵循寂静之歌而活，并且曾花时间调查不死生物组织，研究完成向不死状态最终转变所需的过程。你在对不死生物、尸骸舰队和伊奥克斯进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时，获得+1环境加值。你还学会了死灵语。

You don't plan to die—instead, you're going to exist forever as a necrovite. You live by the Song of Silence and have spent time investigating undead organizations and studying the processes required to make the final transition into undeath. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about undead creatures, the Corpse Fleet, and Eox. You also learn the Necril language.

Protective Subroutine.name: 防护子单元 Protective Subroutine
Protective Subroutine.description: 你的纳米机械可以增强你的防御能力。当你尝试豁免时，你可以选择@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.JS24EjgLYcHB9E3T]{纳米机械激增 Nanite Surge}，而不是当你尝试技能检定时。如果你这样做，你在触发该反应的豁免检定时获得+2状态加值。

Adaptive Talent.name: 适应性天赋 Adaptive Talent
Adaptive Talent.description:
你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.9nO9EkhE1TiS0Yh6]{适应性天赋} 职业特性，但你不会在更高等级时获得额外的技能专长。

特殊 你可以在10级和16级时再次选择此专长，使你通过适应性天赋获得的技能专长数量增加1。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.9nO9EkhE1TiS0Yh6]{Adaptive Talent} class feature, but you do not gain additional skill feats at higher levels.

Special You can select this feat a second time as a 10th level feat and a 16th level feat, increasing the number of skill feats you gain using adaptive talent by 1.

Blood Feast.name: 血腥盛宴 Blood Feast
Blood Feast.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你的上一个动作是使用你通过自身血统制造的徒手攻击或商用小刀进行的一次成功打击。

通过引导环绕在你周围的潜在死灵能量，你从附近的活物身上汲取生命力，并在此过程中治愈自己的身体。你将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.fd31tAHSSGXyOxW6]{Vampiric Exsanguination} 作为一个7环神圣先天法术施放，但该法术只影响你上一次打击的目标。

Frequency once per day

Requirements Your last action was a successful Strike with an unarmed attack or commercial knife you created using your lineage.

By tapping into the latent necromantic energies that surround you, you leech vitality from nearby living creatures, healing your own body in the process. You cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.fd31tAHSSGXyOxW6]{Vampiric Exsanguination} as a 7th-rank divine innate spell, but the spell affects only the target of your last Strike.

Operative Exploit.name: 特工技法 Operative Exploit
Operative Exploit.description:
你获得所选专攻的弱点利用。

You gain the exploit of your chosen specialization.

Canny Survivor.name: 机敏的幸存者 Canny Survivor
Canny Survivor.description:
你在危险与匮乏中磨炼出敏锐的求生本能，并且学会了绝不放松警惕。面对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} 的生物时，你不会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。此外，每当你将要尝试一次反射豁免时，你都可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.WXyalVd471MVyoN6]{Survivor's Instincts}。

Your survival instincts are honed by a life of danger and scarcity, and you've learned to never let your guard down. You are not @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creatures. In addition, you can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.WXyalVd471MVyoN6]{Survivor's Instincts} anytime you would attempt a Reflex save.

Basic Soldier Training.name: 基础士兵训练 Basic Soldier Training
Basic Soldier Training.description:
你获得一个1级或2级士兵专长。

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level soldier feat.

Surprising Escape.name: 出其不意的逃脱 Surprising Escape
Surprising Escape.description:
触发条件 你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被抓住}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动}或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{（被）束缚} 状态。

你极强的柔韧性和极具迷惑性的袖珍体型，让你能够轻松摆脱各种束缚，而你迅捷的反应时间则意味着你能在瞬息之间做到这一点！你尝试进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}。

Trigger You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}.

Your extreme flexibility and deceptively compact frame make it easy for you to escape a variety of confines, and your quick reaction time means you can do so in a flash! You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}.

Enhanced Echolocation.name: 强化回声定位 Enhanced Echolocation
Enhanced Echolocation.description:
你已学会平息其他感官，并将注意力集中在你的回声定位上。你的回声定位模糊感知的范围翻倍至 60 英尺（或在水下为 120 英尺），并获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.0vqXr3SYakIa19k3]{聚焦感官} 动作。

You've learned to quiet your other senses and focus your attention on your echolocation. The range of your echolocation imprecise sense doubles to 60 feet (or 120 feet underwater), and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.0vqXr3SYakIa19k3]{Focus Senses} action.

Enduring Echolocation.name: 不朽城回声定位 Enduring Echolocation
Enduring Echolocation.description:
你依靠回声定位感知周围环境的程度，不亚于依靠其他感官。你的回声定位成为一个精确感官，范围为 60 英尺（或在水下为 120 英尺）；此外，你还拥有延伸至 120 英尺（或在水下为 240 英尺）的不精确感官。

You perceive your surroundings as much by echolocation as by your other senses. Your echolocation becomes a precise sense to a range of 60 feet (or 120 feet underwater), in addition to the imprecise sense out to 120 feet (or 240 feet underwater).

Lie to Me.name: 将计就计 Lie to Me
Lie to Me.description: 你可以用欺骗技能设下圈套，让试图欺骗你的人露出破绽。若你能和某个尝试对你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎 Lie}的人交流，在判断对方是否说谎成功时，使用你的欺骗DC和察觉DC中较高者。若你没有与对方互动对话，比如某人在长篇演讲期间尝试说谎，本专长便无法生效。

Memory Recovery.name: 记忆恢复 Memory Recovery
Memory Recovery.description:
你保留了先前占据你身体的安卓体所留下的本能与零碎记忆，或是嵌入你系统中的远古程序。在每日准备期间，你可以调取这些存档记忆，从而使自己在一项由你选择的技能上成为受训。该熟练会持续到你再次进行准备为止。由于这项熟练是临时性的，你不能将其用作技能提升或专长等永久角色选项的前置条件。

You retain instincts and fragmentary memories from the androids who previously occupied your body or from ancient programming embedded in your system. During your daily preparations, you can tap into these archived memories to become trained in one skill of your choice. This proficiency lasts until you prepare again. Since this proficiency is temporary, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a skill increase or a permanent character option like a feat.

Cellular Acceleration.name: 细胞加速 Cellular Acceleration
Cellular Acceleration.description:
频率 每天一次

你在细胞层面改变自身，以此加快身体的新陈代谢和呼吸。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，持续1分钟，且每轮获得的额外动作只能用于打击和疾走动作。

Frequency once per day

You speed up your body's metabolism and respiration by changing yourself at a cellular level. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} for 1 minute and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Advanced Gunner.name: 先进炮手 Advanced Gunner
Advanced Gunner.description:
你获得一个特工专长。为了满足其先决条件，你的特工等级视为你角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次这样做时，你都会再获得一个特工专长。

You gain one operative feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your operative level is half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you do, you gain another operative feat.

Cerebral Circumvention.name: 脑部规避 Cerebral Circumvention
Cerebral Circumvention.description:
触发条件 一个被你以心灵预判锁定的生物使用一个要求进行反射豁免的效果，或试图对你进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}。

需求 你因使用心灵预判而对目标获得加值。

通过读取征兆并分析概率结果，你能流畅地预判对手的下一步动作。你对触发该动作的反射豁免或反射DC获得+1环境加值。如果自上次你使用心灵预判以来，你已对目标造成过精神伤害，则此加值提高至+2。

Trigger A Telepredicted creature uses an effect that requires a Reflex save or attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} you.

Requirements You have a bonus against the target using Telepredict.

By reading cues and analyzing probability outcomes, you smoothly predicting your opponent's next move. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Reflex save or Reflex DC against the triggering action. Increase this bonus to +2 if you've dealt mental damage to the target since the last time you used Telepredict.

Skillful Encouragement.name: 娴熟鼓励 Skillful Encouragement
Skillful Encouragement.description:
你向一名盟友提供建议与鼓励，给予其所需的激励，使其在面对挑战时能更进一步。在一次战斗遭遇中，选择60尺内的一名盟友。该盟友的技能检定获得+2环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始。随后，该盟友会暂时免疫你的“娴熟鼓励”1小时。若你是口头说出这些建议，“娴熟鼓励”获得听觉特征。若你是以手语表达这些建议，“娴熟鼓励”获得视觉特征。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.TMarUs51Jg7v3g3f]{效果：娴熟鼓励}

You offer an ally advice and encouragement, granting them the inspiration they need to push themselves further in the face of a challenge. During a combat encounter, select an ally within 60 feet. That ally gains a +2 circumstance bonus to their skill checks until the beginning of your next turn. That ally then becomes temporarily immune to your Skillful Encouragement for 1 hour. If you said this advice verbally, Skillful Encouragement gains the auditory trait. If you signed this advice, Skillful Encouragement gains the visual trait.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.TMarUs51Jg7v3g3f]{Effect: Skillful Encouragement}

Gelid Bite.name: 冰寒噬咬 Gelid Bite
Gelid Bite.description:
你的林龙血统随着你变得更强大而开始进一步显现。你的颚击打击额外造成 @Damage[1d6[cold]] 伤害。若造成重击，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态，直到你下个回合结束，除非它在对抗你的职业 DC 或法术 DC（取较高者）时，于一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免中成功。

Your linnorm heritage has begun to manifest more as you've become more powerful. Your jaws Strike deals an additional @Damage[1d6[cold]] damage. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the end of your next turn, unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Commanding Pheromones.name: 支配性信息素 Commanding Pheromones
Commanding Pheromones.description:
你可以利用自己迷人的信息素来安抚恶意，并缓和你的威胁锋芒，将你的胁迫尝试转化为领导之举。当你对一个生物使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{胁迫} 时，如果你的目标本会变为不友善（且他们原本并非不友善或敌对），则他们改为变为冷淡。

You can leverage your alluring pheromones to soothe ill will and take the edge off your threats, turning your attempts at coercion into acts of leadership. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} a creature, if your target would become unfriendly (and they aren't already unfriendly or hostile), they become indifferent instead.

Harmonic Convergence.name: 谐波汇聚 Harmonic Convergence
Harmonic Convergence.description:
失谐会在紧张情境中赋予你些许清明，以及短暂恢复元气的机会。当你使用带有失谐特征的动作时，你获得等于你等级一半数量的临时生命值，持续至你下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.WUHSeAxZXX3Fin3S]{效果：谐波汇流}

Dissonance grants you some clarity and a brief second wind in stressful situations. When you use an action with the disharmony trait, you gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to half your level until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.WUHSeAxZXX3Fin3S]{Effect: Harmonic Convergence}

Perfectly Balanced.name: 完美平衡 Perfectly Balanced
Perfectly Balanced.description:
你愈发接近于在两种极端能量之间找到平衡，学会了在必要时排出或吸收过剩的热量。你获得对寒冷和火焰的抗性 5。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.9P2ZptR0PrYyiJFl]{转移能量} 反应。

You've come closer to finding balance between two extremes of energy, learning how to expel or draw in excess heat when necessary. You gain resistance 5 to cold and fire. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.9P2ZptR0PrYyiJFl]{Redirect Energy} reaction.

All Hands on Deck.name: 全员就位 All Hands on Deck
All Hands on Deck.description:
卡萨萨

频率 每天一次

你短暂地专注于自己的协调性。直到你下个回合开始时，你将额外一对手视为你的可用手。到你下个回合开始时，选择哪一组可用手继续作为你的可用手。

肖巴德

频率 每天一次

你能够短暂地专注于自己的协调性。直到你下个回合开始时，你将额外一对手视为你的可用手。到你下个回合开始时，选择哪一组可用手继续作为你的可用手。

斯基特曼德

频率 每天一次

直到你下个回合开始时，你将额外两对手视为你的可用手。到你下个回合开始时，选择哪一组可用手继续作为你的可用手。

Kasatha

Frequency once per day

You focus on your coordination for a brief moment. Until the beginning of your next turn, you count one additional pair of hands as your active hands. At the beginning of your next turn, choose which set of active hands remains your active hands.

Shobhad

Frequency once per day

You're able to focus your coordination for a brief moment. Until the beginning of your next turn, you count one additional pair of hands as your active hands. At the beginning of your next turn, choose which set of active hands remains your active hands.

Skittermander

Frequency once per day

Until the beginning of your next turn, you count two additional pairs of hands as your active hands. At the beginning of your next turn, choose which set of active hands remains your active hands.

Homeguard.name: 家园守卫 Homeguard
Homeguard.description:
你的家园卫队训练让你为一切情况都做好了准备。你在先攻检定上获得+2环境加值，并且当你与对手的先攻检定结果持平时，你总是先行动。

Your Homeguard training has prepared you for anything. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls, and when you tie an adversary's initiative roll, you always go first.

Advanced Distortion.name: 先进扭曲 Advanced Distortion
Advanced Distortion.description:
你获得一个巫战扭曲者专长。为了满足其先决条件，你的巫战扭曲者等级视为你角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你这样做时，你都会再获得一个巫战扭曲者专长。

You gain one witchwarper feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your witchwarper level is half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you do, you gain another witchwarper feat.

Solar Weapon Customization.name: 太阳武器自定义 Solar Weapon Customization
Solar Weapon Customization.description:
你可以为你的日耀武器选择至多一个特性。达到6级时，你可以选择第二个特性，或者选择触及或双手 1d10 特性，而不是选择两个特性。

You can select up to one trait for your solar weapon. When you reach level 6, you can choose a second trait, or the reach or two-hand 1d10 trait instead of two traits.

Just Like Rehearsal.name: 就像排练一样 Just Like Rehearsal
Just Like Rehearsal.description:
生活常常模仿艺术，而你已学会在危险情境中运用自己的戏剧训练，无论是用自己擅长的滑稽跌倒来缓冲真正的坠落，还是用即兴表演的滑稽把戏来迷惑敌人。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Q6vXNDmTwDom59GV]{装死} 专长，忽略其前置条件。此外，你可以使用表演代替欺骗来 [[/act create-a-diversion skill=performance]]。

Life often imitates art, and you've learned to deploy your dramatic training in dangerous situations, whether it's using your talent for pratfalls to cushion a real drop or faking out an enemy with your improv antics. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Q6vXNDmTwDom59GV]{Feign Death} feat, ignoring the prerequisites. In addition, you can use Performance instead of Deception to [[/act create-a-diversion skill=performance]].

Kiss it Better.name: 让它好起来 Kiss it Better
Kiss it Better.description:
需求 你有一只手空着，且邻接一名生命值未满的盟友。

你进行一次象征性的医疗举动，让盟友相信自己已经从伤势中恢复。以与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势} 相同的 DC 进行一次欺瞒检定。若成功，目标获得等同于治疗伤势对应生命值恢复量一半的临时生命值。这些临时生命值持续 1 轮。Kiss It Better 不会移除濒死条件。目标会在 24 小时内暂时免疫 Kiss It Better。

Requirements You have a hand free and are adjacent to an ally who isn't at full Hit Points.

You perform a token medical effort to convince an ally they've recovered from an injury. Attempt a Deception check with the same DC as for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. On a success, the target gains temporary Hit Points equal to half the corresponding amount of Hit Points from Treat Wounds. These temporary Hit Points last 1 round. Kiss It Better doesn't remove the wounded condition. The target is temporarily immune to Kiss It Better for 24 hours.

Work's Never Done.name: 工作永远做不完 Work's Never Done
Work's Never Done.description:
作为一名育群照料者的经历磨炼了你，使你几乎不需要休息也能正常行动。你只需要睡两个小时就能获得一整夜休息的效果，而不是八小时。当你处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} 时，你仍然可以进行探索活动。

Your experience as a brood-minder has hardened you, and you can function fully with little to no rest. You require only two hours of sleep to get a full night's rest, rather than eight. You can use exploration activities when @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}.

Brutal Barrage.name: 残暴连射 Brutal Barrage
Brutal Barrage.description:
要求 你正持用一把区域或自动武器。

你准备好完美的一击，足以撕裂那些最靠近冲击点的目标。如果你的下一个动作是 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xND8wnEdnGSq84kn]{回旋猛击}，则对与冲击中心点相邻的目标，或位于锥形或线形攻击前 10 尺内的目标，额外增加两个武器伤害骰。
