Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

You prepare the perfect shot, able to tear through those closest to the impact point. If your next action is to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xND8wnEdnGSq84kn]{Whirling Swipe}, add two additional weapon damage dice to targets who are adjacent to the center point of impact or within the first 10 feet of a cone or line.

Psychic Constellation.name: 灵能星座 Psychic Constellation
Psychic Constellation.description:
你用心灵感应毫不费力地操纵各式装备，使自己看起来像一颗被行星般物件环绕的太阳小脑球体。你获得第二组念动力之手，如同“心胜于物”所述，使一名典型的默思族总共拥有六只手。只要你的念动力之手中至少有一只空着，你就可以偏转来袭的攻击，使你的拳头攻击获得格挡特征。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.fQJ8xyZH3Dch5xtN]{离心轨道} 自由动作。

You effortlessly juggle an assortment of gear with your telepathy, giving you the appearance of a solar cerebellum orbited by planetoid items. You gain a second set of telekinetic hands, per Mind Over Matter, granting a typical contemplative six hands total. While at least one of your telekinetic hands is empty, you can deflect incoming attacks, granting your fist attack the parry trait. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.fQJ8xyZH3Dch5xtN]{Eccentric Orbit} free action.

Dramatic Blocking.name: 戏剧性格挡 Dramatic Blocking
Dramatic Blocking.description:
多年的练习让你知道如何利用舞台上的每一寸空间，即使在狭小场地中也能献上精彩绝伦的表演。只要你能够行动，你就不会对等级等于或低于你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉} 或夹击你的生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

Thanks to years of practice, you know how to use every inch of the stage and give a fantastic performance even in tight quarters. While you can act, you aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, or flanking creatures of your level or lower.

Flip the Script.name: 逆转剧本 Flip the Script
Flip the Script.description:
频率 每日一次

触发器 你掷先攻时。

整个世界都是舞台，而你知晓剧本——你预判场景的走向，然后打乱对手的节奏。你可以选择掷两次并取较好的结果，以表演代替你通常用于先攻的属性。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative.

All the world is a stage and you know the script—you anticipate the direction of the scene and then change it up on your opponents. You can choose to roll twice and take the better result, substituting Performance for the statistic you would normally use for initiative.

Clustered Shots.name: 集束射击 Clustered Shots
Clustered Shots.description:
需求 你正持用一把枪，且其中至少装有 3 次 expend 份额的弹药。

你向目标倾泻出一阵弹雨。你先 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对你的标记进行一次远程 Strike，并从其弹匣中扣除等同于你武器 expend 三倍的数量。将此次攻击掷两次，并使用较好的结果。此次攻击无视攻击检定的情境减值，以及因目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{躲藏} 而需要进行的任何平检。

Requirements You're wielding a gun with at least 3 expend worth of ammunition.

You shoot a spray of bullets at a target. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim}, make a ranged Strike against your mark, and subtract three times your weapon's expend from its magazine. Roll the attack twice, and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

Swerveshift.name: 疾转位移 Swerveshift
Swerveshift.description:
触发条件 一个生物以你为目标进行一次攻击。

需求 你已察觉到该次攻击，且对于此次触发攻击你不处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}状态。

你迅速变形为更小的体型，以避免被击中。针对该次触发攻击，你的 AC、强韧 DC 和反射 DC 获得等于你变形时体型差距级数的环境加值（如果你小 1 个体型，则为 +1；如果你小 2 个体型，则为 +2；以此类推）。

Trigger A creature targets you with an attack.

Requirements You are aware of the attack and are not @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to the triggering attack.

You quickly Change Shape into a smaller size to avoid getting hit. You gain a circumstance bonus to AC, Fortitude DC, and Reflex DC against the triggering attack equal to the number of steps between your sizes when you Change Shape (+1 if you are one size smaller, +2 if you are two sizes smaller, and so on).

Shifter's Reach.name: 变形者的触及 Shifter's Reach
Shifter's Reach.description:
你可以将身体伸展成长长的触手状肢体，从更远的距离打击敌人。持续1分钟，当你施放接触距离的法术和进行徒手打击时，你的触及增加至10英尺。这不会改变你近战武器攻击的触及。

You can stretch your body into long tentacular limbs to strike enemies from further away. For 1 minute, increase your reach when you're delivering touch range spells and making unarmed Strikes to 10 feet. This doesn't change the reach of your melee weapon attacks.

Adaptable Intellect.name: 适应性智力 Adaptable Intellect
Adaptable Intellect.description:
需求 你可以使用信息圈、图书馆或类似的资料库。

对其他人而言可能要花上一生才能掌握的知识，你只需进行一次短暂而高强度的学习，就能暂时吸收。在你进行每日准备时，你可以查阅文献，使你自选的一项技能获得受训熟练等级。该熟练度会持续到你再次进行准备时为止。由于这种熟练度是暂时的，你不能将其用作技能提升或永久角色选项（如专长）的前置条件。

Requirements You have access to an infosphere, library, or similar reference collection.

What might take other minds a lifetime to master, you can temporarily absorb through a brief, intense study session. During your daily preparations, you can review literature to gain the trained proficiency rank in one skill of your choice. This proficiency lasts until you prepare again. Since this proficiency is temporary, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a skill increase or a permanent character option (like a feat).

Rapid Mantel.name: 鹞子翻身 Rapid Mantel
Rapid Mantel.description: 你可以轻松地将自己拉回支撑平台之上。当你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge}时，可以将自己拉上抓住的平面并站立。你可以用运动技能取代反射豁免来抓住边缘。若你攀爬（Climb）或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃 Leap}到平台边缘下方5尺之内，可以用该行动的一部分将自己拉上平台并站立。

Undead Scholar.name: 不死生物学者 Undead Scholar
Undead Scholar.description:
你们族群与伊奥克斯长期冲突的历史让你保持警惕。你获得宗教的受训熟练度。如果你已经受训于宗教，则改为获得你自选另一项技能的受训熟练度。你在回忆关于不死生物的知识的检定中获得+1环境加值。

Your people's long history of clashing with Eox has made you wary. You become trained in Religion. If you were already trained in Religion, you become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to Recall Knowledge about undead creatures.

Cosmic Caster.name: 太空施法者 Cosmic Caster
Cosmic Caster.description:
你拥有将环境中的太阳辐射和其他恒星能量转化为纯粹魔法光芒的能力。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Sqo1uzSmebVWpqoT]{Wisp Ally} 作为一个1环奥术先天法术，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.2ZdHjnpEQJuqOYSG]{Floating Flame} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0qaqksrGGDj74HXE]{Revealing Light} 作为2环奥术先天法术。你每天可以将这些法术各施放一次，且均作为奥术先天法术施放。

You have the ability to convert ambient solar radiation and other stellar energy into pure magical light. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Sqo1uzSmebVWpqoT]{Wisp Ally} as a 1st-rank arcane innate spell and gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.2ZdHjnpEQJuqOYSG]{Floating Flame} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0qaqksrGGDj74HXE]{Revealing Light} as 2nd-rank arcane innate spells. You can cast each of these spells as arcane innate spells once per day.

Born to Fly.name: 天生会飞 Born to Fly
Born to Fly.description:
你觉得飞行令人振奋，并以施展令人印象深刻的空中特技动作为生。你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Qf1ylAbdVi1rkc8M]{飞行机动} 的特技检定时获得+1环境加值，并且在驾驶载具或星舰以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uS3qDAgOkZ7b8ERL]{驾驶} 时的驾驶检定中也获得该加值。当你在进行飞行机动的特技检定时掷出严重失败时，你改为获得失败。

You find flying exhilarating and live to perform impressive aerial maneuvers. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Qf1ylAbdVi1rkc8M]{Maneuver in Flight} and on Piloting checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uS3qDAgOkZ7b8ERL]{Drive} a vehicle or starship. When you roll a critical failure on an Acrobatics check to Maneuver in Flight, you get a failure instead.

Brood-Minder.name: 育巢监护者 Brood-Minder
Brood-Minder.description:
你曾担任，或正在接受训练以成为一名育巢者，负责抚养和教育数十只雏体。这是一项持续多年的工作，需要极强的耐力。你变为受训于社群。若你本会自动在此技能上变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上变为受训。此外，你在豁免以抵抗变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}时获得+2环境加值。

You've served as, or are training to become, a brood-minder responsible for rearing and educating dozens of hatchlings. It's a multi-year job requiring extreme endurance. You become trained in Society. If you would automatically become trained in this skill (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus on saves to resist becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}.

Sense Emotions.name: 感知情绪 Sense Emotions
Sense Emotions.description:
你能够感知他人的情绪，尽管你缺乏分辨这些情绪复杂性的能力。你获得情绪感知，作为一种不精确感官，范围为30英尺。这意味着你可以探测并确定具有情绪的生物的位置。当使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{寻找} 动作来发现位于你情绪感知范围内、处于情绪效果影响下的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽} 或未被察觉的生物时，你的察觉检定获得+2环境加值，例如处于狂暴、恐慌状态，或受到任何具有情绪特征的法术影响。

You can detect the emotions of others, though you lack the ability to sort out the complexities of these emotions. You gain emotion sense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet. This means you can detect and determine the location of creatures that possess emotions. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks when using the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action to find @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or undetected creatures within the range of your emotion sense who's under an emotion effect, such as rage, the frightened condition, or any spell with the emotion trait.

Danger Awareness.name: 危险感知 Danger Awareness
Danger Awareness.description:
你拥有一种直觉般的感知，能警示你危险，并让你察觉隐藏威胁的存在。你在寻找陷阱以及 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{未注意到}生物时的察觉检定获得 +1 处境加值；对抗陷阱以及隐匿、未察觉和未注意到生物所做攻击的 AC 获得 +1 处境加值；以及对抗陷阱的豁免获得 +1 处境加值。即使你没有进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}，你仍然可以进行一次检定来发现通常要求你处于搜索状态才能发现的陷阱。你仍然需要满足发现该陷阱的其他任何要求。如果你的先攻结果与对手持平，你总是先行动。

You have an intuitive sense that alerts you to danger and allows you to discern the presence of hidden threats. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find traps and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed} creatures; to AC against attacks made by traps and hidden, undetected, and unnoticed creatures; and to saves against traps. Even if you aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Searching}, you get a check to find traps that normally require you to be Searching. You still need to meet any other requirements to find the trap. If your initiative result is tied with an opponent, you always go first.

Arctic Bite.name: 极地之咬 Arctic Bite
Arctic Bite.description:
你啃咬的冰冻力量变得不可抗拒。你的颚击攻击造成的寒冷伤害提高为 @Damage[2d6[untyped]] 伤害，并且无视目标等同于你等级的寒冷抗性。生物的免疫力不受影响。

The freezing power of your bite becomes irresistible. The cold damage dealt by your jaws Strike increases to @Damage[2d6[untyped]] damage and ignores an amount of the target's cold resistance equal to your level. A creature's immunities are unaffected.

Devastating Aim.name: 毁灭性瞄准 Devastating Aim
Devastating Aim.description:
你精准命中的射击会对目标造成毁灭性的伤口。当你瞄准时，将精确伤害骰从d4提升为d6。

Your well-placed shots inflict devastating wounds on your targets. When you Aim, increase the precision damage dice from d4s to d6s.

Hurry.name: 快点 Hurry
Hurry.description:
你敦促一名盟友加快步伐，更积极地参与周围发生的事件。30英尺内一名能够感知到你的盟友获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，持续1轮。他们可以将这个额外动作用于 交互、调整步或大步移动。随后，目标在接下来的10分钟内暂时免疫 Hurry。

You urge an ally to pick up the pace and contribute more to the events happening around them. One ally within 30 feet who can sense you becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} for 1 round. They can use the extra action to Interact, Step, or Stride. The target is then temporarily immune to Hurry for the next 10 minutes.

Lucky Improviser.name: 幸运即兴者 Lucky Improviser
Lucky Improviser.description:
你是即兴应变的大师，各方面都有一点天赋——即使你根本不知道自己在做什么。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9jGaBxLUtevZYcZO]{未受训即兴发挥}普通专长。此外，你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.00RryKnz4fXq455m]{新手好运}动作。

You're a master improviser with a bit of talent at everything—even if you have no idea what you're doing. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9jGaBxLUtevZYcZO]{Untrained Improvisation} general feat. In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.00RryKnz4fXq455m]{Beginner's Luck} action.

Waste Not.name: 物尽其用 Waste Not
Waste Not.description:
通过谨慎专注，你确保目标失去的生命能量会被你的活力网络捕获。若你接下来使用的动作是施放一个对活体生物造成虚空伤害的法术，你的活力网络获得等同于该法术环阶两倍的生命值。

特殊 你可以在不具有塑法特征的情况下使用“绝不浪费”。若你如此做，且你接下来的动作是用造成虚空伤害的武器进行一次打击，则你的活力网络每个武器伤害骰获得 2 点生命值。

With careful focus, you guarantee vital energy lost from a target is caught by your vitality network. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that deals void damage to a living creature, your vitality network gains Hit Points equal to twice the spell's rank.

Special You can Waste Not without the spellshape trait. If you do and your next action is to Strike with a weapon that deals void damage, your vitality network gains 2 Hit Points per weapon damage die.

Hologram Skeptic.name: 全息影像怀疑论者 Hologram Skeptic
Hologram Skeptic.description:
你很容易发现全息影像中的细微故障与瑕疵。即使你没有进行{@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}}，你也总是会尝试进行检定，以识破那些通常需要你对其进行{@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}}或与之互动的、具有幻觉和科技特征的全息影像与效果。

You easily spot the tiny glitches and imperfections in holograms. Even if you aren't Searching, you always attempt a check to disbelieve holograms and effects with the illusion and tech traits that normally require you to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} or Interact with them.

Vicious Takedown.name: 凶狠击倒 Vicious Takedown
Vicious Takedown.description:
需求 你的上一动作是对一个体型至少比你大一级的生物进行的一次近战打击，且成功命中。

你知道，身形娇小只意味着你需要更凶狠才能生存，并且已经学会了在面对更大的敌人时利用自己的体型优势。进行一次运动检定以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔} 目标，并无视体型需求。如果你的检定结果为大失败，则改为失败。

Requirements Your most recent action was a success on a melee Strike against a creature who is at least one size larger than you.

You know that being small only means you need to be more vicious to survive and have learned to use your size to your advantage against larger foes. Attempt an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} the target, ignoring the size requirements. If you roll a critical failure, you get a failure instead.

Natural Grace.name: 天生优雅 Natural Grace
Natural Grace.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你的特技技能检定或反射豁免检定失败。

你对自身动作的控制几乎达到超自然的程度，这有时能在危险情境中救你一命。你可以重掷触发此次能力的技能检定或豁免检定，即使第二次结果更差，也必须采用第二次结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail an Acrobatics check or Reflex saving throw.

You have an almost supernatural control of your movements, which can sometimes save you in dangerous situations. You can reroll the triggering skill check or saving throw, using the second result even if it's worse.

Opportune Retort.name: 机智反驳 Opportune Retort
Opportune Retort.description:
触发条件 一个生物对你进行近战攻击检定时严重失败。

你利用敌人防御中的破绽。对触发该反应的生物进行一次远程打击。

Trigger A creature critically fails on a melee attack roll against you.

You take advantage of the opening in your foe's defenses. Make a ranged Strike against the triggering creature.

Mighty Guardian.name: 强大守护者 Mighty Guardian
Mighty Guardian.description:
你用来保护他人的魔法火花力量增强。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d7Lwx6KAs47MtF0q]{分担生命} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HTou8cG05yuSkesj]{状态} 作为2环神圣天生法术施放，每种法术每天各一次。

The magical spark you use to protect others grows in power. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d7Lwx6KAs47MtF0q]{Share Life} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HTou8cG05yuSkesj]{Status} as 2nd-rank divine innate spells, once per day each.

Drift Strike.name: 漂流域打击 Drift Strike
Drift Strike.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 你的上一个动作是一次近战打击，且重击了一个生物。

你将被所需打击命中的生物发射进漂流域，以将其重新定位到战场的另一处。该生物被传送到你选择的位置，距离其起始位置最多20英尺，且位于你的视线范围内。如果你位于漂流域中，你能传送该生物的距离加倍。该生物必须能够容纳于其新位置，且其新位置必须未被占据。该生物可以尝试一次@Check[will|against:class-spell]豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 你能传送该生物的距离减半，且不能将其移动到危险位置或会导致坠落的位置。

失败 你将该生物传送至上述距离内的任意位置。

大失败 同失败，但你能传送该生物的距离加倍。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Requirements Your last action was a melee Strike that critically hit a creature.

You launch the creature you hit with the required Strike into the Drift to reposition it across the battlefield. The creature is teleported to a location of your choice up to a distance of 20 feet from its starting location and within your line of sight. If you're in the Drift, the distance you can teleport the creature is doubled. The creature must be able to fit in its new location, and its new location must be unoccupied. The creature can attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The distance you can teleport the creature is halved, and it can't be moved to a location that is hazardous or would result in a fall.

Failure You teleport the creature up to the noted distance.

Critical Failure As failure, but the distance you can teleport the creature is doubled.

Monitoring Bond.name: 监测纽带 Monitoring Bond
Monitoring Bond.description:
只要你和你的结合伙伴位于同一存在位面且双方都活着，你们就可以彼此进行心灵感应交流，并且双方都会知晓彼此当前的状态、彼此的大致方向与距离，以及对方是否处于清醒、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}或濒死状态。你们双方还会知晓彼此受到的任何状态影响，但受影响角色自己并不知晓的那些状态除外。

As long as you and your bonded partner are on the same plane of existence and both alive, you can communicate telepathically together and both remain aware of one another's present state, general direction and distance from one another, and if they are conscious, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, or dying. You both know any conditions affecting one another, except those that the affected character does not know about.

Cleanse Spirit.name: 净魂术 Cleanse Spirit
Cleanse Spirit.description:
通过你对传统卡萨萨治疗仪式与冥想修习的知识，你已学会净化病患或心神困扰者的身体与心灵。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{净化苦难} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Et8RSCLx8w7uOLvo]{健全之躯}，作为4环天赋异术奥秘法术。你每天可以各施放一次这些天赋异术奥秘法术。

Through your knowledge of traditional kasathan healing rituals and meditative practices, you've learned to cleanse the body and mind of the ill or troubled. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Cleanse Affliction} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Et8RSCLx8w7uOLvo]{Sound Body} as 4th-rank occult innate spells. You can cast each of these occult innate spells once per day.

Search High and Low!.name: 高低搜个遍！ Search High and Low!
Search High and Low!.description:
你提醒盟友在紧张局势中留意敌人和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}的事物，并协调他们的行动，使他们能更高效地这样做。直到你下个回合开始前，你和你的盟友进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}的察觉检定获得 +2 处境加值。随着你的特使等级提高，该加值在 7 级时提升为 +3、12 级时提升为 +4、17 级时提升为 +5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.E5oRUzuYh5rLlPzu]{效果：彻底搜索！}

以身作则 如果你用了两个动作，则进行搜索。你100英尺内每个能够感知到你的盟友也都可以立刻以反应进行搜索。

You alert your allies to look for enemies and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} things in a stressful situation, coordinating their efforts so they can do so more efficiently. Until the beginning of your next turn, you and your allies gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}. As your envoy level increases, increase the bonus to +3 at 7th level, +4 at 12th level, and +5 at 17th level.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.E5oRUzuYh5rLlPzu]{Effect: Search High and Low!}

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Seek. Each of your allies within 100 feet who can sense you can also immediately Seek as a reaction.

Sequester Form.name: 封藏形态 Sequester Form
Sequester Form.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发条件 你成为一个精神效果的目标。

你可以通过将自己的一个神经网络与其他神经网络隔离来保护自己的意识，在安全之前切断自己与该身份的联系。你变形，并免疫于触发的精神效果。如果你在该精神效果的持续时间结束前变形为任何与该形态共享同一族裔的形态，你将不再免疫，且该精神效果会继续影响你。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger You're targeted by a mental effect.

You can shield your consciousness by blocking one of your neural networks from the others, cutting yourself off from the identity until it's safe. You Change Shape and become immune to the triggering mental effect. You are no longer immune and the mental effect continues to affect you if you Change Shape into any form that shares an ancestry with that form before the duration of the mental effect expires.

Legendary Professional.name: 传奇业者 Legendary Professional
Legendary Professional.description:
你的名声已经传遍整个银河（例如，如果你拥有战争学识，你可能是一位传奇将军或战术家）。这如同 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.467qQoiy6bjWU1G8]{传奇表演者}，但当你以学识进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{赚取收入} 时，你会获得更高等级的工作。

Your fame has spread throughout the galaxy (for instance, if you have Warfare Lore, you might be a legendary general or tactician). This works as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.467qQoiy6bjWU1G8]{Legendary Performer}, except you gain higher-level jobs when you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income} with Lore.

Galactic Bond.name: 星系纽带 Galactic Bond
Galactic Bond.description:
你可以额外与数量等于你的感知调整值（至少为1）的母星建立联结，这会计入你的联结上限。行星联结的典范、禁忌和效果现在会扩展至所有已联结的行星。

在14级时，将 teleport 加入你的原始法术列表。你习得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7DN13ILADW2N9Z1t]{Commune} 仪式，但你只能使用自然来施放该仪式。

在18级时，当你施放具有 teleport 特征的法术时，将所有已联结的行星都视为与你处于同一恒星系内。无论你当前位于何处，你都可以每天一次以你的法术DC将 wrathful storm 作为原始先天法术施放。

You can bond with a number of additional home worlds equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1), which count against your bond limit. Planetary Bond's edicts, anathemas, and effects now extend to all bonded planets.

At 14th level, add teleport to your primal spell list. You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7DN13ILADW2N9Z1t]{Commune} ritual, but can only use Nature to cast this ritual.

At 18th level, treat all bonded planets as within the same solar system as you when casting a spell with the teleport trait. Regardless of your current location, you can cast wrathful storm as a primal innate spell once per day using your spell DC.

Expeditious Search.name: 迅速搜寻 Expeditious Search
Expeditious Search.description: 你所用的方法让你能够飞快地搜寻，以两倍于他人的速度发现细节和秘密。在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜寻 Search}一个区域时，你只需花费正常情况下一半的时间。这意味着，你在探索期间保持搜寻将进入的区域时，可以将移动速度翻倍（至多不超过你速度的一半）。若你在察觉上的熟练度达到传奇，改为以四倍速度搜寻区域。

Underfoot.name: 足下 Underfoot
Underfoot.description:
你利用自己的体型来对付更大的敌人，迅速在其周围移动以避免被注意到或保持在其攻击范围之外。只要你处于小型，你就可以在一次成功的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{翻滚穿越} 动作结束时，停留在一个中型或更大的敌人的空间内。该敌人必须具有合适的肢体，或以其他方式为这一机动留出足够空间，具体由 GM 决定。例如，你不能占据一个完全填满该方格全部尺寸的软泥怪的空间。当你占据敌人的空间时，该敌人对你处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态。

You use your size against larger foes, quickly moving around them to avoid notice or stay out of reach. As long as you're Small, you can end a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through} action in a Medium or larger enemy's space. The enemy must have appropriate limbs or otherwise leave you enough room for this maneuver, as determined by the GM. You couldn't, for example, occupy the space of an ooze that matches the full dimensions of the square. While you occupy an enemy's space, that enemy is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to you.

Expert Witchwarper Spellcasting.name: 巫战扭曲者专家施法 Expert Witchwarper Spellcasting
Expert Witchwarper Spellcasting.description:
你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#expert-spellcasting-feat]{专家法术施放} 的益处。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#expert-spellcasting-feat]{Expert Spellcasting} benefits.

Lashunta Lore.name: 拉申塔人传说 Lashunta Lore
Lashunta Lore.description:
你研究过其他拉申塔人的生活与成就；他们提升了自身的灵能力量，也改善了自己的社群。你获得神秘学和社群的受训熟练等级。若你会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项你自选的技能上成为受训。

你还获得用于拉申塔人知识的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}通用专长。

You've studied the lives and achievements of other lashuntas who have improved both their psychic powers and their communities. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Occultism and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Lashunta Lore.

Floating Balance.name: 漂浮平衡 Floating Balance
Floating Balance.description:
你习惯于在广阔的海洋中自由漂浮，即使周围没有任何可及之物也不会慌乱。当处于未束缚状态时，你不会获得笨拙或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状况。

You are accustomed to floating free in the wide ocean and don't lose your cool when you have nothing within reach. You don't gain the clumsy or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} conditions when untethered.

Automatic Knowledge.name: 耳熟能详 Automatic Knowledge
Automatic Knowledge.description:
你能够不假思索地想起基础的事实。选择一项熟练度达到专家且拥有“驾轻就熟”专长的技能。每轮一次，你能够用该技能以自由动作使用回忆知识行动，但如此做时，必须对本次技能检定应用“驾轻就熟”。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长，每次选择不同的技能。你可以用所选的任意技能使用“耳熟能详”，但每轮还是总共只能使用一次。

Lengthy Diversion.name: 持久分神 Lengthy Diversion
Lengthy Diversion.description: 当你的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}取得大成功时，你可以在你的回合结束后继续保持@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}。此效果持续时间由GM根据分神方式和情况决定（最少额外1轮）。

Propulsive Shield.name: 推进护盾 Propulsive Shield
Propulsive Shield.description:
你通过已举起的护盾发射太阳能量的爆发，利用其引力来推进你的攻击。当你在已举起太阳护盾时进行一次太阳耀斑 Strike，将你的太阳耀斑的射程增量增加 10 尺，并使你的太阳耀斑造成的伤害每个武器伤害骰增加 1 点。

引力子调谐 额外伤害为钝击伤害。若你重击成功，你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} 尝试时获得 +2 情境加值。

光子调谐 额外伤害为火焰伤害。重击成功时，持续火焰伤害提高至 1d8。

You fire blasts of solar energy through your raised shield, harnessing its gravitational force to propel your attacks. When you make a solar flare Strike while you have your solar shield raised, increase the range increment of your solar flare by 10 feet and increase the damage your solar flare deals by 1 per weapon damage die.

Graviton-Attuned The additional damage is bludgeoning damage. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} attempt on a critical success.

Photon-Attuned The additional damage is fire damage. Increase the persistent fire damage on a critical success to 1d8.

Prophet.name: 先知 Prophet
Prophet.description:
你能够预知未来。你每天可以各施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pkcOby5prOausy1k]{Read Omens} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Jmxru8zMdYMRuO5n]{Vision of Death}，作为4环法术。该法术的传统与你从 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Kgtj8NRoBnWCK9qw]{Sigiled Scales} 获得的戏法传统相同。

在17级时，vision of death 的环阶提升至6环。

You can divine the future. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pkcOby5prOausy1k]{Read Omens} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Jmxru8zMdYMRuO5n]{Vision of Death} each once per day as 4th-rank spells. The tradition of this spell matches the tradition of the cantrip you gained from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Kgtj8NRoBnWCK9qw]{Sigiled Scales}.

At 17th level, the rank of vision of death increases to 6th.

Powerful Leap.name: 强力跳跃 Powerful Leap
Powerful Leap.description: 未采取@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳高 High Jump}行动时，你的垂直@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳跃 Leap}可达5尺高度。你还会在跳跃时增加5尺水平距离，包括跳高和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远 Long Jump}。

Bolstered By Battle.name: 战斗鼓舞 Bolstered By Battle
Bolstered By Battle.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你对一名敌人造成致命一击。

你战斗并不只是因为不得不战斗；战斗的威胁与胜利的快感会使你精神振奋。你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值。这些临时生命值持续 1 分钟，或直到遭遇结束，以先发生者为准。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You deal the killing blow to an enemy.

You don't just fight because you have to; the threat of battle and the thrill of victory invigorate you. You gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to your level. These temporary Hit Points last for 1 minute or until the encounter ends, whichever comes first.

Mounted Unity.name: 骑乘协同 Mounted Unity
Mounted Unity.description:
你将你的羁绊伙伴驮入战斗的能力进一步提升了，而且你们如同同一具身躯、同一个心智般行动。当你的羁绊伙伴将你作为坐骑骑乘时，你在自己回合开始时获得三个动作，而非通常的两个。

Your ability to bear your bonded partner into battle has further improved, and you act as one body and one mind. When your bonded partner rides you as a mount, you gain three actions at the start of your turn, rather than the two you normally would.

Twin Shooter.name: 双枪射手 Twin Shooter
Twin Shooter.description:
当你挥舞双枪时，你尤其危险。只要你持握两把简易枪械，这两把枪械都获得灵巧特征。

You're especially dangerous while brandishing twin guns. As long as you're wielding two simple guns, both guns gain the agile trait.

Linguistic Master.name: 语言大师 Linguistic Master
Linguistic Master.description:
你对语言的精通达到了超自然的境界。你可以每天一次仅以自己为目标，将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K]{真言} 作为一个5环天赋异能奥术法术施放。若在施放该法术之前，你已与所交谈的生物共享一种语言，则在法术持续期间，你的外交检定获得+1状态加值。

Your mastery of language reaches supernatural levels. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K]{Truespeech} as a 5th-rank occult innate spell once per day on yourself only. You gain a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks for the duration of the spell when speaking to creatures with whom you already shared a language before Casting the Spell.

Ruin Delver.name: 废墟探究者 Ruin Delver
Ruin Delver.description:
你对散布在拉约克地表与轨道各处的远古遗迹深感着迷。无论你是回收材料以再利用的拾荒者、寻找独特科技奇观的创新者，还是希望探寻过去秘密的学者，你都会无视危险，进入这些古老遗址。你在寻找危险的察觉检定、解除危险的技能检定、对抗危险所作攻击的 AC，以及对抗危险的豁免中，获得 +1 情况加值。

You're fascinated by the ancient ruins scattered across Lajok's surface and orbit. Whether you're a scrapper harvesting materials for reuse, an innovator looking for a unique technological wonder, or a scholar hoping to glean secrets of the past, you enter these ancient sites, heedless of the danger. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find hazards, to skill checks to disable hazards, to AC against attacks made by hazards, and to saves against hazards.

Cantrip Expansion.name: 戏法扩展 Cantrip Expansion
Cantrip Expansion.description:
学习拓宽了你所掌握的简单法术范围。将你的法术列表中的另外两个戏法加入你的法术库。

Study broadens your range of simple spells. Add two additional cantrips from your spell list to your repertoire.

Come Get Some!.name: 放马过来！ Come Get Some!
Come Get Some!.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你的生命值降至 0，并将要陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}。

你奋战到最后一刻，逼迫自己对一个敌人发动最后一次攻击。进行一次 Strike，承受 –2 情境减值；或者进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire} 攻击，忽略笨重特征，且豁免 DC 降低 2。该攻击结算完毕后，你立即陷入昏迷并获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} 状态。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You are reduced to 0 Hit Points and would fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}.

You fight on to the absolute last, pushing yourself to make one final attack at a foe. Make a Strike with a –2 circumstance penalty, or make an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire} attack ignoring the unwieldy trait and with the save DC decreased by 2. After the attack is concluded, you immediately fall unconscious and gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition.

Glimpse of the Bloom.name: 绽放一瞥 Glimpse of the Bloom
Glimpse of the Bloom.description:
经过多年的练习，你已经磨炼出看穿第一世界的诡计与幻象的能力。每天一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{真视术} 作为原始内在法术施放；对于任何相关的反制检定，使用你的职业 DC 或法术 DC 中较高者，再减去 10。

Through years of practice, you've honed your ability to see through tricks and illusions of the First World. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight} as a primal innate spell; use the higher of your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher, minus 10 for any associated counteract checks.

Advanced General Training.name: 进阶通用训练 Advanced General Training
Advanced General Training.description:
在冒险生涯的漫长旅途中，你的适应力让自己习得了许多有用的能力。你获得一个7级或更低等级的通用专长，你必须满足该专长的先决条件。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长，但每次都要选择一个不同的通用专长。

Diehard.name: 顽强 Diehard
Diehard.description: 你比大多数人更难被杀死。你在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死 Dying 5}时才会死亡，而非濒死4。

Instinctive Aim.name: 本能瞄准 Instinctive Aim
Instinctive Aim.description:
你以同一个动作拔出你的枪并谨慎瞄准。你进行一次交互以拔出一把远程武器或切换持握手，然后用该远程武器 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}。

You draw your gun and take careful aim with the same motion. You Interact to draw a ranged weapon or Switch Hands and then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} with that ranged weapon.

Powerful Exhalation.name: 强力吐息 Powerful Exhalation
Powerful Exhalation.description:
你喷吐能量的能力无与伦比。你的龙人吐息范围扩大为 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]，且伤害骰由 d4 改为 d6。若你拥有任意武器的致命专精效果，则对抗你的龙人吐息进行反射豁免时获得重度失败的生物，会受到其对应的武器致命专精效果影响。

Your ability to breathe energy is unparalleled. The area of your Dragonkin Breath increases to a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] and the damage dice are d6s instead of d4s. If you have the critical specialization effect of any weapon, a creature that gets a critical failure on their Reflex save against your dragonkin breath are affected by its corresponding critical weapon specialization effect.

Repeating Role.name: 重复角色 Repeating Role
Repeating Role.description:
就像为你最具标志性的角色之一再加演一场返场演出一样，你学会了如何在片场之外更好地运用自己的训练。你现在可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.oRZuA2FNSAcI9hO6]{角色剧目}，而非每天一次。

Just like giving an encore performance of one of your most iconic roles, you learn how to better use your training off the set. You can now use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.oRZuA2FNSAcI9hO6]{Role Repertoire} once per hour instead of once per day.

Radiant Zone.name: 辉光区域 Radiant Zone
Radiant Zone.description:
你所塑造的现实比你自身所处的现实明亮得多。你的量子场区域变为明亮光照。在你的量子场中开始其回合的生物，必须尝试一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:witchwarper|options:area-effect,inflicts:dazzled,inflicts:blinded] 豁免；具有畏光的生物将其结果视为降低一级。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续 1 轮。

严重失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}，持续 1 轮，随后目眩 1 轮。

The reality you conjure is much brighter than your own. The area of your quantum field becomes bright light. Creatures who begin their turn in your quantum field must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:witchwarper|options:area-effect,inflicts:dazzled,inflicts:blinded] save against your class DC; creatures with light blindness treat their result as one step worse.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, then dazzled for 1 round.

Encore.name: 安可 Encore
Encore.description:
频率 每天一次

你会不断排练自己最拿手的桥段，以便随时准备返场。在此回合中，你接下来采取的动作可以是一个频率为每天一次，且你今天只使用过一次的能力。这不能让你重新使用法术位，或来自20级专长或特性的能力。

Frequency once per day

You consistently rehearse your best bits so that you're always ready for an encore. During this turn, the next action you take can be an ability with a frequency of once per day and that you've used only once today. This doesn't allow you to reuse spell slots or abilities from 20th-level feats or features.

Foil Senses.name: 挫败感知 Foil Senses
Foil Senses.description: 你擅长蒙蔽生物的特殊感官，并且时刻对它们保持戒备。每次采用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{避人耳目 Avoid Notice}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏 Hide}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行 Sneak}行动，你都可以视为总是针对特殊感官采取了预防措施。

According to My Calculations.name: 根据我的计算 According to My Calculations
According to My Calculations.description:
你向一名盟友宣布商业预测以使其受益。进行一次 @Check[business-lore|dc:@self.level] 或 @Check[corporate-lore|dc:@self.level] 检定，对抗一个基于你等级的 DC。无论你是否成功，目标都会在 24 小时内暂时免疫“According to My Calculations”。该增益持续 1 分钟或直到被启用。

大成功 目标在其下一次技能检定或攻击检定上获得 +2 处境加值。

成功 目标在其下一次技能检定或攻击检定上获得 +1 处境加值。

大失败 目标在其下一次技能检定或攻击检定上承受 –1 减值。

You announce business projections to an ally to benefit them. Make a @Check[business-lore|dc:@self.level] or @Check[corporate-lore|dc:@self.level] check against a DC based on your level. Whether or not you're successful, the target becomes temporarily immune to According to My Calculations for 24 hours. The benefit lasts for 1 minute or until activated.

Critical Success The target gains a +2 circumstance bonus on their next skill check or attack roll.

Success The target gains a +1 circumstance bonus on their next skill check or attack roll.

Critical Failure The target takes a –1 penalty to their next skill check or attack roll.

You Can Do It.name: 你做得到 You Can Do It
You Can Do It.description:
需求 你的上一个动作是一个单动作训令。

你激励60英尺内的一名盟友以身作则。作为一个自由动作，该盟友可以立刻执行你上一个动作中的“以身作则”动作，获得任何收益，并使用任何通常会在你以双动作发布该指令时才会使用的能力。判定任何相关收益时，使用你的魅力调整值而非你盟友的，例如“狠狠干他们！”对伤害提供的状态加值。

Requirements Your last action was a 1-action directive.

You motivate an ally within 60 feet to lead by example. As a free action, that ally can immediately perform the lead by example actions of your last action, gaining any benefits and using any abilities that would normally be used as if you used two-actions to issue the direction. Use your Charisma modifier instead of your ally's when determining any relevant benefits, such as the status bonus to damage for Get 'Em!

Basic Epiphany.name: 基础顿悟 Basic Epiphany
Basic Epiphany.description:
你获得你的连接的初始顿悟法术。如果你还没有，你还获得一个由 1 点专注点构成的专注池；你可以通过反思你的连接来进行再专注。

You gain your connection's initial epiphany spell. If you don't already have one, you also gain a focus pool of 1 Focus Point, which you can Refocus by reflecting on your connection.

Wild Bond.name: 野性羁绊 Wild Bond
Wild Bond.description:
明白所有生物都是同一生命织锦的一部分后，你可以调动这份宇宙通用的代码，彻底改变与你建立纽带之生物的基因。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ssOpTABjuHAqNTPu]{狂野纽带} 顿悟法术。

Understanding that all living things are part of the same tapestry of life, you can tap into the universal code to radically alter the genes of creatures in your bond. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ssOpTABjuHAqNTPu]{Wild Bond} epiphany spell.

Skulking Strike.name: 潜行打击 Skulking Strike
Skulking Strike.description:
触发条件 与你占据同一空间的敌人使用了一个操纵动作或一个移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作中离开一个方格。

你从下方发动一次出其不意的攻击。对触发该条件的生物进行一次近战打击。若你的攻击为重击，且触发条件是一个操纵动作，你便打断该动作。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。

Trigger An enemy occupying the same space as you uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

You launch a surprise attack from below. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. If your attack is a critical hit and the trigger was a manipulate action, you disrupt that action. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Suppressing Fire.name: 压制火力 Suppressing Fire
Suppressing Fire.description:
你获得“压制射击”职业特性。

You gain the suppressing fire class feature.

Gorge.name: 峡谷 Gorge
Gorge.description:
你强迫自己代谢比平时所能消化的更多血肉、筋腱与骨骼，尽可能狼吞虎咽地吃下这顿可怖的餐食，以强化你身体的死灵治疗过程。当你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.8ftl9i9rmorxoBow]{吞食血肉} 时，你获得等同于 10 加上你等级一半（向下取整）的临时生命值。这些临时生命值持续 10 分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.b3bGLDuzs0lKS1Oq]{效果：暴食}

You force yourself to metabolize more flesh, gristle, and bone than you can normally stomach, gorging on as much of your grisly meal as possible to bolster your body's necromantic healing processes. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.8ftl9i9rmorxoBow]{Consume Flesh}, you gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to 10 plus half your level, rounded down. These temporary Hit Points last for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.b3bGLDuzs0lKS1Oq]{Effect: Gorge}

Legendary Thief.name: 传奇神偷 Legendary Thief
Legendary Thief.description: 你的盗窃技术令人难以置信。你可以尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k]{盗窃 Steal}某件正在被积极持用、非常显眼、或需要费时除下的东西（比如正被穿戴的鞋子或护甲）。你必须缓慢而小心地行窃，花费至少1分钟（对于那些平常需要费时除下的物品，比如护甲，则需要长得多的时间）。在这段时间内，你必须用某种方法保持@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}，比如借助黑暗或喧闹人群的掩护。如果该物品非常显眼（比如一套全身板甲），即使你盗窃成功，旁观者也会迅速发现它失窃。

Mournful Howl.name: 哀嚎悲啸 Mournful Howl
Mournful Howl.description:
需求 你位于一名具有濒死状态的盟友 30 尺内。

看到一名盟友濒临死亡让你悲痛欲绝。出于挫败，你发出一声哀恸而凄厉的嚎叫，迫使你的敌人也一同感受你的心碎。你对 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的所有敌人造成 @Damage[floor((@item.level - 1)/2)d6[mental]|traits:nonlethal] 非致命精神伤害（使用你的职业 DC 或法术 DC 中较高者进行 @Check[will|against:class-spell|basic] 基础豁免）。若你的等级超过 13 级，则此伤害每再高 2 级便增加 1d6。

Requirements You're within 30 feet of an ally with the dying condition.

The sight of an ally near death overwhelms you with sorrow. In an act of frustration, you unleash a mournful, keening howl that forces your enemies to share in your heartbreak. You deal @Damage[floor((@item.level - 1)/2)d6[mental]|traits:nonlethal] nonlethal mental damage to all enemies in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] (@Check[will|against:class-spell|basic] save using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher). The damage increases by 1d6 for every two levels you have beyond 13th.

Realized Epiphany.name: 顿悟成真 Realized Epiphany
Realized Epiphany.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你逐渐明白，你的活力网络不仅仅是你的魔法的显现，它还是你的连接在形而上层面的体现。若你的下一个动作是施放一个顿悟法术，你可以从你的活力网络中消耗20点生命值来施放它，而不是消耗1点专注点。

Frequency once per minute

You've come to learn that your vitality network isn't just a manifestation of your magic, it's a metaphysical representation of your connection. If your next action is to cast an epiphany spell, you can expend 20 Hit Points from your vitality network to cast it, rather than spending a Focus Point.

Quick Identification.name: 迅速辨识 Quick Identification
Quick Identification.description: 你可以快速辨识魔法（Identify Magic）。在用辨识魔法判断物品、持续性效果、地点的性质时，你只需要花费1分钟，而非正常情况的10分钟。若你的技能熟练度达到大师，只需要用3个动作即可完成该行动；若达到传奇，只需1个动作。

Swift Sneak.name: 迅速潜行 Swift Sneak
Swift Sneak.description: 你在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行 Sneak}时可以全速移动。只要你拥有相应的移动类型，就可以在掘地、攀爬、飞行、游泳时潜行，而非仅在行走时。

Tale Spinner.name: 故事编织者 Tale Spinner
Tale Spinner.description:
你以魔法让族人的故事延续不息。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{幻象} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC]{魔法伎俩} 作为异能先天法术随意施放。戏法会自动升阶至等于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术环阶。

You keep your people's stories alive with magic. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC]{Prestidigitation} as occult innate spells at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

Load-Bearing Hero.name: 承重英雄 Load-Bearing Hero
Load-Bearing Hero.description:
触发条件你和一名相邻盟友针对同一效果进行一次反射或强韧豁免。

无论是撑住正在坍塌的天花板，还是跳进一颗火球之中，你都会挺身而出，挡在盟友与来袭的危险之间。你的豁免结果恶化一级，但你的盟友的豁免结果提升一级。

Trigger You and one adjacent ally attempt a Reflex or Fortitude save against the same effect.

Whether holding up a crumbling ceiling or jumping into a fireball, you interpose yourself between your ally and incoming danger. The result of your save becomes one degree worse, but the result of your ally's save becomes one degree higher.

Bullet Dance.name: 子弹之舞 Bullet Dance
Bullet Dance.description:
需求 你正持用一把枪。

你在战场上翩然起舞，以精准与优雅歼灭敌人。你进行至多两次Stride。在此次移动期间，你至多可以进行三次远程打击。你进行的每次远程打击都必须以不同的生物为目标，且目标必须位于你的第一射程增量内（从你对该目标进行攻击时所在的位置计算）。每次攻击都计入你的多重攻击减值，但在你完成所有攻击之前，不会提高你的减值。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You dance across the battlefield while dispatching enemies with precision and grace. Stride up to twice. You can make up to three ranged Strikes during this movement. Each ranged Strike you make must target a different creature within your first range increment (calculated from the point at which you took your attack at that target). Each attack counts toward your multiple attack penalty but doesn't increase your penalty until you've made all your attacks.

Crowd Control.name: 人群控制 Crowd Control
Crowd Control.description:
你的声音可以盖过人群中的嘈杂。你对人群进行外交检定时获得+2环境加值。每轮第一次你以Stride进入一个包含人群的方格时，你可以尝试进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:20] 检定，将人群从你的道路上移开。在某些情况下，例如人群具有等级或驱散它有人群固定DC时，GM可能会使用不同的DC。

大成功 如同成功，且当你移动时，人群会从所有相邻方格离开。

成功 人群会从你移动进入的方格散开。

失败 人群不会移动，但你可以继续移动。

大失败 人群会强硬地抵抗你，并打断你的Stride。

Your voice can be heard over the noise in a crowd. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks against crowds. The first time each round you Stride into a square containing a crowd, you can attempt a @Check[diplomacy|dc:20] check to move the crowd out of your way. A GM might use a different DC under certain circumstances, such as when the crowd has a level or set DC to disperse.

Critical Success As success, and the crowd departs from all adjacent squares as you move.

Success The crowd disperses from squares you move into.

Failure The crowd doesn't move, but you can continue moving.

Critical Failure The crowd forcefully resists you and disrupts your Stride.

Universal Telepath.name: 通用心灵感应 Universal Telepath
Universal Telepath.description:
频率 每天一次

仅靠言语进行交流不过是低等心智的局限。你的思维在10分钟内将词语、情感、心理意象与难以言喻的刺激编织成意义，在此期间，你可以使用你的有限心灵感应进行交流，而无需共享语言。

在17级时，你可以随意激活此专长。

Frequency once per day

Communication via mere words is a limitation of lesser minds. Your thoughts weave meaning from words, feelings, mental imagery, and ineffable stimuli for 10 minutes, during which you can communicate using your limited telepathy without sharing a language.

At 17th level, you can activate this feat at will.

Plantlike.name: 植物类 Plantlike
Plantlike.description:
你可以变得与一棵普通的树或缠结的藤蔓几乎无法区分。当你处于包含植物群的自然区域时，你进行隐匿检定获得+1境况加值，并且你可以使用欺骗来伪装成植物生命，包括静止不动的植物，如灌木，或植物生物，如卡萨里克。你对这些检定获得+1境况加值。

You can become virtually indistinguishable from a common tree or tangled vines. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks when you're in a natural area that contains flora, and you can use Deception to Impersonate plant life, including stationary plants like shrubs or plant creatures like ksariks. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to these checks.

Nanite Surge.name: 纳米机械激增 Nanite Surge
Nanite Surge.description:
频率 1小时一次

触发 当你在进行一次不超过3个动作的技能检定时

使你身体中的纳米机械激增，迫使你的身体暂时提高效率。你在触发该反应的技能检定时获得+2状态加值。此外，你的生物电路会发光，在1轮中会发出@Template[emanation|distance:10]的昏暗光线。

Improvised Legend.name: 即兴传奇 Improvised Legend
Improvised Legend.description:
你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.WFFYDg0sgjaXCeq6]{即兴精通}，而非每天两次。

You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.WFFYDg0sgjaXCeq6]{Improvised Mastery} once per hour, rather than twice per day.

Scattering Fire.name: 散射火力 Scattering Fire
Scattering Fire.description:
你压倒性的猛攻将敌人如风中落叶般击散。当你施展 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.fSqUeSAFhvBfq4sE]{推撞射击} 时，区域内所有生物都必须尝试强韧豁免以避免被强制移动，而不只是你的主要目标。

Your overwhelming onslaught scatters enemies like leaves in the wind. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.fSqUeSAFhvBfq4sE]{Shoving Shot}, all creatures in the area attempt the Fortitude save to avoid forced movement, rather than just your primary target.

Look Alive.name: 打起精神 Look Alive
Look Alive.description:
你警告盟友远离危险。除了原本的触发条件外，你还可以在范围内的一名盟友尝试进行反射豁免检定之前使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.60BRmtuNHT6mpJOH]{Watch Out}。如果你这么做，环境加值会应用于他们针对触发该效果的反射豁免检定。

当你使用 Watch Out 且触发的攻击失败或严重失败，或者你的盟友在该豁免检定中成功或严重成功时，你的盟友还可以以自由动作进行一次 Stride，最多移动 10 尺。

You warn your ally to move away from danger. You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.60BRmtuNHT6mpJOH]{Watch Out} before an ally in range attempts a Reflex save in addition to its original trigger. If you do, the circumstance bonus applies to their Reflex save against the triggering effect.

When you use Watch Out and the triggering attack fails or critically fails, or your ally succeeds or critically succeeds at the saving throw, your ally can also Stride up to 10 feet as a free action.

Aberrant Shape.name: 畸变形态 Aberrant Shape
Aberrant Shape.description:
你可以化作一种骇人的异怪。当你变形时，你可以选择以下之一：获得4环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}法术和6环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Y8Y0LS6sh4pkxPsq]{Eldritch Bond}法术的效果；获得2环enlarge法术和6环eldritch bond法术（授予三项能力）的效果；或获得6环eldritch bond法术（授予四项能力）的效果。此效果持续1分钟，或直到你变回原形，以先发生者为准。

You can take the form of a terrifying aberration. When you Change Shape, you can choose one of the following: gain the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} spell and 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Y8Y0LS6sh4pkxPsq]{Eldritch Bond} spell; gain the effects of a 2nd-rank enlarge spell and 6th-rank eldritch bond spell granting three abilities; or gain the effects of a 6th-rank eldritch bond spell granting four abilities. This effect lasts for 1 minute or until you shift back, whichever comes first.

Current Rider.name: 当前乘驾者 Current Rider
Current Rider.description:
你像操纵降落伞一样驾驭气流、电磁波和太阳能。无论你从多高处坠落，都不会受到坠落伤害。

You ride air currents, electromagnetic waves, and solar energy like a parachute. You take no damage from falling regardless of the distance you fall.

A Life For a Life.name: 以命偿命 A Life For a Life
A Life For a Life.description:
你已学会操控活力与虚空的力量来欺骗死亡。从以下戏法中选择一种：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RA7VKcen3p56rVyZ]{禁阻守护} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{稳定术}。你可以随意将该法术作为神圣先天法术施放。戏法的升阶法术环阶等于你等级的一半，向上取整。

特殊 你可以选择此专长两次。每次你都必须选择不同的戏法。

You've learned to manipulate the forces of vitality and void to cheat death. Choose one of the following cantrips: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RA7VKcen3p56rVyZ]{Forbidding Ward} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{Stabilize}. You can cast this spell as a divine innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

Special You can select this feat twice. Each time, you must select a different cantrip.

Darkvision Adaptation.name: 黑暗视觉适应 Darkvision Adaptation
Darkvision Adaptation.description:
你已探索过太空中最黑暗的区域，并找到了适应的方法。你获得黑暗视觉。

You've explored the darkest regions of space and found ways to adapt. You gain darkvision.

Shameless Request.name: 大胆请求 Shameless Request
Shameless Request.description:
厚颜无耻的请求正是你的拿手好戏。当你进行[单动作]请求时，提出过分要求所导致的任何 DC 增加减少 2；如果你的请求检定结果为重度失败，则改为失败。虽然这意味着你在进行请求时永远不会导致目标对你的态度降低，但他们最终还是会对这些请求感到厌烦，即使他们对你仍然保持正面态度。

Shameless requests are your specialty. When you Request something, you reduce any DC increases for making an outrageous request by 2, and if you roll a critical failure for your Request, you get a failure instead. While this means you can never cause your target to reduce their attitude toward you by making a Request, they eventually tire of requests, even though they still have a positive attitude toward you.

Baleful Gaze.name: 邪恶凝视 Baleful Gaze
Baleful Gaze.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你拥有一种令人不安的凶兆气场，会使生者心神不宁。你已学会将这种邪恶灵光化为己用，并能以一次专注的凝视恐吓敌人。将你的恶意集中于30尺内一个活着的生物。目标必须进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者；若失败，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}（若重度失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}），并在其处于恐慌时同时陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。一旦你对某个生物使用过“凶兆凝视”，该生物会在24小时内暂时免疫。

Frequency once per minute

You have an ominous presence that unnerves the living. You have learned to harness this sinister aura to your own advantage and can scare your foes with a focused glance. Focus your ill intent at one living creature within 30 feet. The target must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure) and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} as long as it's frightened. Once you've used Baleful Gaze against a creature, it's temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Sharpshooter.name: 神射手 Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description:
你使用所需远程武器对你所瞄准目标进行的远程打击，在你的回合结束前会额外造成 1d4 精确伤害。该伤害在 6 级时提升为 2d4。

Your ranged Strikes against the target of your Aim using the required ranged weapon deal an additional 1d4 precision damage until the end of your turn. This damage increases to 2d4 at 6th level.

Mindward Shield.name: 心灵护盾 Mindward Shield
Mindward Shield.description:
你的太阳护盾既是你身体的锚点，也是你心智的锚点。当你举起你的太阳护盾时，你获得该护盾对意志豁免的境遇加值。此外，当你举起太阳护盾期间，除了其通常的触发条件外，当你因意志豁免失败而受到伤害时，你也可以进行护盾格挡。如果你这样做，触发的伤害会无视你的太阳护盾的物体免疫。

Your solar shield acts as an anchor for your mind as much as your body. When your Raise your solar Shield, you gain the shield's circumstance bonus to Will saves. In addition, while you have your solar shield raised, you can Shield Block when you take damage as a result of a failed Will save, in addition to its usual trigger. If you do, the triggering damage bypasses your solar shield's object immunities.

Clever Improviser.name: 机智应变 Clever Improviser
Clever Improviser.description: 你学会了该如何处理那些超出你能力范围的情况。你获得了@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.9jGaBxLUtevZYcZO]{即兴发挥 Untrained Improvisation}通用专长。此外，哪怕你在技能上的熟练度为未受训，你也可以尝试那些通常需要你具备受训熟练度才能进行的技能动作。

Sigiled Scales.name: 刻纹鳞片 Sigiled Scales
Sigiled Scales.description:
你的鳞片上带有细小的符纹。当你选择此专长时，选择你是受到神祇赐福，还是受到异常力量的赐福。你可以引导鳞片中潜藏的魔法，以随意施放一个戏法作为先天法术。戏法的强化后环阶等于你等级的一半，向上取整。

如果你受到神祇赐福，从神圣法术列表中选择一个戏法。你可以将此戏法作为神圣先天法术随意施放。

如果你受到异常力量赐福，从惑控法术列表中选择一个戏法。你可以将此戏法作为惑控先天法术随意施放。

每当你施放一个由你的纹鳞或将纹鳞列为前提条件的专长所赋予的先天法术时，你鳞片上的符纹都会闪耀魔法能量，散发明亮光照，在10尺半径内持续等同于该法术环阶的分钟数。

Your scales are marked with tiny sigils. When you select this feat, choose if you were blessed by a god or by an aberrant force. You can tap into the latent magic in your scales to cast a cantrip as an innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

If you are blessed by a god, choose one cantrip from the divine spell list. You can cast this cantrip as a divine innate spell at will.

If you are blessed by an aberrant force, choose one cantrip from the occult spell list. You can cast this cantrip as an occult innate spell at will.

Whenever you cast an innate spell granted by your Sigiled Scales or a feat that lists Sigiled Scales as a prerequisite, the sigils on your scales glow with magical energy, shedding bright light in a 10-foot radius for a number of minutes equal to the spell's rank.

Legendary Medic.name: 传奇医师 Legendary Medic
Legendary Medic.description: 你的医术取得了突破性进展，或是发现了可产生奇迹般效果的技术。对于每个目标每日限一次，你可以花费1小时，治疗目标并尝试医疗检定以移除一种疾病，或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained}状态。使用该疾病的DC，或造成该状态的法术或效果的DC。若效果来源是神器、等级超过20级，或者类似的强大来源，则DC提高10点。

Group Impression.name: 集体印象 Group Impression
Group Impression.description: 在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{建立印象 Make an Impression}时，你可以将交涉检定结果与跟你交流的至多10个目标的意志DC相比较，且无需承受减值。若你在交涉技能上的熟练度达到专家，目标数量提高到20个；若达到大师，提高到50个；若达到传奇，提高到100个。

Cautious Trespasser.name: 谨慎的擅闯者 Cautious Trespasser
Cautious Trespasser.description:
你在一个危险的环境中长大，这教会了你保持警惕。你可以在进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}探索活动的同时进行“调查”探索活动。

You grew up in a dangerous environment that taught you to be wary. You can perform the Investigate exploration activity at the same time as the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} exploration activity.

Reactive Shapeshifting.name: 反应性变形 Reactive Shapeshifting
Reactive Shapeshifting.description:
触发条件 你掷先攻。

你能够在瞬息之间改变自己。你进行变形，且如果你使用欺瞒来掷先攻，则在此次触发的先攻检定上获得+2处境加值。

Trigger You roll initiative.

You can change at a moment's notice. You Change Shape and gain a +2 circumstance bonus on the triggering initiative roll if you used Deception to roll initiative.

Titan Wrestler.name: 巨人摔角术 Titan Wrestler
Titan Wrestler.description: 你可以对体型最多比你大两级的生物尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{卸武 Disarm}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒拿 Grapple}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{移位 Reposition}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞 Shove}或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{摔绊 Trip}，若你在运动技能上的熟练度达到传奇，则目标可以是体型最多比你大三级的生物。

Thermal Conversion.name: 热能转换 Thermal Conversion
Thermal Conversion.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你处于严重、极端或骇人的高温区域，或者你在上一轮内受到过火焰伤害。

你的身体已经适应了将环境中的热能转化为动能来提升你的速度。你可以进行一次Stride，移动距离最多为你速度的两倍。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，直到你的下一回合结束。你只能使用加速提供的额外动作来进行Stride。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You are in an area of severe, extreme, or incredible heat, or you were dealt fire damage within the last round.

Your body has adapted to convert ambient thermal energy into kinetic energy to boost your speed. You Stride up to double your Speed. In addition, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} until the end of your next turn. You can only use the extra action from quickened to Stride.

Partial Corpsefolk.name: 部分尸族 Partial Corpsefolk
Partial Corpsefolk.description:
你死于造成身体部位缺失的巨大创伤，或是在被作为不死生物复生之前腐烂了很长时间。除非你进行了彻底伪装，否则旁观者无法忽视你不死生物的本质，但你可以用富有创意的方式操纵自己破碎的残片。你减轻的质量使你的地面速度获得 +5 英尺状态加值。此外，你可以花费 1 个具有操作特征的动作，掰下自己身体上一块参差尖锐的碎片，以制造一把商业级 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.V0LgOSOvkNvs2i0x]{Knife}。你同时能够制造的小刀数量等于你的体质调整值。它们不能被出售，且对其他人不起作用。增强你天生攻击的效果，例如硬光裹手，会在你持握以这种方式制造的商业级小刀时，将其效果施加于那把小刀。

You died from massive traumatic injuries that caused you to lose body parts, or you rotted for a long time before you were brought back as an undead. There is no hiding your undead nature from onlookers unless you are wholly disguised, but you can manipulate your broken shards in creative ways. Your reduced mass gives you a +5-foot status bonus to your land Speed. In addition, you can spend 1 action that has the manipulate trait to break off a jagged piece of your own body to create a commercial @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.V0LgOSOvkNvs2i0x]{Knife}. You can create a number of knives at a time equal to your Constitution modifier. They can't be sold and don't function for others. Effects that enhance your natural attacks, such as hardlight handwraps, apply their effects to a commercial knife created in this way while you're wielding it.

Ready to Roll.name: 准备掷骰 Ready to Roll
Ready to Roll.description:
触发 你掷先攻时。

你会本能地对麻烦作出反应，指挥你的盟友在他们的介入最能发挥作用的确切时机行动。发布一个单动作训令。

Trigger You roll initiative.

You instinctively react to trouble by directing your allies to act at the exact moment their intervention would matter most. Issue a 1-action directive.

Supersonic Speed.name: 超音速速度 Supersonic Speed
Supersonic Speed.description:
你移动得快得惊人，化作一道色彩斑斓、动作波动的模糊残影。当你因 Zoomies 而处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} 状态时进行 Stride，你获得隐蔽，直到你的下个回合开始。和往常一样，对于这种伴有明显视觉表现的隐蔽，你不能利用这种隐蔽进行躲藏。

You move incredibly fast, becoming a colorful blur of erratic motion. When you Stride while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} from Zoomies, you gain concealment until the start of your next turn. As usual for concealment involving an obvious visual manifestation, you can't use this concealment to Hide.

Pardon Me.name: 失陪一下 Pardon Me
Pardon Me.description:
你在绕着敌人机动时，用一句巧妙的评论来分散他们的注意力。你可以使用 @Check[deception|against:will|options:action:tumble-through] 代替 Acrobatics 来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{翻滚穿越}，并使用目标的意志 DC 而非反射 DC。当你使用 Deception 成功翻滚穿越时，你所穿过其空间的敌人会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}，直到其下一回合结束。

You distract your foes with a clever comment as you maneuver around them. You can use @Check[deception|against:will|options:action:tumble-through] instead of Acrobatics to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through} using the target's Will DC instead of Reflex DC. When you successfully Tumble Through using Deception, the foe whose space you passed through is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the end of its next turn.

Unleash Pneuma.name: 灵息解放 Unleash Pneuma
Unleash Pneuma.description:
你释放出自身灵性本质的一部分——要么是活体躯壳的活力，要么是不死灵魂的虚空——在你周围爆发出猛烈的冲击。你对所有邻近生物造成你所选类型的 @Damage[5d6[untyped]] 伤害（见下文）（基础反射豁免，使用你的职业 DC 或法术 DC，以较高者为准）。在11级时以及此后每隔2级，此伤害增加1d6。

当你获得此专长时，选择活力或虚空之一。一经选择，便无法更改。Unleash Pneuma 造成所选的伤害类型，并获得所选特征。

特殊 你可以获得此专长两次，但每次必须选择不同的伤害类型。如果你这样做，Unleash Pneuma 的频率变为每种伤害类型每天一次，而非每天一次。

You unleash a portion of your spiritual essence—either the vitality of your living body or the void of your undead soul—in a violent burst around you. You deal @Damage[5d6[untyped]] damage of your selected type (see below) to all adjacent creatures (basic Reflex save using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher). At 11th level and every 2 levels thereafter, this damage increases by 1d6.

When you take this feat, choose either vitality or void. Once chosen, this selection can't be changed. Unleash Pneuma deals the chosen damage type and gains the chosen trait.

Special You can take this feat twice, but you must select a different damage type each time. If you do, Unleash Pneuma's frequency becomes once per day per damage type, rather than once per day.

Bond Boost.name: 羁绊强化 Bond Boost
Bond Boost.description:
触发 20尺内的一名结契盟友即将进行一次豁免检定。

你通过你们之间的联结引导一股能量激流，保护盟友的身体与心智。你的盟友在此次触发的豁免检定上获得+1状态加值。若其针对一个活力或虚空效果进行豁免检定并掷出成功，则改为获得大成功。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.9Sq4P1Pxr1owEv6R]{效果：联结强化}

Trigger A bonded ally within 20 feet is about to roll a saving throw.

You channel a surge of energy through your bond, shielding your ally's body and mind. Your ally gains a +1 status bonus to the triggering saving throw. If they roll a success on the saving throw against a vitality or void effect, they get a critical success instead.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.9Sq4P1Pxr1owEv6R]{Effect: Bond Boost}

Disperse!.name: 散开！ Disperse!
Disperse!.description:
当你全副武装，身着自己的地狱骑士盛装时，仅凭你那令人畏惧的面容就足以逼退敌人。对一名位于30英尺内且能够察觉到你的敌人尝试一次 @Check[intimidation] 检定。

大成功 你将目标从你身边推开，最多10英尺。你可以随后对其进行疾行，但你必须沿同一方向移动相同的距离。

成功 你将目标向后推开5英尺。你可以随后对其进行疾行，但你必须沿同一方向移动相同的距离。

When you're fully decked out in your Hellknight regalia, just the presence of your fearsome visage drives enemies back. Attempt an @Check[intimidation] check against an enemy within 30 feet who can perceive you.

Critical Success You push your target up to 10 feet away from you. You can Stride after it, but you must move the same distance and in the same direction.

Success You push your target back 5 feet. You can Stride after it, but you must move the same distance and in the same direction.

Empowered Scales.name: 赋能鳞片 Empowered Scales
Empowered Scales.description:
你会周期性地瞥见近在眼前的未来，并能运用这种洞察在敌人行动之前预判他们的动向。每天一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike} 作为1环法术施放。该法术的传统与你从 Sigiled Scales 获得的戏法传统相同。

You catch periodic glimpses of the immediate future and can use your insight to predict your foes' moves before they make them. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike} as a 1st-rank spell. The tradition of this spell matches the tradition of the cantrip you gained from Sigiled Scales.

Cooperative.name: 协作 Cooperative
Cooperative.description:
你在团队中协作良好，而且你总是乐于伸出援手，并接受他人提供的帮助。你在进行援助的检定时获得 +2 状况加值，而你的盟友在进行援助你的检定时获得 +2 状况加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.xYipnklm52BcgwSD]{效果：合作}

You work well on a team, and you're always ready to lend a hand and accept the help offered by others. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to Aid, and your allies gain a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to Aid you.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.xYipnklm52BcgwSD]{Effect: Cooperative}

Overcrowd.name: 地狭人稠 Overcrowd
Overcrowd.description:
你可以与其他小型生物一起挤入狭小空间。只要你是小型，你就可以在与一名小型盟友相同的方格内结束你的移动。使用此能力或类似能力时，共享同一空间的生物总数最多只能有两名。

You can pack into tight spaces with other small creatures. As long as you're Small, you can end your movement in the same square as a Small ally. Only two creatures total can share the same space when using this ability or a similar one.

Cat Fall.name: 轻身落 Cat Fall
Cat Fall.description: 模仿自猫的高空特技动作让你能够缓冲坠落的损伤。将坠落距离视为缩短10尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到专家，将坠落距离视为缩短25尺，达到大师后，缩短50尺。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到传奇，无论坠落距离多高，你始终能够以脚着地，不会受到任何伤害。

Mutable Manifestation.name: 可变显化 Mutable Manifestation
Mutable Manifestation.description:
通过练习，你可以在战场上临机对你的武器进行调整，让你能针对不同情境选择最合适的攻击。当你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{调谐} 时，你可以改变你的太阳武器的伤害类型（但不能改变其特性或武器组），如同你已 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{重铸太阳武器}。

With practice, you can make on-the-fly battlefield adjustments to your weapon, letting you choose the perfect attack for a situation. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune}, you can change the damage type of your solar weapon (but not its traits or weapon group), as if you'd @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{Re-Forge Solar Weapon}.

Shroud of Shattered Spirits.name: 破碎灵魂之幕 Shroud of Shattered Spirits
Shroud of Shattered Spirits.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 一名敌人的打击或以你为目标的效果将会命中你，且你此前对该敌人并非已经处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}，或未被察觉状态。

你的存在本身就会像磁铁吸引金属一样，吸引躁动的灵体、闹鬼的物品、灵性活跃的物质，以及破碎的灵魂。你将这些灵魂碎片显化为环绕自身的混乱旋风，而你仅能用思绪勉强控制它们。你获得隐蔽，直到你的下个回合开始为止，且隐蔽的平检适用于此次将会命中你的触发打击或效果。若平检失败，则该打击或效果未命中你。

Frequency once per day

Trigger An enemy's Strike or targeted effect would hit you, and you weren't already @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, or undetected to that enemy.

Your mere presence attracts restless spirits, haunted objects, spiritually active substances, and fragmented souls, like a magnet attracts metal. You manifest these spirit shards in a chaotic whirlwind around you that you barely control with your thoughts. You become concealed until the beginning of your next turn, and the flat check for concealment applies to the triggering Strike or effect that would've hit you. If the flat check fails, the Strike or effect misses you.

Septocular.name: 七眼体 Septocular
Septocular.description:
你学会了在全身长出额外的眼睛，强化你的视觉处理能力并扩展你的视野范围。当你使用变形时，你可以选择获得全向视觉，直到你再次改变形态为止。在此期间，若你要冒充另一族裔，你的欺瞒检定和欺瞒DC会承受–3的境况减值；但如果你所冒充的族裔通常有七只或更多眼睛，则不受此限制。

You've learned to grow additional eyes all over your body, enhancing your visual processing and the range of your eyesight. When you use Change Shape, you can choose to gain all-around vision until you change forms again. During this time, you take a –3 circumstance penalty to Deception checks and Deception DCs to Impersonate a different ancestry, unless the ancestry you are Impersonating normally has seven or more eyes.

Psychic Talent.name: 灵能天赋 Psychic Talent
Psychic Talent.description:
你的心灵异能已经发展到不止于简单交流的程度。从神秘法术列表中选择一个戏法。你可以将这个戏法作为神秘先天法术随意施放。戏法会被升阶至等于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术环阶。

Your psychic abilities have developed beyond simple communication. Choose one cantrip from the occult spell list. You can cast this cantrip as an occult innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

Advanced Epiphany.name: 先进顿悟 Advanced Epiphany
Advanced Epiphany.description:
你对自己的连接有了更深的理解。你获得所选连接的先进顿悟法术。

You gain a deeper understanding of your connection. You gain the advanced epiphany spell for your chosen connection.

Esoteric Education.name: 深奥教育 Esoteric Education
Esoteric Education.description:
尽管更广泛的研究领域很实用，但既然还有更专业的学科可供你探索，它们就无法激发你的想象力。选择两个学识技能子类别。你在这两个技能上都获得“额外学识”通用专长。

特殊 你可以选取此专长三次。每次你这样做时，你都会为一个新的学识子类别获得“额外学识”通用专长，并且你会在另一个由你选择的学识技能子类别上成为受训。

For all their practicality, broader fields of study don't capture your imagination when there are more specialized disciplines you might explore. Choose two Lore skill subcategories. You gain the Additional Lore general feat for both skills.

Special You can take this feat three times. Each time you do, you gain the Additional Lore general feat for a new subcategory of Lore, and you become trained in one other Lore skill subcategory of your choice.

Predictive Positioning.name: 预测性定位 Predictive Positioning
Predictive Positioning.description:
触发 敌人对你造成伤害。

需求 你的量子场处于激活状态。

你重新定位到另一个现实中你会占据的空间，从迫近的危险中脱身。你立即传送，最远可达你的速度，并到达你量子场内的一处区域。此移动不会触发基于移动的反应，并且无视险境和地形，但不能穿过墙壁或其他类似的障碍物。

Trigger An enemy damages you.

Requirements Your quantum field is active.

You reposition to a space you'd occupy in a different reality, free from incoming danger. You instantly teleport up to your Speed to an area within your quantum field. This movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement and ignores hazards and terrain, but can't pass through walls or other such obstructions.

Sanctuary Kin.name: 圣域亲族 Sanctuary Kin
Sanctuary Kin.description:
你的魔法火花会守护你的盟友，保护他们免受攻击。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8xRzLhwGL7Dgy3EZ]{Sanctuary} 作为一个1环神圣先天法术施放一次。当你的羁绊伙伴成为一次攻击的目标时，你可以以反应来施放该法术，前提是你的伙伴位于40尺内，且你能够察觉到他们以及攻击者。若你如此做，该法术的射程为40尺，且只能以你的羁绊伙伴为目标。

Your magical spark wards your allies, protecting them from attacks. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8xRzLhwGL7Dgy3EZ]{Sanctuary} as a 1st-rank divine innate spell once per day. You can cast the spell as a reaction triggered when your bonded partner is the target of an attack, as long as your partner is within 40 feet and you can perceive them and their attacker. If you do, the spell has a range of 40 feet and can target only your bonded partner.

Primafloral Adaptation.name: 原始花卉适应 Primafloral Adaptation
Primafloral Adaptation.description:
你可以汲取原初力量的泉源，每天一次将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.m2xFMNyQiUKQDRaj]{Energy Aegis} 作为一个7环原初先天法术施放。

You can draw on a wellspring of primal power to cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.m2xFMNyQiUKQDRaj]{Energy Aegis} as a 7th-rank primal innate spell once per day.

You'll Have to Go Through Me!.name: 你得先过我这关！ You'll Have to Go Through Me!
You'll Have to Go Through Me!.description:
你稳住身形，准备好在身后的盟友前方进行防御。你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击}。直到你下个回合开始时，或直到你使用一个移动动作时（以先发生者为准），你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lNcZ7j1T2YmMwXF7]{活体护盾} 反应；并且如果你将因强制移动效果而被移动，你少移动 10 英尺。

You brace yourself as you prepare to defend your allies behind you. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}. Until the start of your next turn or until you use a move action, whichever happens first, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lNcZ7j1T2YmMwXF7]{Living Shield} reaction and, if you would be moved by a forced movement effect, you move 10 feet less.

Persistent Tactics.name: 持续战术 Persistent Tactics
Persistent Tactics.description:
你已经学会了哪些生存策略最适合自己，并经常依赖它们。从你拥有的以下专长或能力中选择一项：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6fsMvO0jXtK8gYkH]{Puff Up}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Wb4vtGqg2Cl2FF1k]{Shed Skin}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.32W1Pnex4xbhx5Bj]{Squirt Blood}。你可以每 10 分钟使用一次所选能力，而不是每小时一次。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长，每次选择不同的能力。

You've learned which survival tactics work best for you and rely on them frequently. Select one of the following feats or abilities you possess: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6fsMvO0jXtK8gYkH]{Puff Up}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Wb4vtGqg2Cl2FF1k]{Shed Skin}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.32W1Pnex4xbhx5Bj]{Squirt Blood}. You can use the selected ability once per 10 minutes, rather than once per hour.

Special You can take this feat more than once, selecting a different ability each time.

Shobhad Spirit-Blessed.name: 受灵佑的肖布哈德 Shobhad Spirit-Blessed
Shobhad Spirit-Blessed.description:
你出身于一支绍巴德灵媒世家，与你周遭万物四周环绕的小灵低语相谐。选择一个1环神圣或原始法术，该法术必须为普通法术，或是你可获得的其他法术。你可以每天将该法术作为先天原始法术施放一次。

You come from a line of shobhad spiritualists attuned to the whispers of the little spirits that encircle all things. Choose a 1st-rank divine or primal spell, either a common spell or another to which you have access. You can cast that spell once per day as an innate primal spell.

Hulking Corpsefolk.name: 魁梧尸族 Hulking Corpsefolk
Hulking Corpsefolk.description:
你是一座血肉之山，以不可逆转的方式让自己的体型膨胀壮大。也许你吸收了足够多的实体物质才做到这一点，或者你完成了神秘而无法解释的死灵仪式。将你的体型类别提升为大型，并使你的触及增加5英尺。

You're a mountain of flesh, having managed to increase your girth in irreversible ways. Perhaps you absorbed enough physical material to do so, or maybe you've completed mysterious, inexplicable necromantic rituals. Increase your size category to Large, and increase your reach by 5 feet.

AbadarCorp Rep Dedication.name: 阿巴达尔集团代表献身誓言 AbadarCorp Rep Dedication
AbadarCorp Rep Dedication.description:
你已将自己公司的文化与策略内化于心，并且熟悉一般商业惯例。你获得关于商业或企业知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 泛用专长。

在针对与你工作相关的主题进行回忆知识检定时，你可以使用商业或企业知识来代替任何其他技能，例如你公司买卖的货物、你开展业务的个人或定居点，或行业法律。

You've internalized your corporation's culture and strategies, and you're knowledgeable about general business practices. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Business or Corporate Lore.

You can use Business or Corporate Lore instead of any other skill when making a Recall Knowledge check about subjects related to your work, such as goods your company buys and sells, individuals or settlements where you do business, or industry laws.

Quantum Research.name: 量子研究 Quantum Research
Quantum Research.description:
你成为自身悖论的真正化身，超越凡人在你的现实中所能达成的极限。你获得一个额外的10环法术位。

You become a true embodiment of your paradox and surpass what mortals can achieve in your reality. You gain an additional 10th-rank spell slot.

Soothing Anchor.name: 抚慰之锚 Soothing Anchor
Soothing Anchor.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 你的上一个动作是维持你的量子场，或具有锚定特征。

你更深地专注于你的锚点来抚慰自己。你获得等同于你角色等级的临时生命值，持续1轮。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Requirements Your last action was to Sustain your quantum field or had the anchoring trait.

You concentrate more deeply on your anchor to soothe yourself. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your character level that last for 1 round.

Etheric.name: 以太的 Etheric
Etheric.description:
你因一次失败的复活尝试而成为活尸裔——也许是某个魔法法术被打断、某个宗教仪式出了差错，或是故障技术失控，最终导致了你的这种状况。你的灵魂松散地系附于肉体之上，使你能够暂时用来保护自己仍然活着的躯体，免受虚空侵蚀。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.kF6CV5Jo4gfz4gVs]{灵魂护盾} 反应。

You became a borai through a botched resurrection attempt—perhaps a magic spell was disrupted, a religious rite went awry, or faulty technology went haywire, resulting in your condition. Your soul is loosely tethered to your body, allowing you to temporarily shield your living form from the ravages of the void. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.kF6CV5Jo4gfz4gVs]{Soul Shield} reaction.

Linguistic Prodigy.name: 语言奇才 Linguistic Prodigy
Linguistic Prodigy.description:
学习新语言对你来说轻而易举。你获得两种你选择的额外语言，从你可用的常见和非常见语言中选择。每次你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{多语者} 专长时，除了从该专长获得的两种语言外，你还会再获得一种新语言。

Learning new languages comes naturally to you. You gain two additional languages of your choice, chosen from among the common and uncommon languages available to you. Every time you take the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} feat, you gain another new language in addition to the two you gain from that feat.

Spiritual Wards.name: 灵性结界 Spiritual Wards
Spiritual Wards.description:
你的灵性守护者为你抵御一切，唯有最强大的魔法方能穿透。你对灵魂伤害以及来自原始法术的伤害具有20点抗性。

Your spiritual guardians ward you against all but the most potent of magics. You have resistance 20 against spirit damage and damage from primal spells.

Twin Weapons.name: 双持武器 Twin Weapons
Twin Weapons.description:
你获得第二把星辰武器。当你选择此专长或“重铸星辰武器”时，为它与第一把武器分别选择特征。你可以为这第二把星辰武器选择不同的伤害类型、特征和武器组。将灵巧和成对特征加入你可应用于星辰武器的武器特征列表中。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.gABm4VTVRcfbv5sG]{效果：星辰武器（双持武器）}

You have a second solar weapon. When you take this feat or Re-Forge Solar Weapon, choose its traits separately from your first weapon. You can select a different damage type, traits, and weapon group for this second solar weapon. Add the agile and twin traits to the list of weapon traits you can apply to your solar weapons.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.gABm4VTVRcfbv5sG]{Effect: Solar Weapon (Twin Weapons)}

Sheltering Limbs.name: 庇护枝干 Sheltering Limbs
Sheltering Limbs.description:
你的四肢和躯干变得足够强壮厚实，能够为盟友抵挡危险。你可以与至多一名自愿的盟友共享你的空间。当一名盟友正与你共享空间，或占据相邻方格时，你的盟友获得次级掩护的益处。该盟友可以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}，将加值提高为标准掩护。

Your limbs and trunk grow strong and thick enough to shield your allies from danger. You can share your space with up to one willing ally. While an ally is sharing space with you or occupying an adjacent square, your ally gains the benefits of lesser cover. The ally can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} to increase the bonus to standard cover.

Recognize Spell.name: 认知法术 Recognize Spell
Recognize Spell.description:
触发 视觉线内的生物施放一个你未准备或不在你法术库内的法术，或者一个陷阱或类似物件施放这类法术。你必须意识到法术被施放。

若你在该法术根源的相应技能上受训，并且该法术是个2环级或更低环的常见法术，则你可以自动识别它（依然掷骰以尝试获得大成功，但你不会获得比成功更差的结果）。若你的技能熟练度达到专家，自动识别的法术最高环级提高到4环级；若达到大师，提高到6环级；若达到传奇，提高到10环级。根据被施放的法术根源，GM暗骰奥法、自然、神秘或宗教检定。若你未在该技能上受训，则无法获得比失败更好的结果。

大成功 你正确识别出法术，并且在对抗它的豁免检定或AC上获得+1环境加值。

成功 你正确识别出法术。

失败 你未能识别出法术。

大失败 你将法术错认为另一个法术，由GM选择。

Icy Spelunker.name: 冰寒洞穴探险者 Icy Spelunker
Icy Spelunker.description:
你花时间探索了卡洛-马霍伊地壳上的冰冷洞穴，攀爬对你来说几乎和行走一样轻松。你获得 25 尺的攀爬速度，并且你将由冰和雪造成的困难地形视为正常地形。

You spent time exploring the icy caves of Kalo-Mahoi's crust, and climbing comes nearly as easily to you as walking. You gain a Climb speed of 25 feet, and you treat difficult terrain from ice and snow as normal terrain.

Sprint.name: 冲刺 Sprint
Sprint.description:
你以最快速度冲刺，追击敌人或逃离危险处境。移动最多四次。你可以将此活动所需的动作数增加到 3，从而移动最多六次。

You sprint at top speed to chase down a foe or flee a dangerous situation. Stride up to four times. You can increase the number of actions this activity takes to 3 to Stride up to six times.

Akashic Transcendence.name: 阿卡西超越 Akashic Transcendence
Akashic Transcendence.description:
你的眼界向更宏大的真理敞开。你可以每轮使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xQQgbsRjFWp7dZhU]{Akashic Sync}，而非每 10 分钟一次。

Your eye opens to greater truths. You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xQQgbsRjFWp7dZhU]{Akashic Sync} once per round instead of once every 10 minutes.

Elebrian Cantrip.name: 灵脑人戏法 Elebrian Cantrip
Elebrian Cantrip.description:
你用令人愉悦的魔法戏法强化自己的表演，远远超出普通的手上把戏。请从以下列表中选择一个戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.h7IhypLwItepwhou]{粘附术}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{幻象}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC]{魔法伎俩}，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pwzdSlJgYqN7bs2w]{心灵动手}。你可以将这个戏法作为奥术先天法术随意施放。戏法的强化环阶等于你等级的一半（向上取整）。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。如果你这样做，你必须选择一个不同的戏法。

You enhance your performances with delightful magical tricks, going far beyond normal sleight of hand. Choose one cantrip from the following list: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.h7IhypLwItepwhou]{Adhere}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC]{Prestidigitation}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pwzdSlJgYqN7bs2w]{Telekinetic Hand}. You can cast this cantrip as an arcane innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

Special You can select this feat more than once. If you do, you must select a different cantrip.

Zone Overlap.name: 区域重叠 Zone Overlap
Zone Overlap.description:
需求 你的量子场处于激活状态，且有一个区域对其生效。

你使第二个区域与你的量子场重叠。你可以选择施加另一个你能够创造的区域，或再次施加现有区域，并如下增强其效果：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ryCmTz9Z62qbtmQM]{Danger Zone} 额外造成 1 点伤害，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.sW7AbeYfKc8OH7nG]{Debris Zone} 变为更强困难地形，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.rTebGqlQpa420YQy]{Twisted Dark Zone} 无视先前在此次豁免中大成功的生物获得的 1 轮临时免疫。

Requirements Your quantum field is active with one zone affecting it.

You cause a second zone to overlap your quantum field.
