You can choose to apply another zone you're able to create, or apply the existing zone again, improving its effects as follows: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ryCmTz9Z62qbtmQM]{Danger Zone} deals 1 extra damage, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.sW7AbeYfKc8OH7nG]{Debris Zone} becomes greater difficult terrain, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.rTebGqlQpa420YQy]{Twisted Dark Zone} ignores the temporary immunity of creatures that previously critically succeeded at the save for 1 round.

Adapted Augmentations.name: 适应性植入体 Adapted Augmentations
Adapted Augmentations.description:
你通过将尖端植入体整合进自己的身体，拥抱终极适应。选择一个物品等级为1或以下的常见植入体。你开始游戏时，这件植入体已经内嵌在你的体内（你无需支付信用点来购买这件起始植入体）。该植入体不计入你的植入体上限。

You embrace ultimate adaptation by integrating cutting-edge augmentations into your body. Choose one common augmentation with an item level of 1 or less. You begin with this augmentation already installed in your body (you don't need to pay the credits to purchase this starting augmentation). This augmentation doesn't count toward your implant limit.

Stubborn Corpse.name: 顽固尸体 Stubborn Corpse
Stubborn Corpse.description:
你意志坚决且顽固不屈，并且拒绝接受自己的失败——这些特质无论在生前还是死后都对你大有裨益。当你对抗精神效果的豁免检定严重失败时，改为失败。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SdPRiTobzR8adtXq]{否认失败} 反应。

You're willful and stubborn, and you refuse to accept your own failure—traits that have served you well in life and after death. When you critically fail a saving throw against a mental effect, you get a failure instead. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SdPRiTobzR8adtXq]{Deny Failure} reaction.

Uncanny Awareness.name: 离奇警觉 Uncanny Awareness
Uncanny Awareness.description:
你与周遭环境协调一致，能够本能地感知危险何时临近。你在先攻掷骰的察觉检定上获得 +2 处境加值。若你的先攻掷骰结果与某个对手持平，则你先行动，无论你是否是以察觉来进行先攻掷骰。每天第一次你以察觉进行先攻掷骰时，你进行两次先攻掷骰，并取较高结果。

You are in tune with your surroundings and can instinctively sense when danger is near. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks for initiative rolls. If your initiative roll result is tied with that of an opponent, you go first, regardless of whether you rolled Perception or not. The first time each day that you roll Perception for initiative, you roll initiative twice and use the higher result.

Galaxy Brain.name: 银河大脑 Galaxy Brain
Galaxy Brain.description:
频率 每天一次

刹那间，你的心智化作一台灵能超级计算机。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速} 状态，持续1分钟。你只能将额外动作用于回忆知识、进行灵能冲击打击、激活你的灵能冲击的过充能特征、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{寻找}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{感知动机}，或激活带有默思族特征的能力。

Frequency once per day

In an instant, your mind becomes a psychic supercomputer. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} for 1 minute. You can use your extra action only to Recall Knowledge, make psychic shock Strikes, activate your psychic shock's boost trait, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive}, or activate abilities with the contemplative trait.

Incredible Ferocity.name: 无敌凶猛 Incredible Ferocity
Incredible Ferocity.description:
你是一名冷酷无情的敌人，几乎没有谁能在逃避死亡的能力上与你匹敌。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.gD7l0iYrsdKMCmyV]{绍巴德凶暴性}，而非每天一次。

You are an implacable foe whose ability to escape death is nearly unrivaled. You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.gD7l0iYrsdKMCmyV]{Shobhad Ferocity} once per hour, rather than once per day.

Face in the Crowd.name: 芸芸众生 Face in the Crowd
Face in the Crowd.description:
你知道如何在人群中隐没身形。你可以利用人群提供的掩护来进行躲藏和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}，当你身处至少有 10 个生物的人群中时，你的隐匿检定获得 +2 环境加值；当你身处至少有 100 个生物的人群中时，你的隐匿检定获得 +4 环境加值。处于隐藏状态的生物不计入人群成员。如果你的欺瞒达到专家，你只需要 5 个生物就能获得这些加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.IaICLG7zwOV4OKgM]{效果：人群中的面孔}

You know how to get lost in a crowd. You can use cover from crowds to Hide and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to your Stealth checks when in a crowd of at least 10 creatures and a +4 circumstance bonus to your Stealth checks when in a crowd of at least 100 creatures. Hidden creatures don't count as members of a crowd. If you're a master in Deception you only need 5 creatures to get these bonuses.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.IaICLG7zwOV4OKgM]{Effect: Face in the Crowd}

Fast Recovery.name: 快速恢复 Fast Recovery
Fast Recovery.description: 你的身体可以快速从苦难中恢复。你在休息时恢复原本两倍的生命值。你每次对持续中的疾病或毒素强韧豁免成功时，使其阶段降低2，对于恶性疾病或毒素则降低1。你每次对持续中的疾病或毒素强韧豁免大成功时，使其阶段降低3，对于恶性疾病或毒素则降低2。此外，你在整夜休息过后，将流失状态值降低2而非1。

Binaric Assault.name: 二元突袭 Binaric Assault
Binaric Assault.description:
你协调你的日耀与太阳武器发动攻击。对同一目标进行两次打击，一次使用你的太阳武器，一次使用你的日耀，每次都使用你当前的多重攻击减值。你可以按自己想要的任意顺序进行这些打击。第一次有打击命中后，结算伤害与效果，然后切换你当前的调谐。如果两次攻击都未命中，你变为未调谐状态。双星突袭在计算你的多重攻击减值时视为两次攻击。

You coordinate your attacks with both your solar flare and solar weapon. Make two Strikes at the same target, one with your solar weapon and one with your solar flare, each using your current multiple attack penalty. You can make these Strikes in whichever order you desire. After the first time a Strike hits, resolve the damage and effects, then swap your current attunement. If both attacks fail to hit, you become unattuned. Binaric Assault counts as two attacks when calculating your multiple attack penalty.

Barathu Lore.name: 飞螅族知识 Barathu Lore
Barathu Lore.description:
通过你的成长经历，你学会了族人的生活方式，同时也努力在造物术领域拓展自己的心智。你在制作和医疗中获得受训熟练等级。如果你本会自动在这些技能之一中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项由你选择的技能中成为受训。

你还获得用于飞螅族知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 通用专长。

From your upbringing, you've learned the ways of your people while also seeking to expand your own mind in the fields of creation. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Crafting and Medicine. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Barathu Lore.

Deepspeaker.name: 深语者 Deepspeaker
Deepspeaker.description:
你出身于一个由深言者组成的悠久家族世系，其渊源可追溯至一位曾担任林虫联络使的祖先。你被选中来延续这一传统，学习由你的族人世代相传的秘密。你在表演上成为受训，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{令人印象深刻的表演} 技能专长。

You're descended from a long line of deepspeakers, dating back to an ancestor who served as liaison for a linnorm. You've been chosen to carry on the tradition, learning secrets passed down through generations of your people. You become trained in Performance and gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{Impressive Performance} skill feat.

Willful Defiance.name: 顽强反抗 Willful Defiance
Willful Defiance.description:
你高声宣告你对60英尺内一个你察觉到的单一生物的反抗。对于所选生物的攻击、法术和其他效果，你的护甲等级和豁免检定获得+1环境加值，持续1分钟。在此期间，如果你对所选生物进行的豁免检定结果为失败或大失败，你可以选择重掷该次失败的豁免。如果你这么做，在重掷后，Willful Defiance结束。

You loudly proclaim your opposition to a single creature you're aware of within 60 feet. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Armor Class and saving throws against the selected creature's attacks, spells, and other effects for 1 minute. During that time, if you would fail or critically fail a saving throw against the selected creature, you can choose to reroll the failed save. If you do, after rerolling, Willful Defiance ends.

Religious Talisman.name: 宗教护符 Religious Talisman
Religious Talisman.description:
你可以在10分钟内制作并祝圣一枚属于你神祇的宗教象征。虽然这类护符传统上是画有宗教符号的纸片，但它们也可以有多种形式，包括身体艺术、贴纸，甚至虚拟表情符号。你只能为自己以及你所崇拜的神祇制作这种护符。只要你继续从事符合你神祇典范的活动，你在先攻掷骰上就会获得+1状态加值。若你违背了你神祇的禁忌，这枚护符就会被毁坏，且你在完成一次@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone}仪式之前，先攻掷骰和察觉检定都会承受–1状态减值。

You can construct and bless a religious symbol of your deity in 10 minutes. While such talismans are traditionally scraps of paper with a religious symbol drawn on them, they can take many forms, including body art, a sticker, or even a virtual emoji. You can create a talisman only for yourself and for the deity you worship. As long as you continue to engage in activities that match your deity's edicts you gain a +1 status bonus to initiative rolls. If you violate your deity's anathema, the talisman is destroyed, and you take a –1 status penalty to initiative rolls and Perception checks until you complete an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual.

Complete Transposition.name: 完全置换 Complete Transposition
Complete Transposition.description:
多元宇宙是一场复杂的游戏——你利用平行现实来移动棋盘上的生物。当你使用维持动作来移动你的量子场时，你可以将量子场原始区域内任意数量的生物传送到其新区域内由你选择的方格中。你也会传送他们所穿戴或持有的任何物品。这使得维持动作获得传送特征。每个目标都可以尝试进行一次 @Check[will|against:witchwarper|options:area-effect] 豁免，对抗你的职业 DC。豁免成功的目标不受影响。

The multiverse is a complex game—you use alternate realities to move creatures on the board. When you use the Sustain action to move your quantum field, you can teleport any number of creatures within the quantum field's original area to squares of your choice in its new area. You also teleport any items they're wearing or holding. This gives the Sustain action the teleportation trait. Each target can attempt a @Check[will|against:witchwarper|options:area-effect] save against your class DC. Targets who succeed at the save are unaffected.

Hampering Flare.name: 妨碍耀焰 Hampering Flare
Hampering Flare.description:
你专注于你的耀斑，准备释放一阵能量爆发来扰乱敌人。用你的太阳耀斑进行一次远程打击。若此次攻击命中，目标将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到你下个回合开始，或直到它采取掩护，以先发生者为准。

You focus on your flare, setting up a blast of energy to disorient your foes. Make a ranged Strike with your solar flare. If this attack hits, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn or until it Takes Cover, whichever comes first.

Headstrong.name: 顽强不屈 Headstrong
Headstrong.description:
你凭借自身顽强的意志成为了一名活尸裔。当你死去时，你拒绝接受自己的死亡，紧抓着自己的尸体，强行将灵魂塞回体内，并连同生命一并重新取回。你在对抗恐惧以及会使你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{受控} 的效果时，进行意志豁免检定获得 +1 情境加值；同时，你的意志DC在对抗试图对你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓} 的尝试时也获得该加值。

You became a borai through your own stubborn willfulness. When you died, you refused to accept your death and clung to your corpse, forcing your soul back into your body and regaining life along with it. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saving throws against fear and effects that would make you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} and to your Will DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you.

Vital Sap.name: 活性树液 Vital Sap
Vital Sap.description:
你那藤蔓般身躯分泌出的黏稠树液具有治疗特性。每天当你暴露在自然阳光下至少 4 小时时，你会产出 1d4 瓶树液。生物以一个 Interact 动作饮下一瓶该树液后，恢复 2d8 生命值。此效果具有治疗和命能特征。

The sticky sap produced by your vined body has healing properties. You produce 1d4 vials of sap each day when you are exposed to natural sunlight for at least 4 hours. A creature that drinks a vial of the sap as an Interact action restores 2d8 Hit Points. This effect has the healing and vitality traits.

Bullet Hell.name: 弹幕地狱 Bullet Hell
Bullet Hell.description:
需求 你正持用一把具有自动或区域（锥形）属性的武器。

你持续连发武器，倾泻出稳定而密集的火力洪流，将地形撕裂得险恶难行。用你的武器进行一次@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击}攻击。直到你的下个回合开始前，任何穿过你所攻击区域移动的生物，每穿过1格，都会受到1d4点与该武器所造成伤害类型相同的伤害；它每次以移动动作穿过该区域结束时，都必须进行一次@Check[reflex|against:soldier|basic|options:area-effect]豁免。若失败，该生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态，直到你的下个回合开始。

Requirements You're wielding an automatic or area (cone) weapon.

You fire your weapon in sustained bursts to unleash a consistent deluge of firepower that tears apart the terrain to become treacherous. Make an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire} attack with your weapon. Until the start of your next turn, any creature that moves through the area you attacked takes 1d4 damage of the same type as the weapon fired per square traversed, with a @Check[reflex|against:soldier|basic|options:area-effect] save at the end of each move action it takes through the area. On a failure, a creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.

Talon Transporter.name: 利爪运载者 Talon Transporter
Talon Transporter.description:
你已学会用爪子携带额外的补给。你获得“沉重搬运者”技能专长。若你已拥有此专长，则改为将你的最大负载值和负重负载值提高 2。处于漂浮或飞行时，你可以将双脚当作额外的一对手来使用，但仅能用来携带超出你最大负载上限的至多 4 Bulk 生物或物品。

You've learned to carry additional supplies using your talons. You gain the Hefty Hauler skill feat. If you already have this feat, instead increase your maximum and encumbered Bulk limits by 2. While floating or flying you may use your feet as an additional pair of hands, but only to carry up to 4 Bulk of creatures or items beyond your maximum encumbrance.

Broodless.name: 无巢群体 Broodless
Broodless.description:
你成长时没有同巢群体。无论你是唯一的幸存者、曾经走失，还是在外星被抚养长大，你都已学会独自生存。你在以下技能中任选一项，成为受训：欺瞒或巧手。如果你会自动在这两项技能上都成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项你自选的技能上成为受训。如果你选择了欺瞒，你获得“迷人骗子”技能专长。如果你选择了巧手，你获得“隐秘盗窃”技能专长。

You grew up without a brood. Whether you were a lone survivor, became lost, or were raised offworld, you've learned to survive alone. You become trained in one of the following skills of your choice: Deception or Thievery. If you would automatically become trained in both of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. If you selected Deception, you gain the Charming Liar skill feat. If you selected Thievery, you gain the Subtle Theft skill feat.

Plasma Ejection.name: 等离子喷射 Plasma Ejection
Plasma Ejection.description:
你释放出一股等离子体喷发，命中你所选择的一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的每个生物，或一条 @Template[type:line|distance:30] 内的每个生物。区域内的每个生物都要受到 @Damage[((1 + floor(@actor.level / 2))d6)[fire]|options:area-damage,plasma-ejection-base-damage] 伤害，并以你的职业 DC 进行一次针对 @Check[reflex|against:solarian|basic|options:area-effect] 的基础豁免。豁免严重失败的生物还会额外受到 @Damage[1d8[persistent,electricity]] 伤害。

引力子调谐 生物若豁免失败，则会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

光子调谐 将火焰伤害骰提升为 d8。

等级（+2） 伤害提高 1d6（若你处于光子调谐，则改为 1d8）。

You unleash an ejection of plasma, hitting every creature in your choice of a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] or in a @Template[type:line|distance:30]. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[((1 + floor(@actor.level / 2))d6)[fire]|options:area-damage,plasma-ejection-base-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:solarian|basic|options:area-effect] save against your class DC. A creature that critically fails its save additionally takes @Damage[1d8[persistent,electricity]] damage.

Graviton-Attuned A creature that fails its save is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Photon-Attuned Increase the fire damage to d8s.

Level (+2) The damage increases by 1d6 (or 1d8 if you're photon-attuned).

Soul Sustenance.name: 灵魂维系 Soul Sustenance
Soul Sustenance.description:
你的灵魂光辉灿烂，能够无限期地维持你的活体躯体，而无需外界的滋养。你不需要进食或饮水，并且在确定你通过休息恢复多少生命值时，你的体质调整值视为高 1 点。

Your soul is radiant and can sustain your living body indefinitely, without the need for outside nourishment. You don't need to eat or drink, and you count your Constitution modifier as one higher while determining how much you heal from resting.

Shobhad Special.name: 肖布哈德特制 Shobhad Special
Shobhad Special.description:
需求 你至少有一只手是空着的，并且你用未激活的手持握着一把不具有区域（特征）的双手远程武器。

一千多年前，一位才华横溢的绍巴德狙击手发明了所谓的“绍巴德绝技”。这是一种毁灭性的战斗动作，只有具备绍巴德-内赫独特的体型、力量、额外肢体以及文化中的狙击技法组合的生物才能施展。令你无比自豪的是，你是少数掌握了它的人之一。对一个体型至少比你小一级的生物尝试进行一次拳头打击。若此次攻击成功，你不造成伤害，但目标会立刻被朝你选择的方向投掷，最远30英尺。然后，切换持手，并使用所需武器对目标进行一次远程打击；目标对此次打击处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。无论此次打击是否成功，该生物随后都会根据你的投掷情况，在合适的空间内@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

特殊 如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{巨人摔角手}技能专长，你可以对体型至多与你相同的生物使用绍巴德绝技；若你的运动达到传奇，则还可以对体型比你大一级的生物使用。

Requirements You have at least one hand free and are wielding a two-handed ranged weapon that doesn't have the area trait in your inactive hands.

Invented by a talented shobhad sniper over a thousand years ago, the so-called "shobhad special" is a devastating maneuver that is only possible by a creature with the shobhad-neh's unique combination of size, strength, extra limbs, and cultural sniping techniques. Much to your pride, you're one of the few who have mastered it. Attempt a fist Strike against a creature at least one size smaller than you. If the attack is successful, you deal no damage but the target is immediately thrown up to 30 feet in a direction of your choice. Then, Switch Hands and make a ranged Strike against the target with the required weapon; the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against this Strike. Regardless of whether this Strike is successful, the creature then falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} in whatever space is appropriate based on your throw.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} skill feat, you can use Shobhad Special against creatures up to your size, or up to one size larger than you if you're legendary in Athletics.

Gun Expert.name: 枪械专家 Gun Expert
Gun Expert.description:
你对简易枪械和军用枪械的熟练等级提升为专家。

Your proficiency ranks for simple and martial guns increase to expert.

Overwatch.name: 守望哨卫 Overwatch
Overwatch.description:
触发 你武器的第一距离增量内有一个受压制生物进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作中离开一个方格。

你将火力集中于一个在你武器威胁范围内活动的特定目标。对触发生物进行一次远程打击，此次打击中忽略你所持武器的笨重特征。若重击成功，且触发动作是一个移动动作，则你打断该动作。

Trigger A suppressed creature within your weapon's first range increment makes a ranged attack or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

You concentrate fire on a specific target operating within your weapon's threat range. Make a ranged Strike against the triggering creature, ignoring the unwieldy trait of weapons you wield for this Strike. On a critical hit, if the triggering action was a move action, you disrupt that action.

Fissile Budding.name: 裂变出芽 Fissile Budding
Fissile Budding.description:
频率 每天一次

你可以使用变形将你的两种身份分裂为两个不同的身体，各自使用独特的形态与身份。每个复制体都向一个未被占据的方格进行一次移动。你和你的复制体都在你的回合行动，并共用同一个动作池、同一个多重攻击减值以及同一个生命值池；但如果两个形态都因同一个效果而受到伤害，例如来自具有区域伤害的攻击或法术，则你只承受一次伤害。若某个带有豁免的效果同时影响两个形态，则你采用较差的结果，并将其应用于两个形态。当此效果结束时，你从两个形态中选择一个作为你的真实形态，而你的另一个版本会朝你移动一次，并在与您处于同一方格时变成一条手臂并与你的身体融合。如果你无法取回你的手臂，你将失去变形为该复制体形态的能力，并失去该肢体的使用，直到其在1周后重新长出。若你的生命值降至0、你与你的复制体处于同一方格，或经过1分钟，此效果会自动结束。

Frequency once per day

You can use Change Shape to split two of your identities into two different bodies, each using a unique form and identity. Each copy Strides to an unoccupied square. Both you and your copy act on your turn and use the same pool of actions, the same multiple attack penalty, and the same pool of Hit Points, but if both forms take damage from the same effect, such as from an attack or spell with area damage, you apply the damage only once. In the case of an effect with a save that affects both forms, you take the worse result and apply it to both forms. When this effect ends, you choose one of the two forms as your actual form and the other version of you Strides once toward you before becoming an arm that melds with your body as soon as it occupies the same square as you. If you can't retrieve your arm, you lose the ability to Change Shape into that copy's form and lose the use of that limb until it regrows in 1 week. This effect automatically ends if you are reduced to 0 Hit Points, if you occupy the same square as your copy, or after 1 minute.

Quip.name: 俏皮话 Quip
Quip.description:
触发条件 30尺内的一个生物受到一名盟友的打击伤害。

你乘着盟友得手之机，向他们伤到的敌人抛出一句狡黠而恰到好处的嘲讽。尝试对触发该反应的生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓}。

Trigger A creature within 30 feet is damaged by an ally's Strike.

You follow up on your ally's success by hurling a cunning, well-timed taunt at a foe they wounded. Attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} the triggering creature.

Not in the Face.name: 别打脸 Not in the Face
Not in the Face.description:
触发 一个生物以近战攻击为目标指定你。

你挥舞双臂护住脸庞以免受伤害，并畏缩起来，表现得软弱又可怜。对触发此反应的生物的意志DC进行一次 @Check[deception|against:will] 检定。随后，该触发生物在1小时内免疫“别打脸”。

大成功 你的攻击者重新考虑是否要伤害你，并且被彻底扰乱。直到其下个回合开始前，它对你进行的攻击检定和伤害检定承受–2状态减值。

成功 你的攻击者被扰乱了。直到其下个回合开始前，它对你进行的攻击检定承受–1状态减值。

失败 你的攻击者暂时被扰乱了。触发此次反应的攻击检定承受–1状态减值。

大失败 你的攻击者不受影响。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8uHTQ6ha3CT79fS6]{效果：别打脸}

Trigger A creature targets you with a melee attack.

You wave your arms to shield your face from harm and cower, acting meek and pitiful. Attempt a @Check[deception|against:will] check against the triggering creature's Will DC. The triggering creature is then immune to Not in the Face for 1 hour.

Critical Success Your attacker has second thoughts about harming you and is thoroughly thrown off. It takes a –2 status penalty to attack and damage rolls against you until the start of its next turn.

Success Your attacker is thrown off. It takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls against you until the start of its next turn.

Failure Your attacker is temporarily thrown off. It takes a –1 status penalty to the triggering attack roll.

Critical Failure Your attacker is unaffected.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8uHTQ6ha3CT79fS6]{Effect: Not in the Face}

Nanite Form.name: 纳米虫形态 Nanite Form
Nanite Form.description:
频率 每天一次

你化作一群纳米机械，持续至多1分钟，或直到你花费1个单一动作恢复为正常形态。你变为超大型，获得集群特征，并获得40尺飞行速度。作为集群，你具有以下特性。

  • 你免疫 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{（被）束缚} 状态。
  • 你对范围伤害和溅射伤害具有弱点5。
  • 你可以占据与其他生物相同的空间，且你必须如此做才能使用你的伤害能力。
  • 作为一个2动作活动，你可以对所有与你共享空间的生物造成10d6点强酸伤害（进行一次基础反射豁免，DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC，以较高者为准）。
  • 你不能说话、施放法术、使用需要双手的操控动作、激活魔法物品，或用你的正常身体进行任何打击。
  • 你不会获得集群心智能力，因此你仍会正常受到心灵效果影响。

Frequency once per day

You change into a swarm of nanites for up to 1 minute or until you spend a single action to return to your normal shape. You become Huge, gain the swarm trait, and gain a fly Speed of 40 feet. As a swarm, you have the following characteristics.

  • You're immune to the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} conditions.
  • You have weakness 5 to area and splash damage.
  • You can occupy the same space as other creatures and must do so to use your damaging ability.
  • As a 2-action activity, you can deal 10d6 acid damage to all creatures sharing your space (basic Reflex save with a DC equal to your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher).
  • You can't speak, Cast Spells, use manipulate actions requiring your hands, Activate magic items, or make any Strikes with your normal body.
  • You don't gain the swarm mind ability, so you're still affected normally by mental effects.

Helping Hand.name: 援手 Helping Hand
Helping Hand.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

转瞬之间，你已做好准备，协助盟友完成一项任务。为使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助} 反应，这算作你正在准备协助盟友。你仍必须向 GM 说明你究竟是如何提供协助的。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

In the blink of an eye, you ready yourself to help your ally with a task. This counts as preparing to help an ally for the purposes of using the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} reaction. You must still explain to the GM exactly how you're helping.

Psychic Master.name: 心灵大师 Psychic Master
Psychic Master.description:
你的灵能变得更强了。选择一个来自秘法术法术列表的普通2环法术。你可以将该法术作为天生秘法术法术每天施放一次。

Your psychic abilities have grown stronger. Choose one common 2nd-rank spell from the occult spell list. You can cast that spell as an occult innate spell once per day.

Telepathic Conduit.name: 心灵传导通路 Telepathic Conduit
Telepathic Conduit.description:
拉申塔人 当你使用有限心灵感应与另一生物交流时，你会充当其思维的传导媒介，使其能够在短暂的片刻内向你回应——如果他们愿意的话。该生物可以以反应动作给你一个简短的答复，或者在其下个回合开始时以自由动作作出答复，前提是其仍处于你心灵感应的范围内。

Shirren 当你使用有限心灵感应与另一生物交流时，该生物可以以反应动作给你一个简短的答复，或者在其下个回合开始时以自由动作作出答复。

Lashunta When you use limited telepathy to communicate with another creature, you act as a conduit for their thoughts, allowing them to respond to you for a few scant moments—if they wish. The creature can give you a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action at the beginning of their next turn as long as they remain within range of your telepathy.

Shirren When you use limited telepathy to communicate with another creature, the creature can give you a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action at the beginning of their next turn.

Quick Climb.name: 迅速攀爬 Quick Climb
Quick Climb.description: 在攀爬（Climb）时，你获得成功结果时多移动5尺，大成功时多移动10尺，最多不超过你的速度。若你在运动技能上的熟练度达到传奇，获得等于你的速度的攀爬速度。

Mediator.name: 调解者 Mediator
Mediator.description:
你是一位有才华的外交官或调解者，擅长给人留下良好印象，并且习惯于寻找折中方案、促成交易，以及建立牢固的社交联系。你获得外交技能的受训熟练等级。若你会自动获得外交的受训熟练（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你自选的一项技能上获得受训熟练。你还会在以外交进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}检定时获得+1环境加值。

You're a talented diplomat or mediator who's skilled at making a good impression and accustomed to finding compromises, brokering deals, and forging strong social connections. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Diplomacy. If you would automatically become trained in Diplomacy (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}.

Skill Training.name: 技能训练 Skill Training
Skill Training.description:
你在所选的技能上受训。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长。每次在一项新技能上受训。

Widen Spell.name: 扩展法术 Widen Spell
Widen Spell.description:
你操纵你的法术的能量，使其影响更广的区域。如果你接下来使用的动作是施放一个具有爆发、锥形或直线区域且没有持续时间的法术，则增大该法术的区域。将通常半径至少为10英尺的爆发半径增加5英尺（半径更小的爆发不受影响）。将通常长度为15英尺或更短的锥形或直线长度增加5英尺，并将更大的锥形或直线长度增加10英尺。

You manipulate the energy of your spell, causing it to affect a wider area. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has an area of a burst, cone, or line and doesn't have a duration, increase the area of that spell. Add 5 feet to the radius of a burst that normally has a radius of at least 10 feet (a burst with a smaller radius isn't affected). Add 5 feet to the length of a cone or line that's normally 15 feet long or smaller, and add 10 feet to the length of a larger cone or line.

Witchwarper Dedication.name: 巫战扭曲者献身 Witchwarper Dedication
Witchwarper Dedication.description:
选择一个悖论。你在该悖论的技能上变为受训；如果你已经受训，则改为在你选择的一项技能上变为受训。你获得“扭曲现实”动作，但你的量子场是一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:10]。

你像巫战扭曲者一样施放法术。你获得“施放法术”活动的使用权限。你的法术库获得两个常见戏法，这些戏法来自与你的悖论相关联的法术列表、由你的悖论授予的法术，或你学习或发现的该传统的任何其他戏法。你在法术攻击调整值和法术DC数据上变为受训。你用于巫战扭曲者原型法术的关键施法属性是智力，且这些法术属于你的悖论传统的巫战扭曲者法术。除这些之外，你不会从所选的悖论中获得任何其他能力。

Choose a paradox. You become trained in the paradox's skill or, if you were already trained, you become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the Warp Reality action, but your quantum field is a @Template[type:burst|distance:10].

You cast spells like a witchwarper. You gain access to the Cast a Spell activity. You gain a spell repertoire with two common cantrips from the spell list associated with your paradox, from the spells granted by your paradox, or any other cantrips of that tradition you learn or discover. You're trained in the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics. Your key spellcasting attribute for witchwarper archetype spells is Intelligence, and they are witchwarper spells of your paradox's tradition. You don't gain any other abilities from your choice of paradox.

Multilingual.name: 多语言 Multilingual
Multilingual.description:
你可以轻松掌握新的语言。学习两种新语言，从常见语言、罕见语言和其它你有许可的语言中选取。若你在社群技能上的熟练度达到大师，可以学会一种新语言，达到传奇后再学会一种新语言。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长。每次都可学习额外的语言。

Camouvisage.name: 伪装面容 Camouvisage
Camouvisage.description:
你改变皮肤的颜色与纹理，使其与周围环境一致。你进行变形，但并非化作另一种生物的形态，而是与环境融为一体。只要观察者距离你至少20英尺，你在该观察者面前进行躲藏或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} 时就不需要掩护。此效果会持续，直到你保持这种新形态，或直到你移动到地形明显不同的区域为止。

You shift the color and texture of your skin to match your surroundings. You Change Shape, but instead of taking on the form of another creature, you blend in with your environment. As long as an observer is at least 20 feet away from you, you don't need cover from that observer to Hide or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}. This lasts as long as you stay in your new form or until you move to an area with substantially different terrain.

Memories of Ashok.name: 阿肖克的回忆 Memories of Ashok
Memories of Ashok.description:
凭借无与伦比的专注，你能够接入并梳理每一位先于你而来的默思族的记忆。你每周可以作为主施法者施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.hp6Q64dl7xbdn4gQ]{Collective Memories} 仪式。如此做时，你可以无视稀有熏香的成本；如果你这样做，在完成该仪式后你会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}。

With unparalleled focus, you can tap into and sift through the memories of every contemplative who has come before. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.hp6Q64dl7xbdn4gQ]{Collective Memories} ritual once per week as the primary caster. When you do so, you can ignore the rare incense cost; if you do so, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} after completing the ritual.

Secrete Numbing Saliva.name: 分泌麻痹唾液 Secrete Numbing Saliva
Secrete Numbing Saliva.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你的上一个动作必须是以你的胃口颚击徒手攻击成功进行的一次打击。

你的胃口会向目标分泌麻痹唾液，使其暴露于此毒素之下。

麻痹唾液（损伤，毒素）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell]（取你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者）

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 笨拙 1 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}（1轮）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 且受压制（1轮）

Frequency once per hour

Requirements Your last action was a successful Strike with your stomach-mouth jaws unarmed attack.

Your stomach-mouth secretes numbing saliva into your target, exposing them to the poison.

Numbing Saliva (injury, poison)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] (the higher of your class or spell DC)

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 clumsy 1 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and suppressed (1 round)

Warp Wounds.name: 扭曲伤口 Warp Wounds
Warp Wounds.description:
触发 敌人对你造成伤害。

需求 一个敌人或自愿的盟友位于你的量子场中。

你的现实发生偏移，部分与另一个现实重叠；在那里，别人代替你受了伤。你获得对触发此次攻击的所有伤害的抗性，数值等于你等级的一半；你量子场中的一个敌人或自愿的盟友受到同类型的伤害，数值等于以此方式防止的伤害量，并且其必须以你的职业 DC 进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:witchwarper|basic] 豁免。

Trigger An enemy damages you.

Requirements An enemy or willing ally is in your quantum field.

Your reality shifts to partly overlap with another in which someone else was injured in your stead. You gain resistance to all damage against the triggering attack equal to half your level, and one enemy or willing ally in your quantum field takes damage of the same type equal to the amount of damage prevented this way, with a @Check[fortitude|against:witchwarper|basic] save against your class DC.

Elebrian Lore.name: 灵脑人知识 Elebrian Lore
Elebrian Lore.description:
你族人日渐稀少的数量，并未阻止你去学习一切关于祖先过往的知识。你在奥秘和社群方面受过训练。如果你会自动在其中一项技能上获得受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在一项由你选择的技能上获得受训。

你还获得用于灵脑人传承知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 泛用专长。

Your people's dwindling numbers hasn't stopped you from learning everything there is to know about your ancestral past. You are trained in Arcana and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Elebrian Lore.

Quantum Breadth.name: 量子广度 Quantum Breadth
Quantum Breadth.description:
你的法术 repertoire 扩展了，并且你每天可以施放更多属于你悖论传统的法术。除你的两个最高巫战扭曲者法术位对应的法术环阶外，你的 repertoire 中每个其他法术环阶的法术数量，以及你从巫战扭曲者原型专长获得的法术位数量，都增加 1。

Your repertoire expands, and you can cast more spells of your paradox's tradition each day. Increase the number of spells in your repertoire and number of spell slots you gain from witchwarper archetype feats by 1 for each spell rank other than your two highest witchwarper spell slots.

Proleptic Parry.name: 预见性招架 Proleptic Parry
Proleptic Parry.description:
触发 一个被心灵预判的生物以一个精神效果为目标指定你。

需求 你使用“心灵预判”对该目标具有加值。

你对抗该触发效果的意志豁免检定获得+1环境加值。如果自你上次使用“心灵预判”以来，你曾对该目标造成过精神伤害，则此加值提高至+2。如果你的豁免检定结果为大成功，则目标受到 @Damage[5d4[mental]] 伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，直到你的下个回合结束。

Trigger A Telepredicted creature targets you with a mental effect.

Requirements You have a bonus against the target using Telepredict.

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saving throws against the triggering effect. Increase this bonus to +2 if you've dealt mental damage to the target since the last time you used Telepredict. If you roll a critical success on the saving throw, the target takes @Damage[5d4[mental]] damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn.

Attuned Blow.name: 调谐打击 Attuned Blow
Attuned Blow.description:
你一完成调谐就能立刻使用你的显化。当你以单个动作进行调谐时，你可以以自由动作用你的太阳耀焰或太阳武器进行一次打击。

You can use your manifestations immediately upon attuning yourself. When you Attune as a single action, you can make a Strike with your solar flare or solar weapon as a free action.

Historian.name: 历史学家 Historian
Historian.description:
你在一项自选的学识技能上成为受训。你可以花费10分钟查阅你的笔记或研究材料，以使用任意一项你未受训的学识技能来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}一段历史，并以你最高的学识技能调整值替代该技能的调整值。

You become trained in a Lore skill of your choice. You can spend 10 minutes checking your notes or research materials to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about a piece of history with any Lore skill in which you aren't trained, using your highest Lore skill modifier instead of your modifier with that skill.

Impeccable Crafting.name: 完美手艺 Impeccable Crafting
Impeccable Crafting.description: 你能以极高的效率制作出完美无瑕的成品。制作你在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.QLeMH5mQgh28sa5o]{独门手艺 Specialty Crafting}中所选类型的物品时，每当你的手艺检定掷出成功，改为获得大成功。

Natural Ambition.name: 天生野望 Natural Ambition
Natural Ambition.description: 你从小就壮志勃勃，并且为了出人头地一直在努力奋斗，这让你在你所选择的职业领域上的进步卓越。你获得你自身职业的一个1级职业专长。你必须满足该专长的先决条件，你仅能在创建角色阶段延后选取该专长，以满足所选职业专长的先决条件。

Cheek Pouches.name: 颊囊 Cheek Pouches
Cheek Pouches.description: 你的脸颊富有弹性，你可在颊囊内容纳至多四个重量不大于轻负载的物品。这些物品的长宽高均不得超过1 尺。若你的颊囊内存放有物品，你会变得口齿不清。将物品放入或拿出颊囊是一个交互动作。你可以一个单动作将颊囊内的所有物品同时吐出，这些物品将掉落在你所处方格的地面上。

Draconic Lethality.name: 龙族致命性 Draconic Lethality
Draconic Lethality.description:
你的龙裔身躯本身就是一种武器。当你选择此专长时，你获得以下一种由你选择的徒手攻击：爪击、角击、颚击或尾巴。上述每种攻击都属于搏斗武器组，并具有所列的伤害骰和特性。

  • 爪击 1d6 挥砍（灵巧、巧技、徒手）
  • 角击 1d6 穿刺（巧技、徒手）
  • 颚击 1d6 穿刺（擒抱、徒手）
  • 尾巴 1d6 钝击（横扫、绊摔、徒手）

在5级时，每当你用这些攻击之一造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

特殊 你可以选择此专长四次。每次你这么做时，从上述选项中选择一种不同的攻击。

Your draconic body is a weapon. When you select this feat, you gain one of the following unarmed attacks of your choice: claw, horn, jaws, or tail. Each of these attacks is in the brawling weapon group and has the listed damage die and traits.

  • Claw 1d6 slashing (agile, finesse, unarmed)
  • Horn 1d6 piercing (finesse, unarmed)
  • Jaws 1d6 piercing (grapple, unarmed)
  • Tail 1d6 bludgeoning (sweep, trip, unarmed)

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these attacks, you get its critical specialization effect.

Special You can take this feat four times. Each time you do, select a different attack from the options listed above.

Dragonkin Breath.name: 龙人吐息 Dragonkin Breath
Dragonkin Breath.description:
你的呼气中灌注着能量，如同你久远的龙族祖先一般。你可以喷吐一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15]，造成 @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d4[@actor.flags.system.dragonkinBreath.damageType]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 对你的职业 DC 或法术 DC 中较高者进行豁免）。使用此攻击后，你在 [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Dragonkin Breath]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用它。到达3级时，以及此后每隔2级，伤害增加1d4。

特殊 当你选择此专长时，选择你吐息的伤害类型和武器组：强酸（腐蚀）、钝击（锤）、寒冷（低温）、电击（震击）、火焰（烈焰）、穿刺（矛）、挥砍（刀）或音波（音波）。此选择为永久。此能力具有与其所造成伤害类型相关联的特质。

Your exhalations are infused with energy, like your dragon ancestors of old. You can exhale a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d4[@actor.flags.system.dragonkinBreath.damageType]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC). After using this attack, you can't use it again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Dragonkin Breath]]{1d4 rounds}. At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d4.

Special When you select this feat, choose your breath's damage type and weapon group: acid (corrosive), bludgeoning (hammer), cold (cryo), electricity (shock), fire (flame), piercing (spear), slashing (knife), or sonic (sonic). This choice is permanent. This ability has the trait associated with the type of damage it deals.

Greater Warp.name: 强效扭曲 Greater Warp
Greater Warp.description:
你突破了悖论理解的帷幕。你获得与你的悖论对应的高阶扭曲法术。

You breach the veil of paradoxical understanding. You gain the greater warp spell for your paradox.

Feign Death.name: 诈死 Feign Death
Feign Death.description:
触发条件 你受到伤害。

你卧倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧} 并假扮成一具尸体。只要你不采取任何需要动用心智以外事物的动作，你看起来就是死的。要识破你的伪装，生物必须通过“寻找”或“回忆知识”进行一次对抗你欺瞒 DC 的检定并成功。若你在欺瞒上达到大师熟练度，则你可以在不结束此效果的情况下“准备”一个动作。

Trigger You take damage.

You lie @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and Impersonate a corpse. As long as you don't take any actions requiring anything other than your mind, you appear dead. To see through your ruse, a creature must succeed at a check against your Deception DC, either by Seeking or Recalling Knowledge. You can Ready an Action without ending this effect if you're a master in Deception.

Dragonkin Lore.name: 龙人学识 Dragonkin Lore
Dragonkin Lore.description:
你接受过代代相传于龙人的技艺训练。你获得运动和社群的受训熟练等级。若你本会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你自选的一项技能上成为受训。

你还获得用于龙人传承的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 泛用专长。

You're trained in skills passed down through generations of dragonkin. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Athletics and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Dragonkin Lore.

Travel-Tongue.name: 旅行语 Travel-Tongue
Travel-Tongue.description:
在你的旅途中某个时候，学习新语言变得像呼吸一样轻松——你的某些同伴甚至怀疑你可能受到了神祇威登的祝福！你能够说、读并理解任何语言。

Somewhere along your travels, picking up new languages became as easy as breathing—some of your colleagues even suspect you might be blessed by the god Weydan! You can speak, read, and understand any language.

Stunt Double.name: 替身演员 Stunt Double
Stunt Double.description:
作为娱乐事业的一部分，你刻苦训练，以应对各种类型的身体挑战。你获得等同于你地面速度的攀爬速度或游泳速度。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。

You've trained hard to tackle physical challenges of all types as part of your entertainment career. You gain a climb Speed or a swim Speed equal to your land Speed.

Special You can select this feat more than once.

Specialty Crafting.name: 独门手艺 Specialty Crafting
Specialty Crafting.description:
你的训练专注于制造某一种特定类型的物品。从下列专精中选择一种；你在制造该类型物品的制造检定上获得+1环境加值。如果你在制造上是大师，此加值提升为+2。如果不明确该专精是否适用，则由GM决定。有些专精可能只会部分适用。例如，如果你要制作一套阿巴达尔集团旅行服，且你的专精是纺织品，由于该物品的制作同时需要护甲锻造和纺织品，GM可能只会给你一半的加值。

专精适用物品
护甲锻造护甲、护盾和升级
艺术创作美术品，包括珠宝和星辉武者水晶
载具制造载具，包括太空船
化学品酒精、弹药、爆炸物和燃料
计算机通讯设备、数据板和虚拟物品
工程学科技小装置和配件
枪械制造火器和火器升级
生命科学生物科技和部分药物
机器人学无人机、机甲和机器人
纺织品服装、皮革和聚合物护甲

Your training focused on Crafting one particular kind of item. Select one of the specialties listed below; you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Crafting checks to Craft items of that type. If you are a master in Crafting, this bonus increases to +2. If it's unclear whether the specialty applies, the GM decides. Some specialties might apply only partially. For example, if you were making an Abadarcorp travel suit and had specialty in textiles, the GM might give you half your bonus because the item requires both armorsmithing and textiles to craft.

SpecialtyApplicable Items
ArmorsmithingArmor, shields and upgrades
ArtistryFine art, including jewelry and solarian crystals
AutomotivesVehicles, including spaceships
ChemicalsAlcohol, ammunition, explosives, and fuel
ComputerComm units, datapads, and virtual items
EngineeringTech gadgets and accessories
GunsmithingFirearms and firearm upgrades
Life ScienceBiotechnology and some pharmaceuticals
RoboticsDrones, mechs, and robots
TextilesClothing, leather, and polymer armor

Stitch Flesh.name: 缝合血肉 Stitch Flesh
Stitch Flesh.description:
你可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势} 来为不死生物恢复生命值，而不仅仅是活体生物。你为此使用的技术各不相同，但都需要缝合线、绷带以及医疗包中包含的其他工具。某些可能提高治疗不死生物伤口 DC 的情况，与活体生物有所不同。例如，如果不死生物是在法拉斯明医疗舱中接受治疗，或者伤口是由强大的生命能量造成的，GM 可能会提高 DC。

You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} to restore Hit Points to undead creatures, not just living ones. The techniques you use to do so vary, but all require sutures, bandages, and other tools included in a medkit. Some conditions that might raise the DC of treating undead's wounds differ from that of living creatures. For instance, the GM might increase the DC if the undead is being treated in a Pharasmin medbay or the wounds were caused by powerful vital energy.

Dramatic Reading.name: 戏剧朗读 Dramatic Reading
Dramatic Reading.description:
你背诵一句由著名媒体角色说出的、令人印象深刻的口头禅或独白。对30尺内的单个敌人的意志DC进行一次 @Check[media-lore|against:will] 或 @Check[performance|against:will] 检定。

如果你的媒体学识或表演熟练等级为专家，你可以将范围内至多两个目标作为目标；如果为大师，则至多四个；如果为传奇，则至多八个。

大成功 目标在1分钟内的察觉检定和意志豁免获得–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.mpoTONLPMyb14mO9]{效果：戏剧性朗诵（大成功）}

成功 目标在1轮内的察觉检定和意志豁免获得–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.IPIYAY9bTGetPw12]{效果：戏剧性朗诵（成功）}

大失败 目标会暂时免疫戏剧性朗诵1小时。

You recite a memorable catchphrase or monologue delivered by a famous media character. Attempt a @Check[media-lore|against:will] or @Check[performance|against:will] check against the Will DC of a single enemy within 30 feet.

You can target up to two targets within range if you have expert proficiency in Media Lore or Performance, four if you're a master, and eight if you're legendary.

Critical Success The target takes a –1 status penalty to Perception checks and Will saves for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.mpoTONLPMyb14mO9]{Effect: Dramatic Reading (Critical Success)}

Success The target takes a –1 status penalty to Perception checks and Will saves for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.IPIYAY9bTGetPw12]{Effect: Dramatic Reading (Success)}

Critical Failure The target is temporarily immune to Dramatic Reading for 1 hour.

Fundamental Understanding.name: 基本理解 Fundamental Understanding
Fundamental Understanding.description:
触发条件 你的量子场内有一个生物、陷阱或类似物体施放了一个你不在自己的法术收录中的法术，且你察觉到了此次施法。

如果该触发法术是常见法术，且你在该法术传统对应的相关技能上受过训练，你会自动辨识出正在施放的法术（你仍需进行掷骰以尝试获得重度成功，但结果不会差于成功）。你或一个位于60尺内且对此法术可见的盟友，针对该法术的豁免检定或 AC 获得 +1 处境加值（如果你掷出了重度成功，则该处境加值改为 +2）。

Trigger A creature, trap, or similar object within your quantum field casts a spell that you don't have in your spell repertoire, and you're aware of the casting.

If the triggering spell is common and you're trained in the associated skill for the spell's tradition, you automatically identify the spell being cast (you still roll to attempt to get a critical success but can't get a worse result than a success). You or a visible ally within 60 feet targeted by this spell gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your saving throw or your AC against it (or a +2 circumstance bonus if you rolled a critical success).

Convert Illumination.name: 转化光照 Convert Illumination
Convert Illumination.description:
触发条件 60尺内的一个区域因魔法黑暗而使其光照等级降低。

如果受影响区域原本是微光，你的活力网络恢复等同于该魔法黑暗法术环阶的生命值；如果受影响区域原本是明亮光照，则恢复量翻倍。即使该魔法黑暗结束，该区域的光照等级仍会维持为非魔法黑暗1分钟；此效果会移除区域内的光照，但不属于魔法黑暗，并且会被任何形式的魔法光自动克服。

Trigger An area within 60 feet has its light level reduced due to magical darkness.

Your vitality network regains Hit Points equal to the spell rank of the magical darkness if the affected area was normally dim light, and doubled if the affected area was normally bright light. Even if the magical darkness ends, the area's light level remains non-magical darkness for 1 minute; this effect removes light in the area but isn't magical darkness and is automatically overcome by any form of magical light.

Ammo Hoarder.name: 弹药囤积者 Ammo Hoarder
Ammo Hoarder.description:
要求 你正持用一把自动武器。

通过采用直接且有条不紊的连发射击，你在不削弱破坏潜力的情况下节省了弹药。你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击} 的消耗数量等于区域内目标的数量，而非区域内目标数量 × 2。

Requirements You're wielding an automatic weapon.

By using direct and methodical burst fire, you conserve your ammunition without compromising your destructive potential. Your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire} has an expend equal to the number of targets in the area, rather than the number of targets in the area × 2.

Versatile Outfit.name: 多用途服装 Versatile Outfit
Versatile Outfit.description:
你以令人惊叹的定制服装而闻名，并以设计多用途、可重构的衣着为傲，使你能够在片刻之间打造出几乎任何造型。你可以使用制作技能而非欺瞒来冒充他人，并且可以在1分钟内完成，而不是通常所需的10分钟。当你使用制作来冒充特定人物时，你不需要伪装工具包，而工匠工具包会为该检定提供+1物品加值。

You are known for your astounding custom outfits and pride yourself on designing versatile and reconfigurable garments, allowing you to create nearly any look in a matter of moments. You can use the Crafting skill rather than Deception to Impersonate another person, and can do so in 1 minute rather than the usual 10 minutes. You don't need a disguise kit to Impersonate a specific person when using Crafting to do so, and a maker's toolkit grants a +1 item bonus to the check.

Shobhad Lore.name: 绍巴德传说知识 Shobhad Lore
Shobhad Lore.description:
你对自己族人的故事了如指掌。你获得自然和求生的受训熟练度。如果你本会自动在这些技能之一上获得受训熟练度（例如来自你的背景或职业），则改为在你选择的一项技能上获得受训熟练度。你还获得用于修博哈德学识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 泛用专长。

特殊 如果你拥有都市修博哈德传承，你还会获得用于伊索基学识的额外学识泛用专长。

You're well-versed in the stories of your people. You become trained in Nature and Survival. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example) you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Shobhad Lore.

Special If you have the urban shobhad heritage, you also gain the Additional Lore general feat for Ysoki Lore.

Bonded Transposition.name: 联结转移 Bonded Transposition
Bonded Transposition.description:
频率 每10分钟一次。

触发条件 你的缔约伙伴位于40英尺内，且将受到敌人的伤害。

你本能地感知到你的缔约伙伴身陷危险，于是猛然扑去，使其免受伤害。你与缔约伙伴立即彼此交换位置，传送到对方所在的位置。本应对你的缔约伙伴造成的伤害改为由你承受。

Frequency once every 10 minutes.

Trigger Your bonded partner is within 40 feet and would be damaged by an enemy.

Instinctively sensing your bonded partner is in danger, you swoop in to save them from harm. You and your bonded partner immediately swap places with one another, teleporting into one another's locations. The damage that would be dealt to your bonded partner is dealt to you instead.

Terror-Forming.name: 恐惧塑形 Terror-Forming
Terror-Forming.description:
要求 你正持用一把区域或自动武器。

你的武器将战场轰得支离破碎，使其化为一片毁坏的废墟。你进行区域射击或自动射击。你不指定主要目标，而是改为使你攻击区域内的每个方格都成为困难地形。若某个方格已经是困难地形，则其变为强效困难地形。由此动作创造的任何困难地形或强效困难地形都会留在原地，且若无大规模工程或魔法便无法改变。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

Your weapon blasts apart the battlefield and leaves it a ruinous waste. You Area Fire or Auto-Fire. You don't designate a primary target, but instead make each square in the area of your attack difficult terrain. If a square was already difficult terrain, it becomes greater difficult terrain. Any difficult or greater difficult terrain created by this action remains in place and can't be changed without extensive engineering or magic.

Twin Draw.name: 双重拔枪 Twin Draw
Twin Draw.description:
需求 你有两只空闲手。

你已经练习过如何流畅地拔出并用两把武器瞄准。拔出至多两把单手武器并 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}。

Requirements You have two free hands.

You've practiced smoothly drawing and taking aim with two weapons. Draw up to two one-handed weapons and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim}.

Dual Bond.name: 双重纽带 Dual Bond
Dual Bond.description:
尽管有些人声称你无法像其他龙人那样建立深厚的伙伴联结，但不可否认的是，在建立联结方面，你拥有更大的灵活性和自由。你可以同时维持任意数量的伙伴联结。与你建立联结的伙伴彼此之间不会自动视为已建立联结。

While some claim you're incapable of forming a partner bond as deep as other dragonkin can, it's undeniable that you have more flexibility and freedom when it comes to bonding. You can maintain any number of partner bonds at once. Your bonded partners don't automatically count as being bonded with one another.

Silent Tide.name: 寂潮 Silent Tide
Silent Tide.description:
在卡洛-马霍伊的海带森林中潜踪追猎巨大的鳍状野兽，教会了你如何借助繁茂植被的掩护，安静而流畅地移动。进行潜行时，你无视由植被和灌木丛造成的困难地形，并将由植被或灌木丛造成的高等困难地形视为困难地形。此外，当你在游泳时进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}，你可以以你的完整游泳速度移动。如果你拥有其他允许你在潜行时以完整速度移动的能力，那么你在游泳时进行潜行检定还会获得 +2 状态加值。

Stalking great finned beasts through the kelp forests of Kalo-Mahoi has taught you to move silently and smoothly through the cover of foliage. While sneaking, you ignore difficult terrain caused by foliage and underbrush and treat greater difficult terrain caused by foliage or underbrush as difficult terrain. In addition, you can move at your full swim Speed when you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} while swimming. If you have another ability that allows you to move at full speed while Sneaking, you also gain a +2 status bonus to checks to Sneak while Swimming.

Shifter's Orientation.name: 变形者的定位 Shifter's Orientation
Shifter's Orientation.description:
你可塑的身体让你更容易重新调整位置并恢复平衡。每10分钟一次，当你变形时，你可以获得戏法 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.t0oFlhMhNOHbb6rG]{Reorient} 的效果。

Your malleable body makes it easier for you to reposition and rebalance yourself. Once every 10 minutes, when you Change Shape, you can gain the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.t0oFlhMhNOHbb6rG]{Reorient} cantrip.

Swarm Evolution.name: 虫群进化 Swarm Evolution
Swarm Evolution.description:
无论是逐渐发生，还是在辉煌进化的一瞬间爆发中，你都已蜕变为一种强大的类虫群生物。你对抗恐惧的豁免获得+2状态加值，并获得等于你等级一半的强酸抗性。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.O6VQC1Bs4aSYDa6R]{恐怖面具} 作为一个7环原始天生法术施放一次。

Whether gradual or in an instant burst of glorious evolution, you've metamorphosed into a powerful Swarm-like creature. You gain a +2 status bonus to saves against fear, and you gain acid resistance equal to half your level. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.O6VQC1Bs4aSYDa6R]{Mask of Terror} as a 7th-rank primal innate spell once per day.

Learning Experience.name: 学习体验 Learning Experience
Learning Experience.description:
你的身体能够部分吸收持续性伤害，并从中学习。在你为一个持续性效果掷伤害之前，你可以选择仅承受该效果的一半伤害。如此一来，你会自动在结束该持续性伤害的平检上失败，并且你可以立即以一个自由动作进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}，以回想与该持续性伤害来源相关的信息。如果你拥有任何通常会在你回忆知识时触发的特殊能力或自由动作，你不能将它们用于此动作。

Your body can partially absorb persistent damage to learn from it. Before you roll damage from a persistent effect, you can choose to take half damage from the effect. When you do, you automatically fail your flat check to end the persistent damage and you can immediately @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} as a free action to recall information related to the source of the persistent damage. If you have any special abilities or free actions that would normally be triggered when you Recall Knowledge, you can't use them with this action.

I'll Be Back.name: 我会回来的 I'll Be Back
I'll Be Back.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你在处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 后恢复意识。

即使你被击倒，一旦恢复过来，你也会立刻重返战局。你可以执行站起和交互以拔出一把武器或拾取一把无人持用的武器。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You regain consciousness after being @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}.

Even when you're downed, you get right back into the thick of things once recovered. You Stand and Interact to draw a weapon or grab an unattended weapon.

Wary Disarmament.name: 谨慎解除 Wary Disarmament
Wary Disarmament.description: 若你在解除装置或陷阱时导致其被触发，你在对抗该装置或陷阱的AC或豁免上获得+2加值。这个加值只能应用于你尝试失败时触发的攻击或效果，对后续的攻击或效果无效，比如复杂陷阱的额外攻击。

Basic Stellar Attunement.name: 基础星辰谐调 Basic Stellar Attunement
Basic Stellar Attunement.description:
你获得一个1级或2级的星辉武者专长。

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level solarian feat.

Soldier's Training.name: 士兵的训练 Soldier's Training
Soldier's Training.description:
长期的训练与战斗经验让你具备了能够瞬间做出判断的反应力。选择一个你拥有且会赋予你反应动作的士兵职业专长。在你的回合开始时，你获得一个额外的反应动作，但你只能将其用于所选的职业专长，或由所选职业专长赋予的动作。

只要新的专长符合要求，你就可以在进行每日准备时更改为此专长所选择的反应动作。

Constant drills and combat experience leave you with reflexes capable of making snap decisions. Choose one soldier class feat you have that grants a reaction. At the start of your turn, you gain an additional reaction that you can only use for the selected class feat or an action granted by the selected class feat.

You can change the reaction selected for this feat when you make your daily preparations as long as the new feat meets the requirements.

Swap Upgrades.name: 交换升级件 Swap Upgrades
Swap Upgrades.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你正持有一套修理工具，或你正穿戴着它且有一只手空着。

你一丝不苟地准备好了自己的装备，以便在野外进行快速调整而不损坏任何精密部件。你拔出并将一个升级模块装入一件手持武器或已穿戴的护甲中。你可以在此活动中卸下并收好一个升级模块。如果你的制作熟练度达到大师，你可以安装两个升级模块。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You are holding a repair kit, or you are wearing it and have a hand free.

You've meticulously prepared your gear to allow for quick adjustments in the field without damaging any delicate components. You draw and Install an Upgrade into a wielded weapon or worn armor. You can uninstall and stow an upgrade as part of this activity. If you have master proficiency in Crafting, you can Install two upgrades.

Fool the Camera.name: 欺骗摄像机 Fool the Camera
Fool the Camera.description:
你知道如何欺骗安保摄像头和赋予特殊感官的科技物品，例如瞄准镜。每当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} 动作时，你始终被视为已针对来自科技物品的特殊感官采取预防措施。此外，你获得对抗摄像头和科技陷阱以避免被察觉时的隐匿 DC +2 情境加值。

You know how to fool security cameras and tech items that confer special senses, such as scopes. Whenever you use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} actions, you're always considered to be taking precautions against special senses from tech items. In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Stealth DC to Avoid Notice by cameras and technological hazards.

Natural Skill.name: 天生精熟 Natural Skill
Natural Skill.description: 你的聪明才智让你在各种各样的技能上都获得了训练。你选择两项技能，将其熟练度提升至受训。

Soldier's Toughness.name: 士兵的坚韧 Soldier's Toughness
Soldier's Toughness.description:
你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升为大师。

Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to master.

Slippery Secrets.name: 滑头鬼 Slippery Secrets
Slippery Secrets.description: 有人尝试揭示你的本质或意图时，你能够加以回避。当一个法术或魔法效果尝试读取你的思想、侦测你是否在说谎、或者揭示你的身份时，你可以尝试一次欺骗检定对抗该法术或效果的DC。若你检定成功，该效果无法获得任何结果。

Clinging Bite.name: 攀附噬咬 Clinging Bite
Clinging Bite.description:
你对自己的胃口口腔拥有极佳的控制力。你的颚击徒手攻击获得擒拿特征。当你用颚击攻击造成重击时，你可以用你的下一个动作尝试用你的颚击对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}，或者自动延长你正用颚击压制的一个生物身上的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}状态。此次尝试既不会受到也不会计入你的多重攻击减值。

You have excellent control over your stomach-mouth. Your jaws unarmed attack gains the grapple trait. When you critically hit with your jaws attack, you can use your next action to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} that creature with your jaws or automatically extend the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} condition on a creature you're restraining with your jaws. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward your multiple attack penalty.

Corporate Speak.name: 企业黑话 Corporate Speak
Corporate Speak.description:
你可以使用技术性的商务和企业行话来传递隐藏信息，并使用商务学识或企业学识来掩饰你话语的真实含义。任何至少与你一同旅行了整整1周的盟友，或在相同学识技能上受过训练的盟友，都会自动辨明你的意思。其他观察者必须在对抗你的商务学识或企业学识DC的察觉检定中成功，才会意识到你在传递秘密信息，而且他们必须大成功才能理解该信息。

You can share hidden messages using technical business and corporate jargon, using Business or Corporate Lore to disguise the true meaning of your words. Any allies who have traveled alongside you for at least 1 full week or are trained in the same Lore skill automatically discern your meaning. Other observers must succeed at a Perception check against your Business or Corporate Lore DC to realize you're passing a secret message, and they must critically succeed to understand the message.

Centered Mind.name: 心神专注 Centered Mind
Centered Mind.description:
你了解自己的内心，并会本能地抗拒那些扰乱你思绪或操控你情绪的企图。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.sobAVW9cH4VGaRkn]{集中思绪}，而非每天一次。

You know your own mind and instinctively resist attempts to unbalance your thoughts or control your emotions. You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.sobAVW9cH4VGaRkn]{Center Thoughts} once per hour, rather than once per day.

Ride.name: 骁骑手 Ride
Ride.description: 当你对骑乘的动物发动@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.q9nbyIF0PEBqMtYe]{指挥动物 Command an Animal}，让它移动（比如行走）时，你不需要尝试检定，而是自动获得成功。你骑乘的任何动物都会像仆从一样在你的回合行动。若你在遭遇过程中@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PM5jvValFkbFH3TV]{骑乘 Mount}动物，则它会跳过自己的下个回合，并在你的下个回合行动。

Power Slide.name: 强行转向 Power Slide
Power Slide.description:
你让载具进入一种勉强受控的侧滑状态，猛然转向以躲避追击。你以驾驶检定承受 –2 减值进行驾驶，并获得与你用于动力侧滑所花费的动作数相同的驾驶动作效果。移动结束时，若你成功，你可以将载具转向至多 90 度。若你的驾驶检定大成功，则你改为可以将载具转向至多 180 度。

You throw the vehicle into a barely controlled skid, turning sharply to evade pursuit. You Drive with a –2 penalty to your Piloting check, gaining the effects of the Drive action for the same number of actions you spent to Power Slide. At the end of the movement, if you succeed, you can turn the vehicle up to 90 degrees. If you critically succeed at your Piloting check, you can instead turn the vehicle up to 180 degrees.

Consistent Communalism.name: 一致社群主义 Consistent Communalism
Consistent Communalism.description:
在你的盟友最需要你的时候，你总是随时准备伸出援手。你每小时可以使用一次“群体主义”，而非每天一次。

You're always ready to help your allies when they need you the most. You can use Communalism once per hour, rather than once per day.

Planetary Bond.name: 行星纽带 Planetary Bond
Planetary Bond.description:
你的纽带已成长为与你星球上一切生灵的亲缘联系。当你位于自己的星球上时，你会持续处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{与动物交谈} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qvwIwJ9QBihy8R0t]{与植物交谈} 的效果之下。你被视为你的纽带中任意星球的原生者。原生于你星球的生物会本能地感受到与你的连接，因此当你向它们进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求} 时，你的外交检定获得 +2 情境加值。特别乐于助人的生物可能会同意执行一些轻微任务，例如传递消息或侦察某个区域，但它们不会替你做危险的工作，也不会为你而战。

你发誓要保护与你缔结纽带的世界。获得以下典范与禁忌。

典范 保卫你的世界免受外星威胁，保护其自然资源不被掠夺，与自己星球上的生命形态建立纽带

禁忌 扰乱或伤害你星球的生态系统，掠夺你星球的自然资源，剥削你星球上的生命形态

如果你因触犯禁忌而失去力量，你会失去此专长的效果，并且只有通过进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{赎罪} 仪式进行悔过后，才能与另一颗星球建立纽带。

Your bond has grown into a kinship with all that lives on your planet. You're constantly under the effects of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{Speak with Animals} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qvwIwJ9QBihy8R0t]{Speak with Plants} while on your planet. You are considered a native of any planet in your bond. Creatures native to your planet feel an instinctual connection to you, granting a +2 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks when making a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} from them. Particularly helpful creatures may agree to minor tasks like delivering messages or spying on an area, but they won't do dangerous jobs or fight for you.

You vow to protect your bonded world. Gain the following edicts and anathemas.

Edicts defend your world from extraterrestrial threats, protect its natural resources from exploitation, form bonds with lifeforms on your planet

Anathemas disturb or harm your planet's ecosystem, plunder your planet's natural resources, exploit your planet's lifeforms

If your powers are lost due to anathema, you lose the effects of this feat and cannot bond with another planet only if you repent by conducting an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual.

Hurl Ally.name: 投掷盟友 Hurl Ally
Hurl Ally.description:
需求 你与一名盟友相邻，或你的盟友正骑乘你，且你有一只或更多空闲的手。

你运用与生俱来的力量，将一名盟友猛掷穿过战场。将一名与你相邻、体型与你相同或更小的盟友举起，并将其投掷到你视线内 20 尺范围内的一个未被占据的空间；如果你投掷的是你的羁绊伙伴，则可投掷到 40 尺范围内。他们的移动不会触发反应。你的盟友以站立状态结束此次移动，并将此次坠落视为低了 20 尺；如果你投掷的是你的羁绊伙伴，则视为低了 40 尺。

Requirements You are adjacent to an ally or your ally is riding you and you have one or more hands free.

You use your innate strength to hurl an ally across the battlefield. Pick up an adjacent ally of your size or smaller and throw them to an unoccupied space you can see within 20 feet, or within 40 feet if you throw your bonded partner. Their movement doesn't trigger reactions. Your ally ends this movement on their feet and treats the fall as 20 feet lower, or 40 feet lower if you throw your bonded partner.

Dragonkin Weapon Familiarity.name: 龙人武器熟悉 Dragonkin Weapon Familiarity
Dragonkin Weapon Familiarity.description:
你擅长使用天火军团偏爱的武器。你接受过天火剑、火焰喷射器和机枪的训练。此外，你还获得所有具有龙人特征的非普通武器的使用权限。就熟练项而言，你将其中任何军用武器视为简易武器，并将任何先进（型）武器视为军用武器。

在5级时，每当你用这些武器之一造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

You wield weapons favored by the Skyfire Legion. You are trained with the skyfire sword, flamethrower, and machine gun. In addition, you gain access to all uncommon weapons with the dragonkin trait. For the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you get its critical specialization effect.

Furious Flap.name: 狂怒拍击 Furious Flap
Furious Flap.description:
控制你膜翼的肌肉发育得格外完善，而你也知道如何利用它们的力量，令敌人猝不及防。每天一次，在有大气的区域内时，你可以拍动双翼，以原始先天法术施放 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind}。如果你浸没在液体中，则可以改为施放 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jfVCuOpzC6mUrf6f]{Hydraulic Push}。在你施放该法术后，你可以以一个自由动作移动至多相当于你一半速度的距离（如果处于浸没状态，则为你游泳速度的一半）。

The muscles that control your membranous wings are particularly well developed, and you know how to use them to catch enemies off guard with their power. Once per day while in an area of atmosphere, you can flap your wings to cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind} as a primal innate spell. If you're submerged in liquid, you can instead cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jfVCuOpzC6mUrf6f]{Hydraulic Push}. After you've cast the spell, you can move up to half your Speed (or half your swim Speed if submerged) as a free action.

Shifting Smuggler.name: 流变走私犯 Shifting Smuggler
Shifting Smuggler.description:
当你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.34E7k2YRcsOU5uyl]{变形}时，你可以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.qVNVSmsgpKFGk9hV]{藏匿物品}，将一件物品藏在你体内的空腔中，或使用“交互”从你体内取出一件储存的物品。若你是大型生物，你最多可以储存四件轻型体积或以下的物品；若你是中型生物，则最多储存三件轻型体积或以下的物品；若你是小型生物，则最多储存两件轻型体积或以下的物品。若你变形为更小体型的身体，超出的物品会掉落到你所在方格的地面上。这些物品的任何一个尺寸都不能长于1英尺。

When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.34E7k2YRcsOU5uyl]{Change Shape}, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.qVNVSmsgpKFGk9hV]{Conceal an Object} inside a cavity in your body or Interact to grab an object stored inside your body. You can store up to four items of light Bulk or less if you are Large, three items of light Bulk or less if you are Medium, or two items of light Bulk or less if you are Small. If you Change Shape into a smaller-sized body, the excess items fall to the ground in your square. None of these items can have a dimension longer than 1 foot.

Cellular Regeneration.name: 细胞再生 Cellular Regeneration
Cellular Regeneration.description:
频率 每天一次

你的身体能够修复受损的细胞，甚至让缺失的肢体重新长出。你获得等于你等级一半的再生，持续1分钟。在此期间，你不会因伤害而死亡，你的濒死状态也不能增加到会杀死你的数值；不过，如果你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受创} 值变为4或更高，你会保持 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}，直到你的伤势得到治疗。每次你因再生恢复生命值时，你还会重新长出一个受损或毁坏的器官（如果有的话），并且你可以花费一个交互动作将被切断的身体部位贴在其被切断的部位上，以重新接合该身体部位。

Frequency once per day

Your body can repair damaged cells and even regrow missing limbs. You gain regeneration equal to half your level for 1 minute. During this time, you can't die from damage and your dying condition can't increase to a value that would kill you, though if your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} value becomes 4 or higher, you stay @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until your wounds are treated. Each time you regain Hit Points from regeneration, you also regrow one damaged or ruined organ (if any), and you can reattach severed body parts by spending an Interact action to hold the body part to the area it was severed from.

Allsix.name: 奥尔西克斯 Allsix
Allsix.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 除了你当前活动手中持有的物品外，你没有持有任何其他物品。

你全力以赴，将自己拥有的一切专注于手头的任务，把你的六只手（你的三对手臂）全都投入其中！下一次你进行攻击检定或技能检定时，掷三次并使用其中最高的结果。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You aren't holding any items except in your active hands.

You put forth your best effort and focus everything you've got on the task at hand, putting allsix of your hands (three of your sets of arms) into it! The next time you roll an attack roll or skill check, roll it three times and use the highest result.

Communalism.name: 公社主义 Communalism
Communalism.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 10尺内的一名盟友在一次需要3个动作或更少的技能检定中失败。

你将有帮助的鼓励或相关信息传入你盟友的心智。你的盟友重掷触发此次能力的技能检定，并采用较好的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger An ally within 10 feet fails a skill check requiring 3 actions or fewer.

You broadcast helpful encouragement or pertinent information to your ally's mind. Your ally rerolls the triggering skill check and takes the better result.

Assistive Shove.name: 协助推撞 Assistive Shove
Assistive Shove.description:
触发 一个与你相邻且体型至少比你小一级的盟友将会被一次打击命中。

你利用自己的体型和杠杆优势，迅速将盟友移出危险范围。进行一次运动学检定，对被此次触发性打击指定为目标的盟友执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}。如果你的盟友是自愿的，则将结果视为成功等级提高一级。若成功，除了其通常效果外，被推撞的盟友还会在对抗此次触发性打击的 AC 上获得 +2 处境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Gt6n0nYxHlPSmWVH]{效果：辅助推撞}

Trigger An adjacent ally who is at least one size smaller than you would be hit by a Strike.

You use your size and leverage to quickly move an ally out of harm's way. Attempt an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} the ally targeted by the triggering Strike. If your ally is willing, treat the result as one degree of success higher. On a success, in addition to its normal effects, the Shoved ally also gains a +2 circumstance bonus to their AC against the triggering Strike.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Gt6n0nYxHlPSmWVH]{Effect: Assistive Shove}

Death's Indifference.name: 死亡的冷漠 Death's Indifference
Death's Indifference.description:
你的皮肤和骨骼已经风化到了这样的程度：某些类型的伤害对它们造成的效果，已不再像你仍被视作生者之一时那样。你获得对一种特定伤害类型、数值等于你等级一半的抗性。噬咬尸族获得挥砍伤害抗性，残缺尸族获得穿刺伤害抗性，而蹒跚尸族获得钝击伤害抗性。

Your skin and bones have weathered down to the point where certain types of damage no longer have the same effect on them as when you were counted among the living. You gain resistance to a specific damage type equal to half your level. Biting corpsefolk gain resistance to slashing damage, partial corpsefolk gain resistance to piercing damage, and shambling corpsefolk gain resistance to bludgeoning damage.

Fearsome.name: 畏怖 Fearsome
Fearsome.description:
你如巨龙般可怖。你获得威吓的受训熟练等级。如果你会自动成为威吓的受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你自选的一项技能上成为受训。

你还获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{威吓怒视}技能专长。

You're as fearsome as a dragon. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Intimidation. If you would automatically become trained in Intimidation (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} skill feat.

Cloud Jump.name: 梯云纵 Cloud Jump
Cloud Jump.description:
凭借登峰造极的运动技能，你能够跳跃不可思议的距离。你在成功@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}时，跳跃距离变为三倍（因此成功进行DC 30的检定后你可以跳90英尺远）。当你成功@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump}时，使用跳远的跳跃距离和距离限制，但距离不翻三倍。

在跳远或跳高时，你可以花费额外的动作，从而让你的跳远或跳高距离超出你的速度。每额外花费一个动作，就将你的速度增加到距离限制上。

Legendary Survivalist.name: 传奇生存专家 Legendary Survivalist
Legendary Survivalist.description: 你能够在完全没有食物或水的情况下生存，并且能够忍受严寒、极寒、酷寒、炎热、极热、酷热，不会受到其伤害。

Light 'Em Up.name: 照亮他们 Light 'Em Up
Light 'Em Up.description:
需求 你正持用一把区域或自动武器。

你的对手可以逃跑，但他们躲不起来！你朝着一名未被看见的敌人大致所在的方向扫射武器，暴露其位置。你进行区域射击或自动射击。若主要目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，你无需进行平检即可将其作为目标；若其处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏} 状态，则以其为目标的平检DC为5。

当你以此次攻击对一个隐蔽生物施加 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 时，它周围飞溅的碎屑会帮助暴露其当前位置，你无需进行平检即可将其作为目标；若其处于隐藏状态，则以其为目标的平检DC变为5，且该生物不能变为未被察觉。只要该生物保持受压制，此增益就会持续。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

Your opponents can run, but they can't hide! You spray your weapon in the general direction of an unseen enemy, revealing its location. You Area Fire or Auto-Fire. If the primary target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, you don't need to attempt a flat check to target it, and if it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, the DC of the flat check to target it is 5.

When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppress} a concealed creature with this attack, the debris around it helps reveal its current position, and no flat check is needed to target it; If it's hidden, the DC of the flat check to target it becomes 5, and the creature can't become undetected. This benefit lasts as long as the creature remains suppressed.

Gliding Wings.name: 滑翔之翼 Gliding Wings
Gliding Wings.description:
你手臂与躯干之间延展出的翼状膜，让你在漂浮时即使没有可借力推动的坚实支点也能进行机动。在低重力或失重环境中，你可以在伸手可及范围内没有坚实表面的情况下执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.FF5KgZHj345s2moq]{Push Off} 动作。

此外，当你在此类环境中坠落时，你每下落 20 尺垂直距离，便可以朝你选择的方向水平移动 5 尺。在计算坠落伤害时，从你下落的距离中减去这段水平移动的距离。

The winglike membranes that stretch between your arms and torso let you maneuver while floating without a solid point to push off from. While in low gravity or zero gravity, you can take the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.FF5KgZHj345s2moq]{Push Off} action without having a solid surface within reach.

In addition, when falling in such an environment, you can move 5 feet horizontally in the direction of your choice for every 20 vertical feet you fall. Subtract this distance moved horizontally from the distance you fell when calculating fall damage.

Advanced Targeting System.name: 先进定位系统 Advanced Targeting System
Advanced Targeting System.description: 你的眼部处理器配备了先进的瞄准系统，可以让你更容易地定位你的敌人并读取他们的动作。你可以施展@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{料敌机先 Sure Strike}作为你的奥术内在法术，每日一次。

Ambidextrous Shifter.name: 双巧变形者 Ambidextrous Shifter
Ambidextrous Shifter.description:
你对自己的自然形态已经有了足够的练习，因此能比平常运用更多的肢体。你拥有六条手臂，这使你能够持用和携带总计最多相当于六只手所能使用的武器和装备。如果你使用其中超过四条手臂，你的陆地速度变为 5 尺。在任何时候，其中一对手都被指定为你的主动手。你可以通过执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oW81CfM9ebxXnrw3]{Switch Hands} 动作，将这一指定从一对手变更为另一对手，该动作是单动作。你只能用你的主动手执行动作。当你使用变形来采取具有多条手臂的形态时，例如卡萨萨或掠跃怪，该专长允许你使用最多六条手臂。

You have enough practice with your natural form that you can utilize more of your limbs than usual. You have six arms, which allows you to wield and hold up to six hands' worth of weapons and equipment. If you use more than four of these arms, your land Speed becomes 5 feet. At any time, one pair of hands is designated your active hands. You can change this designation from one pair of hands to another by taking the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oW81CfM9ebxXnrw3]{Switch Hands} action, which is a single action. You can only perform actions with your active hands. This feat allows you to use up to six arms when you use Change Shape to take a form with multiple arms, such as a kasatha or skittermander.

Bottomless Pockets.name: 无底口袋 Bottomless Pockets
Bottomless Pockets.description:
你的旅行经历教会了你为任何情况都精明地打包。你有特别大的口袋，而且你把一大堆有用的东西都塞进了里面。你可以每小时使用一次“正是这东西……”，而不是每天一次。

Your travels have taught you to pack smart for any situation. You've got really big pockets, and you've crammed a whole lot of useful stuff into them. You can use Just the Thing… once per hour, rather than once per day.

Convert Information.name: 转换信息 Convert Information
Convert Information.description:
分析你的敌人能让你更深入地理解将万物联系在一起的纽带，并有助于使你与阿卡西记录的连接同步。对你正在观察的一名敌人尝试进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定。若成功，除了通常的收益外，你的活力网络恢复 10 点生命值。若大成功，则恢复 20 点生命值。

Analyzing your enemies gives you a greater understanding of the ties that bond all things and helps synchronize your connection to the Akashic Record. Attempt a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check against an enemy you're observing. On a success, in addition to the normal benefits, your vitality network regains 10 Hit Points. On a critical success, it regains 20 Hit Points.

Pin Down.name: 压制射击 Pin Down
Pin Down.description:
触发条件 你正在观察的一个生物成功通过了对你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击} 攻击的豁免检定。

你将武器火力集中在一个顽强的目标身上，以你猛攻的纯粹凶暴将其压制。所需目标必须成功进行一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[will|against:soldier] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态，直到你下个回合开始。

Trigger A creature you're observing succeeds at their saving throw against your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire} attack.

You focus your weapons fire on a resilient target in order to suppress them with the sheer ferocity of your assault. The required target must succeed at a @Check[will|against:soldier] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.

Dazzling Glare.name: 炫目瞪视 Dazzling Glare
Dazzling Glare.description:
通过练习，你学会了如何增强你生物发光的强度。你生物发光的范围增加至50尺。你炫目的眩光会误导你的敌人，使你能够对位于你生物发光范围内的一个生物使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻} 动作，并且可应用于远程攻击。

Through practice, you've learned how to increase the intensity of your bioluminescence. The range of your bioluminescence increases to 50 feet. Your dazzling glare misleads your foes, allowing you to use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} action against a creature within the range of your bioluminescence, and applies to ranged attacks.

Advanced Soldier Training.name: 先进士兵训练 Advanced Soldier Training
Advanced Soldier Training.description:
你获得一个士兵专长。为了满足其先决条件，你的士兵等级视为你角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你这样做时，你都会再获得一个士兵专长。

You gain one soldier feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your soldier level is half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you do, you gain another soldier feat.

Meandering Mind.name: 漫游思绪 Meandering Mind
Meandering Mind.description:
需求 你的量子场处于激活状态。

你让思绪游离到那些令你愉悦的事物上，短暂地将一切现实隔绝在外，并保护自己免受伤害。直到你的下一回合开始前，你在对抗精神效果的豁免检定上获得+2状态加值。

Requirements Your quantum field is active.

You allow your mind to wander to things you find pleasant, briefly shutting out all realities and protecting you from harm. You gain a +2 status bonus to saving throws against mental effects until the start of your next turn.

Distant Telepath.name: 远距心灵感应 Distant Telepath
Distant Telepath.description:
无论是通过训练还是天赋异禀，你都扩大了自己以心灵感应进行交流的距离。你的有限心灵感应范围增加15英尺。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。

Whether through training or innate talent, you've expanded the range at which you can telepathically communicate. Increase the range of your limited telepathy by 15 feet.

Special You can select this feat more than once.

Unconventional Expertise.name: 冷门专家 Unconventional Expertise
Unconventional Expertise.description:
你已继续运用你的非常规武器来提升自身能力。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在某些武器上的熟练等级提升为专家或更高时，你在为“非常规武器专长”所选择的那件武器上也获得相同的熟练等级。

You've continued to advance your powers using your unconventional weapon. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in the weapon you chose for Unconventional Weaponry.

Otherworldly Spell.name: 异界法术 Otherworldly Spell
Otherworldly Spell.description:
你的法术具有一种奇特的外观或装饰性效果。如果你接下来使用的动作是施放法术，拥有施放该法术能力的生物不会自动知道那是什么法术。此外，目睹你施法的生物在以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 识别该法术的检定，以及对抗该法术及其效果的检定上，承受 –2 情境减值。

Your spell has an odd appearance or cosmetic effect. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell, creatures with the ability to Cast that Spell don't automatically know what the spell is. In addition, creatures that witness your spellcasting take a –2 circumstance penalty to checks to identify the spell with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} and checks to counteract the spell and its effects.

Harness Cosmic Forces.name: 驾驭宇宙之力 Harness Cosmic Forces
Harness Cosmic Forces.description:
你是最强大的萨瑟蝶人之一，能够驾驭物质宇宙中的太空力量，创造出惊人的恒星现象。选择以下法术之一，你可以将其作为一个 7 环奥术本能法术每天施放一次：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0jadeyQIItIuRgeH]{Eclipse Burst} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a3aQxCpoj1q1NQxC]{Sunburst}。

You're among the most powerful of sarcesians and can harness the cosmic forces of the universe to create incredible stellar phenomena. Select one of the following spells, which you can cast once per day as a 7th-rank arcane innate spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0jadeyQIItIuRgeH]{Eclipse Burst} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a3aQxCpoj1q1NQxC]{Sunburst}.

Scrapper's Ingenuity.name: 拾荒者的巧思 Scrapper's Ingenuity
Scrapper's Ingenuity.description:
你非常乐于将物体拆解为其组成部件，以便将其重建成全新的东西。你在以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Device} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Lock} 为目的的盗窃检定上获得+1环境加值。每当你成功 Disable Device 时，你都会从该装置中收集可供日后使用的有用零件，使你下一次进行制作或修理的制作检定获得+1环境加值。如果你解除的装置等级高于你自己的等级，则此加值提高为+2。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.hcH7IdEjC2wUVfaK]{效果：拾荒者的巧思}

You take great delight in breaking down objects to their component parts so they can be rebuilt into something new. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on Thievery checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Device} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Lock}. Whenever you successfully Disable Device, you harvest useful parts from the device for future use, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus on your next Crafting check to Craft or Repair. If the device you disabled was of a level higher than your own, this bonus increases to +2.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.hcH7IdEjC2wUVfaK]{Effect: Scrapper's Ingenuity}

Fog of War.name: 战争迷雾 Fog of War
Fog of War.description:
需求 你正持用一把范围或自动武器。

你狂乱枪火产生的闪光与烟雾会将你遮蔽起来，使任何在余波后仍站着的敌人都难以看清你。你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击}。你会在该区域内留下持续到你下个回合结束，或被强风吹散（以先发生者为准）的一团烟尘。区域内的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状况，而对它们而言，所有其他生物也都是隐蔽的。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

The flash and smoke from your frenzied gunfire conceals you from any enemies who might be left standing in the aftermath. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}. You leave behind a cloud of smoke and dust within the area that lasts until the end of your next turn or until dissipated by a strong wind (whichever happens first). Creatures in the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them.

Master Spy.name: 间谍大师 Master Spy
Master Spy.description:
你的察觉熟练等级提升至大师。

Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.

Impeding Shot.name: 阻碍射击 Impeding Shot
Impeding Shot.description:
要求 你正持握一把枪械。

你以一次射击妨碍目标。你先@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对你的标记进行一次远程打击。若此次打击命中，则目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}，直到其下个回合结束。若目标正在飞行，它还会坠落10尺。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You hinder your target with a shot. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make a ranged Strike against your mark.
