If the Strike hits, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of its next turn. If the target is flying, it also falls 10 feet.

Xenodruid Dedication.name: 异种德鲁伊献身 Xenodruid Dedication
Xenodruid Dedication.description:
你可以与一颗世界诸生态系统的集体灵魂建立纽带。这是一项耗时 10 分钟的活动，包含与自然交流和冥想。该行星必须拥有活跃的生物圈。你一次只能与一颗行星建立纽带。这会计入你的纽带数量上限。就法术、先决条件或其他能力（包括你的活力网络）的用途而言，行星不视为生物或盟友。

你对自己行星上的生命与自然现象进行回忆知识时，获得 +1 处境加值。你在其荒野中维生进行生存检定时，也获得 +1 处境加值；对你所建立纽带的行星上自然存在的环境危害与效果进行豁免检定时，获得 +1 处境加值。离开该世界时，你总是知道你的行星相对你所在位置的大致方向（但不知道距离），这使你在导航时的驾驶检定获得 +1 处境加值。

此外，你每天可以一次评估你行星的健康状况，并尝试定位其生态系统中的任何重大扰动。在与你的行星接触时，尝试一次 @Check[nature|dc:20] 检定。

大成功 你通过其各种生态圈诊断该行星的健康状况。此外，你可以察觉自然世界中正在发生的具体扰动——例如工业采矿，或某个特定山谷中的火灾。你可以感知该扰动的距离与方向，并且对由该扰动造成的危害进行豁免检定时获得 +1 处境加值。

成功 如同大成功，但你只能感知大规模发生的扰动（例如飓风、火山喷发或遍及整颗行星的污染），以及其方向。

失败 你诊断出该行星的健康状况，但未能识别出任何扰动。

特殊 如果你拥有秘学者多职原型的奉献专长，即使你还没有再选两个额外的秘学者专长，你也可以选取此专长。为了完成这些原型，秘学者原型专长视为异德鲁伊专长，反之亦然。

You can form a bond with the collective spirit of a world's ecosystems. This is a 10-minute activity that involves communing with nature and meditation. The planet must have an active biosphere. You can only bond with one planet at a time. This counts toward your maximum number of bonds. Planets don't count as creatures nor allies for the purposes of spells, prerequisites, or other abilities, including your vitality network.

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Recall Knowledge about your planet's life and natural occurrences. You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Survival checks to subsist in its wilds and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against environmental hazards and effects naturally found on your bonded planet. When off-world, you always know the general direction your planet lies in relation to you (but not distance), which grants a +1 circumstance bonus to Piloting checks to navigate.

In addition, you can assess the health of your planet once per day and attempt to locate any major disturbances to its ecosystems. Attempt a @Check[nature|dc:20] check while in contact with your planet.

Critical Success You diagnose the planet's health through its various ecospheres. In addition, you can detect specific ongoing disturbances to the natural world—such as industrial mining or a fire in a particular valley. You can sense the distance and direction of the disturbance and gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against hazards created by this disturbance.

Success As a critical success, but you can only sense disturbances happening on a massive scale (such as hurricanes, volcanic eruptions, or planetwide pollution) and the direction to it.

Failure You diagnose the planet's health but don't identify any disturbances.

Special You can take this feat if you have the mystic multiclass archetype dedication feat even if you haven't taken two additional mystic feats. Mystic archetype feats count as xenodruid feats, and vice-versa, for purposes of completing the archetypes.

Psychic Paragon.name: 灵能完美者 Psychic Paragon
Psychic Paragon.description:
你的灵能变得更加强大。从惑控法术列表中选择一个普通的6环法术。你可以将该法术作为惑控先天法术每天施放一次。

Your psychic abilities have grown stronger. Choose one common 6th-rank spell from the occult spell list. You can cast that spell as an occult innate spell once per day.

Fleet.name: 飞跑 Fleet
Fleet.description: 你的脚步变得更快。你的速度提高5尺。

Nomad's Persistence.name: 游牧者的坚毅 Nomad's Persistence
Nomad's Persistence.description:
Shobhad-neh 能在会让其他物种疲惫不堪的环境中生存。当你将要变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} 时，进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:17]。若成功，你不会陷入疲乏。若疲乏状态有你尚未解决的根本原因，例如缺乏休息，则你必须按照 GM 决定的时间间隔再次尝试此检定，直到你在检定中失败或解决该根本原因为止。

Shobhad-neh survive in conditions that would grind other species to exhaustion. When you would become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, you aren't fatigued. If the fatigued condition has an underlying cause that you don't address, such as a lack of rest, you must attempt this check again at an interval determined by the GM until you fail the check or address the underlying cause.

Momentum.name: 动量 Momentum
Momentum.description:
需求 你的上一个动作必须是一次成功的星能武器打击。

你利用上一次攻击的动能在战场上周旋，可以选择留下光子残像，或进行借助重力的大跳跃。执行两次调整步。

引力子调谐 你每次调整步移动10尺，而非5尺。

光子调谐 你会在起始的方格中留下一个残像。该残像持续至你下个回合结束，但如果有其他生物进入该空间，则会提前结束。为夹击目的，该残像对你和你的盟友而言视为盟友。

Requirements Your last action was a successful solar weapon Strike.

You use the momentum of your last attack to maneuver around the battlefield, either by leaving photonic images or making great gravity-assisted leaps. Step twice.

Graviton-Attuned You move 10 feet with each Step, rather than 5 feet.

Photon-Attuned You leave an afterimage in the square you started in. This image lasts until the end of your next turn but ends early if another creature enters the space. This afterimage counts as an ally to you and your allies for the purposes of flanking.

Twin Guard.name: 双重守卫 Twin Guard
Twin Guard.description:
触发条件 你触及范围内的一个生物以近战打击对你造成重击命中，且你正持握两把太阳武器。

你举起其中一把武器来拦截一次尤其致命的攻击。你获得等同于你等级的抗性，以对抗此次触发攻击。你的一把太阳武器粉碎，并且不再显现。

Trigger A creature within your reach critically hits you with a melee Strike, and you're wielding two solar weapons.

You raise one of your weapons to intercept a particularly deadly attack. You gain resistance equal to your level against the triggering attack. One of your solar weapons shatters and is no longer manifested.

Operative Dedication.name: 特工奉献 Operative Dedication
Operative Dedication.description:
你获得对简易和军用枪械的受训熟练。你获得特工职业 DC 的受训熟练。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 动作；它不会造成额外伤害，但仍会减少你的标记因掩护获得的 AC 加值（且该效果不会随着你等级提升而增加）。

You become trained in simple and martial guns. You become trained in operative class DC.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} action, it doesn't deal additional damage, but still reduces the bonus to AC your mark gains from cover (which does not increase as you gain levels).

Infinite Aim.name: 无限瞄准 Infinite Aim
Infinite Aim.description:
你是一名神枪手，不需要瞄准镜或架势也能射出你最出色的一击。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 作为一个自由动作。

You're a sharpshooter who doesn't need a scope or stance to shoot your best shot. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} as a free action.

Intuitive Talent.name: 直觉天赋 Intuitive Talent
Intuitive Talent.description:
频率 每小时一次

你乐于拥抱新体验，并且擅长掌握新的技能与才能；有时，凭借你半死不活的本质所赋予的更广阔视角，这种过程甚至横跨无数次生命。选择一项你未受训的技能。直到你的下一回合开始时，你在所选技能上变为受训。

Frequency once per hour

You enjoy embracing new experiences and have a knack for picking up new skills and talents, sometimes over the course of countless lifetimes, as your semi-dead nature grants you a wider perspective. Choose a skill that you're untrained in. Until the beginning of your next turn, you become trained in the chosen skill.

Stunt Maneuver.name: 特技动作 Stunt Maneuver
Stunt Maneuver.description:
无论你是天生的王牌还是经验丰富的飞行员，你都能逼使载具完成令人难以置信的特技动作。当你以 –1 减值尝试“特技动作”时，移除鲁莽特征。如果你在驾驶上达到大师熟练度，那么当你以 –2 减值或更低尝试“特技动作”时，移除鲁莽特征。如果你在驾驶上达到传奇熟练度，则你尝试的任何“特技动作”都移除鲁莽特征。

Whether you're a natural ace or a veteran pilot, you can push a vehicle to perform incredible stunts. Remove the reckless trait when you attempt a Stunt with a –1 penalty. If you're a master in Piloting, remove the reckless trait when you attempt a Stunt with a –2 penalty or lower. If you're legendary in Piloting, remove the reckless trait from any Stunt you attempt.

Serum Crafting.name: 血清制作 Serum Crafting
Serum Crafting.description:
你可以制作具有消耗品特征的血清和医疗物品，不过其中一些还有其他要求。当你选择此专长时，你获得四种2级或以下普通血清的配方。

You can Craft serums and medical items with the consumable trait, though some have other requirements. When you select this feat, you gain formulas for four common serums of 2nd level or lower.

Novice Necrovite.name: 新手死灵裔 Novice Necrovite
Novice Necrovite.description:
你作为死灵邪教徒的研究已有进展，并且你已学会如何影响无心智的不死生物。你可以使用外交来对无心智的不死生物[[/act make-an-impression]]，或向它们[[/act request]]简单的任务。如果该不死生物受一名等级高于你的生物控制，你通常需要在你的外交技能检定中获得大成功。

Your studies as a necrovite have progressed, and you've learned how to influence mindless undead. You can use Diplomacy to [[/act make-an-impression]] on mindless undead or [[/act request]] simple tasks of them. If the undead creature is controlled by a creature with a higher level than yours, you typically need a critical success on your Diplomacy skill check.

Solarian's Resiliency.name: 星辉武者的坚韧 Solarian's Resiliency
Solarian's Resiliency.description:
你每拥有一个星辉武者原型职业专长，便额外获得 3 点生命值。随着你继续选择星辉武者原型职业专长，你也会继续以这种方式获得额外生命值。

You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each solarian archetype class feat you have. As you continue selecting solarian archetype class feats, you continue to gain additional Hit Points in this way.

Contortive Compression.name: 扭曲压缩 Contortive Compression
Contortive Compression.description:
像是在变形一样扭曲你的四肢，使你能够穿过狭窄的空间。你在挤压通过时可以以完整速度移动。

Contorting your limbs as though you were transforming allows you to fit through tight spaces. You can move at full Speed while Squeezing.

Effortless Concentration.name: 不疲专注 Effortless Concentration
Effortless Concentration.description:
触发条件 你的回合开始。

你几乎不假思索地维持着自己正在生效的法术。你立即获得对自己一个正在生效的秘学者法术执行一次维持动作的效果。

Trigger Your turn begins.

You maintain your active spells with hardly a thought. You immediately gain the effects of a Sustain action for one of your active mystic spells.

Dazzling Diversion.name: 炫目佯攻 Dazzling Diversion
Dazzling Diversion.description:
你将周围的能量凝聚成一道闪光。以这道闪光作为掩护，你使用隐匿技能进行躲藏，然后你可以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}最多两次。

You concentrate ambient energy into a burst of light. Using the flash as cover, you use the Stealth skill to Hide, and then you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} up to twice.

Electrical Engineer.name: 电气工程师 Electrical Engineer
Electrical Engineer.description:
你可以通过从不同来源汲取电力，为电池供能的装置补充电力。这样做需要 1 分钟的工作时间，以及一个与该装置相邻、且适合该装置的电力来源。若电力来源是一个科技生物或危害，则其必须是在过去 10 分钟内被摧毁的，并提供等于其等级两倍的充能。若来源是能够为电池充电的设施，则该电池供能装置运作时视同电池始终处于完全充满状态。若你的制作技能熟练度达到大师，你可以用一个 3 动作活动将装置连接到电源。若你是传奇，则只需 1 个动作。

You can fuel battery-powered devices by drawing electricity from different sources. Doing so takes 1 minute of work and an adjacent source of power appropriate to the device. If the source of power is a technological creature or hazard, it must have been destroyed within the last 10 minutes and provides charges equal to twice its level. If the source is a facility capable of charging a battery, the battery-powered device operates as if the battery were always fully charged. If you're a master in Crafting, you can connect a device to a power source as a 3-action activity. If you're legendary, it takes 1 action.

Hair Trigger.name: 一触即发 Hair Trigger
Hair Trigger.description:
触发条件 自你上个回合开始以来，你最后一个以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 为目标的生物使用了一个操作动作或一个移动动作、进行了远程攻击，或在一次移动动作中离开了一个方格。

需求 你正持握一把枪。

你尝试对触发该反应的生物进行一次远程打击。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。

Trigger The last creature you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aimed} at since the start of your last turn uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action.

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You attempt a ranged Strike against the triggering creature. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Ancestral Knowledge.name: 先祖知识 Ancestral Knowledge
Ancestral Knowledge.description:
选择一个族裔或传承。你学会一种该族裔或传承可选的新语言。你成为受训于社群。若你已受训于社群，则改为受训于你自选的另一项技能。你还会受训于与该特定族裔或传承相关的学识技能，例如安卓体学识或伊苏奇学识。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长，每次选择不同的族裔或传承。

Choose an ancestry or heritage. You learn a new language available to that ancestry or heritage. You become trained in Society. If you're already trained in Society, you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You also become trained in the Lore skill related to that specific ancestry or heritage, such as Android Lore or Ysoki Lore.

Special You can select this feat multiple times, choosing a different ancestry or heritage each time.

Rip Current.name: 激流回卷 Rip Current
Rip Current.description:
你与卡洛-马霍伊的强大洋流及其与绽放之间的相互作用有着神秘的连接，并且你已经学会召请它们，通过位面之间的传送门将强大的异界生物冲刷驱离。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.bay4AfSu2iIozNNW]{放逐术}，作为一个你每天可以施放一次的8环原始先天法术。你可以施放该法术，以最多10个自愿生物为目标；他们将其意志豁免的结果视为低两个成功等级。

You have a mystical connection to the powerful currents of Kalo-Mahoi and their interactions with the blooms, and you've learned to call upon them to wash powerful outsiders away through portals between planes. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.bay4AfSu2iIozNNW]{Banishment} as an 8th-rank primal innate spell that you can cast once per day. You can cast the spell targeting up to 10 willing creatures, who treat the results of their Will save as two degrees of success lower.

Assurance.name: 驾轻就熟 Assurance
Assurance.description:
即使在最恶劣的条件下，你也能完成基本的任务。选择一项你受训的技能，你可以放弃为该技能的技能检定掷骰，改为获得等于10+你的熟练度加值的结果（不应用任何其它加值、减值或调整值）。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长。每次选择不同的技能获得专长效果。

Stop Them in Their Tracks.name: 阻止他们的行动 Stop Them in Their Tracks
Stop Them in Their Tracks.description:
要求 你已对一个目标执行了@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}。

你以致命的威严命令目标停下脚步、丢下他们的武器并投降。你尝试对你的标记执行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓}。如果目标与你不共享语言，此检定不会承受 –4 情境减值。若你获得大成功，你的标记还会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，持续 1 轮。

Requirements You've @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aimed} at a target.

With a deadly authority, you order your target to halt in their tracks, drop their weapons, and surrender. You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} your mark. This check doesn't take the –4 circumstance penalty if the target doesn't share a language with you. On a critical success, your mark is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round.

Hampering Shot.name: 牵制射击 Hampering Shot
Hampering Shot.description:
要求 你正持用一把枪。

你熟练地瞄准射击，以妨碍你的敌人。你先@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对你的目标进行一次远程打击。若此次打击命中，该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到你下个回合结束。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You skillfully line up your shot to hinder your foe. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make a ranged Strike against your mark. If the Strike hits, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.

Parkour.name: 跑酷 Parkour
Parkour.description:
你向前猛冲，不受障碍物或墙壁阻碍。进行一次疾行，并进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳高}（顺序任意）。你必须在水平表面上开始此次移动。在此次移动期间，你可以无视困难地形，并以你的全额速度沿垂直表面向上奔跑，例如墙壁。如果你在疾行结束时不在地面上，那么你会在进行下一个动作后或在你的回合结束时坠落，以先发生者为准（不过如果适用，你可以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{抓住边缘}）。

You dash forward, unhindered by obstacles or walls. Stride and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} (in any order). You must start your movement on a horizontal surface. During this movement, you can ignore difficult terrain and run up vertical surfaces, like walls, at your full Speed. If you end the Stride off the ground, you fall after taking your next action or when your turn ends, whichever comes first (though you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge}, if applicable).

Get Them!.name: 干掉他们！ Get Them!
Get Them!.description:
当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{盯上他们！}时，你可以选择射程内任意数量的敌人，而不是单一目标（如果你花费了2个动作，你仍然只对一个目标进行打击）。

When you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!}, you can choose any number of enemies within range instead of a single target (you still only Strike one target if you spent 2 actions).

Enlightenment.name: 启蒙 Enlightenment
Enlightenment.description:
你理解了自己连接的真正本质，以及它如何跨越现实的浩瀚支柱延展。你的生命力网络的最大容量为 200 生命值，并且在每个回合开始时恢复 20 生命值，而不是 8。你可以与任意数量的自愿生物建立纽带。

You understand the true nature of your connection and how it stretches across the vast pillars of reality. Your vitality network has a maximum capacity of 200 Hit Points and regains 20 Hit Points at the start of each turn instead of 8. You can bond with any number of willing creatures.

Energy Infusion.name: 能量灌注 Energy Infusion
Energy Infusion.description:
你将来自物质宇宙之外的死灵或辉光能量注入你的攻击中。你将灵性能量注入你的攻击，持续1分钟。你所持握的所有武器和你的徒手打击都变为魔法，并且要么对活物额外造成1点灵性伤害并获得对活物的邪秽特征，要么对不死生物额外造成1点灵性伤害并获得对不死生物的圣洁特征。

You infuse your attacks with necromantic or radiant energies from beyond the material Universe. You infuse your attacks with spiritual energy for 1 minute. All weapons you're wielding and your unarmed Strikes become magical and either deal 1 additional spirit damage and gain the unholy trait against living creatures, or deal 1 additional spirit damage and gain the holy trait against undead.

Advanced Leadership.name: 先进领导力 Advanced Leadership
Advanced Leadership.description:
你获得一个特使专长。为满足其前置条件之目的，你的特使等级等于你角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你选择它时，你都会再获得一个特使专长。

You gain one envoy feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your envoy level is equal to half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another envoy feat.

Confounding Disquisition.name: 惑乱论述 Confounding Disquisition
Confounding Disquisition.description:
你试图用一段复杂又毫无意义的长篇大论迷惑一名敌人，让听众听得目瞪口呆。对 30 尺内的单个生物的意志 DC 进行一次 @Check[deception|against:will|options:inflicts:stupefied,inflicts:stunned] 或 @Check[diplomacy|against:will|options:inflicts:stupefied,inflicts:stunned] 检定。随后，该目标会暂时免疫你的 Confounding Disquisition，持续 1 天。

大成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}，持续 1 轮。

成功 目标陷入 stupefied 1，持续 1 轮。

失败 目标在 1 轮内的察觉检定和意志豁免上承受 –1 状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.YI60jVAgutn1YrI7]{效果：Confounding Disquisition（失败）}

大失败 目标不受影响。

You attempt to enthrall a foe with a convoluted and utterly pointless monologue that leaves your audience dumbfounded. Attempt a @Check[deception|against:will|options:inflicts:stupefied,inflicts:stunned] or @Check[diplomacy|against:will|options:inflicts:stupefied,inflicts:stunned] check against the Will DC of a single creature within 30 feet. The target is then temporarily immune to your Confounding Disquisition for 1 day.

Critical Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Success The target is stupefied 1 for 1 round.

Failure The target takes a –1 status penalty to Perception checks and Will saves for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.YI60jVAgutn1YrI7]{Effect: Confounding Disquisition (Failure)}

Critical Failure The target is unaffected.

Unsettling Display.name: 令人不安的展示 Unsettling Display
Unsettling Display.description:
你可以通过扭动你的肌肉与骨骼系统来对周围的人进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓}。当你如此做时，威吓失去听觉（特征）并获得视觉（特征），且如果该生物不理解你的语言，你不会受到减值。

You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} those around you by shifting your muscular and skeletal systems around. When you do, Demoralize loses the auditory trait and gains the visual trait, and you don't take a penalty if the creature doesn't understand your language.

Survivor's Instincts.name: 幸存者的本能 Survivor's Instincts
Survivor's Instincts.description:
触发条件 你即将针对一个环境危害进行一次反射豁免检定

你已经学会在顷刻之间对阿基顿的危险作出反应，并相信自己的直觉能助你渡过难关。你在触发此能力的豁免检定上获得+1处境加值。

Trigger You are about to roll a Reflex save against a hazard

You've learned to react to Akiton's dangers at a moment's notice, and you trust your instincts to see you through. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the triggering saving throw.

Nonlethal Spell.name: 非致命法术 Nonlethal Spell
Nonlethal Spell.description: 你能把侵略性强的法术变得没那么致命。如果你下个动作是施放法术，并且法术可以造成伤害且没有死亡或虚能特征，那么该法术会获得非致命特征。

Opening Volley.name: 开场齐射 Opening Volley
Opening Volley.description:
要求 你正持用一把枪械和一把近战武器。

你射击目标，随后再接上一记近战攻击，持续向敌人施压。用你手持的枪械进行一次远程打击。若此次打击成功，则你在本回合中对同一目标进行的下一次近战攻击，其攻击检定获得+2环境加值。

Requirements You're wielding a gun and a melee weapon.

You shoot your target, then you follow up with a melee attack to keep the pressure on your foe. Make a ranged Strike with your held gun. If the Strike is successful, your next melee attack this round against the same target gains a +2 circumstance bonus to the attack roll.

Shed Skin.name: 蜕皮 Shed Skin
Shed Skin.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 你尝试进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}。

你迅速蜕去一层皮肤，从紧缚或黏滞的困境中滑脱出来，得以留待来日再战（或逃跑）。你在触发此次挣脱时获得+2环境加值，并且在之后3轮内进行的所有挣脱尝试也获得该加值。若触发的此次挣脱成功，你还可以额外执行站起或移步（若为重度成功，则可以疾奔，最多移动至你的速度）。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}.

You rapidly shed a layer of your skin and slip away from a tight or sticky situation, living to fight (or flee) another day. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus on the triggering Escape, and on all attempts to Escape for 3 rounds. If the triggering Escape was successful, you can additionally Stand or Step (or Stride up to your Speed on a critical success).

Deadlift.name: 硬拉 Deadlift
Deadlift.description:
需求 你未处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}。

在 1 分钟内，你在变为负重前可比平常多携带 4 Bulk。该数值在专家时提高至 6，大师时提高至 8，传奇时提高至 10。当此专长的增益结束时，你会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 10 分钟。

Requirements You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}.

For 1 minute, you can carry 4 more Bulk than normal before becoming encumbered. The amount you can carry increases to 6 at expert, 8 at master, and 10 at legendary. When the benefits of this feat end, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 10 minutes.

Iomedae's Barrage.name: 艾奥梅黛的齐射 Iomedae's Barrage
Iomedae's Barrage.description:
频率 每日一次

你将自身的灵魂引导为来自天族等离子巨炮的强力齐射。艾奥梅黛的齐射会在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 或一个 @Template[type:line|distance:30] 内进行自动射击，造成 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2 - 1))d6[fire], (floor(@actor.level/2 - 1))d6[spirit]|traits:holy] 伤害，并具有圣洁特征（@Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)]）。在12级时，以及此后每提高2级，火焰伤害和灵魂伤害各增加1d6。若一个生物在此次反射豁免中获得重度失败，则还会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1轮。

Frequency once per day

You channel your spirit into a mighty barrage from a celestial plasma cannon. Iomedae's barrage Auto-Fires in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] or a @Template[type:line|distance:30], dealing @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2 - 1))d6[fire], (floor(@actor.level/2 - 1))d6[spirit]|traits:holy] damage with the holy trait (@Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)]). At 12th level and every 2 levels thereafter, the fire and spirit damage each increase by 1d6. A creature that gets a critical failure on this Reflex save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Long Whiskered.name: 长须 Long Whiskered
Long Whiskered.description:
你的胡须可作为先进的电感受器发挥作用，让你能更轻松地判断自身方位。在你处于未束缚状态的每个轮次结束时，进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:15]。若成功，你在1分钟内无视因处于零重力环境而受到的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状况。

Your whiskers function as advanced electroreceptors, allowing you to orient yourself more easily. At the end of each round in which you're untethered, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:15]. On a success, you ignore the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} conditions imposed by being in zero-g for 1 minute.

Tag Team.name: 协同效应 Tag Team
Tag Team.description:
触发条件 你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} 的目标被一名盟友的攻击造成重击，或在对抗一名盟友的攻击或法术时反射豁免大失败。

你抓住了盟友制造出的破绽，迅速攻击你的敌人。对该触发生物进行一次打击。若这是一次远程打击，则目标必须位于你武器的第一距离增量内。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，并且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。

Trigger The target of your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} is critically hit by an ally's attack or critically fails a Reflex save against an ally's attack or spell.

You seize the opening your ally has provided, quickly attacking your foe. Make a Strike against the triggering creature. If it's a ranged Strike, it must be in your weapon's first range increment. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Infernal Armaments.name: 炼狱军备 Infernal Armaments
Infernal Armaments.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你将地狱之力灌注进你的武器。接下来1分钟内，在每轮你的第一次武器打击时，你获得等同于武器伤害骰数量两倍的伤害状态加值；该额外伤害由你所选择的地狱骑士团决定。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You infuse your weapons with the might of Hell. For the next minute, on your first weapon Strike each round, you gain a status bonus to damage equal to twice the number of weapon damage dice; this extra damage is determined by your chosen Hellknight order.

Natural Hunter.name: 天生猎手 Natural Hunter
Natural Hunter.description:
你拥有猎手般敏锐的直觉，并知道该直取咽喉。若你是拥有锋利牙齿的弗拉卡，你用颚击造成的伤害提高至1d8，且你的颚击失去娴熟（特征）并获得擒拿（特征）。否则，你获得一个颚击无武装攻击，造成1d4点穿刺伤害。你的颚击属于斗殴组，并具有娴熟（特征）与无武装（特征）。

无论哪种情况，每当你用颚击无武装攻击造成一次重击时，除了重击的其他效果外，你的目标还会每个武器伤害骰承受1点持续性流血伤害。

You have the keen instincts of a hunter and know to go for the throat. If you're a sharp-toothed vlaka, the damage you deal with your jaws increases to 1d8, and your jaws lose the finesse trait and gain the grapple trait. Otherwise, you gain a jaws unarmed attack that deals 1d4 piercing damage. Your jaws are in the brawling group and have the finesse and unarmed traits.

In either case, whenever you score a critical hit with your jaws unarmed attack, your target takes 1 persistent bleed damage per weapon damage die, in addition to the other effects of a critical hit.

Implacable Grappler.name: 无情擒抱者 Implacable Grappler
Implacable Grappler.description:
你将自己令人印象深刻的体格与额外的肢体结合起来，成为一名凶悍的摔跤手。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{泰坦摔跤手} 技能专长，并且在对抗 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Tkd8sH4pwFIPzqTr]{抓取} 尝试的强韧 DC 上获得 +1 环境加值。

You combine your impressive stature and additional limbs to become a fierce wrestler. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} skill feat and a +1 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude DC against @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Tkd8sH4pwFIPzqTr]{Grab} attempts.

Streetwise.name: 人情练达 Streetwise
Streetwise.description: 你了解街头巷尾的生活，时刻把握着本地社区的动向。你可以用社群调整值替代交涉调整值来[[/act gather-information skill=society]]。在任何你频繁活动的聚居地当中，你都可以用社群技能回忆知识（Recall Knowledge），从而获得正常情况下用交涉技能搜集信息才能获得的情报。这么做的DC通常会高很多，但你可以不必花时间搜集就了解情报。若你未能成功回忆起信息，仍然可以在之后尝试用正常的方法搜集信息。

Express Driver.name: 特快机师 Express Driver
Express Driver.description:
你知道如何快速到达那里。驾驶载具进行长途地面或空中旅行时，在计算当天的旅行速度时，你可以尝试进行一次驾驶检定，以提高你的载具在长期地面或空中旅行中的旅行速度。DC由GM决定，但通常以该载具的驾驶DC或基于环境的难度为准，取较高者。成功时，你的载具当天的旅行速度加倍。这对你的载具在遭遇中的移动，或对在漂流域中航行的星舰，都没有效果。

You know how to get there fast. When calculating your travel Speed for the day while piloting a vehicle, you can attempt a Piloting check to increase your vehicle's travel Speed for long-term overland or aerial travel. The DC is determined by the GM but is typically based on the vehicle's piloting DC or a difficulty based on the environment, whichever is harder. On a success, double your vehicle's travel Speed for the day. This has no effect on your vehicle's movement in encounters or on starships traveling through the Drift.

Wall Jump.name: 弹墙跳 Wall Jump
Wall Jump.description:
你可以利用跳跃时的冲力将自己从墙壁上弹开。若你在跳跃（无论是@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳高 High Jump}，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远 Long Jump}还是@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃 Leap}）结束时邻接一道墙，只要你的下个动作还是跳跃，就不会坠落。前一次跳跃赋予你的冲力让你能够以一个动作执行跳高或跳远，但你不能以该行动的一部分行走。

你每回合只能使用一次弹墙跳，除非你在运动技能上的熟练度达到传奇，达到传奇熟练度后，你在当回合内可以多次连续跳跃。

Adapted Cantrip.name: 调整戏法 Adapted Cantrip
Adapted Cantrip.description:
通过多种魔法根源的研究，你学会了调整一个法术来适应你自己的施法风格。从你已掌握的魔法根源以外的根源中选择一个戏法。若你是准备施法者，你可以在准备你的戏法时用该法术替换你已有的一个选项。若你拥有一个法术库，用该法术替换你已知的一个戏法。你在施放该戏法时，可以将其视作你职业所具备的根源内的法术。

若你在之后选择替换或是重训该戏法，你可以从与原本相同或不同的根源中选择其替代品。

Intimidating Prowess.name: 威逼 Intimidating Prowess
Intimidating Prowess.description: 在可以对@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{挫败士气 Demoralize}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{胁迫 Coerce}目标造成人身威胁的情况下，你的威吓检定获得+1环境加值，并且可忽略语言不通的减值。若你的力量调整值为+5或更高，且在威吓技能上的熟练度达到大师，加值提高到+2。

Longrifle Reload.name: 长步枪装填 Longrifle Reload
Longrifle Reload.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 你正持用一把装填值为1或更高的远程武器。

你学会了操使远程武器的独特技巧，这些技巧经由数代经验打磨而成，并通过传统教导与高强度的实操训练传承下来。用你当前手中的一把远程武器进行一次打击，然后要么进行一次交互以装填该武器，要么切换手位。

特殊 如果你拥有狙击手绍巴德血统，并且当前手中持用一把绍巴德长步枪，同时在你未活动的那对手中持有另一把属于狙击武器组的武器，则此专长的频率改为每轮一次。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon with reload 1 or greater.

You've learned unique techniques for wielding ranged weapons, honed through generations of experience and passed down through traditional teachings and intensive hands-on training. Strike with a ranged weapon in your active hands and then either Interact to reload that weapon or Switch Hands.

Special If you have the sniper shobhad heritage and are wielding a shobhad longrifle in your active hands while holding another weapon from the sniper weapon group in your inactive pair of hands, the frequency of this feat is instead once per round.

Ravenous Restoration.name: 贪婪复原 Ravenous Restoration
Ravenous Restoration.description:
对你这种体型的生物来说，你的食欲大得惊人，而且你发现一顿美餐总是最合胃口。每天一次，你可以用 10 分钟活动吃一份点心或一顿饭。如此做时，你恢复等同于 1d6 加上你的等级的生命值（@Damage[(1d6 + @actor.level)[healing]]）。

You have a colossal appetite for a creature your size, and you find that a good meal always hits the spot. Once per day, you can eat a snack or meal as a 10-minute activity. When you do, you regain a number of Hit Points equal to 1d6 plus your level (@Damage[(1d6 + @actor.level)[healing]]).

Inventor.name: 发明家 Inventor
Inventor.description:
你在制造方面是个天才，轻而易举就能判断事物是如何制成的，并创造新的发明。你可以花费停工期来发明一个你尚未知晓的普通配方。这与“制造”活动的运作方式完全相同：你先支付该配方价格的一半，进行一次制造检定，而在成功时，你可以支付差额来完成该配方，或继续工作更久以降低价格。不同之处在于，你把额外的时间花在研究、设计和开发上，而不是用于制作一件物品。一旦完成，你就将自己发明的新配方加入你的配方书中。

GM可能允许你发明非普通或稀有配方，通常会提高DC。你需要拥有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{魔法制造}专长，才能发明混合与魔法配方。

ou are a genius at Crafting, easily able to determine how things are made and create new inventions. You can spend downtime to invent a common formula that you don't know. This works just like the Craft activity: you spend half the Price of the formula up front, attempt a Crafting check, and on a success either finish the formula by paying the difference or work for longer to decrease the Price. The difference is that you spend the additional time in research, design, and development, rather than in creating an item. Once it's complete, you add the new formula you invented to your formula book.

The GM might allow you to invent uncommon or rare formulas, typically with an increased DC. You need the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{Magical Crafting} feat to invent hybrid and magical formula.

Persistent Confidence.name: 持久自信 Persistent Confidence
Persistent Confidence.description:
你始终相信自己。你可以每小时使用一次“自信具现”，而非每天一次。

You always believe in yourself. You can use Confident Actualization once per hour, rather than once per day.

Elebrian Magic.name: 灵脑人魔法 Elebrian Magic
Elebrian Magic.description:
你的奥术天赋随着你学会如何用魔法更好地使观众着迷而成长。从以下列表中选择一个1环法术：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6]{魅惑}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{容光焕发}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{幻象伪装}，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yV7Ouzaoe7DHLESI]{腹语术}。你可以将该法术作为奥术天生法术每天施放一次。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。如果你这样做，你必须选择一个不同的法术。

Your arcane aptitude grows as you learn how to better entrance an audience with magic. Choose one 1st-rank spell from the following list: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6]{Charm}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{Glow Up}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yV7Ouzaoe7DHLESI]{Ventriloquism}. You can cast this spell as an arcane innate spell once per day.

Special You can select this feat more than once. If you do, you must select a different spell.

Favored Disguise.name: 偏好的伪装 Favored Disguise
Favored Disguise.description:
你创造了一种偏爱的伪装，能在转瞬之间启用。每当你进行冒充时，你可以决定让该伪装成为你的偏爱伪装。如果你拥有全息拟肤，或能够变形，那么你在冒充时总是可以采用你的偏爱伪装。你仍然要为冒充检定掷欺骗，但将任何严重失败结果改为失败。你可以拥有一种偏爱伪装，并且当你的欺骗熟练度达到专家、大师和传奇时，各额外获得一种可使用的偏爱伪装。

You create a favored disguise that you can call upon at a moment's notice. When you Impersonate, you can decide that the disguise becomes your favored disguise. If you have a holoskin or can Change Shape, you can always adopt your favored disguise when Impersonating. You still roll Deception for the Impersonate check but count any critical failure results as failures instead. You can have one favored disguise and gain an additional favored disguise you can employ at expert, master, and legendary proficiency in Deception.

Machine Saboteur.name: 机械破坏者 Machine Saboteur
Machine Saboteur.description:
你被制造出来就是为了与其他合成生物战斗。当你对具有科技特征的生物造成重击时，目标变为故障 1。

You were created to fight other synthetic creatures. When you roll a critical hit against a creature with the tech trait, the target becomes glitching 1.

Unmistakable Lore.name: 无错学识 Unmistakable Lore
Unmistakable Lore.description: 只要是与你的专业领域有关的信息，你就绝对不会出差错。用任何你已受训的学识子类回忆知识（Recall Knowledge）时，若骰出大失败，改为获得失败。若你在一项学识子类别上的熟练度达到大师，在取得大成功的结果时，你将比通常情况获得更多情报或背景信息。

Cosmic Traveler.name: 太空旅者 Cosmic Traveler
Cosmic Traveler.description:
漂流域才是你真正的家园，你可以在其中无限期地生存。当你处于漂流域时，你获得宇宙特征，且无需进食或饮水。当你处于漂流域或真空中时，你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

The Drift is your true home, and you can survive within it indefinitely. While you're in the Drift, you gain the cosmic trait, and you don't need to eat or drink. While you're in the Drift or a vacuum, you gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed.

Diverse Schemes.name: 多元计谋 Diverse Schemes
Diverse Schemes.description:
你是个高效的多面手，而且你心中总是同时怀着不止一个目标，或手头进行着不止一个计划。你可以维持相当于你魅力调整值两倍的资产。

You're an efficient multitasker, and you always have more than one goal in mind or scheme on the go. You can maintain twice your Charisma modifier of assets.

Emotional Defiance.name: 情感反抗 Emotional Defiance
Emotional Defiance.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你对一个精神效果的意志豁免检定失败。

你拒绝让他人影响或操纵你的情绪。重掷触发此次能力的豁免检定，并采用较好的结果。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You fail a Will saving throw against a mental effect.

You refuse to allow others to influence or manipulate your emotions. Reroll the triggering saving throw and use the better result.

Shobhad Weapon Familiarity.name: 绍巴德武器熟悉 Shobhad Weapon Familiarity
Shobhad Weapon Familiarity.description:
你获得所有具有绍贝德人特征的非普通武器的使用权限。你熟悉具有绍贝德人特征的武器，以及冷冻长枪、牙刃和锤。就熟练项而言，你将其中任何属于军用武器的武器视为简易武器，将任何属于先进武器的武器视为军用武器。

到 5 级时，每当你用这些武器之一造成重击时，你都会获得其重击专精效果。

You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the shobhad trait. You have familiarity with weapons with the shobhad trait, plus the cryopike, fangblade, and hammer. For the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you get its critical specialization effect.

Undead Empathy.name: 共情不死者 Undead Empathy
Undead Empathy.description:
对你而言，其他不死生物很容易看透，而且你在应付它们方面有着他人所欠缺的天赋。你可以影响无心智不死生物，并向你的仆从传达基本的命令。你可以使用外交来对无心智不死生物 [[/act make-an-impression]]，或向它们提出简单的请求。如果该不死生物当前已经受制于某个等级高于你的生物，你通常需要掷出一次大成功（由 GM 裁定）。

For you, other undead creatures are easy to read, and you have a knack for dealing with them that others lack. You can influence mindless undead and communicate rudimentary orders to your minions. You can use Diplomacy to [[/act make-an-impression]] on mindless undead or make simple requests of them. If the undead creature currently is already in the thrall of a creature whose level is higher than yours, you typically need to roll a critical success (at GM discretion).

Shifter's Eye.name: 变形者之眼 Shifter's Eye
Shifter's Eye.description:
你非常擅长识破他人的伪装。当你进入一名经过伪装、变形，或正在冒充某个特定生物的生物 10 尺范围内时，GM 会为你秘密进行一次察觉检定，以判断你是否意识到该生物经过伪装，即使你没有花费动作对该生物使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}。

You are a master at spotting other people in disguise. When you come within 10 feet of a creature that is disguised, transformed, or Impersonating a specific creature, the GM rolls a secret Perception check for you to realize that the creature is disguised, even if you didn't spend an action to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} against that creature.

Share Quantum Aura.name: 共享量子灵光 Share Quantum Aura
Share Quantum Aura.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你暂时与一名盟友共享你的量子场。你使你的量子场从你能看见的一名盟友处散发，而非从你自己身上散发。该盟友获得你的量子场的所有益处，并且直到你的量子场停用为止，你的扭曲法术都改为从该盟友处而非你自身处起源。若你对其他目标施放扭曲法术，你仍必须对目标具有视线，但在判定其射程和效果线时，该法术视为从你的盟友处起源。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You temporarily share your quantum field with an ally. You cause your quantum field to emanate from an ally you can see instead of yourself. The ally gains all the benefits of your quantum field, and your warp spells originate from your ally instead of you until your quantum field deactivates. If you cast warp spells at other targets, you must still have line of sight to the target, but the spell originates from your ally for purposes of determining its range and line of effect.

Hang in There.name: 坚持住 Hang in There
Hang in There.description:
你鼓励自己或一名盟友，为即将到来的挑战替其打气，并赋予其临时生命值。选择你自己或 30 尺内的一名盟友，然后尝试进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:20|showDC:all] 检定。如果你的外交熟练等级为大师，你可以改为尝试进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:30|showDC:all] 检定，使成功检定时获得的临时生命值增加 5。如果你的熟练等级为传奇，你可以改为尝试进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:40|showDC:all] 检定，使成功检定时获得的临时生命值增加 10。这些临时生命值持续 1 分钟。随后，目标会在 1 天内暂时免疫你的 Hang in There。

大成功 目标获得等同于其等级两倍加上你的魅力调整值的临时生命值。

成功 目标获得等同于其等级加上你的魅力调整值的临时生命值。

失败 目标不受影响，且你在 1 分钟内不能再次使用 Hang in There。

大失败 目标不受影响，且你在 1 小时内不能再次使用 Hang in There。

You encourage yourself or an ally, psyching them up for a coming challenge and granting them temporary Hit Points. Choose yourself or an ally within 30 feet, then attempt a @Check[diplomacy|dc:20|showDC:all] check. If you have master proficiency in Diplomacy, you can instead attempt a @Check[diplomacy|dc:30|showDC:all] check to increase the temporary Hit Points gained on a successful check by 5. If you have legendary proficiency, you can instead attempt a @Check[diplomacy|dc:40|showDC:all] check to increase the temporary Hit Points gained on a successful check by 10. These temporary Hit Points last for 1 minute. The target is then temporarily immune to your Hang in There for 1 day.

Critical Success The target gains temporary Hit Points equal to double their level plus your Charisma modifier.

Success The target gains temporary Hit Points equal to their level plus your Charisma modifier.

Failure The target is unaffected, and you can't use Hang in There again for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is unaffected, and you can't use Hang in There again for 1 hour.

Basic Insectile Flight.name: 基础类虫飞行 Basic Insectile Flight
Basic Insectile Flight.description:
有些施壬人天生长有翅膀，而另一些则会在之后长出翅膀。你进化出一对昆虫般的翅膀，使你获得20尺的飞行速度。此外，当你坠落时，你不会受到坠落伤害。

特殊 如果你是有翼施壬人，你要么长出第二对翅膀，要么现有的翅膀变形成更强壮的一对翅膀，使你的飞行速度提高至25尺。

Some shirrens are born with wings, but others grow them later. You evolve a pair of insectile wings that grant you a fly Speed of 20 feet. In addition, when you fall, you take no falling damage.

Special If you're a winged shirren, you either grow a second set of wings or your existing wings morph into a stronger set of wings, increasing your fly Speed to 25 feet.

Convergent Evolution.name: 趋同演化 Convergent Evolution
Convergent Evolution.description:
你会采集与你接触过的生物与人群的遗传特征并加以模仿。当你获得此专长时，选择至多三种你曾有过密切接触的不同族裔。除了飞螅族族裔专长外，你还可以从你所选的族裔中选择族裔专长。此外，你获得所选族裔之一中一个你符合条件的5级或以下族裔专长。你可以在每日准备期间每天将所选专长重训一次。

You sample the genetics of creatures and people you've made contact with and mimic them. When you take this feat, select up to three different ancestries with which you've had significant contact. You can select ancestry feats from the ancestries you chose, in addition to barathu ancestry feats. Additionally, you gain one ancestry feat you qualify for of 5th level or lower from one of the selected ancestries. You can retrain the selected feat once per day during your daily preparations.

Collateral Witness.name: 连带目击者 Collateral Witness
Collateral Witness.description:
触发 你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击} 将你的主要目标的生命值降至 0。

你以武器做出一个微妙的手势并投以注视，提醒一名从你猛攻中幸存下来的敌人：这种打击还有的是。对一个曾处于你自动射击区域内的单个生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓}；你在此次检定中获得 +2 的境遇加值。如果你在威吓上拥有传奇熟练度，或者如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{动作英雄} 战斗风格，且“Collateral Witness”的目标是离你最近的敌人，你就可以在同一触发条件下将此作为一个自由动作使用。

Trigger You reduce your primary target to 0 Hit Points using @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}.

With a subtle gesture of your weapon and a stare, you remind a survivor of your onslaught that there's more where that came from. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} a single creature that was in the area of your Auto-Fire; you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to this check. If you have legendary proficiency in Intimidation, or if you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{Action Hero} fighting style and the target of Collateral Witness is the enemy closest to you, you can use this as a free action with the same trigger.

Loping Vines.name: 蔓行藤蔓 Loping Vines
Loping Vines.description:
你用来移动的藤蔓——也就是别人所说的你的肢体——格外修长。你的陆行速度和攀爬速度提高 5 英尺。

The vines you use to move—what others call your limbs—are extra long. Increase your land Speed and climb Speed by 5 feet.

Tactical Swap.name: 战术换位 Tactical Swap
Tactical Swap.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 你在本回合中的上一次远程打击未命中，或命中但未能对目标造成伤害。

你以娴熟的动作切换武器。你进行“切换手持”或“交互”，将你当前的武器换成另一把。用你新抽出的武器对所需目标进行一次打击。

Frequency once per round

Requirements Your last ranged Strike this turn missed or hit and failed to damage the target.

You swap weapons with a practiced motion. You Switch Hands or Interact to swap your current weapon for another. Make a Strike against the required target with your newly drawn weapon.

Planar Survival.name: 异界生存家 Planar Survival
Planar Survival.description: 你可以在其它位面用生存技能求生，即使这些位面缺少你通常所需的资源和自然现象。举例而言，即使该位面缺少能正常维持你生存的食物，你也可以无减值地觅食。用于求生的检定成功还会让你和用求生供给的其他生物免受该位面造成的伤害。这只对位面的普遍状态造成的伤害有效，对小型危害无效。

Urban Survivalist.name: 都市生存专家 Urban Survivalist
Urban Survivalist.description:
你可以使用 [[/act subsist skill=survival]]{生存} 来代替社群，在城市、空间站和其他聚居地中维持生计。你也可以在这些环境中使用 @Check[survival] 代替察觉来注意到危险；如果你以这种方式发现了一个危险，你还可以使用生存代替巧手来 [[/act disable-device skill=survival]]{停用装置}。

You can use [[/act subsist skill=survival]]{Survival} in place of Society to Subsist in cities, space stations, and other settlements. You can also use @Check[survival] instead of Perception to notice hazards in these environments; if you find a hazard in this way, you can also use Survival instead of Thievery to [[/act disable-device skill=survival]]{Disable the Device}.

Chattermander.name: 吱喳猿 Chattermander
Chattermander.description:
你绝不会让无法交流妨碍你和新朋友们聊天！你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{动物交谈}，作为一个2环原始先天法术；并获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qvwIwJ9QBihy8R0t]{植物交谈} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY]{通晓语言}，作为3环原始先天法术。你每天可以将这些原始先天法术各施放一次。

You never let the inability to communicate stop you from chatting with nufriends! You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{Speak with Animals} as a 2nd-rank primal innate spell, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qvwIwJ9QBihy8R0t]{Speak with Plants} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY]{Translate} as 3rd-rank primal innate spells. You can cast each of these primal innate spells once per day.

Knight of Golarion Dedication.name: 戈拉里昂骑士献身 Knight of Golarion Dedication
Knight of Golarion Dedication.description:
你熟悉剑类武器组中的所有武器。就熟练度而言，将其中任何军用武器视为简易武器，将任何先进武器视为军用武器。如果你至少达到专家熟练度，你获得该武器的致命专精效果。你研习过失落的戈拉里昂古代文化。你在以下两项中成为受训，前提是你原本尚未受训：戈拉里昂知识、艾奥梅黛知识，或一项与失落的戈拉里昂中的族裔或文化相关的知识技能，例如地精、半身人、人类或兽人。

You have familiarity with all weapons in the sword weapon group. For the purposes of proficiency, treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons. If you are at least expert, you gain that weapon's critical specialization effect. You've studied lost Golarion's ancient cultures. You become trained in two of the following that you were not already trained in: Golarion Lore, Iomedae Lore, or a Lore skill associated with an ancestry or culture from Lost Golarion, such as Goblin, Halfling, Human, or Orc.

Method Actor.name: 方法派演员 Method Actor
Method Actor.description:
你喜欢像自己所扮演的角色那样生活，这使你的表演极具说服力。每当你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充} 的欺骗检定时本应遭遇严重失败时，你改为失败。

You like to live as the character you're playing, which makes your performances incredibly convincing. Whenever you would critically fail a Deception check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate}, you fail instead.

Undying.name: 不朽 Undying
Undying.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 你具有濒死状态，且即将进行一次恢复检定。

你以前曾死过一次，而且再也无意死去；当你本会就此死去时，你的灵魂会顽强地使你的身体复苏。你恢复至 1 生命值，失去濒死状态和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 状态，并且本回合可以正常行动。你的重伤状态如常增加。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You have the dying condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.

You have died once before and have no intention of dying ever again; your soul stubbornly resuscitates your body when you would otherwise perish. You are restored to 1 Hit Point, lose the dying and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} conditions, and can act normally on this turn. You increase your wounded condition as normal.

Cooperative Soul.name: 协作之魂 Cooperative Soul
Cooperative Soul.description: 你与你的伙伴建立了直达灵魂的羁绊，并且与他们维持着更加深度的合作。若你在你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{协助 Aiding}所用的技能上拥有至少专家熟练度，那么除非结果为大成功，否则你协助检定的掷骰结果一概视为成功。

Enlarge Quantum Field.name: 扩大量子场 Enlarge Quantum Field
Enlarge Quantum Field.description:
你的量子场缓慢地侵蚀现实。将你的量子场半径增加 10 英尺。直到你的量子场停用为止，每回合一次，当你维持该量子场时，将其半径额外增加 5 英尺（最多额外增加 50 英尺）。

Your quantum field slowly encroaches on reality. Increase your quantum field's radius by 10 feet. Until your quantum field deactivates, once per turn when you Sustain the quantum field, increase its radius by an additional 5 feet (to a maximum of 50 additional feet).

Opportunistic Hug.name: 趁机熊抱 Opportunistic Hug
Opportunistic Hug.description:
触发 一个生物对你进行的一次近战打击严重失败。

需求 触发生物位于你的触及范围内，你至少有一只空闲的可用手，并且你的目标体型不比你大超过一级。

你抓住机会，给敌人一个大大的拥抱，好让他们感觉好些，或者冷静下来。你尝试进行一次运动学检定，以对触发生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}。

特殊 如果你拥有“泰坦摔角手”技能专长，你可以对体型最多比你大两级的生物使用“机会拥抱”；如果你在运动学上达到传奇，则可以对体型最多比你大三级的生物使用。

Trigger A creature critically fails a melee Strike against you.

Requirements The triggering creature is within your reach, you have at least one free active hand, and your target is no more than one size larger than you.

You seize the opportunity to give your foe a big hug to help them feel better or calm down. You attempt an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} the triggering creature.

Special If you have the Titan Wrestler skill feat, you can use Opportunistic Hug against creatures up to two sizes larger than you, or up to three sizes larger than you if you're legendary in Athletics.

Quick Jump.name: 迅速跳跃 Quick Jump
Quick Jump.description: 你能够以单动作而非2个动作@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳高 High Jump}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远 Long Jump}。若如此做，你无需先行走（Stride），也不会因未行走10尺而失败。

Guarded Thoughts.name: 思想护卫 Guarded Thoughts
Guarded Thoughts.description:
你的灵能训练使你能够阻止他人读取你的思想。任何明确试图读取你的心智以获取信息的效果，都必须以你的职业 DC 或你的法术 DC 中较高者为目标，通过一次反制检定，才能成功做到这一点；否则，它无法获得任何信息。该反制等级等于你等级的一半，向上取整。

Your psychic training allows you to block attempts to read your thoughts. Any effect that specifically attempts to read your mind to glean information must succeed at a counteract check against the higher of your class DC or your spell DC to do so successfully; otherwise, it gains no information. The counteract rank is equal to half your level rounded up.

Repair Module.name: 修复模组 Repair Module
Repair Module.description:
频率 每天一次

你启动身体的自我修复程序，刺激体内的纳米机器人治疗你的伤口。你获得等同于你等级一半的快速愈合，持续1分钟。当“修复模块”处于激活状态时，如果你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.JS24EjgLYcHB9E3T]{Nanite Surge} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.OlSfsaJSE4Lk7wkt]{Nanite Form}，此快速愈合结束。

Frequency once per day

You trigger your body's self-repair programming, stimulating your body's nanites to heal your wounds. You gain fast healing equal to half your level for 1 minute. While Repair Module is active, if you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.JS24EjgLYcHB9E3T]{Nanite Surge} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.OlSfsaJSE4Lk7wkt]{Nanite Form}, this fast healing ends.

Cloud Storage.name: 云存储 Cloud Storage
Cloud Storage.description:
你可以将你的活力网络用作一个异次元储物空间，像它是一个 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.EAMHdtJLqWUO0ZU0]{虚空空间舱} 那样，将物品滑入或从稀薄空气中取出。你可以对一件重量为 1 Bulk 或更轻的物品执行“交互”动作，将其收入你的云端储存中。你联结中的一个生物，且与您位于同一位面时，可以用一个“交互”动作从你的云端储存中取出一件物品，但这样做需要 2 个动作而不是 1 个动作。你的云端储存容量为 12 Bulk。该容量在第 8 级时增加到 25 Bulk，第 12 级时增加到 50 Bulk，第 16 级时增加到 75 Bulk。

You can use your vitality network as an extradimensional storage space, sliding items into and out of thin air as if it were a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.EAMHdtJLqWUO0ZU0]{Null Space Chamber}. You can Interact with an item that weighs 1 Bulk or less to stow it into your Cloud Storage. A creature in your bond and on the same plane can remove an item from your Cloud Storage as an Interact action, but doing so takes 2 actions instead of 1 action. Your Cloud Storage has a capacity of 12 Bulk. This increases to 25 Bulk at 8th level, 50 Bulk at 12th level, and 75 Bulk at 16th level.

Iomedae's Shield.name: 艾奥梅黛的护盾 Iomedae's Shield
Iomedae's Shield.description:
你将自己的信仰显现为一面护盾。你自己的护甲，以及至多五名你能看见且位于30英尺内的盟友的护甲，获得已启动的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.6ZW9IcSwd4WCFuf6]{战术型力场}升级的益处，具有14生命值，并在你的回合恢复2生命值，但不像正常力场那样能防护重击。该力场持续1分钟。在获得艾奥梅黛之盾的益处后，你和你的盟友对此效果免疫1小时。

在10级时，这变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.2637b5l0hxitACkR]{卓越型力场}，具有26生命值，并在你的回合恢复5生命值；在16级时，这变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.6hunzJ4gwfNT58vl]{终极型力场}，具有37生命值，并在你的回合恢复7生命值。

You manifest your faith as a shield. Your armor and the armor of up to five allies you can see within 30 feet gains the benefits of an activated @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.6ZW9IcSwd4WCFuf6]{Tactical Force Field} upgrade with 14 Hit Points that replenishes 2 Hit Points on your turn but does not protect from critical hits like a normal force field. The force field lasts for one minute. After receiving the benefits of Iomedae's Shield, you and your allies are immune to the effect for one hour.

At level 10, this becomes a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.2637b5l0hxitACkR]{Superior Force Field} with 26 HP and replenishes 5 Hit Points on your turn, and at level 16, this becomes an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.6hunzJ4gwfNT58vl]{Ultimate Force Field} with 37 HP and replenishes 7 Hit Points on your turn.

Blazing Corona.name: 炽焰日冕 Blazing Corona
Blazing Corona.description:
你操控太阳辐射的能力提升了。你可以在任何时候显现你的翅膀，以在不占用任何手的情况下使用日冕闪焰，即使你不在真空中也可以。此外，你的日冕闪焰获得“投掷 40尺”特征。

Your ability to manipulate solar radiation has improved. You can manifest your wings to use Coronal Flare without any hands at any time, even if you are not in a vacuum. In addition, your Coronal Flare gains the Thrown 40 feet trait.

Undead Senses.name: 不死生物感知 Undead Senses
Undead Senses.description:
你在死后，感官发生了变化并得到了强化。现在，你能够感受到从活物身上辐射出的活力能量，以及环绕着其他像你一样的不死生物实体的虚空。你获得生命感知，作为一种不精确感知，范围为10英尺，使你能够确定活物与不死生物的位置（并将二者区分开来），但无法感知其他非活体存在，例如构装体。

Your senses changed and improved after you died. Now you can feel the vitality energy radiating from living creatures and the void surrounding other undead entities like you. You gain lifesense as an imprecise sense with a range of 10 feet, allowing you to pinpoint the locations of (and distinguish between) living and undead creatures, but not other unliving beings such as constructs.

Digestive Outburst.name: 消化爆发 Digestive Outburst
Digestive Outburst.description:
你吐出自己的胃，用强力酶素攻击对手。你获得一种胃部徒手攻击，造成 1d8 点强酸伤害，具有非电子和笨重特征，并属于腐蚀武器组。

You disgorge your stomach to attack your opponents with powerful enzymes. You gain a stomach unarmed attack that deals 1d8 acid damage damage, has the analog and unwieldy traits, and is in the corrosive weapon group.

Legendary Codebreaker.name: 传奇译码员 Legendary Codebreaker
Legendary Codebreaker.description: 你在语言和密码上的造诣极高，单凭快速浏览文本，就能破译其信息。你能够在以正常速度阅读时用社群技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{解译文书 Decipher Writing}。若你放慢速度，花费通常情况所需的完整时间，并在检定中成功，则改为获得大成功。若你花费通常情况需要的完整时间，并获得大成功，则可几乎逐字逐句地细致理解文本。

Heightened Paranoia.name: 加剧的偏执 Heightened Paranoia
Heightened Paranoia.description:
你近距离目睹了那场据称重新点燃索塔之焰的仪式，尽管它无疑令人印象深刻，但你不认为它本该奏效。你始终无法摆脱一种感觉：幕后还有别的东西在起作用——某种危险且未知的存在。不管那是什么，你都打算正面迎击这一威胁。当你在对抗可能施加 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 状态的效果进行意志豁免检定成功时，你改为获得大成功。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.fXQxrEuO2ER8fUgW]{Determined Optimist} 专长，则不能选择此专长。

You witnessed the ritual that supposedly rekindled Sota's flame up close, and while it was certainly impressive, you don't believe it should've worked. You can't seem to shake the feeling that something else is at work behind the scenes—something dangerous and unknown. Whatever it is, you intend to face this threat head on. When you succeed on a Will saving throw against an effect that could impose the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition, you get a critical success instead.

Special You can't select this feat if you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.fXQxrEuO2ER8fUgW]{Determined Optimist} feat.

Basic Witchwarper Spellcasting.name: 基础巫战扭曲者法术施放 Basic Witchwarper Spellcasting
Basic Witchwarper Spellcasting.description:
你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#basic-spellcasting-feat]{基础法术施放} 的益处。每当你从巫战扭曲者原型获得一个新环阶的法术位时，向你的法术库中加入一个对应法术环阶的法术：一个属于你悖论传统的普通法术，或你悖论授予的法术之一。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#basic-spellcasting-feat]{Basic Spellcasting} benefits. Each time you gain a spell slot of a new rank from the witchwarper archetype, add a spell of the appropriate spell rank to your repertoire: a common spell of your paradox's tradition, or one of your paradox's granted spells.

Ascending Necrovite.name: 升格尸魂灵 Ascending Necrovite
Ascending Necrovite.description:
你已达到活体生物所能获得的死灵维特训练的巅峰。你制作了一台脑波仪，这是一种旨在保存你之存在的高科技灵魂牢笼，并且你已开始为自己最终转化为不死生物进行神秘准备。你获得虚空治疗，以及对死亡效果、疾病和毒素的免疫。你获得 5 点寒冷与物理伤害抗性。当你死亡时，你的灵魂会立刻转移到你的脑波仪中。

You've reached the pinnacle of necrovite training available to living creatures. You've crafted an electroencephalon, a type of high-tech soul cage designed to preserve your existence, and you've begun your mystical preparations for your final transition into undeath. You gain void healing and immunity to death effects, disease, and poison. You gain resistance 5 to cold and physical damage. When you die, your soul immediately transfers to your electroencephalon.

Solar Manifestation Expert.name: 星辰显化专家 Solar Manifestation Expert
Solar Manifestation Expert.description:
你的太阳耀斑、太阳武器，以及星辉武者职业DC的熟练等级提升为专家。

Your proficiency ranks for solar flare, solar weapon, and your solarian class DC increases to expert.

Remix World's Rhythm.name: 重混世界的节奏 Remix World's Rhythm
Remix World's Rhythm.description:
无论是通过严格的音乐训练、魔法洞察，还是梅耶尔的神圣赐福，你都能感知周遭世界的节奏，并拨动时间的和弦来操纵其旋律与流动。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}，作为3环原始本能法术。你每天可以施放这些法术各一次。

Whether through intense musical training, magical insight, or Meyel's divine blessing, you can feel the rhythm of the world around you and tug on time's chords to manipulate its melody and flow. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow} as 3rd-rank primal innate spells. You can cast each of these spells once per day.

Data Jockey.name: 数据骑师 Data Jockey
Data Jockey.description:
你可以轻松地向诸如 spectra 之类的科技装置发送数据。你可以随意将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZBeKxBcUOsXrfMRo]{植入数据} 戏法作为神圣先天法术施放。戏法会自动升阶至等同于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术环阶。

You can easily send data to technological devices like a spectra. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZBeKxBcUOsXrfMRo]{Implant Data} cantrip as a divine innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

Heroic Last Stand.name: 英勇的背水一战 Heroic Last Stand
Heroic Last Stand.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你的剩余生命值低于最大生命值的四分之一。

你为了朋友而无畏奋战。你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续1分钟。只要你拥有这些临时生命值，你对恐惧效果的意志豁免获得 +1 处境加值，并且你对他人尝试 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 你的意志DC获得 +2 处境加值。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You have less than one-quarter of your Hit Points remaining.

You fight fearlessly for your friends. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level for 1 minute. As long as you have these temporary Hit Points, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves against fear effects and a +2 circumstance bonus to your Will DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you.

Avid Traveler.name: 热衷旅行者 Avid Traveler
Avid Traveler.description:
你花在银河系各处漫游的时间比待在家里的时间还多。你变为受训于社群。若你本会自动变为受训于社群（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项由你选择的技能上变为受训。

你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{多语言} 技能专长。

You spend more time gallivanting across the galaxy than you do at home. You become trained in Society. If you would automatically become trained in Society (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} skill feat.

Sign Language.name: 手语 Sign Language
Sign Language.description:
你学会与自己掌握的语言相关的手语，能够用手势表达自己的意思，并且能够理解他人的手势。手语通常需要同时用上双手才能表达较复杂的内容，并且依靠视觉而非听觉。

由于对注意力的需求较高，手语在战斗中难以理解，因为它并不单是指向敌人以提议将其作为目标这样的基础手势。手语在能见度低的地方也很难使用，就像嘈杂的环境中不方便说话一样。

Basic Mystic Spellcasting.name: 基础秘学者施法 Basic Mystic Spellcasting
Basic Mystic Spellcasting.description:
你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#basic-spellcasting-feat]{基础法术施放} 的益处。每当你从秘学者原型获得一个新环阶的法术位时，将一个相应法术环阶的法术加入你的法术 repertory：一个属于你连接传统的普通法术，或你连接授予的法术之一。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#basic-spellcasting-feat]{Basic Spellcasting} benefits. Each time you gain a spell slot of a new rank from the mystic archetype, add a spell of the appropriate spell rank to your repertoire: a common spell of your connection's tradition, or one of your connection's granted spells.

Greater Epiphany.name: 更高顿悟 Greater Epiphany
Greater Epiphany.description:
你通过自己的连接洞悉宇宙的真理。你获得所选连接的高等顿悟法术。

You see into the truth of the cosmos through your connection. You gain the greater epiphany spell for your chosen connection.

Adaptable Limbs.name: 适应性肢体 Adaptable Limbs
Adaptable Limbs.description:
你长出结实的下肢，使你能够在陆地上行走。将你的速度提高至20尺。此外，你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.iIESt0oV0vobl41N]{适应性移动}动作。

You grow sturdy lower limbs that allow you to walk on land. Increase your Speed to 20 feet. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.iIESt0oV0vobl41N]{Adaptive Locomotion} action.

Eclipse Strike.name: 蚀影打击 Eclipse Strike
Eclipse Strike.description:
你的攻击会制造出一道灿烂的蚀影，遮蔽敌人的视线。用你的太阳武器或太阳耀斑进行一次打击。若命中，你会在自己与敌人之间制造出令人印象深刻的太阳能量景象。你从该敌人处获得的掩护等级提高一级。次级掩护变为标准掩护；或者，面对至少比你大一个体型类别的生物时，标准掩护变为高级掩护。该效果持续至你下个回合开始。

引力调谐 在持续时间内，若你在一次以你为目标的攻击中没有任何掩护，则你获得针对该次攻击的次级掩护。

光子调谐 在持续时间内，若你打击的目标在敌人的攻击中为你提供掩护，则该敌人的攻击检定受到 –1 处境减值。

Your attacks create a brilliant eclipse that veil you from the enemy's view. Make a Strike with your solar weapon or your solar flare. On a hit, you create an impressive display of solar energy between you and your foe. Increase the level of cover you receive from your enemy by one step. Lesser cover becomes standard cover, or standard cover becomes greater cover in the case of creatures at least one size category larger than you. This effect lasts until the start of your next turn.

Graviton-Attuned For the duration, if you don't have any cover against an attack targeting you, you gain lesser cover against that attack.

Photon-Attuned For the duration, if the target you struck provides you cover against an enemy's attack, that enemy takes a –1 circumstance penalty to their attack roll.

Breath Control.name: 龟息 Breath Control
Breath Control.description: 即使在有危害或稀薄的空气中，你也能够呼吸。在窒息前你可以闭气长达25分钟。对抗吸入毒素之类的吸入型威胁时，你的豁免检定获得+1环境加值，并且在这类豁免检定中骰出成功的结果时，改为获得大成功。

Masks Under Masks.name: 面具之下的面具 Masks Under Masks
Masks Under Masks.description:
即使你被迫显露自己的自然外貌，你仍拥有一层额外的安全保障——一个作为后备的变形身份。在你每日准备期间选择一个形态。你把自己的变形能力轻描淡写地说成某种无关的魔法或科技，从而在以“所选形态才是你的真实形态”为内容进行“说谎”的欺瞒检定上获得 +3 处境加值。你可以说出保护自己身份的谎言，甚至能够对抗魔法法术，而且像真实视觉这样的效果会将所选形态显现为你的真实形态。如果你成为某个法术或效果的目标，而其会使你不情愿地变回真实形态，你会改为恢复成此形态。

Even if you are forced to reveal your natural appearance, you have an additional layer of security in the form of a backup shapeshifting identity. Choose one form during your daily preparations. Waving away your ability to transform as some unrelated magic or technology, you gain a +3 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to Lie that the chosen form is your true form. You can tell lies that protect your identity even against magical spells, and effects like truesight reveal the chosen form as your true form. You revert to this form if you become the target of a spell or effect that causes you to unwillingly shift back to your true form.

Cheer Up.name: 振作起来 Cheer Up
Cheer Up.description:
你通过拍打相邻盟友的背部、给予他们有用的建议，或提供某种形式的安慰或鼓舞，鼓励他们克服轻微的不适。目标将其自选的以下一个状态的值降低 2：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{愚钝}。随后，目标在 1 天内暂时免疫 Cheer Up。

You encourage an adjacent ally to overcome their minor ailments by patting them on the back, providing them useful advice, or offering some form of comfort or inspiration. The target reduces the value of one of the following conditions of their choice by 2: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}. The target then becomes temporarily immune to Cheer Up for 1 day.

Byzantine Linguistics.name: 拜占庭语言学 Byzantine Linguistics
Byzantine Linguistics.description:
你花了数小时研读积满灰尘的古墓与古老铭文，使你对语言学问题具备了娴熟的洞察力。你获得对非常见语言的使用权限，这些语言之所以受限，是因为它们属于古代文明或早已失落的文化。这不会让你获得那些因其他原因而受限的语言的使用权限，例如尚未被破译的语言或秘密语言。

你可以使用社群或探究学识来破译文字，并且在尝试破译你不懂的语言文本时，你的检定获得 +1 处境加值。

You've spent hours poring over dusty tombs and ancient inscriptions, giving you practiced insight into linguistic problems. You gain access to uncommon languages that are restricted due to belonging to ancient civilizations or long-lost cultures. This does not give you access to languages that are restricted for additional reasons, such as not being decoded yet or being a secret language.

You can use Society or Delve Lore to Decipher Writing and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on checks made to decipher text in a language that you don't know.

Use the Scenery.name: 使用场景。 Use the Scenery
Use the Scenery.description:
为观众表演让你对周围环境保持敏锐。你总是在寻找利用周遭景物为自己争取优势的方法，让自己摆出面对世人时最出彩的角度——或者把它藏起来！当你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{躲避掩护} 时，你总是额外获得 +1 状态加值。

Performing for an audience has made you aware of your surroundings. You're always looking for ways to use the scenery to your advantage, setting yourself up to show your best angle to the world—or hide it! You always gain an additional +1 status bonus when you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}.

360 No Scope.name: 360 无瞄准镜射击 360 No Scope
360 No Scope.description:
需求 你正持用一把枪。

你在一次特技动作中射出一发花式射击。你进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.WBrg7BsHa8ylkigL]{跑酷}。你可以在此次移动期间——包括在你坠落时——@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后用你正持用的枪进行一次远程打击。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You fire a trick shot as part of a daredevil maneuver. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.WBrg7BsHa8ylkigL]{Parkour}. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make a ranged Strike with the gun you're wielding during this movement, including when you're falling.

Death-Touched Caster.name: 亡触施法者 Death-Touched Caster
Death-Touched Caster.description:
你存在于生与死的边界之间，并且能够将你自身失衡的灵性能量导入魔法法术中。从以下戏法中选择一个：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kcelf6IHl3L9VXXg]{Vitality Lash} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN]{Void Warp}。你可以将此法术作为神圣先天法术随意施放。戏法会自动升阶至等同于你等级一半并向上取整的法术环阶。

特殊 你可以选择此专长两次。每次你都必须选择一个不同的戏法。

You exist on the boundaries between life and death, and you can channel your own imbalanced spiritual essence into magical spells. Choose one of the following cantrips: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kcelf6IHl3L9VXXg]{Vitality Lash} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN]{Void Warp}. You can cast this spell as a divine innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

Special You can select this feat twice. Each time, you must select a different cantrip.

Combat Hack.name: 战斗破解 Combat Hack
Combat Hack.description:
需求 你正手持或穿戴一套黑客工具包，且有一只空闲手。

尝试进行一次计算机检定，对一个相邻且具有科技特征的生物、障碍或物品执行 [[/act hack]]{Hack}。DC 等于该生物、物品或障碍的强韧 DC，或看护该物件的生物的强韧 DC。如果目标是无人看管的物件，则 GM 根据该物品的等级设定此次检定的 DC。该目标会在 10 分钟内暂时免疫你对其进行战斗破解的尝试。

大成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。

大失败 如果目标具有故障状态，则将其故障状态的值降低 1。

Requirements You are holding or wearing a hacking toolkit and have a free hand.

Attempt a Computers check to [[/act hack]]{Hack} an adjacent creature, hazard, or item with the tech trait. The DC is equal to the creature, item, or hazard's Fortitude DC, or the Fortitude DC of the creature attending the object. If the target is an unattended object, the GM sets the DC for the check based on the item's level. The target is temporarily immune to your attempts to Combat Hack it for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Critical Failure If the target has the glitching condition, reduce the value of its glitching condition by 1.

Primary Target.name: 主要目标 Primary Target
Primary Target.description:
你获得主要目标的职业特性。

You gain the primary target class feature.

Wormhole.name: 虫洞 Wormhole
Wormhole.description:
频率 每小时一次

你强行撕开空间，形成一条通往附近地点的隧道。在效果线内、距离彼此不超过100英尺、对你可见且彼此至少相距15英尺的未被占据方格中创建两个虫洞。当一个生物进入某个虫洞的空间时，它会从另一个虫洞相邻的、由其自行选择的一个未被占据空间中出现。不会飞行的生物将所有缺乏坚实地面的空间视为被占据。若没有可供该生物进入的有效空间，则两个虫洞都会坍缩，且该生物留在其进入第一个虫洞时所在的空间。虫洞会持续1轮后坍缩，但你可以维持虫洞最多1分钟。当你采取虫洞动作时，使用你的调谐来决定其调谐效果。

引力子调谐 在某个虫洞相邻处开始其回合的生物，必须成功通过一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|options:forced-movement] 豁免，否则会被拖拽进虫洞。

光子调谐 生物进入虫洞时，会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，直到其下个回合开始。

Frequency once per hour

You force a rip in space that acts as a tunnel to a nearby location. Create two wormholes in unoccupied squares in line of effect that are within 100 feet, visible to you, and at least 15 feet apart. When a creature enters a wormhole's space, they emerge in an unoccupied space of their choice adjacent to the other wormhole. A creature that isn't flying treats all spaces lacking solid ground as occupied. If there's no valid space for the creature to enter, then both wormholes collapse and the creature remains in the space where it entered the first wormhole. The wormholes last for 1 round before collapsing, but you can Sustain the wormholes for up to 1 minute. Use your attunement when you take the Wormhole action to determine its attuned effects.

Graviton-Attuned A creature beginning its turn adjacent to a wormhole must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|options:forced-movement] save against your class DC or be pulled into the wormhole.

Photon-Attuned A creature entering the wormhole becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} until the start of its next turn.

Coordinated Fire.name: 协同火力 Coordinated Fire
Coordinated Fire.description:
需求 你正持用一把区域或自动武器。

伴随着一声强而有力的怒吼，你倾泻武器火力，为盟友提供他们重整旗鼓所需的掩护。你进行区域射击或自动射击，且不选择主要目标。作为射击的一部分，你发出一个口头指令，从“装填”、“打击”或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{寻找掩护} 中选择其一。每个在30英尺内、能听见并理解你指令的盟友，都可以以反应执行你所选择的动作。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

With a mighty bellow, you unload your weapon to give your allies the cover they need to rally. You Area Fire or Auto-Fire without selecting a primary target. Give a verbal order as part of your firing, selecting either Reload, Strike, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}. Every ally within 30 feet who hears and understands your order can perform the action you selected as a reaction.

Massive Fists.name: 巨拳 Massive Fists
Massive Fists.description:
你以近似棍棒或岩石的蛮力出拳。你的徒手拳击攻击不具有非致命特征，并获得推撞武器特征。

You punch with brutal force akin to a club or rock. Your fist unarmed attacks don't have the nonlethal trait and gain the shove weapon trait.

The Science of Motion.name: 运动科学 The Science of Motion
The Science of Motion.description:
你对天文学、天体物理学和恒星现象所拥有的广博科学知识，使你洞悉了物质宇宙的底层原理——尤其是运动。你可以运用这些知识，更轻松地在战场上移动你的敌人。你在进行 Athletics 检定以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{重新定位}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔} 时，获得 +1 处境加值。如果你在进行 Athletics 检定以重新定位、推撞或绊摔时大失败，则改为失败。

Your extensive scientific knowledge of astronomy, astrophysics, and stellar phenomenon have given you insight into the underpinnings of the universe—particularly motion. You can use this knowledge to more easily move your foes across the battlefield. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}. If you critically fail an Athletics check to Reposition, Shove or Trip, you get a failure instead.

Emotional Maestro.name: 情感大师 Emotional Maestro
Emotional Maestro.description:
你感知他人情绪的能力无与伦比。你的情绪感知变为一种精确感知，范围为120英尺。

Your ability to detect the emotions of others is unparalleled. Your emotion sense becomes a precise sense with a range of 120 feet.

Kasatha Weapon Elegance.name: 卡萨萨武器优雅 Kasatha Weapon Elegance
Kasatha Weapon Elegance.description:
你已学会如何调整自己的武技专长来运用其他武器。当你持用自己未受训的武器时，将你的等级视为你的熟练加值。

在11级时，你在所有武器上都成为受训。

You've learned how to adapt your martial expertise to wield other weapons. When wielding a weapon you aren't proficient with, treat your level as your proficiency bonus.

At 11th level, you become trained in all weapons.

Nimbus Block.name: 云团格挡 Nimbus Block
Nimbus Block.description:
你将自身防御力量的强度结合起来，使你的星辉灵冕增强了你的太阳护盾。当你用太阳护盾对一次近战攻击进行护盾格挡时，只要你或你的护盾有任一方因该次攻击受到伤害，你就可以将“灵冕守护”作为一个自由动作使用。

You've combined the strength of your defensive powers such that your solar nimbus bolsters your solar shield. When you Shield Block a melee attack with your solar shield, as long as either you or your shield take damage from the attack, you can use Nimbus Ward as a free action.

Quick Coercion.name: 迅速胁迫 Quick Coercion
Quick Coercion.description:
你可以在交谈 1 轮后而非 1 分钟后对一个生物进行 [[/act coerce]]。你仍然不能在战斗正酣时，或未进行交谈的情况下，胁迫一个生物。

You can [[/act coerce]] a creature after 1 round of conversation instead of 1 minute. You still can't Coerce a creature in the midst of combat, or without engaging in a conversation.

Defensive Gunner.name: 防御炮手 Defensive Gunner
Defensive Gunner.description:
你已经学会了仅凭一把枪来保护自己，用枪托和枪管护住身体并偏转打击。你持用的枪械获得格挡特征。如果一把合适的武器已经具有格挡特征，则它在用于格挡时给予 AC 的境遇加值从 +1 提高到 +2。

You've learned to defend yourself with only a gun, shielding your body and deflecting blows with stock and barrel. Guns you wield gain the parry trait. If an appropriate weapon already has the parry trait, increase the circumstance bonus to AC it grants when used to parry from +1 to +2.

Quick Swim.name: 迅速游泳 Quick Swim
Quick Swim.description: 在游泳（Swim）时，你获得成功结果时多移动5尺，大成功时多移动10尺，最多不超过你的速度。若你在运动技能上的熟练度达到传奇，获得等于你的速度的游泳速度。

Frequent Drifter.name: 常客漂泊者 Frequent Drifter
Frequent Drifter.description:
你与漂流域的连接变得更加强大，使你能够更频繁地在其中旅行。漂流跃迁的频率变为每小时一次。

Your connection to the Drift grows even stronger, allowing you to travel through it more often. The frequency of Drift Hop changes to once per hour.

Fixation.name: 固着 Fixation
Fixation.description:
你对某个特定主题着迷，例如某个小型崇拜教派的宗教、意大利面化的过程，或是星鳐所唱的歌曲。你获得关于所选学识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 专长，以及 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{稳操胜券} 专长。

You're fascinated with a particular topic, such as the religion of a small sect of worshippers, the process of spaghettification, or the songs sung by asterays. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat and the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance} feat for the chosen Lore.

Covering Fire.name: 掩护射击 Covering Fire
Covering Fire.description:
你进行一次精准射击，或倾泻弹雨来掩护你的盟友。对一个目标进行一次远程Strike，并选择一个处于同次攻击射程内的盟友。若你的Strike命中目标，你不造成伤害，但该目标生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}，并且在你的下个回合结束前，其对你的盟友进行的攻击获得 –2 处境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.0kdfFVZuHoHTG5c0]{效果：掩护火力}

你可以将掩护火力作为一个2动作活动来使用，以进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击}，而不是进行一次远程Strike，影响豁免失败的目标。

You make a well placed shot or unleash a hail of fire to cover your allies. Make a ranged Strike against a target and select one ally within range of the same attack. If your Strike hits your target, you deal no damage, but the targeted creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} and takes a –2 circumstance penalty on attacks made against your ally until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.0kdfFVZuHoHTG5c0]{Effect: Covering Fire}

You can use Covering Fire as a 2-action activity to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire} instead of making a ranged Strike, affecting targets that fail their save.

Change of Plans.name: 计划有变 Change of Plans
Change of Plans.description:
触发条件 你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} 的目标被降至 0 生命值。

需求 你在上一个回合中对一个生物使用了 Get 'Em!。

当你指挥盟友击倒的目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 或被摧毁时，你会迅速将他们指向另一个目标。你对一个新目标使用 Get 'Em!，并遵循 Get 'Em! 的所有正常目标限制。对于这个新目标，你不算是以身作则领导。

Trigger The target of your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} is reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Requirements You used Get 'Em! against a creature on your last turn.

When the target you directed your allies to take down falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} or is destroyed, you quickly direct them at another target. You use Get 'Em! against a new target following all the normal targeting restrictions for Get 'Em! You don't count as leading by example against this new target.

Leader's Confidence.name: 领袖的自信 Leader's Confidence
Leader's Confidence.description:
你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.9g0pgy75Gd1hcrM8]{领袖的自信} 职业特性。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.9g0pgy75Gd1hcrM8]{Leader's Confidence} class feature.

Terrain Stalker.name: 地形潜伏 Terrain Stalker
Terrain Stalker.description:
从下列困难地形中选择一项：石堆、雪地、灌木丛。当你在该地形中对非盟友处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}状态时，只要移动距离不超过5尺，也未在移动过程中进入敌人10尺范围内，你无需尝试隐秘检定就可以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行 Sneak}。

在探索期采取@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{避人耳目 Avoiding their Notice}行动期间，本专长还令你能够自动接近其他生物15尺内，前提是他们未在主动@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Searching}或保持警戒。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长。每次选择不同类型的地形。

Prescient Planner.name: 未雨绸缪 Prescient Planner
Prescient Planner.description:
费用 所选物品的价格

需求 自从你上一次能够购买货物以来，你还没有使用过这个能力。

你经常制定错综复杂的计划和应变预案，并利用自己的资源将其付诸实施。你花费1分钟取下你的背包，然后小心地拿出一件你先前未曾声明购买过的物品——你凭直觉预感到自己会需要这件物品，并在最近一次有机会时买下了它。该物品必须是一件冒险装备，且不能是武器、护甲、血清、魔法物品或其他财宝。它必须是普通物品，等级不高于你等级的一半，且其体积必须足够低，以至于携带它本不会使你陷入超载。

Cost the Price of the chosen item

Requirements You haven't used this ability since the last time you were able to purchase goods.

You regularly create convoluted plans and contingencies, using your resources to enact them. You take 1 minute to remove your backpack, then carefully remove an item you hadn't previously declared that you purchased—you intuited that you would come to need the item and purchased it at the latest opportunity. The item must be a piece of adventuring gear, and can't be a weapon, armor, serum, magic item, or other treasure. It must be common with a level no higher than half your level, and its Bulk must be low enough that carrying it wouldn't have made you encumbered.

Arcane Sense.name: 奥法感知 Arcane Sense
Arcane Sense.description:
你可以随意施放 1环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法}，作为一个奥术本能法术。如果你的奥秘学熟练达到大师，则该法术会升阶至 3环；如果你达到传奇，则会升阶至 4环。

You can cast 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{Detect Magic} at will as an arcane innate spell. If you're a master in Arcana, the spell is heightened to 3rd rank; if you're legendary, it is heightened to 4th rank.

Telepredict.name: 心灵预知 Telepredict
Telepredict.description:
你解读目标脑波中的细微线索，以预判你有限心灵感应范围内、且你能通过思想感知察觉到的一个生物的心理状态。你在以该生物为目标进行的欺骗检定和威吓检定上获得+1处境加值；对抗该目标具有恐惧特征的效果的豁免上获得+1处境加值；以及对抗该目标的威吓技能动作（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}）时，你的意志DC获得+1处境加值。如果你对该目标造成精神伤害，则此加值提高至+2。

你一次只能对一个生物使用心灵预判。若你对另一个生物使用心灵预判，或该生物离开你的有限心灵感应范围，心灵预判即结束。

You read the subtle cues of a target's brainwaves to anticipate the mental state of a single creature within range of your limited telepathy that you can detect with thoughtsense. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception checks and Intimidation checks targeting the creature, to saves against the target's effects that have the fear trait, and to your Will DC against the target's Intimidation skill actions, such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}. If you deal mental damage to the target, increase this bonus to +2.

You can Telepredict the actions of only one creature at a time. Telepredict ends if you use it on a different creature or the creature leaves the range of your limited telepathy.

Memory Matrix.name: 记忆矩阵 Memory Matrix
Memory Matrix.description:
你拒绝放弃自己的自主权，并建立了精神壁垒与技术协议，以保护你的心智和记忆。每当你尝试对抗会使你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} 状态的法术或效果进行一次意志豁免时，掷两次该豁免并采用较高的结果（这是一种幸运效果）。如果你会在自己回合开始时处于 confused 或 controlled 状态，你可以立即尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:5]。成功时，你会对抗那种精神控制，在你的回合结束前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}，而非违背自己的意志行动。如果你在这次平检中掷出 20，你会立即结束 confused 或 controlled 状态。
