You refuse to surrender your autonomy and have erected mental bulwarks and technological protocols to safeguard your mind and memories. Whenever you attempt a Will save against a spell or effect that would give you the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition, roll that save twice and use the higher result (this is a fortune effect). If you would start your turn confused or controlled, you can immediately attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5]. On a success, you fight that mental control, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} until the end of your turn rather than acting against your will. If you roll a 20 on this flat check, you immediately end the confused or controlled condition.

Unleash Sota's Flame.name: 释放索塔之焰 Unleash Sota's Flame
Unleash Sota's Flame.description:
引导索塔重燃之日的炽热，你向战场释放出一道等离子体爆裂。你在一条 @Template[line|distance:120] 内造成 @Damage[10d8[fire]] 伤害。此后 1 分钟内，你的身体充盈着太阳能量。擒抱你的生物，或以徒手打击或非触及近战武器命中你的生物，都会受到 @Damage[1d6[fire]] 伤害。区域内的生物必须使用你的职业 DC 或法术 DC（取较高者）进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，外加 @Damage[1d6[electricity]] 伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，外加 @Damage[1d6[persistent,electricity]] 伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1 轮。此后 1 分钟内，你的身体充盈着太阳能量。擒抱你的生物，或以徒手打击或非触及近战武器命中你的生物，都会受到 @Damage[1d6[fire]] 伤害。

Channeling the heat of Sota's rekindled sun, you unleash a blast of plasma across the battlefield. You deal @Damage[10d8[fire]] damage in a @Template[line|distance:120]. For 1 minute afterward, your body is awash with solar energy. Creatures that Grab you or that hit you with an unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee weapon take @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage. Creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] save using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage, plus @Damage[1d6[electricity]] damage, and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, plus @Damage[1d6[persistent,electricity]] damage, and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round. For 1 minute afterward, your body is awash with solar energy. Creatures that Grab you or that hit you with an unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee weapon take @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage.

Tactical Advance.name: 战术推进 Tactical Advance
Tactical Advance.description:
需求 你未处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{负重}状态。

你闪避、翻滚并穿梭于危险之外，在穿越战场时不留下任何可供攻击的破绽。移动，距离最多等同于你的速度。此次移动不会触发反应。

Requirements You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered}.

You dodge, roll, and weave out of danger, leaving no openings for attack as you move across the battlefield. Stride up to your Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Continual Recovery.name: 看护师 Continual Recovery
Continual Recovery.description: 你热心监测伤患的恢复情况，以便能更快实施治疗。在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势 Treat Wounds}时，你的伤患只会免疫治疗伤势10分钟而非1小时。此效果只应用于你的治疗伤势行动，伤患接受的其它治疗伤势不受影响。

Feather Step.name: 轻羽步 Feather Step
Feather Step.description: 你的步伐谨慎而迅捷。你可以用快步进入困难地形。

Convert Life Force.name: 生命力转化 Convert Life Force
Convert Life Force.description:
通过极度专注，你可以牺牲自己的生命值来为你的活力网络充能。你的活力网络恢复等同于你所牺牲数值的生命值。

With extreme concentration, you can sacrifice your own Hit Points to recharge your vitality network. Your vitality network regains Hit Points equal to the amount you sacrifice.

Fearless.name: 无畏 Fearless
Fearless.description:
无论这是出于责任感还是出于成功的渴望，当你面对可怕的敌人时，你很少会退缩。如果你在针对恐惧效果的豁免检定中获得成功，则改为获得暴击成功。

Whether it comes from a sense of duty or a desire to succeed, you rarely flinch when confronted by fearsome foes. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead.

Big Mouth.name: 大嘴巴 Big Mouth
Big Mouth.description:
你的颊囊特别大且富有弹性。你可以在颊囊中储存的物品不再是最多四件轻型体积物品，而是最多总计 1 体积的物品。单件物品的最大尺寸不变。

Your cheek pouches are especially large and stretchy. Instead of storing up to four items of light Bulk in your cheek pouches, you can store up to 1 Bulk worth of items. The maximum size of a given item is unchanged.

Fish in a Barrel.name: 瓮中之鱼 Fish in a Barrel
Fish in a Barrel.description:
正如那句老话所说：击中容易的目标就像瓮中捉鳖。你先进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对一个未受掩护加益的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}生物进行一次远程打击。将成功视为大成功。如果你掷出大成功，该生物将处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态，直到你下个回合开始。

As the old saying goes: hitting easy targets is like shooting fish in a barrel. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make a ranged Strike against a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} creature not benefiting from cover. Treat a success as a critical success. If you roll a critical success, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the beginning of your next turn.

Sales Pitch.name: 销售话术 Sales Pitch
Sales Pitch.description:
你已经精通说服他人按你的方式看待事物的艺术。你可以使用 [[/act make-an-impression skill=business-lore]]{商业传说} 或 [[/act make-an-impression skill=corporate-lore]]{企业传说} 来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下好印象}，并且在成功或重度成功时，将目标的态度提升一级。无论“留下好印象”是否成功，目标都会暂时免疫 Sales Pitch，持续24小时。

You've perfected the art of convincing others to see things your way. You can use [[/act make-an-impression skill=business-lore]]{Business Lore} or [[/act make-an-impression skill=corporate-lore]]{Corporate Lore} to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and, on a success or critical success, you shift your target's attitude one step higher. Whether or not Make an Impression is successful, the target becomes temporarily immune to Sales Pitch for 24 hours.

Effortless Influencer.name: 轻松影响者 Effortless Influencer
Effortless Influencer.description:
你已成为如此高明的操纵大师，以至于发现一个施展你影响力的机会已成了你的第二天性。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance} 技能专长三次，分别用于欺瞒、外交和威吓。此外，当你以欺瞒、外交或威吓进行检定并成功时，60英尺内目睹你成功的盟友，在1分钟内以下一次使用该技能进行的检定获得+1状态加值（若你的检定为大成功，则该加值为+2）。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ZQM4vfHEKgxvNJik]{效果：轻松施加影响}

You've become such a master manipulator that spotting an opening to ply your influence has become second nature. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance} skill feat three times for Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation. Furthermore, when you succeed at a check with Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation, allies within 60 feet who witnessed your success gain a +1 status bonus to the next check they attempt with that skill within 1 minute (or a +2 bonus if your check was a critical success).

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ZQM4vfHEKgxvNJik]{Effect: Effortless Influencer}

Working Artist.name: 在职艺术家 Working Artist
Working Artist.description:
人们已经注意到你艺术造物的原创性与品质，而你也开始兼职担任职业艺术家。你在制作或一项与艺术相关的知识技能（例如艺术知识或雕塑知识）上成为受训。当你使用制作或一项与艺术相关的知识技能进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{维生} 检定并获得成功或大成功时，按仿佛你尝试的是高一级的检定来计算你赚取的金额。

People have noticed the originality and quality of your artistic creations, and you've started moonlighting as a professional artist. You become trained in Crafting or a Lore skill related to art (such as Art Lore or Sculpture Lore). When you succeed or critically succeed on a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income} using Crafting or a Lore skill related to art, calculate the amount you earn as if you'd attempted a check one level higher.

Glad-Hand.name: 自来熟 Glad-Hand
Glad-Hand.description: 塑造第一印象是你的强项。在非正式场合或社交场合遇到某人时，你可以无需先交流1分钟，立即尝试一次交涉检定以对其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{建立印象 Make an Impression}。若检定失败，你可以不必接受失败或大失败结果，而是进行1分钟的交流，然后尝试一次新的检定。

Transforming Huddle.name: 变形者小群体 Transforming Huddle
Transforming Huddle.description:
你可以调整自己身体的大小与形态，以利用战场上的障碍物。使用“变形”变为小型形态，并且@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩护}；在你“变形”之后，若你原本会从一个生物获得较低掩护，则你可以采取掩护以获得标准掩护；若你原本会从一个生物获得标准掩护，则你改为获得更高掩护。

You can adjust your body's size and shape to take advantage of obstacles on the battlefield. Change Shape into a Small-sized form and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}; you can Take Cover to gain standard cover if you would have lesser cover from a creature after you Change Shape; if you would have standard cover from a creature, you gain greater cover instead.

Nightvision Adaptation.name: 夜光适应 Nightvision Adaptation
Nightvision Adaptation.description: 你的眼部处理器中的纳米机械已经适应了黑暗，增强了你在黑暗中的视力。你获得黑暗视觉。

Overwhelming Shot.name: 压制射击 Overwhelming Shot
Overwhelming Shot.description:
你以恰到好处的一击贯穿敌人的抗性。你先执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对你的标记目标进行一次打击。从以下伤害类型中选择一种：强酸、钝击、寒冷、电击、火焰、精神、穿刺、毒素、挥砍或音波伤害。你的射击无视目标对所选伤害类型的抗性，其数值等于你的等级。如果该生物对所选伤害类型具有弱点，则使该弱点增加等同于你等级一半的数值。生物的免疫不受影响。

You pierce through your foe's resistance with a well-timed shot. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make a Strike against your mark. Select one of the following damage types: acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, mental, piercing, poison, slashing, or sonic damage. Your shot ignores an amount of the target's resistance to the selected damage type equal to your level. If the creature has a weakness to the selected damage type, increase that weakness by an amount equal to half your level. A creature's immunities are unaffected.

Magical Guardian.name: 魔法守卫 Magical Guardian
Magical Guardian.description:
你想要保护你所关心的人免受伤害的愿望，点燃了你灵魂中的魔法火花，而你也能够与他人分享这道火花。你可以随意将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{指引术} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RA7VKcen3p56rVyZ]{禁制结界} 戏法作为神圣先天法术施放。戏法会自动强化至等于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术环阶。每当你对你的羁绊搭档施放这些法术之一时，你将该法术的射程提高至60英尺，而非30英尺。

Your desire to protect the people you care about from harm has kindled the spark of magic in your soul, and you can share that spark with others. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{Guidance} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RA7VKcen3p56rVyZ]{Forbidding Ward} cantrips as divine innate spells at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up. Whenever you cast one of these spells on your bonded partner, you increase the range of the spell to 60 feet, rather than 30 feet.

Prismeni Lore.name: 棱裔人传说 Prismeni Lore
Prismeni Lore.description:
你已学会利用自己与漂流域的内在联系，这使你成为一名出色的驾驶员。你在驾驶和隐秘上获得受训熟练等级。如果你本会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。

你还获得用于棱彩人传承学识的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}通用专长。

You've learned to leverage your intrinsic link to the Drift, making you an excellent pilot. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Piloting and Stealth. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Prismeni Lore.

Follow Their Lead.name: 追随他们的引领 Follow Their Lead
Follow Their Lead.description:
触发条件 一名相邻盟友进行Stride。

你将自己的移动与盟友同步，在战斗中与他们并肩前进以保持近距离。跟随触发此反应的盟友进行Stride，在其移动期间始终保持与其相邻，直到其停止移动，或你已移动了等同于你速度的距离，以先发生者为准。

Trigger An adjacent ally Strides.

You synchronize your movement to that of your allies, moving alongside them to keep close in the fray. Stride after the triggering ally, remaining adjacent to your ally for the duration of their movement until they stop or you've moved a distance equal to your Speed, whichever occurs first.

Timber!.name: 木头！ Timber!
Timber!.description:
触发条件 当你处于站立状态时，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}、濒死或死亡。

你如同一棵巨树般倒下，对从你所在方格起始、长达 @Template[type:line|distance:10] 的直线内每个生物造成 @Damage[7d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] 伤害，且它们必须针对你的职业 DC 进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免；若重度失败，则一个中型或更小的生物会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}，并且在你的身体被移走之前处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动} 状态。

Trigger You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, dying, or dead while standing.

You fall like a mighty tree, dealing @Damage[7d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in a @Template[type:line|distance:10] originating from your square with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save against your class DC; on a critical failure, a medium or smaller creature falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until your body is removed.

Mantarider.name: 蝠螳骑手 Mantarider
Mantarider.description:
你已受训于骑乘鳐鱼进行战斗的仪礼艺术，并能将你的经验运用于其他形式的机动作战。当你从一辆在上一轮内移动过的载具上发动攻击时，将减值降至 0（若载具失控，或上一轮中的任一动作具有鲁莽特征，则为 –2）。当你处于骑乘状态时，你的反射豁免不承受减值。

You have trained in the ceremonial art of combat mounted upon a manta and can apply your experience to other forms of mobile combat. Reduce the penalty when attacking from a vehicle that has moved within the last round to 0 (or –2 if the vehicle is uncontrolled or any action in the last round had the reckless trait). You don't take a penalty to Reflex saves while mounted.

Meditative Analysis.name: 冥想分析 Meditative Analysis
Meditative Analysis.description:
你短暂冥想你敌人的本质以及其在更广阔宇宙中的角色。尝试进行一次关于某个生物的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定。若成功，你在本轮内下一次用太阳武器对目标进行的打击获得 +1 处境加值。若你的打击命中，你可以选择此次打击获得哪种谐调增益。你的检定对象会暂时免疫“冥想分析”1 天。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.kxaRFiXRKMNpasnu]{效果：冥想分析}

You briefly meditate on the nature of your foe and their role in the wider cosmos. Attempt a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about a creature. On a success, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your next Strike with a solar weapon against the target this round. If your Strike hits, you can choose which attunement benefit you gain for that strike. The subject of your check is temporarily immune to Meditative Analysis for 1 day.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.kxaRFiXRKMNpasnu]{Effect: Meditative Analysis}

Shell Shower.name: 弹壳雨 Shell Shower
Shell Shower.description:
频率 每轮一次

无论你是厌倦了总被打脸，还是受够了在战斗中踩到弹壳打滑，你都已经学会了在倾泻火力时，如何重新导引武器射出的废弃弹药或因地形扭曲而排放出的能量。在你使用武器进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击} 攻击后，使任意数量与你相邻的方格变为困难地形。如果某个方格已经是困难地形，则改为变成强效困难地形。由此动作创造的任何困难地形或强效困难地形都会保留在原处，直到被清除。

Frequency once per round

Whether you got tired of getting hit in the face or slipping on bullet casings in the middle of a fight, you've learned how to redirect your weapon's spent ammunition or terrain warping vented energy while firing off a barrage. After you make an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire} attack with a weapon, make any number of squares adjacent to you difficult terrain. If a square was already difficult terrain, it instead becomes greater difficult terrain. Any difficult or greater difficult terrain created by this action remains in place until cleared.

Return to the River.name: 重返河流 Return to the River
Return to the River.description:
你与星间之河有着灵魂深处的连接。当你身陷致命险境时，星间之河会召唤你回归，投入它的怀抱。当你本应死亡时，你不会死。相反，你会被金色的太阳能量包裹成一个茧并消失，传送穿越银河抵达星间之河。[[/gmr 2d6 #days]]{2d6 天}之后，这个蛹会孵化，而你会在流散带中星间之河沿线的一个随机地点出现，且已完全痊愈。

You have a soul-deep connection to the River Between. When you're in mortal peril, the River Between beckons you home and into its embrace. When you would die, you don't. Instead, you are encased in a cocoon of golden solar energy and disappear, teleporting across the galaxy to the River Between. [[/gmr 2d6 #days]]{2d6 days} later, this chrysalis hatches, and you emerge fully healed in a random location along the River Between in the Diaspora.

Student of the Unseen.name: 无形秘学门生 Student of the Unseen
Student of the Unseen.description:
你研究存在于你周围物质宇宙中每一个粒子与每一缕魔法微尘里的微妙无形力量。在你每日准备期间，你可以冥想这些灵性与天族的奥秘，并在你选择的任意一个知识技能子类别中获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 技能专长。该专长（以及它所赋予你的知识技能熟练）会持续到你再次进行每日准备为止。由于该专长和熟练都只是临时获得的，你不能用它们来满足技能提升或永久角色选项（如专长）的前置条件。

You study the subtle, intangible forces that can be found in every particle and mote of magic in the universe around you. During your daily preparations, you can meditate on these spiritual and celestial mysteries and gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat in any Lore skill subcategory of your choice. This feat (and your proficiency in the Lore skill granted by it) lasts until you make your daily preparations again. Since both the feat and proficiency are temporary, you can't use them to satisfy a prerequisite for a skill increase or permanent character option (like a feat).

Just Kidding.name: 开个玩笑而已 Just Kidding
Just Kidding.description:
触发 一名盟友在 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{胁迫}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 或请求时严重失败。

你试图把一次社交失误掩饰成玩笑。进行一次表演检定，DC 与该盟友检定的 DC 相同。若你成功，你的盟友将其严重失败视为失败。

Trigger An ally critically fails to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}, or Request.

You attempt to play off a social misstep as a joke. Attempt a Performance check against the same DC as your ally's check. If you succeed, your ally treats their critical failure as a failure.

Dauntless.name: 不挠勇者 Dauntless
Dauntless.description:
你很少会气馁或害怕。你在对抗恐惧的豁免检定，以及对抗他人试图对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓} 时的意志DC上获得+1环境加值。如果你在对抗恐惧效果的豁免检定中获得成功，则改为获得大成功。

You're rarely discouraged or afraid. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against fear and to your Will DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you. If you get a success on a save against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead.

Divine Guidance.name: 开示 Divine Guidance
Divine Guidance.description: 你对神圣经卷深刻钻研，无论遇到什么情况，都能够在它们的字里行间找到启示与指引。花费10分钟，对你信仰的神祇或哲学的经文进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{Deciphering Writing}，同时思索你遇到的一个具体问题或难关，然后尝试@Check[religion]检定（DC由GM决定）。若成功，你将发现某个能够帮你前进或转变思路以解决难题的相关段落、寓言或警句。

Boundless Energy.name: 无尽城能量 Boundless Energy
Boundless Energy.description:
你的能量之井无穷无尽，而你的旺盛活力根本无法遏制。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.o7xxuslqMeEvsqha]{Zoomies}，而非每天一次。

Your wells of energy are unending, and your exuberance can't be contained. You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.o7xxuslqMeEvsqha]{Zoomies} once every hour, rather than once per day.

Terrified Retreat.name: 破胆威吓 Terrified Retreat
Terrified Retreat.description: 当你的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫败士气 Demoralize}行动大成功时，等级低于你的目标将@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing}1轮。

Prophet's Premonition.name: 先知的预感 Prophet's Premonition
Prophet's Premonition.description:
你身上带有魔法的鳞片纹记，使你得以窥见未来。你每天可以施放两次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]{预兆术}，作为一个2环法术。该法术的传统与你从 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Kgtj8NRoBnWCK9qw]{铭纹鳞片} 获得的戏法传统相同。

Your magical scale markings give you insight into the future. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]{Augury} twice per day as a 2nd-rank spell. The tradition of this spell matches the tradition of the cantrip you gained from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Kgtj8NRoBnWCK9qw]{Sigiled Scales}.

Toxic Transference.name: 毒素转移 Toxic Transference
Toxic Transference.description:
你利用体内积聚的毒素来强化你的天生攻击，使其带有毒性。每当你用从 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.iac0qVH4SDzCXOyc]{袖珍掠食者} 获得的徒手打击造成伤害时，你会按该攻击的每个武器伤害骰额外造成 1 点毒素伤害。每当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6fsMvO0jXtK8gYkH]{鼓胀} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.32W1Pnex4xbhx5Bj]{喷血} 时，你还会额外造成等同于你等级一半的毒素伤害。

You use your body's built-up toxins to enhance your natural attacks, making them poisonous. Whenever you deal damage with an unarmed Strike you gained from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.iac0qVH4SDzCXOyc]{Compact Predator}, you deal an additional 1 poison damage per weapon damage die of the attack. Whenever you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6fsMvO0jXtK8gYkH]{Puff Up} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.32W1Pnex4xbhx5Bj]{Squirt Blood}, you additionally deal poison damage equal to half your level.

Tech Caster.name: 科技施法者 Tech Caster
Tech Caster.description:
你控制并强化科技装置的能力提升了。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yXD9uU8w8uFD2OBQ]{删除} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SbBqa1HStMrV47fb]{超载武器}，作为1环神圣先天法术。你每天可以各施放一次这些神圣先天法术。

Your ability to control and empower technological devices has improved. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yXD9uU8w8uFD2OBQ]{Delete} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SbBqa1HStMrV47fb]{Supercharge Weapon} as 1st-rank divine innate spells. You can cast each of these divine innate spells once per day.

Cosmic Infusion.name: 太空灌注 Cosmic Infusion
Cosmic Infusion.description:
你将额外的能量灌注进你的调谐之中。当你因处于光子调谐而造成火焰伤害或持续性火焰伤害时，你可以改为选择造成活力伤害或持续性活力伤害，这会伤害具有虚空治疗的生物，例如不死生物。

当你处于引力子调谐时，你的太阳武器进行的打击会使目标将 10 尺内的所有方格都视为困难地形，而非仅相邻方格。

You infuse your attunements with additional energy. When you deal fire damage or persistent fire damage due to being photon-attuned, you can instead choose to deal vitality damage or persistent vitality damage, which damages creatures with void healing, such as undead.

While graviton-attuned, Strikes with your solar weapon cause the target to count all squares within 10 feet as difficult terrain, rather than just adjacent squares.

Shot on the Run.name: 移动射击 Shot on the Run
Shot on the Run.description:
需求 你正持用一把区域或自动武器。

你在移动时做好武器准备，使自己一旦就位便能立刻发射一轮齐射。疾奔，移动距离最多等同于你的速度，然后@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击}。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

By preparing your weapon while on the move, you ready yourself to fire a salvo as soon as you're in position. Stride up to your Speed, and then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}.

Kindle Blaze.name: 金德尔·布雷兹 Kindle Blaze
Kindle Blaze.description:
触发条件 你受到火焰伤害。

无论是太阳光线还是炽烈火焰，光与热都是你的一部分。持续1分钟，你由内而外地发光，在30英尺半径内提供明亮光照（接下来30英尺为微光）。当你以这种方式发光时，你的身体充满暖意——你将环境寒冷效果视为低一个等级的极端程度（难以置信的寒冷变为极端，极端寒冷变为严酷，依此类推）。你还会在对抗具有寒冷特征的攻击、法术及其他效果的豁免中获得+1情境加值。

Trigger You take fire damage.

Be they solar rays or blazing flames, light and heat are a part of you. For 1 minute, you glow from within, shedding bright light in a 30-foot radius (and dim light to the next 30 feet). While you glow in this way, your body is flush with warmth—you treat environmental cold effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible cold becomes extreme, extreme cold becomes severe, and so on). You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against attacks, spells, and other effects that have the cold trait.

Objects in Motion.name: 运动中的物体 Objects in Motion
Objects in Motion.description:
需求 你的上一个动作是一次成功的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}。

你利用自己对能量、质量与运动的知识来对付对手，操纵他们在战场上的位置。被推撞的生物会继续移动。它们会被额外向后推5英尺；如果所需的推撞是一次重击成功，则额外向后推10英尺。若它们会因这次移动而撞上坚固表面，你立即尝试以一个自由动作对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}，即使它们已不在你的触及范围内。

Requirements Your last action was a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}.

You leverage your knowledge of energy, mass, and motion against your opponents to manipulate their battlefield positioning. The Shoved creature continues moving. They're pushed back an additional 5 feet, or 10 feet if the required Shove was a critical success. If they would collide with a solid surface due to this movement, you immediately attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} them as a free action, even if they're no longer within your reach.

Always on Alert.name: 时刻警戒 Always on Alert
Always on Alert.description:
经历了无数次意料之外的遭遇后，你对危险培养出了第二直觉。你可以在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{侦察} 探索活动的同时，进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{避人耳目}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{调查} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索} 探索活动。当你进行侦察时，你赋予的先攻加值为 +2 而非 +1。

After countless unexpected encounters you've developed a second sense for danger. You can perform the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{Scout} exploration activity at the same time as the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} exploration activity. The bonus to initiative you grant when you Scout is +2 instead of +1.

Command Tactics.name: 指挥战术 Command Tactics
Command Tactics.description:
你是一位娴熟的领袖。每当一名盟友在其尝试 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert} 时选择你作为目标，你使其技能检定获得的环境加值额外增加 +1；如果你的熟练等级达到大师或更高，则额外增加 +2（即专家总计 +3，大师总计 +5，传奇总计 +6）。

You're a skilled leader. Whenever an ally selects you as the target of their attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}, you increase the circumstance bonus they receive to their skill check by an additional +1, or an additional +2 if you have master proficiency or higher (for a total of +3 for expert, +5 for master, and +6 for legendary).

Quick Disguise.name: 迅速易容 Quick Disguise
Quick Disguise.description: 你只需要正常时间的十分之一就能完成易容（通常为1分钟）。若你在欺骗技能上的熟练度达到大师，你可以用3动作的行动完成全套易容并@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{乔装 Impersonate}；若达到传奇，只需1个动作。

Advantageous Assault.name: 趁势突击 Advantageous Assault
Advantageous Assault.description:
当你的敌人虚弱时，你便乘胜追击。当你使用近战或远程武器成功对带有 frightened 或 persistent bleed 状况的生物进行 Strike 时，你在伤害掷骰上获得等同于此次 Strike 所用武器的武器伤害骰数量的情境加值。

When your foe is weak, you press on. When you successfully Strike a creature that has the frightened or persistent bleed condition with a melee or ranged weapon, you gain a circumstance bonus to the damage roll equal to the number of weapon damage dice of the weapon used for the Strike.

Multiverse Magic.name: 多元宇宙魔法 Multiverse Magic
Multiverse Magic.description:
你的悖论本质使你能够接触到与你的施法传统无关的魔法。你的法术 repertoire 中可以有一个法术（不是你悖论法术列表上的法术）不属于你的施法传统。在你选择此专长时选择这个法术。你可以将该法术作为你施法传统的法术来施放，且它会成为你的招牌法术。当你获得等级时，你可以更换所选的法术。

Your paradoxical nature has given you access to magic that isn't associated with your spellcasting tradition. You can have one spell in your spell repertoire (not one on your paradox's spell list) that isn't from your spellcasting tradition. Select this spell when you select this feat. You can cast that spell as a spell of your spellcasting tradition, and it becomes a signature spell. You can change the spell you choose when you gain a level.

Vent Gas.name: 排放气体 Vent Gas
Vent Gas.description:
频率 每小时一次

你喷出气体推动自己前进。@Template[type:emanation|distance:5] 内的所有方格都充满气体。气体中的所有生物都变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，而气体外的所有生物对于气体内的生物而言也变为隐蔽。该气体在你下一回合开始时消散。

直到你下一回合开始时，你的所有速度获得+10尺环境加值。然后你进行Stride。

Frequency once per hour

You vent gas to propel yourself forward. All squares in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] become filled with gas. All creatures in the gas become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the gas become concealed to creatures within it. This gas disperses at the beginning of your next turn.

You gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to all your Speeds until the start of your next turn. Then you Stride.

Iomedae's Helm.name: 艾奥梅黛之盔 Iomedae's Helm
Iomedae's Helm.description:
你触碰一个邻近的盟友；该盟友因未能通过一次意志豁免而受到一个具有心灵特征的法术或其他魔法效果影响，且其持续时间不超过1分钟。该盟友可以立刻针对该效果的DC尝试一次意志豁免，成功则结束该状态。此举无法结束除你的目标盟友之外任何生物身上的该效果。无论此次豁免结果如何，你的盟友都会在10分钟内暂时免疫艾奥梅黛之盔。

You touch an adjacent ally who is affected by a spell or other magical effect with the mental trait due to failing a Will save and has a duration of no longer than 1 minute. That ally can immediately attempt a Will save against the effect's DC, ending the condition on a success. This can't end the effect for any creatures other than your target ally. Regardless of the result of the save, your ally is temporarily immune to Iomedae's Helm for 10 minutes.

Drift Blink.name: 漂流域闪现 Drift Blink
Drift Blink.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发条件 一名敌人的 Strike 将会命中你，且你此前对该敌人并非 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}，也并非未被该敌人察觉。

你会短暂滑入漂流域，从而针对该次触发的 Strike 变为隐蔽。如果隐蔽的平检失败，则该次 Strike 未命中你。结算完该次触发的 Strike 后，你会从漂流域重新出现于与你原本方格相邻的一个未被占据空间内。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger An enemy's Strike would hit you, and you weren't already @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, or undetected to that enemy.

You momentarily slip into the Drift, becoming concealed against the triggering Strike. If the flat check for concealment fails, the Strike misses you. After resolving the triggering Strike, you reemerge from the Drift in an unoccupied space adjacent to your original square.

Battle Cry.name: 战吼 Battle Cry
Battle Cry.description: 在骰先攻时，你能够以自由动作发出震耳欲聋的战吼，对一个可见敌人[[/act demoralize]]。若你在威吓技能上的熟练度达到传奇，你在攻击检定大成功时能够以反应动作@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}。

Long-Legged.name: 长腿的 Long-Legged
Long-Legged.description:
你稳健的步伐天性结合了你天生的身高和长腿，使你拥有格外令人印象深刻的步幅。你的速度增加 5 尺。

Your sure-footed nature combines with your natural height and long legs to give you an exceptionally impressive stride. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

Management Material.name: 管理材料 Management Material
Management Material.description:
任何与你谈论工作、职场或办公室技能的人，都会认为你是该环境中的专业人士，除非你有意以不同的身份示人。你可以使用 [[/act make-an-impression]]{社群} 对专业人士 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}，或者冒充某一类专业人士或某个特定的专业人士。如果你在这些情况下使用通常所需的技能，则你改为在该检定中获得+1环境加值。

Anyone who speaks with you about a job, workplace, or office skill set assumes you're a professional in that setting unless you intentionally present yourself differently. You can use [[/act make-an-impression]]{Society} to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on a professional or to Impersonate a type of professional or a specific individual professional. If you use the normally required skills in those situations, you receive a +1 circumstance bonus to the check instead.

Hardy Transplant.name: 坚韧移植 Hardy Transplant
Hardy Transplant.description:
你是个势不可挡的移植者，已经适应并能在与卡斯卓韦茂密森林截然不同的严酷环境中茁壮生存。你始终视为已适应一颗行星的环境，并且你总是只承受来自环境效果的一半伤害，例如寒冷、高温或腐蚀性大气造成的伤害。

You're an unstoppable transplant who has adapted to thrive in brutal environments vastly different from the lush forests of Castrovel. You always count as adapted to a planet's environment, and you always take half damage from environmental effects such as from cold, heat, or corrosive atmospheres.

Menacing Growl.name: 威吓咆哮 Menacing Growl
Menacing Growl.description:
需求 30尺内有一个生物具有恐惧状态。

你对30尺内的一个生物凶狠地咆哮，以龇露的牙齿威吓对方。使其恐惧状态的值提高1（最多为3）。然后，目标在24小时内暂时免疫你的威吓咆哮。

只要目标处于恐惧状态，你对该生物进行近战打击时获得+1环境加值，且你的近战打击对该生物造成的伤害每个伤害骰额外造成 @Damage[1[mental]] 伤害。

Requirements A creature within 30 feet has the frightened condition.

You snarl ferociously at a creature within 30 feet, menacing them with bared teeth. Increase the value of the frightened condition by 1 (maximum 3). The target then becomes temporarily immune to your Menacing Snarl for 24 hours.

As long as the target is frightened, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to melee Strikes against that creature, and damage dealt to the creature by your melee Strikes deals an additional @Damage[1[mental]] damage per damage die.

Attuned Wards.name: 谐调守护罩 Attuned Wards
Attuned Wards.description:
你将自己对恒星之力的掌控延伸出去，以惩罚你的敌人。用一次攻击命中你的生物会根据你的调谐承受相应后果。

引力子调谐 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续 1 轮。若这是它在本回合中第二次命中你，则改为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}。

光子调谐 该生物受到等同于你等级一半的持续火焰伤害。

You extend your control of stellar forces to punish your foes. Creatures that hit you with an attack suffer consequences based on your attunement.

Graviton-Attuned The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. This increases to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} if this is the second time it hit you this turn.

Photon-Attuned The creature takes persistent fire damage equal to half your level.

Skilled Bodyguard.name: 熟练保镖 Skilled Bodyguard
Skilled Bodyguard.description:
你那庞大的体格与灵巧的肢体极其有用，能确保你让体型较小的盟友远离伤害。你可将若干个自愿且与你相邻、体型比你小的生物，各自朝你选择的一个方向移动至多 5 英尺；你能移动的生物数量等于你当前空着的手的数量（包括你未激活的那对手）。这视为强制移动（意味着你不能将目标移动到危险地形中，或移动到他们无法占据的空间内）。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} 技能专长，你可以使用 Skilled Bodyguard 来移动任意体型的生物。

Your bulk and dexterous limbs are incredibly useful for ensuring that you keep your smaller allies out of harm's way. You move a number of willing, adjacent creatures that are smaller than you up to 5 feet each in a direction of your choice; the number of creatures you can move is equal to the number of unoccupied hands you currently have (including your inactive pair of hands). This counts as forced movement (meaning you cannot move a target into hazardous terrain or a space they cannot occupy).

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} skill feat, you can use Skilled Bodyguard to move a creature of any size.

Stunt Work.name: 特技工作 Stunt Work
Stunt Work.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你将要进行一次豁免检定。

你曾为观众表演过无数危险特技和炫目把戏，而你那不可思议的好运似乎总能让你安然无恙。对于此次触发的豁免检定，你可以掷两次并取较好的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're about to roll a saving throw.

You've performed countless risky stunts and flashy tricks for an audience, and your uncanny luck always seems to keep you safe. For the triggering saving throw, you can roll twice and take the better result.

Distant Flare.name: 远方闪焰 Distant Flare
Distant Flare.description:
你的专注让你能将你的太阳耀斑射得更远。你的太阳耀斑的射程增量增加 15 英尺。

Your concentration lets you fire your solar flare even further. Increase the range increment of your solar flare by 15 feet.

Smooth Diversions.name: 巧妙消遣 Smooth Diversions
Smooth Diversions.description:
你擅长迅速而巧妙地转移注意力的艺术。每当你成功尝试 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{虚张声势制造声东击西} 时，你都可以立刻以自由动作 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 或跨步。

此外，只有当你严重失败于虚张声势制造声东击西时，生物才会意识到你在试图欺骗它们。否则，该生物会认为你的佯动只是你一贯虚张声势的一部分。

You're practiced in the art of diverting attention quickly and subtly. When you succeed at an attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, you can immediately @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} or Step as a free action.

Additionally, creatures only become aware you were trying to trick them if you critically fail to Create a Diversion. Otherwise the creature assumes that your diversion was part of your regular bravado.

Range Sniper.name: 远程狙击手 Range Sniper
Range Sniper.description:
你受过训练，能够从远处与敌人交战，并利用你敏锐的视力来提高自己的精准度。你将攻击超出首个射程增量时的减值降低 1，最低为 0。若你处于真空中，则你将攻击超出首个射程增量时的减值改为降低 2，最低为 0。

此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.K2wMNyK4JGwgrjVL]{调整射击路线} 动作。

You've trained to engage your foes from afar and leverage your keen vision to improve your accuracy. You reduce the penalty for attacking beyond your first range increment by 1, to a minimum of 0. If you're in a vacuum, you instead reduce the penalty for attacking beyond your first range increment by 2, to a minimum of 0.

In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.K2wMNyK4JGwgrjVL]{Line Up the Shot} action.

Trek the Frigid Wastes.name: 跋涉寒霜荒原 Trek the Frigid Wastes
Trek the Frigid Wastes.description:
你已经花费了许多漫长岁月穿行于拉约克的地表，在一座座城市之间迁徙，或是猎取食物与资源。你早已习惯在湿滑的冰原上移动，并在深雪中艰难前行。当你在极地地形的冰面或雪地上移动时，你总是获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SB7cMECVtE06kByk]{掩盖踪迹}动作的好处，而无需使用该活动，也不必以一半速度移动。你不将冰面地形视为不平整地面（尽管对你而言它仍然是困难地形），并且你忽略由积雪造成的困难地形。

You've spent many long years traversing Lajok's surface, moving from city to city or hunting for food and resources. You're accustomed to moving across slippery ice sheets and plowing through deep snow. When moving over ice or snow in arctic terrain, you always gain the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SB7cMECVtE06kByk]{Cover Tracks} action without needing to use the activity or having to move half your Speed. You don't treat icy terrain as uneven ground (though it's still difficult terrain for you), and you ignore difficult terrain caused by snow.

Network Shield.name: 网络护盾 Network Shield
Network Shield.description:
触发条件 你被一次攻击命中。

你将自身活力网络的能量凝聚成一道护盾。触发此次反应的攻击所造成的伤害改为先扣减你的活力网络的生命值，而非你的生命值，最多可代为承受相当于你等级两倍的伤害。在你的活力网络生命值降至 0 后，任何剩余伤害则改为由你承受。

Trigger You're hit by an attack.

You condense the energy of your vitality network into a shield. The triggering attack reduces your vitality network's Hit Points instead of your own, up to twice your level. Any remaining damage after your Vitality Network is reduced to 0 Hit Points is dealt to you instead.

Digestive Spray.name: 消化喷雾 Digestive Spray
Digestive Spray.description:
频率 每天一次

你强迫自己的身体产生过量的强效腐蚀性消化酶，并可将其喷洒成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]，造成 @Damage[7d6[acid]] 伤害（对你的职业 DC 或法术 DC 中较高者进行 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 基础豁免）。在此次反射豁免中严重失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

Frequency once per day

You force your body to produce an excess of powerful corrosive digestive enzymes that you can use to spray in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], dealing @Damage[7d6[acid]] damage (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC). A creature that gets a critical failure on this Reflex save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Nomad's Guard.name: 游牧者的守卫 Nomad's Guard
Nomad's Guard.description:
你学会了一种由绍布哈德拳击手和战士练习的技巧，用来抵挡拳头和刀刃的打击。只要你至少有一只空闲手（包括未活动的手），你的徒手拳击攻击便获得格挡特征。

You have learned a technique practiced by shobhad boxers and warriors to fend off strikes from fists and blades. As long as you have at least one free hand (including an inactive hand), your fist unarmed attack gains the parry trait.

Conceal Spell.name: 匿藏法术 Conceal Spell
Conceal Spell.description:
凭借纯粹的精神努力，你可以将施放法术所需的咒语与手势简化，使其几乎难以察觉。如果你接下来使用的动作是施放法术，则该法术获得晦匿（特征），将原本通常会暴露你正在施法的发光符文、魔法火花以及其他显现隐藏起来。该特征只会隐藏该法术的施法动作与显现，而不会隐藏其效果，因此观察者仍可能看见一道射线从你身上飞射而出，或看见你凭空消失。

Through sheer mental effort, you can simplify the incantations and gestures needed to spellcast, leaving them barely noticeable. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell, the spell gains the subtle trait, hiding the shining runes, sparks of magic, and other manifestations that would usually give away your spellcasting. The trait hides only the spell's spellcasting actions and manifestations, not its effects, so an observer might still see a ray streak out from you or see you vanish into thin air.

Pahtra Lore.name: 帕赫特拉学识 Pahtra Lore
Pahtra Lore.description:
你精通传统与现代帕赫特拉表演艺术。你获得特技和表演的受训熟练等级。如果你本会自动在这些技能中的一项上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。

你还获得用于帕赫特拉知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外知识} 通用专长。

You're an expert in both the traditional and modern pahtra performing arts. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Acrobatics and Performance. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Pahtra Lore.

Psychic Bully.name: 灵能霸凌者 Psychic Bully
Psychic Bully.description:
你可以利用你的心灵感应能力影响他人的心智，传达命令或煽动恐惧。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aIHY2DArKFweIrpf]{Command} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear} 作为1环天赋异能秘奥法术施放。你每天可以将这些天赋异能秘奥法术中的每一种各施放一次。

You can leverage your telepathic abilities to influence the minds of others, imparting orders or inflaming fears. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aIHY2DArKFweIrpf]{Command} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear} as 1st-rank occult innate spells. You can cast each of these occult innate spells once per day.

Flatten Body.name: 压平身体 Flatten Body
Flatten Body.description:
你可以将身体完全压平，以避免受伤。你可以通过蜷伏下来，将变形和卧倒视为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{寻找掩护}。由于获得了更高程度的掩护，你可以进行隐匿和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}，并且在你潜行时不会失去寻找掩护的益处。

You can flatten your body completely to avoid getting hurt. Change Shape and Drop Prone to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} by hunkering down. You can Hide and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} due to the greater cover and don't lose the benefits of Take Cover when you Sneak.

Buoy.name: 浮标 Buoy
Buoy.description:
触发条件 60英尺内的一名盟友的意志豁免检定失败。

你在盟友需要之时高声鼓励或打出鼓励手势，振奋其精神并坚定其意志。你的盟友重掷触发此次反应的检定，但必须使用新的结果，即使结果更差也是如此。若你高声呼喊，Buoy获得听觉特征。若你打出手势，Buoy获得视觉特征。

Trigger An ally within 60 feet fails a Will saving throw.

You shout or sign encouragement to an ally in their time of need, buoying their spirits and hardening their resolve. Your ally rerolls the triggering check but must use the new result, even if it's worse. If you shout, Buoy gains the auditory trait. If you sign, Buoy gains the visual trait.

Shoving Shot.name: 猛推射击 Shoving Shot
Shoving Shot.description:
需求 你正持用一把区域或自动武器。

你利用武器的爆发力将对手向后推开。你进行区域射击或自动射击。你的主要目标必须尝试一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:soldier|options:forced-movement] 豁免。

失败 目标被向后推 10 尺。若使用的是区域（爆发）武器，目标会被从爆发的中心点推开。

大失败 同失败，但目标被推 15 尺。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

You use the blast of your weapon to push back your adversaries. You Area Fire or Auto-Fire. Your primary target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:soldier|options:forced-movement] save against your class DC.

Failure The target is pushed back 10 feet. If using an area (burst) weapon, the target is pushed away from the burst's center point.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is pushed 15 feet.

Determined Optimist.name: 坚定的乐观主义者 Determined Optimist
Determined Optimist.description:
即使一切看似毫无希望，你也拒绝放弃或向绝望屈服。你在对抗情绪和恐惧效果的豁免检定中获得+1情境加值。若你在对抗情绪或恐惧效果的豁免检定中掷得成功，则改为获得大成功。

特殊 若你拥有专长 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ZiyExMCbCKHwgbzh]{Heightened Paranoia}，则不能选择此专长。

You refuse to give up or give in to despair, even when all seems hopeless. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion and fear effects. If you roll a success on a saving throw against an emotion or fear effect, you get a critical success instead.

Special You can't select this feat if you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ZiyExMCbCKHwgbzh]{Heightened Paranoia} feat.

Overkill.name: 超限伤害 Overkill
Overkill.description:
有时，没有什么比用集中的火力压制一个倒霉的敌人更能确保成功了。当你用区域射击或自动射击对一个生物施加@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{压制}，且你的攻击区域内只有这一个生物时，或者当你使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.6AMH5DfG2cSz1tY0]{集中射击}时，目标受到@Damage[1d10[persistent,bleed]]伤害。若你以主要目标打击对其造成重击，则该伤害提高为@Damage[2d10[persistent,bleed]]伤害。

Sometimes there's no better way to assure success than to pin a hapless enemy with concentrated firepower. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppress} a creature with Area Fire or Auto-Fire and only one creature was in the area of your attack, or when you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.6AMH5DfG2cSz1tY0]{Concentrated Shot}, the target takes @Damage[1d10[persistent,bleed]] damage. If you critically hit it with your primary target Strike, this increases to @Damage[2d10[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Electromagnetic Whiskers.name: 电磁胡须 Electromagnetic Whiskers
Electromagnetic Whiskers.description:
你已将自己胡须的敏感度磨炼到足以感知潜在敌人所发出的微弱电场运动的程度。你获得电磁感应，作为一种范围为15英尺的不精确感官。电磁感应使你能够察觉附近的活体生物和科技生物，但在电磁辐射过强的环境中，例如宇宙飞船的引擎室内或强无线电波源附近，你可能必须使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{寻找}动作，才能发现一个未被察觉的生物。

You've honed your whiskers' sensitivity to the degree that you can sense the movement of the weak electric fields emitted by potential enemies. You gain electromagnetic sense as an imprecise sense out to 15 feet. Electromagnetic sense allows you to detect nearby living and technological creatures, but you might have to use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action to find an undetected creature in an environment with too much electromagnetic radiation, such as inside the engine room of a spaceship or near a powerful source of radio waves.

Hellknight Dedication.name: 地狱骑士入门 Hellknight Dedication
Hellknight Dedication.description:
你那炼狱般的面容令人闻风丧胆。你的威吓获得专家熟练（如果你在威吓上已是专家，则改为你自选一个你已受训的其他技能获得专家熟练）。你获得轻甲和中甲的受训熟练。若你已具有轻甲和中甲的受训熟练，则你也获得重甲的受训熟练。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在任一种护甲上获得专家或更高熟练（但不包括无甲防御）时，你也会在此专长赋予你的护甲类型上获得同等熟练。你获得该护甲的护甲专精效果以及1个额外的护甲升级。你从该护甲专精获得的抗性（或对重击的减伤）比通常高1，且你在威吓检定上获得等于1 + 你护甲韧性值的物品加值。

地狱骑士团

地狱骑士团团派典范炼狱伤害与抗性
锁链骑士团惩戒违法者电击
熔炉骑士团考验文明寒冷
日蚀骑士团管控危险信息虚空
焚烧骑士团以火清除颠覆性媒体火焰

Your infernal countenance is a scourge. You gain expert proficiency in Intimidation (or in another skill in which you're trained of your choice if you were already an expert in Intimidation). You become trained in light armor and medium armor. If you already were trained in light armor and medium armor, you gain training in heavy armor as well. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in any type of armor (but not unarmored defense), you also gain that proficiency in the armor types granted to you by this feat. You gain the armor specialization effects of that armor and one additional armor upgrade. Your resistance (or reduction from critical hits) from that armor's specialization is 1 higher than normal and you gain an item bonus to Intimidation checks equal to 1 + your armor's resilience value.

Hellknight Orders

Hellknight OrderEdictsInfernal Damage and Resistance
Order of the Chainpunish lawbreakerselectricity
Order of the Crucibletest civilizationscold
Order of the Eclipsecontrol dangerous informationvoid
Order of the Pyrepurge subversive media with firefire

Cosmic Alignment.name: 太空阵营 Cosmic Alignment
Cosmic Alignment.description:
你与太空循环达成了真正的协调。你将永久处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}状态。你只能将你的额外动作用于调谐，或使用你的太阳耀焰或太阳武器进行一次打击。

You reach true alignment with the cosmic cycle. You're permanently @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}. You can use your extra action only to Attune or make a Strike with your solar flare or solar weapon.

Advanced Warp.name: 先进型扭曲 Advanced Warp
Advanced Warp.description:
你的悖论开始在你的人生中逐渐稳固。你获得你的悖论的先进扭曲法术。

Your paradox begins to cement itself across your life. You gain the advanced warp spell for your paradox.

Inner Wellspring.name: 内在泉源 Inner Wellspring
Inner Wellspring.description:
频率 每天一次

当你必须忍受极度的压力与痛苦时，你会深入挖掘自己，汲取你那已失落的祖先母星戈拉里昂的记忆或故事，激发内在储备的力量，再创造一次奇迹。你恢复1点专注点。

Frequency once per day

When you must endure times of extreme stress and pain, you dig deep and draw on the memories or stories of your lost ancestral home world of Golarion, tapping into inner reserves of power to pull off just one more miracle. You regain 1 Focus Point.

Persistent Quantum Field.name: 持续性量子场 Persistent Quantum Field
Persistent Quantum Field.description:
频率 每天一次

你可以创造一个稳定的量子场。你以持续时间为 1 分钟进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{扭曲现实}。

Frequency once per day

You can create a stable quantum field. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality} with a duration of 1 minute.

Punitive Strike.name: 惩戒打击 Punitive Strike
Punitive Strike.description:
触发条件 你触及范围内的一个生物进行了操纵动作、进行了远程打击、使用了移动动作，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开了一个方格。

你的敌人防御上的瞬间疏漏给了你一个可乘之机。对触发该条件的生物进行一次近战打击，此次打击无视你所持用的任何武器上的笨重（特征）。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。

Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action, makes a ranged Strike, uses a move action, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

Your foe's momentary lapse in defense gives you an opening Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature, ignoring the unwieldy trait on any weapons you're wielding for this Strike. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Moodscales.name: 情绪量表 Moodscales
Moodscales.description:
你的鳞片会自动变色，以匹配你当前的情绪状态。这具有与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.VYtnxv13EtkyggD4]{Moodskin} 植入体相同的效果，不过它不算作植入体，也不计入你的植入体上限。当你选择此专长时，你可以决定每种情绪分别对应哪些颜色。你对自身情绪的敏锐觉察使你在对抗情绪效果的豁免检定中获得 +1 状况加值。如果你在对抗情绪效果的豁免检定中获得成功，则改为获得大成功。

Your scales automatically change color to match your current temperament. This has the same effect as a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.VYtnxv13EtkyggD4]{Moodskin} augmentation, though it doesn't count as an augmentation and doesn't count toward your implant limit. When you select this feat, you can decide which colors correspond to each mood. Your keen awareness of your mood grants you a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion effects. If you roll a success on a saving throw against an emotion effect, you get a critical success instead.

Kill Shot.name: 击杀射击 Kill Shot
Kill Shot.description:
需求 你正持用一把枪。

你小心瞄准目标，开枪夺命。你先进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对你的目标进行一次远程打击。若此次攻击成功（但非重度成功），你造成最大伤害。计算该伤害时，视同你本应掷出的每个骰子都掷出了最大结果。若为重度成功，则照常掷出结果；但如果伤害加倍后的结果仍低于普通成功时的最大伤害结果，则改为使用成功时的最大伤害结果。

如果你花费了3个动作，且你的攻击为重度成功，则你造成最大伤害，并如常将该结果的伤害加倍。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You take careful aim at your mark and shoot to kill. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make a ranged Strike against your mark. If this attack is a success (but not a critical success), you deal maximum damage. Calculate this damage as if every die you would roll has a maximum result. On a critical success, roll the result normally, but if the double damage would be less than the result of a maximum damage on a normal success, use the maximum damage on the success instead.

If you spent 3 actions and your attack was a critical success, then you deal maximum damage and double the damage of that result as normal.

Vlaka Lore.name: 弗拉卡学识 Vlaka Lore
Vlaka Lore.description:
你努力让族人的传统与故事得以延续，哪怕你也在建立新的社群并缔结新的联盟。你在外交和社群中获得受训熟练等级。若你本会自动在这些技能之一上获得受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则改为在你自选的一项技能上获得受训。

你还会获得用于弗拉卡学识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 通用专长。

You strive to keep the traditions and stories of your people alive, even as you build new communities and forge new alliances. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Diplomacy and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Vlaka Lore.

Basic Warp Spell.name: 基础扭曲法术 Basic Warp Spell
Basic Warp Spell.description:
你获得你的悖论的初始扭曲法术。若你还没有，你也获得一个包含 1 点专注点的专注池，你可以通过沉思无数世界来进行重新专注。（关于扭曲法术的更多内容，见第 165 页。）

You gain your paradox's initial warp spell. If you don't already have one, you also gain a focus pool of 1 Focus Point, which you can Refocus by contemplating infinite worlds. (For more on warp spells, see page 165.)

Kip Up.name: 鲤鱼打挺 Kip Up
Kip Up.description: 你从倒地状态起身。这个移动不会触发反应。

Shobhad Ferocity.name: 肖布哈德凶暴 Shobhad Ferocity
Shobhad Ferocity.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你将被降至 0 生命值，但不会立即死亡。

在一颗残酷无情的星球上生活了数个世纪，使许多肖巴德获得了即使身受重创也要存活下去的坚决意志。你避免陷入昏迷，并以 1 点生命值维持清醒，且你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤} 状况增加 1。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points, but not immediately killed.

Centuries of living on a brutal and unforgiving planet has endowed many shobhad with an implacable will to survive despite debilitating injuries. You avoid being knocked out and remain at 1 Hit Point, and your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} condition increases by 1.

Grasping Tendrils.name: 攫握触须 Grasping Tendrils
Grasping Tendrils.description:
你已让更多触须与肢体适应了复杂的肌肉组织和细胞结构，提升了关节活动能力与精细动作技巧。你的手臂数量增加两条。任何时候，你的一对手都被指定为你的主动手。你可以通过执行“切换手部”动作来将这一指定从一对手变更为另一对手，该动作是单动作。你只能用你的主动手持握物品。

特殊 你可以多次选取此专长。

You've adapted more of your tendrils and limbs with complex musculature and cellular structures, improving articulation and fine motor skills. Increase your number of arms by two. At any time, one pair of your hands is designated as your active hands. You can change this designation from one pair of hands to another by taking the Switch Hands action, which is a single action. You can only wield items with your active hands.

Special You can take this feat multiple times.

Peek.name: 偷看 Peek
Peek.description:
你射击后迅速闪避，以避免反击和流弹。进行一次远程打击，然后 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩护}。

You shoot and then duck out of the way to avoid retaliation and errant gunfire. Make a ranged Strike, then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}.

Pirate's Parry.name: 海盗招架 Pirate's Parry
Pirate's Parry.description:
触发 一名相邻敌人试图对你进行一次近战打击。

需求 你正持握一把枪械，以及一把具有灵巧特征的近战武器或一把相位弯刀。

你用近战武器招架此次触发的打击，使你对该攻击的 AC 获得 +2 处境加值。若此次触发的打击重度失败，你可以尝试对触发该效果的生物进行一次远程打击。此次远程打击不会触发目标的反应。

Trigger An adjacent enemy attempts a melee Strike against you.

Requirements You are wielding a gun and a melee weapon with the agile trait or a phase cutlass.

You parry the triggering Strike with your melee weapon, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC against the attack. If the triggering Strike is a critical failure, you may attempt a ranged Strike against the triggering creature. This ranged Strike does not trigger reactions from the target.

Group Coercion.name: 集体胁迫 Group Coercion
Group Coercion.description:
即使他人并非孤立无援，你也可以对其有效地进行暴力威慑。当你采取@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{胁迫 Coerce}行动时，你可以将威吓检定结果与至多5个目标的意志DC相比较，而非一个目标。

对于每个目标，取得的成功程度可能不尽相同。若你在威吓技能上的熟练度达到专家，你用一个动作可胁迫的目标数量提高到10个；若达到大师，提高到25个；若达到传奇，提高到50个。

Masterful Imitation.name: 精湛模仿 Masterful Imitation
Masterful Imitation.description:
你对某些生物已有足够深入的研究，因此你能够变形成它们。如果你在可用于辨识某一类生物的一个学识技能上达到大师熟练度，你可以使用变形将自己的外貌变为该类别中一个小型或中型生物的样子。

You've studied certain creatures enough that you can transform into them. If you are a master in a Lore skill that can be used to identify a category of creatures, you can use Change Shape to transform your appearance to that of a Small or Medium creature of that category.

Radiant Bond.name: 辉耀链接 Radiant Bond
Radiant Bond.description:
当你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{转移活力}时，你可以选择任意数量的已缔结盟友作为转移目标，但你能够转移的生命值总最大数值不会增加。

When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality}, you can select any number of bonded allies to transfer to, though the total maximum number of Hit Points you can transfer doesn't increase.

Death Blossom.name: 死亡绽放 Death Blossom
Death Blossom.description:
需求 你正持用一把装满弹匣的区域或自动武器。

你原地旋转，漫无差别地开火，将房间彻底清空。你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击}（即使使用的是自动武器也是如此），影响你周围一个散发区域内的每个生物，其半径等于该武器的射程，并耗尽该武器的整个弹匣。由于倾泻而下的火力具有灾难性的威势，区域内的生物对此次攻击进行反射豁免时承受 –1 情境减值。你无需为此次攻击指定主要目标。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon with a full magazine.

Spinning in place, you fire indiscriminately to completely clear out the room. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} (even if using an automatic weapon), affecting each creature in an emanation around you with a radius equal to the range of the weapon, expending the weapon's entire magazine. Creatures in the area take a –1 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves against this attack due to the cataclysmic nature of the raining fire. You don't designate a primary target with this attack.

Fast Synergy.name: 快速协同 Fast Synergy
Fast Synergy.description:
人们愿意追随你的领导，因为你帮助他们发挥出自身的终极潜能。你的每个盟友若在其回合开始时位于你100英尺内且能够察觉到你，便获得一个额外的反应。这个额外反应只能用于执行你发出的训令。

People follow your lead because you help push them to their ultimate potential. Each of your allies gain a second reaction if they start their turn within 100 feet of you and can perceive you. This second reaction can only be used for directives you issue.

Accelerated Step.name: 加速步伐 Accelerated Step
Accelerated Step.description:
你可以吸收周围的太阳辐射与电磁辐射，将其转化为推动身体更快前进的动能。你的速度提高 5 英尺。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.P95mzZ3VV40cXbx5]{光速} 动作。

You can absorb the solar and electromagnetic radiation in your surroundings, transforming it into kinetic energy that propels your body faster. Your Speeds increase by 5 feet. In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.P95mzZ3VV40cXbx5]{Light Speed} action.

Push It.name: 突破其极 Push It
Push It.description:
每当你在一次驾驶检定中成功时，你所驾驶的载具在你的回合结束前，其所有速度获得+10英尺的境况加值。若你获得大成功，此加值改为+15英尺。

Whenever you succeed at a Piloting check, the vehicle you're piloting gains a +10-foot circumstance bonus to all its Speeds until the end of your turn. If you critically succeed, this bonus increases to +15 feet.

Defy Gravity.name: 抗拒重力 Defy Gravity
Defy Gravity.description:
你打破了重力的束缚。当你处于引力子调谐时，你获得等同于你速度的飞行速度。

You break the bonds of gravity. While graviton-attuned, you gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

Line 'em Up.name: 排成一线 Line 'em Up
Line 'em Up.description:
Requirements 你正持用一把枪。

你射出一发穿过多个敌人的巧妙射击。用你的枪对你第一距离增量内的一个目标进行一次远程打击。将此次攻击应用于你与目标之间呈一直线的所有生物。此次攻击无视这些目标彼此提供的任何轻度掩护。伤害只掷一次，并将其应用于你命中的每个生物。Line 'Em Up在计算你的多重攻击减值时视为两次攻击。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You fire a single trick shot that passes through multiple foes. Make a ranged Strike with your gun against a target within your first range increment. Apply this attack against all creatures in a straight line between you and your target. This attack ignores any lesser cover the targets would provide one another. Roll damage only once, and apply it to each creature you hit. Line 'Em Up counts as two attacks for your multiple attack penalty.

Cellular Adaptation.name: 细胞适应 Cellular Adaptation
Cellular Adaptation.description:
你身体的可塑性会减轻肉体疾病的影响。你在对抗疾病、毒素和辐射的豁免检定中获得+1处境加值。若你在对抗这些效果之一的豁免检定中获得成功，则改为获得大成功。

The malleable nature of your body dulls the impact of physical ailments. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against diseases, poisons, and radiation. If you roll a success on a saving throw against one of these effects, you get a critical success instead.

Arcane Recall.name: 奥术回想 Arcane Recall
Arcane Recall.description:
频率 每天一次

你的训练增强了你对魔法的记忆，法术会在你的脑海中萦绕不去。你可以施放一个你今天已经施放过的法术，而无需消耗法术位。

Frequency once per day

Your training has enhanced your memory for magic, and spells linger in your mind. You can cast one spell you've already cast today without expending a spell slot.

Master Mystic Spellcasting.name: 秘学者大师施法 Master Mystic Spellcasting
Master Mystic Spellcasting.description:
你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#master-spellcasting-feat]{宗师施法} 的益处。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#master-spellcasting-feat]{Master Spellcasting} benefits.

Prismatic Display.name: 棱彩展示 Prismatic Display
Prismatic Display.description:
你迅速改变皮肤的颜色，以扰乱周围生物的感官。对近战触及范围内所有生物的感知 DC 进行一次 @Check[deception|against:perception] 检定。若成功，该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，直到你的回合结束（若大成功，则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}）。无论你的检定结果如何，随后每个生物都会在 10 分钟内暂时免疫“棱彩展示”。

You rapidly shift the colors of your skin to throw off the senses of those around you. Attempt a @Check[deception|against:perception] check against the Perception DCs of all creatures within melee reach. On a success, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the end of your turn (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} on a critical success). Regardless of the result of your check, each creature is then temporarily immune to Prismatic Display for 10 minutes.

Nimbus Ward.name: 云幕结界 Nimbus Ward
Nimbus Ward.description:
触发 你将因一次攻击、法术或其他效果而受到伤害。

需求 你察觉到触发效果，且未处于措手不及状态。

你引导自己的日冕星辉来保护自己免受伤害。你获得等于你等级一半的抗性（向上取整），持续至你下个回合开始时。你在使用此动作时，根据你当前的调谐状态选择抗性的类型。

只有在满足需求且触发条件发生时，你才能将Nimbus Ward作为反应使用，但即使未满足需求或未发生触发条件，你仍可以将其作为一个单动作活动来使用。

引力子调谐 你的抗性可以是以下任一种伤害类型：钝击、力场、穿刺或挥砍。

光子调谐 你的抗性可以是以下任一种能量伤害类型：强酸、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波。

Trigger You would be damage by an attack, spell, or other effect.

Requirements You're aware of the triggering effect and not offguard.

You harness your solar nimbus to protect yourself from harm. You gain resistance equal to half your level (rounded up) until the start of your next turn. You choose the type of resistance when you use this action, depending on your current attunement.

You can use Nimbus Ward as a reaction only when the requirements and trigger are met, but you can use it as a 1-action activity without the requirements or trigger being met.

Graviton-Attuned Your resistance can be one of the following types of damage: bludgeoning, force, piercing, or slashing.

Photon-Attuned Your resistance can be one of the following types of energy damage: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic.

Oddity Identification.name: 辨别异象 Oddity Identification
Oddity Identification.description: 当你发现一个魔法效果或目睹法术被施放时，你可以立即知道它是否会影响心智（具有心灵特征）、扭转运势（具有幸运或厄运特征）、洞悉秘密（具有侦测、预测、揭示或探知特征）。根据GM的判断，类似效果也可能算作这些类型。在[[/act identify-magic skill=occultism]]或[[/act recall-knowledge skill=occultism]]以了解关于这些效果的更多信息时，你可以始终使用神秘技能而无需承受减值，并获得+2环境加值。

Dual Aim.name: 双重瞄准 Dual Aim
Dual Aim.description:
你的神射手技巧有所提升。你现在可以同时拥有两个标记，而不是一个。当你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}时，你可以选择两个标记，而不是一个。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.SjauZALDFxxkSNbl]{效果：双重瞄准}

Your sharpshooter skills improve. You can have two marks at a time instead of one. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim}, you can select two marks, rather than one.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.SjauZALDFxxkSNbl]{Effect: Dual Aim}

Crew Member.name: 船员 Crew Member
Crew Member.description:
触发条件 30英尺内的一名盟友尝试进行援助且掷出了失败。

你总能在紧要关头帮上忙。进行一次与你盟友所尝试的同类型技能检定或攻击检定，并以你的结果替代失败的援助结果，即使你没有事先准备提供帮助也可以。

Trigger An ally within 30 feet attempts to Aid and rolls a failure.

You're always able to help in a pinch. Attempt a skill check or attack roll of the same type attempted by your ally and replace the result of the failed Aid with your result, even if you didn't prepare to help.

Solar Shield.name: 太阳护盾 Solar Shield
Solar Shield.description:
你开发出一种新的星辰显化——一面环绕着你运转的微型恒星能量护盾。这个能量护盾具有调谐和星辉武者特征，且不需要手来使用。你可以举起护盾，使你获得 AC +1 的环境加值，直到你下个回合开始。你获得通用专长“护盾格挡”。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.q5W7fV1wXvqBFxt8]{效果：太阳护盾}

当护盾举起时，你可以用你的护盾使用护盾格挡反应。该护盾的生命值等于 5 + 你的等级两倍，坚固值等于你等级的一半，向上取整。你的护盾不会损坏，但如果它被摧毁，你在 10 分钟内无法显化新的护盾。如果你的护盾因你失去调谐而消失，那么当你调谐以使其重新成形时，护盾会以上一次拥有的生命值返回。护盾会在你每日准备期间，以及每当你休息至少 10 分钟时，恢复所有失去的生命值，即使它已经被摧毁也是如此。

引力子调谐 如果你的护盾被摧毁，它会释放出一道冲击波。相邻敌人必须成功通过一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 豁免，否则便会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 1 轮（若重度失败则为 2 轮）。

光子调谐 如果你的护盾被摧毁，它会释放出一道闪光。相邻敌人必须成功通过一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 豁免，否则便会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮（若重度失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1 轮）。

You've developed a new solar manifestation—a small shield of stellar energy that orbits you. This energy shield has the attuned and solarian traits and doesn't require a hand to use. You can Raise a Shield, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn. You gain the Shield Block general feat.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.q5W7fV1wXvqBFxt8]{Effect: Solar Shield}

While the shield is raised, you can use the Shield Block reaction with your shield. The shield has Hit Points equal to 5 plus twice your level and Hardness equal to half your level, rounded up. Your shield can't be broken, but if it's destroyed, you can't manifest a new shield for 10 minutes. If your shield vanishes due to you losing attunement, when you Attune to reform it, the shield returns with however many Hit Points it previously had. The shield regains all its lost Hit Points during your daily preparations and whenever you rest for at least 10 minutes, even if it's been destroyed.

Graviton-Attuned If your shield is destroyed, it releases a shock wave. Adjacent enemies must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} for 1 round (2 rounds on a critical failure).

Photon-Attuned If your shield is destroyed, it releases a flash of light. Adjacent enemies must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round on a critical failure).

Ride the River Between.name: 乘上星间之河 Ride the River Between
Ride the River Between.description:
你将力量延伸穿越太空，与星间之河建立连接，并夺取其太阳洪流的一段碎片，使战场沐浴在金色光辉与太阳能量之中。这股来自星间之河的细流会形成一条 @Template[type:line|distance:100]、直径为10英尺、起始于你所处方格的区域，并持续1分钟。星河一旦形成，你可以移动到星河内的任意方格（此次移动不会触发反应）。该区域为明亮光照，且在萨瑟蝶人使用其能量之翼时，视为真空环境。在你施展“驾驭星间之河”时位于该区域内的非萨瑟蝶人，或之后进入该区域的非萨瑟蝶人，必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，持续1轮（若重度失败则为1分钟）。受此能力影响的生物会在24小时内暂时免疫。此次豁免的DC等于你的法术DC或职业DC中较高者。

Reaching across space, you connect with the River Between and seize a fragment of its solar stream, inundating the battlefield in golden light and solar energy. This trickle of the River Between fills a @Template[type:line|distance:100] that is 10 feet in diameter, starts from your square, and remains for 1 minute. Once the river forms, you can move to any square within the river (this movement does not trigger reactions). The area is bright light and counts as a vacuum for the purposes of a sarcesian using their energy wings. Non-sarcesians in the area when you use Ride the River Between, or who later enter the area, must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round (1 minute on a critical failure). Creatures affected by this ability are temporarily immune for 24 hours. The DC of this save is equal to the higher of your spell DC or class DC.

Seedpod Lure.name: 种荚诱饵 Seedpod Lure
Seedpod Lure.description:
你会长出一个漂浮的次级种荚，可用来欺骗其他生物。你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{声东击西} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻} 时获得 +1 情境加值。每 10 分钟一次，你可以用一个移动动作部署这个诱饵。它会保持部署状态 1 分钟，或直到你将其撤销。任何以你为目标进行攻击的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:5]；若失败，该生物会改为命中种荚诱饵而不是你，并将其摧毁。休息 10 分钟后，会长出一个新的。

You grow a floating secondary seedpod you can use to fool other creatures. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint}. Once every 10 minutes, you can deploy this lure as a move action. It remains deployed for 1 minute or until you Dismiss it. Any creature targeting you with an attack must attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5]; on a failure, the creature hits the seedpod lure instead of you, destroying it. A new one grows after 10 minutes of rest.

Armor Ace.name: 护甲专家 Armor Ace
Armor Ace.description:
你已经通过反复尝试和痛苦的失误，学会了如何最大限度地利用你的护甲，偏转爆炸和类似效果造成的伤害。穿戴护甲时，你可以使其获得壁垒特征，直到你将其卸下。当你穿着本就具有壁垒特征的护甲时，该护甲为你对抗伤害性效果的反射豁免提供的调整值提升至 +4，而非 +3。

You've learned through trial and painful error how to make the most out of your armor, deflecting damage from explosions and similar effects. When donning armor, you can grant it the bulwark trait until you remove it. When you're wearing armor that already has the bulwark trait, increase the modifier to Reflex saves to avoid damaging effects granted by that armor to +4, rather than +3.

Subtle Theft.name: 妙手空空 Subtle Theft
Subtle Theft.description: 当你成功@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k]{盗窃 Steal}某件物品时，旁观者（除了你盗窃对象以外的其它生物）在侦测你的偷窃行为的察觉DC上受到-2环境减值。此外，如果你在无踪状态下先用欺骗技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，然后执行一次@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ijZ0DDFpMkWqaShd]{Palm an Object}或盗窃行动，你的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}状态不会因此而终止。

Sturdy Vine.name: 坚韧藤蔓 Sturdy Vine
Sturdy Vine.description:
你长出了一根粗壮的藤蔓，可以用它来重击敌人。你获得一种藤蔓无武装攻击，它属于搏击武器组，造成 1d6 钝击伤害，并具有 khizar、横扫、绊摔和无武装特征。

You've grown a stout vine that you can use to bludgeon enemies. You gain a vine unarmed attack, which is in the brawling weapon group, deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage, and has the khizar, sweep, trip, and unarmed traits.

Inner Peace.name: 内心平和 Inner Peace
Inner Peace.description:
你从不失去冷静。每当你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝} 状态时，你立即将该状态的值降低 1。每当你将要获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{混乱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{操控} 状态时，你可以尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:16]。若成功，你不会获得混乱或操控状态。

You never lose your cool. When you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}, you immediately reduce the value of the condition by 1. When you would gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition, you can attempt a @Check[flat|dc:16]. On a success, you don't get the confused or controlled condition.

Grandmother's Lore.name: 祖母的知识 Grandmother's Lore
Grandmother's Lore.description:
你追随老鼠婆的教诲，并且为了得到自己想要的东西，不惧说谎、欺骗或偷窃。由于你额外的虔诚，你获得欺瞒和盗窃的受训熟练等级。如果你本会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你自选的一项技能上成为受训。

你获得用于老鼠婆学识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 通用专长。

You follow Lao Shu Po's teachings and aren't afraid to lie, cheat, or steal to get what you desire. Thanks to your extra devotion, you gain the trained proficiency rank in Deception and Thievery. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Lao Shu Po Lore.

Unified Theory.name: 统一法论 Unified Theory
Unified Theory.description:
你理解四大魔法传统与魔法精华的共同基础。每当你使用一项技能动作或技能专长，且其要求根据魔法传统进行一次自然、神秘学或宗教检定时，你都可以改为使用奥秘学。如果你通常会因将奥秘学用于其他魔法而承受减值或具有更高的DC（例如使用鉴定魔法时），你不再承受该减值或提高后的DC。

You understand the common underpinnings of the four traditions of magic and magical essences. Whenever you use a skill action or a skill feat that requires a Nature, Occultism, or Religion check, depending on the magic tradition, you can use Arcana instead. If you would normally take a penalty or have a higher DC for using Arcana on other magic (such as when using Identify Magic), you no longer do so.

Scramble Tech.name: 扰乱科技 Scramble Tech
Scramble Tech.description:
凭借一个念头，你可以用一种短暂存在的病毒感染一个科技生物或装置，使该物体发生故障并失灵。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rBh2PjtbDGAjbcu6]{放电术} 作为一个3环神圣天生法术每天施放两次。

With a thought, you can infect a technological creature or device with a short-lived virus, causing the object to glitch and malfunction. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rBh2PjtbDGAjbcu6]{Discharge} as a 3rd-rank divine innate spell twice per day.

History Buff.name: 历史通 History Buff
History Buff.description:
你已编录了无数的习俗、历史与传统。你每天可以将超认知施放一次，作为一个3阶天赋异能灵能法术。当你施放 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition} 时，进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时，你可以用你为“历史学家”所选择的学识技能的调整值，替代任何其他技能调整值。

You've cataloged countless customs, histories, and traditions. You can cast hypercognition once per day as a 3rd-rank occult innate spell. You can use your modifier for the Lore skill you chose for Historian in place of any other skill modifier when attempting a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check while casting @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition}.

Energy Deflection.name: 能量偏斥 Energy Deflection
Energy Deflection.description:
触发 你成为一次远程攻击的目标，且该攻击将造成至少一种你以“能量护盾”所选定的伤害类型。

需求 你察觉到此次攻击，且对此攻击你不处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态。

你利用萦绕在身体上的魔法能量来对抗类似的有害攻击。你对触发此次反应的攻击获得 AC 的 +2 情境加值。

Trigger You are the target of a ranged attack that would deal at least one type of damage you selected with Energy Shielding.

Requirements You're aware of the attack and are not @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against it.

You leverage the magical energy clinging to your body to counter similar harmful attacks. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

Fluid Anatomy.name: 流体解剖学 Fluid Anatomy
Fluid Anatomy.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 敌人以一次Strike对你造成重击。

你的身体构造会调整，将伤害从要害部位分散开来。触发此次能力的攻击只造成其命中时本应造成的伤害（通常为正常伤害而非双倍伤害）。该攻击因重击而产生的任何其他效果仍然照常发生，例如重击专精效果。直到你的下个回合开始时，你对触发此次能力的敌人处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger An enemy scores a critical hit against you with a Strike.

Your anatomy adjusts to distribute damage from vital areas. The triggering attack deals only the damage it would deal on a hit (typically normal damage instead of double damage). Any other effects of the attack caused by a critical hit still occur, such as critical specializations effects. Until the beginning of your next turn, you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the triggering enemy.

Canny Acumen.name: 审时度势 Canny Acumen
Canny Acumen.description: 你躲避危险的能力和观察力让大多数同僚相形见绌。选择强韧豁免、反射豁免、意志豁免或察觉。你在所选能力上的熟练度变为专家。达到17级时，所选能力的熟练度变为大师。

Xenoarchaeologist Dedication.name: 异星考古学家奉献 Xenoarchaeologist Dedication
Xenoarchaeologist Dedication.description:
你成为社群和巧手方面的专家，并且当你以调查作为你的探索活动时，在进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}检定和深究传承检定时获得+1处境加值。

你获得关于深究传承的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外知识}泛用专长，你可以用它来回忆有关具有考古意义地点，以及古代历史、遗物、语言和族群的知识。获得这项技能时，为你的深究传承检定选择智力或感知作为关键属性。此选择为永久选择，之后无法更改。

You become an expert in Society and Thievery and gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks and Delve Lore checks when using Investigate as your exploration activity.

You gain the@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{ Additional Lore} general feat in Delve Lore, which you can use to Recall Knowledge about sites of archaeological significance, and about ancient history, relics, languages, and peoples. Upon gaining this skill, choose either Intelligence or Wisdom as the key attribute for your Delve Lore checks. This choice is permanent and can't be changed later.

Divine Bond.name: 神圣羁绊 Divine Bond
Divine Bond.description:
作为一位神祇的门徒，你运用其部分神圣力量。你在与该神祇相关的已列出神圣技能上成为受训，并将已列出的牧师法术作为特征法术加入你的法术列表和法术 repertory。若你已在该已列出神圣技能上受训，则改为在你自选的另一项技能上成为受训。你会受到该神祇禁忌的约束，并能够接受该神祇的神力祝佑。

As a disciple of a god, you wield some of their divine power. You become trained in the listed divine skill associated with the deity and add the listed cleric spells to your spell list and spell repertoire as signature spells. If you were already trained in the listed divine skill, you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You become bound by that deity's anathema and can receive that deity's divine sanctification.

Size Up.name: 估量身量 Size Up
Size Up.description:
频率 每小时一次

你花费1分钟观察一个特定个体、10分钟在信息圈上调查一个特定个体，或1小时建立人脉并收集信息。该对象成为你的资产。如果你通过观察来评估你的资产，你不需要知道其身份；但如果你通过调查或建立人脉来评估你的资产，你必须知道其身份，这至少需要关于对方的两条相关信息。相关信息的例子包括其姓名、出生地、当前居所、其父母或重要伴侣的姓名、其雇主，或其所属组织。GM会根据你所选定的资产，判定哪些内容可构成本用途下的相关信息。

你对你的资产进行或与其相关的 Deception、Diplomacy、Intimidation 和 Perception 检定获得+1环境加值，且尝试对你的资产 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 时获得+1环境加值。

当你对一项资产使用单动作的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} 时，你获得双动作 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} 的好处。

你可以维持数量等同于你魅力调整值的资产。如果在那之后你对其他资产使用 Size Up，你的新资产会替换掉之前的一项资产。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RBWwGxsrxPBKi3X7]{效果：Size Up}

Frequency once per hour

You spend 1 minute observing a specific individual, 10 minutes researching a specific individual on the infosphere, or 1 hour networking and gathering information. This subject is your asset. If you assess your asset via observation, you don't need to know their identity, but if you assess your asset via research or networking, you must know their identity, which requires at least two relevant pieces of information about them. Examples of relevant information could include their name, their place of origin, their current residence, the name of their parent or significant other, their employer, or their organizational affiliation. The GM determines what constitutes relevant information for this purpose, based on the asset you've selected.

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Perception checks against or in relation to your asset, and a +1 circumstance bonus to attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about your asset.

You gain the benefits of the 2-action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} when using 1-action Get 'Em! on an asset.

You can maintain a number of assets equal to your Charisma modifier. If you Size Up other assets after that, your new asset replaces a previous one.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RBWwGxsrxPBKi3X7]{Effect: Size Up}

Crushing Fists.name: 碎击拳 Crushing Fists
Crushing Fists.description:
你的拳头是格外有效的武器。你的拳头徒手攻击的伤害骰提升至 d6，并获得擒抱武器特性。

Your fists are exceptionally effective weapons. The damage die for your fist unarmed attack increases to a d6 and it gains the grapple weapon trait.

Ultimate Spacefarer.name: 终极太空旅者 Ultimate Spacefarer
Ultimate Spacefarer.description:
你能够在太空的真空中无限期生存。当你维持悬息时，你免疫吸入类威胁。此外，只要你使用悬息，你就不需要进食或饮水。每天一次，以一个自由动作，你可以在有大气的环境中悬息并获得这些好处，持续1分钟。

You're capable of surviving in the void of space indefinitely. While you maintain suspended respiration, you are immune to inhaled threats. Additionally, as long as you use suspended respiration, you don't need to eat or drink. Once per day as a free action, you can suspend respiration in atmosphere with these benefits for 1 minute.

Dance!.name: 跳舞！ Dance!
Dance!.description:
你通过瞄准敌人的腿、翅膀或其他移动部位，迫使敌人避开你的攻击，从而让他们更容易被你周旋。当你用你的某次攻击对一个目标施加@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{压制}时，该目标还会变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到其回合开始。

此外，当你以锥形区域进行自动射击且仅影响单一目标时，该目标对该次自动射击攻击进行的反射豁免会承受 –1 情境减值。

You compel enemies to avoid your attacks by aiming at their legs, wings, or other forms of movement to make them easier to outmaneuver. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppress} a target with one of your attacks, it also becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of its turn.

In addition, when Auto-Firing in a cone that affects only a single target, that target takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves against the Auto-Fire attack.

Predatory.name: 掠食性 Predatory
Predatory.description:
战斗如同舞蹈，而你已将自己的身体磨练成一件既精妙又致命的器械。当你选择此专长时，你获得爪击无武装攻击或颚击无武装攻击中的一种。这两种攻击都属于搏击武器组。

爪击无武装攻击造成 1d6 点挥砍伤害，并具有灵巧、灵动、帕赫特拉和无武装特征。

颚击无武装攻击造成 1d6 点穿刺伤害，并具有灵动、擒抱、帕赫特拉和无武装特征。

在 5 级时，每当你用这些攻击之一造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

特殊 你可以第二次选择此专长。若你这样做，则从以上选项中选择另一种攻击。

Battle is a dance, and you've honed your body into an instrument as exquisite as it is deadly. When you select this feat, you gain your choice of a claw unarmed attack or a jaws unarmed attack. Both of these attacks are in the brawling weapon group.
