A claw unarmed attack deals 1d6 slashing damage and has the agile, finesse, pahtra, and unarmed traits.

A jaws unarmed attack deals 1d6 piercing damage and has the finesse, grapple, pahtra, and unarmed traits.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these attacks, you get its critical specialization effect.

Special You can take this feat a second time. If you do, select the other attack from the options above.

Compact Predator.name: 袖珍掠食者 Compact Predator
Compact Predator.description:
你也许身形娇小，但你的身体本身就是危险的武器，可能长有修长的利爪、锋利如剃刀的牙齿，或弯曲的角。选择此专长时，你获得以下一种攻击供你选择：爪击无武装攻击、角击无武装攻击，或颚击无武装攻击。这些攻击属于搏斗武器组。

  • 爪击无武装攻击造成1d6点挥砍伤害，并具有灵巧、娴熟、异客蜥人和无武装特征。
  • 角击无武装攻击造成1d6点钝击伤害，并具有缴械、异客蜥人、推撞和无武装特征。
  • 颚击无武装攻击造成1d6点穿刺伤害，并具有擒抱、异客蜥人和无武装特征。

在5级时，每当你用这些攻击之一造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

特殊 你至多可以选择此专长三次。每次选择时，都要从上述选项中选择一种不同的攻击。

You may be small, but your body is a dangerous weapon, sporting either long talons, razor-sharp teeth, or curving horns. When you select this feat, you gain your choice of a claw unarmed attack, a horn unarmed attack, or a jaws unarmed attack. These attacks are in the brawling weapon group.

  • A claw unarmed attack deals 1d6 slashing damage and has the agile, finesse, ikeshti, and unarmed traits.
  • A horn unarmed attack deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and has the disarm, ikeshti, shove, and unarmed traits.
  • A jaws unarmed attack deals 1d6 piercing damage and has the grapple, ikeshti, and unarmed traits.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these attacks, you get its critical specialization effect.

Special You can take this feat up to three times. Each time you do, select a different attack from the options above.

Multi-Stemmed.name: 多茎的 Multi-Stemmed
Multi-Stemmed.description:
你的身体有两个主要的“躯干”，其中一个在本质上已经与另一个分化。选择一个你尚未拥有的奇扎尔传承；你获得该传承及其益处。

Your body has two primary "trunks," one of which has diverged in nature from the other. Choose one khizar heritage that you don't already have; you gain that heritage and its benefits.

Sense Life.name: 感知生命 Sense Life
Sense Life.description:
你能够察觉生物的生命本质。你获得生命感知，作为一种范围为30尺的不精确感官。这意味着你能够感知范围内活体生物和不死生物的生命本质。你能够分辨驱动活体生物的活力能量与驱动不死生物的虚空能量，就如同视觉能够分辨颜色一般。

You can detect the vital essence of creatures. You gain lifesense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet. This means you can sense the vital essence of living and undead creatures within range. You can distinguish between the vitality energy animating living creatures and the void energy animating undead creatures, much as sight distinguishes colors.

Phreaker.name: 骇客 Phreaker
Phreaker.description:
你学会了如何使用替代方法进行黑入。你可以使用计算机，通过任何计算机、通讯装置或终端来停用装置或黑入系统，而不必使用黑入工具包。如果你在计算机上是专家，且你所使用的装备至少为3级，你在停用装置或黑入时获得+1物品加值。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.abcKcLvAGE5AKig4]{Combat Hack} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{Digital Diversion} 技能专长，你可以使用此专长来进行战斗黑入或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}，而无需黑入工具包。

You've learned how to hack using alternative methods. You can use Computers to Disable a Device or Hack a system using any computer, comm unit, or terminal instead of a hacking toolkit. If you're an expert in Computers and the equipment you use is at least 3rd level, you gain a +1 item bonus to Disable a Device or Hack.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.abcKcLvAGE5AKig4]{Combat Hack} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{Digital Diversion} skill feat, you can use this feat to Combat Hack or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} without a hacking toolkit.

Adopted Ancestry.name: 异族情谊 Adopted Ancestry
Adopted Ancestry.description: 你深谙另一个族裔的文化和传统，其原因可能是你在这个族裔当中出生并长大成人、或者与其成员有深交或恋情。选择一个常见族裔或另一个你有许可的族裔。除了角色本身族裔的专长之外，你还可以从所选族裔的族裔专长列表中选取专长，前提是你不缺少这些专长需要用到的生理特征，具体由GM定夺。

Spirit's Protection.name: 灵体防护 Spirit's Protection
Spirit's Protection.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你的一次豁免检定失败。

在承受巨大压力的时刻，你仍能感受到你已故伴侣心跳的闪烁，与自己的心跳同频共振，引导你趋向安全，或稳固你的心智以抵御侵袭。他们的灵魂依然从坟墓之外守护着你。你可以重掷此次触发的豁免检定，并采用较好的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail a saving throw.

In times of great stress, you can still feel the flickers of your deceased partner's heartbeat pounding in time with yours, steering you to safety or girding your mind from assault. Their spirit still protects you from beyond the grave. You can reroll the triggering saving throw and use the better result.

Twitching Muscles.name: 抽搐的肌肉 Twitching Muscles
Twitching Muscles.description:
当你死亡时，你的肌肉与肌腱比生前更加紧密地纠结在一起，使你的动作能得到更严密的控制并更加迅速。你的地面速度获得+5英尺状态加值。

When you died, your muscles and sinew knotted themselves together more tightly than when you were alive, allowing for more tightly controlled and rapid movements. You gain a +5-foot status bonus to your land Speed.

Synthetic Speech.name: 合成语音 Synthetic Speech
Synthetic Speech.description:
你每天可以将与计算机交谈作为一个4环奥术先天法术施放一次。

You can cast speak with computers once per day as a 4th-rank arcane innate spell.

Kasathan Weapon Familiarity.name: 卡萨坦武器熟悉 Kasathan Weapon Familiarity
Kasathan Weapon Familiarity.description:
你对近战战斗怀有敬意，并且你已训练自己在战斗中运用几种更为优雅的武器。你获得所有具有卡萨斯人特征的非常见武器的使用权限。你熟悉具有卡萨斯人特征的武器，以及决斗剑、等离子剑、电击警棍和鸣歌长矛——就熟练项而言，你将其中任何属于军用武器的视为简易武器，将任何属于先进武器的视为军用武器。

在5级时，每当你用这些武器之一造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

You have a respect for melee combat, and you've trained to wield a few more elegant examples in battle. You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the kasatha trait. You have familiarity with weapons with the kasatha trait plus the dueling sword, plasma sword, shock truncheon, and singing spear—for the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you get its critical specialization effect.

Pickpocket.name: 扒手 Pickpocket
Pickpocket.description: 你可以对被密切看管的物品使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k]{盗窃 Steal}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ijZ0DDFpMkWqaShd]{手上功夫 Palm an Object}，比如放在口袋里的东西，而无需承受正常的-5减值。你无法盗窃非常显眼或需要费时除下的东西（比如正被穿戴的鞋子或护甲，或者正在被积极持用的物品）。若你在贼活技能上的熟练度达到大师，你可以尝试在战斗中或其它类似的保持戒备的生物身上盗窃东西。如此做的时候，盗窃需要2个动作而非1个，并且你需要承受-5减值。

Ancestral Weapon Familiarity.name: 祖传武器熟悉 Ancestral Weapon Familiarity
Ancestral Weapon Familiarity.description:
你学会了如何使用另一族裔的传统武器。你获得与所选族裔或传承相关联的武器熟悉专长，即使你并非该族裔或传承的成员。你可以像自己是该族裔或传承的成员一样，选择将该专长列为前提条件的族裔专长。选择时，除了族裔或传承以外，你必须满足该专长的所有前提条件。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长，每次选择不同的族裔或专长。

You've learned how to use the traditional weapons of another ancestry. You gain the weapon familiarity feat associated with a chosen ancestry or heritage, even if you are not a member of that ancestry or heritage. You can select ancestry feats that include that feat as a prerequisite as if you were a member of that ancestry or heritage. You must meet all feats' prerequisites when chosen other than the ancestry or heritage.

Special You can select this feat multiple times, choosing a different ancestry or feat each time.

Basic Quantum Field.name: 基础量子场 Basic Quantum Field
Basic Quantum Field.description:
你的量子场获得你所选悖论的效果。

Your quantum field gains the effect of your chosen paradox.

Shield Block.name: 盾牌格挡 Shield Block
Shield Block.description:
触发 你已举起盾牌，并将要受到攻击造成的物理伤害（钝击、穿刺或挥砍）。

你眼疾手快地调整盾牌位置，接下一次猛击。你的盾牌为你减免等于盾牌硬度的伤害值。你和盾牌均会受到其余的伤害，这可能导致盾牌破损或被摧毁。

Rip, Tear.name: 撕裂，眼泪圣物 Rip, Tear
Rip, Tear.description:
你的头骨板或牙齿随着时间推移变得更加锋利，或者你曾精心将它们打磨到在战斗中使用时能造成最大伤害。你的徒手颚击攻击现在在成功命中时会造成 1d6 持续流血伤害（重击时加倍）。如果你的武器伤害提高，你的流血伤害骰子数量也会以相同幅度增加。

Your skull plates or teeth have grown sharper over time, or you have painstakingly carved them to do maximum damage when using them in combat. Your unarmed jaws attack now inflicts 1d6 persistent bleed damage on a successful hit (double on a critical hit). If your weapon damage ever increases, the number of dice for your bleed damage also increases by the same amount.

Death's Advance.name: 死亡逼近 Death's Advance
Death's Advance.description:
2 或 3

你那经由魔法保存的尸体能够冲破障碍，并以生者无法做到的方式无视负担。移动两次；如果你花费了 3 个动作来使用“死亡推进”，则移动三次。在此次移动期间，你无视困难地形和重度困难地形。每天一次，当你使用“死亡推进”时，你可以选择无视所有对你速度的境况减值和状态减值。

2 or 3

Your magically preserved corpse can plow through obstacles and ignore strain in ways the living cannot. Stride twice, or three times if you spent 3 actions to Death's Advance. During this movement, you ignore difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain. Once per day, you can choose to ignore all circumstance and status penalties to your Speed when you use Death's Advance.

Dishonored Contrarian.name: 不受尊重的唱反调者 Dishonored Contrarian
Dishonored Contrarian.description:
当处境变得艰难时，坚韧之人会竭尽全力去建立更好的生活——字面意义上也是如此。你的弗拉卡同胞或许心怀希望、梦想与无尽的乐观，但你一向更难看到光明的一面，而为了活下去，你也做过一些不太光彩的事。无论你曾说谎、欺骗、偷窃，还是夺走过一些生命，你都知道，在这个冰冷无情的银河中，你做了生存与兴盛所必需的一切。你在以下技能中自选一项，成为受训：欺瞒、威吓或盗窃。若你选择欺瞒，则获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.HEBXaS656MZTiWFu]{Lengthy Diversion} 技能专长。若你选择威吓，则获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.gUqvezs2zzoTXFAI]{Group Coercion} 技能专长。若你选择盗窃，则获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.hVZbnsDuXihggylt]{Subtle Theft} 技能专长。

When the going gets tough, the tough fight tooth and nail to build a better life—literally. Your fellow vlakas might carry hope, dreams, and unending optimism in their hearts, but you've always found it harder to look on the bright side, and you've done some dubious things to get by. Whether you've lied, cheated, stolen, or taken some lives, you know that you did what it took to survive and thrive in a cold and callous galaxy. You become trained in one of the following skills of your choice: Deception, Intimidation, or Thievery. If you select Deception, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.HEBXaS656MZTiWFu]{Lengthy Diversion} skill feat. If you select Intimidation, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.gUqvezs2zzoTXFAI]{Group Coercion} skill feat. If you select Thievery, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.hVZbnsDuXihggylt]{Subtle Theft} skill feat.

Resonant Weapon.name: 谐振武器 Resonant Weapon
Resonant Weapon.description:
你将一股灵性能量释放到你正持握的一件武器中，使其与非实体的灵魂物质产生共鸣。直到你下个回合开始时，你的武器获得幽灵杀手武器融合的效果。17级时，它额外造成 1d6 灵魂伤害。

You release a pulse of spiritual energy into one weapon you're holding, making it resonate with immaterial soul stuff. Until the beginning of your next turn, your weapon gains the effects of the ghost killer weapon fusion. At 17th level, it deals an additional 1d6 spirit damage.

Floating Flight.name: 漂浮飞行 Floating Flight
Floating Flight.description:
当你处于漂浮状态时，你四肢与躯干之间的膜状连结会变得足够强韧，能够像真正的翅膀一样发挥作用。当你处于低重力或零重力环境中时，你获得等同于你游泳速度的飞行速度。

The membranous webbing between your limbs and torso grows strong enough to function as true wings when you're floating. When you're in low or zero gravity, you gain a Fly speed equal to your Swim speed.

Statistical Anomaly.name: 统计异常 Statistical Anomaly
Statistical Anomaly.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你在一次豁免检定或技能检定中严重失败。

很难说你的运气究竟是非常好还是非常坏；或许还需要更多研究。重掷触发此次能力的检定或豁免，并使用第二次结果。如果触发此次能力的技能检定是用于深究学识，或触发此次能力的豁免检定是为了避免陷阱的效果，则此效果的频率变为每10分钟一次。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You critically fail a saving throw or skill check.

It's unclear whether your luck is very good or very bad; more research may be necessary. Reroll the triggering check or save and use the second result. If the triggering skill check is for Delve Lore or the triggering saving throw is to avoid a trap's effects, the frequency for this effect becomes once per 10 minutes.

Anchoring Impacts.name: 锚定冲击 Anchoring Impacts
Anchoring Impacts.description:
你的压制性攻击会将敌人钉在原地，使其移动速度无法快于匍匐前进。当你用自己的一次攻击使目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 时，在受压制状态的持续时间内，将其速度减值提高为 –20 尺状态减值。若施加受压制状态的效果是一次重击，或者目标在其豁免检定中大失败并陷入受压制，则该目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.5da0ZOocaoySCSJ2]{效果：锚定冲击}

Your suppressing attacks pin foes in place, preventing them from moving at more than a crawling pace. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppress} a target with one of your attacks, increase the speed penalty to a –20-foot status penalty for the duration of the suppressed condition. If the effect that imparted the suppressed condition was a critical hit, or the target critically fails its save and becomes suppressed, then the target also becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.5da0ZOocaoySCSJ2]{Effect: Anchoring Impacts}

Careful Strike.name: 谨慎打击 Careful Strike
Careful Strike.description:
你专注于你星辰武器的轨迹，使你能够在最后一刻之前调整它，并将一次未命中的攻击变成一次擦击。用你的太阳耀斑或星辰武器进行一次打击。它获得以下失败效果。

失败 你的攻击造成等同于你力量调整值的伤害。它不算作命中，也不会触发任何其他特殊能力。

You focus on your solar weapon's trajectory so you can adjust it up to the last possible moment and turn a missed attack into a glancing blow. Make a Strike with your solar flare or solar weapon. It gains the following failure effect.

Failure Your attack deals damage equal to your Strength modifier. It doesn't count as a hit and doesn't trigger any other special abilities.

Maximize Profits.name: 利润最大化 Maximize Profits
Maximize Profits.description:
你已经学会了将自己的潜在收益最大化。每当你在一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{赚取收入} 检定中本应失败时，你改为获得成功。

You've learned to maximize your potential earnings. Whenever you would fail an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income} check, you get a success instead.

Borrow Spell.name: 借用法术 Borrow Spell
Borrow Spell.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你使用了一个维持你的量子场的动作，且该量子场仍处于激活状态。

通过同时跨越时间与空间，你可以借用居于另一重现实中的某个自己所掌握的法术。在此次回合中，你可以施放一个法术而无需为此消耗法术位。该法术必须在你的法术 repertoire 中。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You use an action that Sustains your quantum field, and the quantum field is still active.

By reaching across both time and space, you can borrow the use of a spell from a version of yourself inhabiting another reality. During this turn, you can cast one spell without spending a spell slot to do so. The spell must be in your repertoire.

Seedpod Surveillance.name: 种荚监视 Seedpod Surveillance
Seedpod Surveillance.description:
每天一次，你可以用一个带有专注特征的单一动作部署你的种荚。以这种方式部署时，你的种荚最多可以离开你200英尺，且具有20英尺的飞行速度。移动种荚是一个自由动作，你每回合可以执行一次，并且你可以如同使用自己正常的感官一样，通过它感知四面八方。1分钟后，种荚以其正常速度直接返回你身边。

Once per day, you can deploy your seedpod as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. When deployed this way, your seedpod can travel up to 200 feet away from you, with a fly Speed of 20 feet. Moving the seedpod is a free action, which you can take once per turn, and you can sense through it in all directions as if using your normal senses. After 1 minute, the seedpod returns directly to you at its normal Speed.

Undead Slayer.name: 不死杀手 Undead Slayer
Undead Slayer.description:
你在战斗中运用自己关于不死生物的丰富知识。你对不死生物使用武器和徒手攻击造成伤害时，获得 +1 情境加值。若你的攻击本会造成超过一个武器伤害骰的伤害，则该加值等于武器伤害骰或徒手攻击伤害骰的数量。

此外，当你对一个你能看见的不死生物进行回忆知识检定并成功或大成功时，你会识破其防御中的弱点——在 1 分钟内，你获得所有武器和徒手攻击的重击专精效果，但仅适用于你对该特定生物进行的攻击。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.jtlZPjobJNXLol7S]{效果：不死生物杀手}

You leverage your extensive knowledge of undead during combat. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to damage with weapons and unarmed attacks against undead creatures. If your attack would deal more than one weapon die of damage, the bonus is equal to the number of weapon dice or unarmed attack dice.

Furthermore, when you succeed or critically succeed at a check to Recall Knowledge against an undead creature that you can see, you identify a weak spot in their defenses—for 1 minute, you gain access to the critical specialization effects of all weapons and unarmed attacks for attacks you make against that specific creature.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.jtlZPjobJNXLol7S]{Effect: Undead Slayer}

Vitality Network.name: 活力网络 Vitality Network
Vitality Network.description:
你获得一个拥有 10 生命值的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hNnIAyBxfQ2Howp2]{活力网络}，并且可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{转移活力} 来转移至多 10 HP。在 10 级、15 级和 20 级时，你的活力网络的最大容量提高 10。在 5 级、10 级、15 级和 20 级时，你可以转移的数量提高 5。

You gain a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hNnIAyBxfQ2Howp2]{Vitality Network} with 10 Hit Points and can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} to transfer up to 10 HP. Increase the maximum capacity of your vitality network by 10 at 10th, 15th, and 20th-level. Increase the amount you can transfer by 5 at 5th, 10th, 15th, and 20th-level.

Planetary Reincarnation.name: 行星转生 Planetary Reincarnation
Planetary Reincarnation.description:
你的结契世界会让你复苏。将回生术加入你的原始法术列表。当你位于结契行星上时，如果你施放 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life} 并将一名与你结契的成员作为目标，则可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} 来为目标恢复生命值。若你这么做，且目标同样遵循“行星结契”的典范与禁忌，则目标还会额外恢复等同于其等级的生命值（且不需要从你的活力网络中消耗任何生命值）。如果你位于结契行星上，那么当你将要死亡时，你可以对自己施放 回生术，即使你处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}。

Your bonded world revives you. Add breath of life to your primal spell list. While on a bonded planet, if you cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life} and target a member of your bond, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} to restore Hit Points to the target. If you do, the target regains additional Hit Points equal to their level (without spending any Hit Points from your vitality network), if they also follow the edicts and anathema of Planetary Bond. If you are on a bonded planet, you can cast breath of life on yourself when you would die, even if you are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}.

Prehensile Tail.name: 善抓巧尾 Prehensile Tail
Prehensile Tail.description:
你的尾巴如同一条额外的肢体。你可以用尾巴持握相当于一只手所能持有的额外装备，并且你可以用尾巴执行“交互”动作。就用“切换手部”动作指定你的活动手部而言，你的尾巴被视为一对手。

Your tail functions like an extra limb. You can hold one extra hand's worth of equipment with your tail, and you can use your tail to perform Interact actions. You tail is considered one pair of hands for the purposes of designating your active hands with the Switch Hands action.

Singularity.name: 纯一主义 Singularity
Singularity.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你处于引力子调谐状态。

你召唤出那终将毁灭万物、不可阻挡的太空之力的一丝碎片。你集中精神，在 60 英尺内显现出一个黑洞的针尖般中心。它占据一个 5 英尺的单格空间。处于该奇点空间内的生物受到 @Damage[(max((2*floor(@actor.level / 2) - 4),10))d8[void]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并以你的职业 DC 进行一次对抗你的 @Check[reflex|against:solarian|basic|options:area-effect] 基础豁免。任何因该效果降至 0 生命值的生物都会被撕裂并拖拽进奇点，不留任何遗骸。直到你的下一回合结束前，光无法穿过奇点所在空间及所有与其相邻的方格，使其笼罩在连具有黑暗视觉或高等黑暗视觉的生物也无法看穿的黑暗之中。任何在这片黑暗中开始其回合的生物，都必须以你的职业 DC 成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed] 基础豁免，否则在该回合中变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}。

等级（+2） 伤害增加 2d8。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You're graviton-attuned.

You call upon a shred of the unstoppable cosmic force that eventually destroys all things. You concentrate and manifest the pinpoint center of a black hole within 60 feet. This occupies a single 5-foot space. Creatures within the singularity's space take @Damage[(max((2*floor(@actor.level / 2) - 4),10))d8[void]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:solarian|basic|options:area-effect] save against your class DC. Any creature dropped to 0 Hit Points by this effect is torn asunder and pulled into the singularity, leaving no remains. Until the end of your next turn, light can't pass through the singularity's space and all adjacent squares, shrouding it in darkness that even creatures with darkvision or greater darkvision can't see through. Any creature that starts its turn in the darkness must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for that turn.

Level (+2) Increase the damage by 2d8.

Endlessly Adaptive.name: 无尽适应性 Endlessly Adaptive
Endlessly Adaptive.description:
你丰富多样的人生经历让你几乎能适应任何情况。当你通过适应天赋获得技能专长时，你会额外获得两个技能专长。此外，你可以花费 10 分钟进行规划，以适应当天的挑战。若你这么做，你可以如同进行了每日准备一样，重新选择通过适应天赋选定的专长。你不能替换掉那些你在当天已经使用过其有限次数能力的专长。

Your varied life experiences let you adapt to nearly any situation. When you gain skill feats using adaptive talent, you gain two additional skill feats. In addition, you can adapt to the day's challenges by spending 10 minutes to plan. If you do, you can reselect the feats chosen with adaptive talent as if you'd made your daily preparations. You can't trade out feats with limited-use abilities that you've already used that day.

Starfinder Field Agent Dedication.name: 《星际探索》战地特工奉献 Starfinder Field Agent Dedication
Starfinder Field Agent Dedication.description:
你是寻星者协会的一名受训特工。你成为协会事务的专家。你获得用于寻星者学识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长；如果你已经受训于寻星者学识，你还会在一项自选的学识技能上成为受训。

特殊 即使你尚未习得另外两个异种考古学家专长，只要你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.i5OwninARF668ud8]{Xenoarchaeologist Archetype Dedication} 专长，你仍然可以选择此专长。为了完成原型，异种考古学家原型专长视为寻星者战地特工专长，反之亦然。

You are a trained agent of the Starfinder Society. You become an expert in Society. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Starfinder Lore; if you were already trained in Starfinder Lore, you also become trained in a Lore skill of your choice.

Special You can take this feat if you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.i5OwninARF668ud8]{Xenoarchaeologist Archetype Dedication} feat even if you haven't taken two additional xenoarchaeologist feats. Xenoarchaeologist archetype feats count as Starfinder field agent feats, and vice-versa, for purposes of completing the archetypes.

Monster Crafting.name: 怪物取材 Monster Crafting
Monster Crafting.description:
利用怪物的身体部件，你可以让造物更有成效。在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制作 Craft}行动中，你可以用生存技能替代手艺技能，以怪物的身体部件辅助制作物品，若该怪物的身体部件具有价值，还可以将其用于支付物品的原材料成本（若怪物条目并未列出其身上有价值的素材，则由GM决定）。

若你为制作物品花费额外的天数，则在降低价格时使用怪物等级而非你自己的等级。某些物品可能会需要特定生物作为素材，见其制作需求。

Quick Install.name: 快速安装 Quick Install
Quick Install.description:
你只需 1 分钟即可安装升级件。如果你在制作上达到传奇熟练度，你可以以 3 动作活动来安装升级件。

You take only 1 minute to Install an Upgrade. If you're legendary in Crafting, you can Install an Upgrade as a 3-action activity.

Magical Savior.name: 魔法救世主 Magical Savior
Magical Savior.description:
到了紧要关头时，你完全愿意代替盟友牺牲自己的生命。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yHujiDQPdtXW797e]{灵魂链接}，作为一个3环神圣先天法术。你每天可以施放该法术一次。如果你对你的契约伙伴施放此法术，灵魂链接会升阶为4环，并且你可以将灵魂链接的射程提高至60尺，而非30尺。

When push comes to shove, you're more than willing to give your life in place of an ally's. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yHujiDQPdtXW797e]{Spirit Link} as a 3rd-rank divine innate spell. You can cast this spell once per day. If you cast this spell on your bonded partner, spirit link is heightened to 4th-rank and you can increase the range of spirit link to 60 feet, rather than 30 feet.

In Another Life.name: 在另一种人生中 In Another Life
In Another Life.description:
每当你休息时，你都会看到其他现实中的不同版本的自己。在你进行每日准备时，为你的族裔选择一个你满足其先决条件且尚未拥有的族裔专长。你获得该专长，直到你的下一次每日准备。

Whenever you rest, you behold different versions of yourself in other realities. During your daily preparations, select one ancestry feat for your ancestry that you meet the prerequisites for and don't already have. You gain that feat until your next daily preparations.

Drift-Touched.name: 漂流域之触 Drift-Touched
Drift-Touched.description:
频率 每天一次

你生来或在孕育期间便身处漂流域之中，超空间始终是你的一部分。你只需一念之间，便能攫取漂流域的一小块碎片，并暂时将其移植到战场上，形成一道由绚丽光芒构成的无形屏障。这片闪烁的力场会出现在30英尺内，笔直竖立，最长可延伸10英尺、最高可达10英尺。该屏障会为隔着它作为目标的生物提供隐蔽，并在两侧各照出10英尺的彩色明亮光照，以及接下来10英尺的微光。你可以无视该屏障所提供的任何隐蔽。该屏障持续5轮。

Frequency once per day

You were born or gestated inside the Drift, and hyperspace is always a part of you. With a thought, you seize a fragment of the Drift and temporarily transplant it onto the battlefield as an intangible barrier of colorful light. This shimmering field appears within 30 feet and is straight and vertical, stretching up to 10 feet long and 10 feet high. The barrier grants concealment to creatures targeted through it, and it sheds colorful bright light for 10 feet on each side and dim light for the next 10 feet. You can ignore any concealment granted by the barrier. The barrier lasts for 5 rounds.

Tactical Bond.name: 战术纽带 Tactical Bond
Tactical Bond.description:
你与已结契的伙伴学会了以身体相互保护，免受伤害。若你会为已结契的伙伴提供轻度掩护（包括当你的伙伴将你当作坐骑时），或你的已结契伙伴会为你提供轻度掩护，则改为提供标准掩护。

You and your bonded partner have learned to physically shield one another from harm. If you would grant lesser cover to your bonded partner (including when your partner is using you as a mount), or your bonded partner would grant lesser cover to you, standard cover is granted instead.

Enter Rivener State.name: 进入里维纳州 Enter Rivener State
Enter Rivener State.description:
你拥抱自己的愤怒，自愿进入一种受控的狂河者状态，并维持自己的心智能力。你的身体生长并膨胀，变为大型。你的装备会随你一同变大，但若被移除，则会恢复为其自然尺寸。你的触及增加 5 英尺，且你获得近战伤害 +2 状态加值。你变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。此次变形持续 10 分钟，或直到你选择以一个具有专注特征的单动作提前结束它。当你的变形结束时，你会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}，持续 10 分钟。

在 13 级和 17 级时，该伤害加值额外增加 2

You embrace your anger, willingly entering a controlled rivener state and maintaining your mental faculties. Your body grows and expands, becoming Large. Your equipment grows with you, but returns to its natural size if removed. Your reach increases by 5 feet, and you gain a +2 status bonus to melee damage. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}. This transformation lasts for 10 minutes, or until you choose to end it early as a single action that has the concentrate trait. When your transformation ends, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 10 minutes.

At 13th level and 17th level, the bonus damage increases by 2

Remote Access.name: 远程访问 Remote Access
Remote Access.description:
你知道如何像别人操作黑客工具包一样，轻而易举地用思维探查计算机系统。你可以与 10 英尺内的科技装置进行无线通信，使你无需用户界面或黑客工具包，便能对这些装置尝试进行计算机检定。若你已经能够在远程尝试计算机检定，则你可以这样做的距离额外增加 10 英尺。

You know how to probe computer systems with your mind as easily as others might handle a hacking toolkit. You can communicate wirelessly with technological devices within 10 feet, allowing you to attempt Computers checks on these devices without a user interface or hacking toolkit. If you can already attempt Computers checks at range, you increase the distance that you can do so by an additional 10 feet.

Sense Abnormalities.name: 感知异常 Sense Abnormalities
Sense Abnormalities.description:
你对周遭的魔法拥有一种不可思议的第六感。你能够感知魔法灵光的存在，如同你始终在施放一个1环的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法}法术。该能力只会在你的视野范围内侦测魔法。当你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}时，你会对所见之物获得一个3环侦测魔法法术的效果（除搜索的正常收益外）。你可以在自己回合开始或结束时用一个自由动作关闭或开启这种感知。

You possess an uncanny sixth sense for ambient magic. You can sense the presence of magic auras as though you were always using a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{Detect Magic} spell. This detects magic in your field of vision only. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, you gain the benefits of a 3rd-rank detect magic spell on things you see (in addition to the normal benefits of Seeking). You can turn this sense off and on with a free action at the start or the end of your turn.

Double Tap.name: 双重射击 Double Tap
Double Tap.description:
需求 你正持用一把枪械。

你迅速连续向同一目标开出两枪。你先@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对你的标记进行两次打击。照常应用多重攻击减值。若两次攻击都命中，则合并它们的伤害。你仅能将任何精准伤害加入一次，并由你选择加入到其中一次攻击。目标的抗性和弱点也只应用一次。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You fire two shots at the same target in quick succession. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make two Strikes against your mark. Apply the multiple attack penalty normally. If both attacks hit, combine their damage. You add any precision damage only once, to the attack of your choice. Apply the target's resistances and weaknesses only once.

Schooled in Secrets.name: 知晓秘印 Schooled in Secrets
Schooled in Secrets.description:
你能注意到神秘教团等秘密社群的成员用来向同僚表明身份的标志和徽记。在对这类群体[[/act gather-information skill=occultism]]{收集信息}，或者[[/act impersonate skill=occultism]]{乔装}成这类群体的成员时，你可以用神秘技能替代交涉和欺骗技能。

若你隶属于一个秘密教团、结社、教派，或类似的组织，你会自动认出你的同僚，除非他们特意尝试对你隐瞒自己的存在。他们也可以自动认出你的身份，除非你特意隐瞒。

Virtuosic Performer.name: 精湛演技 Virtuosic Performer
Virtuosic Performer.description:
你在某一种表演类型上拥有非凡的天赋。进行某一类表演时，你在进行该类型的表演检定时获得 +1 环境加值。若你的表演熟练度达到大师，此加值提升为 +2。选择以下专长之一，并在尝试该类型的表演检定时应用此加值。如果无法明确该专长是否适用，则由 GM 决定。

专长示例
表演戏剧、直播、真人秀
喜剧滑稽表演、讲笑话、单口喜剧
舞蹈芭蕾、交谊舞、即兴诠释舞、流行舞、传统舞
键盘乐器键tar、风琴、钢琴
朗诵史诗、颂诗、诗歌、讲故事
打击乐铃、编钟、架子鼓、木琴
歌唱民谣、吟唱、流行、摇滚、船歌
弦乐器吉他、击音线圈、特雷门琴
合成器合成器台、转盘
管乐器号角、长笛、管乐器

You have exceptional talent with one type of performance. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus when making a certain type of performance. If you are a master in Performance, this bonus increases to +2. Select one of the following specialties and apply the bonus when attempting Performance checks of that type. If it's unclear whether the specialty applies, the GM decides.

SpecialtyExamples
ActingDrama, live streams, reality shows
ComedyBuffoonery, joke telling, stand-up routines
DanceBallet, ballroom, interpretive, pop, traditional
KeyboardsKeytar, organ, piano
OratoryEpic, ode, poetry, storytelling
PercussionBells, chimes, drum kit, xylophone
SingingBallad, chant, pop, rock, shanty
StringsGuitar, singing coil, theremin
SynthsSynth deck, turn table
WindsHorn, flute, pipes

Prescient Consumable.name: 有备无患 Prescient Consumable
Prescient Consumable.description: 你可以提前预测可能需要用到的消耗品。在使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.bh2jHyyYrkLMsIdX]{未雨绸缪 Prescient Planner}时，你可以从背包中取出一件消耗品，而非一件装备。这件消耗品仍然必须是常见物品，等级不超过你等级的一半，负载不能高到导致你超载。

Incredible Improvisation.name: 奇妙应变 Incredible Improvisation
Incredible Improvisation.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你使用一项未受训的技能进行检定

尽管你缺乏经验，但你的灵机一动可以让你在一项技能上取得不小的优势。你在触发该能力的技能检定上获得+4环境加值。

Thoughtful Insight.name: 深思熟虑的洞察 Thoughtful Insight
Thoughtful Insight.description:
你知道，明智地行动比迅速地行动更重要。当你花时间从各个角度思考一个问题时，你会得出富有洞见的启示。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pkcOby5prOausy1k]{Read Omens}，作为一个4环神秘先天法术。你每天可以施放该法术一次。

You know that it's more important to act wisely than it is to act quickly. When you take the time to consider a problem from all angles, you come up with an insightful revelation. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pkcOby5prOausy1k]{Read Omens} as a 4th-rank occult innate spell. You can cast this spell once per day.

Communal Crafting.name: 协同手艺 Communal Crafting
Communal Crafting.description: 你可以让其他PC在你的指导下帮你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制作 Craft}物品。提供帮助的PC用已受训的一项技能骰检定。该技能必须是手艺或其它与该物品有关的技能，由GM定夺。举例而言，PC可以用宗教技能帮助制作有神术特征的物品，或用战争学识技能帮助制作武器。仍然由你的检定来决定制作物品是否成功，提供帮助者的检定则会按照@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{赚取收入 Earn Income}表格中的数值降低材料成本，判断收入时使用该盟友PC的技能熟练度，等级视为低1级。提供帮助的PC必须在制作行动期间陪同你（因此无法进行其它休整期行动），否则好处将会失去。GM可以根据环境决定能提供帮助的PC数量。协同手艺还可以让你能够在其他人制作物品时成为帮助者，前提是对方接受你帮忙。

Energy Shielding.name: 能量护盾 Energy Shielding
Energy Shielding.description:
在穿行流散带时，你目睹过无数魔法异常现象，并活了下来得以讲述这些经历。长期暴露于魔法能量之中对你产生了影响，在你体内留下了魔法的痕迹，使你的身体免受有害能量的侵袭。从以下能量伤害类型中选择一种：强酸、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波。你获得对此伤害类型的抗性 5。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次选择时，选择一种不同的能量类型。

While traversing the Diaspora, you've witnessed countless magical anomalies and survived to tell the tale. This persistent exposure to magical energy has rubbed off on you, leaving traces of magic behind that shield your body from harmful energy. Select one of the following types of energy damage: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain resistance 5 to that damage type.

Special You can select this feat multiple times. Each time you do, select a different energy type.

Crowd Surfing.name: 人群冲浪 Crowd Surfing
Crowd Surfing.description:
你可以在人群中穿行而不减速。你可以在人群中以完整速度移动。将真正挤满人群的区域视为困难地形，而非更大困难地形。

You move through crowds without slowing down. You can move at full Speed in crowds. Treat areas truly packed with people as difficult terrain instead of greater difficult terrain.

Predator's Eye.name: 掠食者之眼 Predator's Eye
Predator's Eye.description:
你的眼睛能够像瞄准镜一样放大远处的目标。你可以用单一动作调整那只眼睛的视力，以对特定生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}，并使你的察觉检定获得 +2 情境加值；或者进行搜索，以在最远 100 尺外的一个 10 尺见方区域内寻找任何未被察觉或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽} 的生物或物体。除非目标距离你超过 2 英里，否则你不会因物体或生物过于遥远而受到减值。

Your eye magnifies distant targets as well as a scope. You can adjust your sight in that eye as a single action to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} a specific creature with a +2 circumstance bonus to your Perception check, or Seek to search a 10-foot square up to 100 feet away for any undetected or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} creatures or objects. You don't take penalties for an object or creature being too far away unless you're more than 2 miles away.

Cooperative Nature.name: 协作天性 Cooperative Nature
Cooperative Nature.description: 人类的短暂寿命迫使你以更全面的角度地看待事物，你打小便学会了该如何通过求同存异的方式与他人共襄盛举。你在协助检定上获得+4环境加值。

Ancestral Paragon.name: 族裔典范 Ancestral Paragon
Ancestral Paragon.description: 凭借天性、研究或魔法的帮助，你与自己族裔的关联比常人更深。你获得一个1级族裔专长。

Situational Awareness.name: 态势感知 Situational Awareness
Situational Awareness.description:
你准备一个训令。若你指定的触发条件在你下个回合开始前发生，你可以使用该训令的 2 动作版本，而非 1 动作版本。

You Ready a directive. If the trigger you designated occurs before the start of your next turn, you can use the 2-action version of the directive instead of the 1-action.

Brainsplain.name: 脑析 Brainsplain
Brainsplain.description:
触发条件 你成功通过一次回忆知识检定，以识别你有限心灵感应范围内的一个敌人。

在仔细分析一个生物后，你好心地通过心灵感应向它发送一番关于其生理与心理缺陷的训话。出于某些难以解释的原因，这么做往往会激怒该生物，而非启发它。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:class] 豁免，对抗你的职业 DC。若你在触发该反应的回忆知识检定中获得重度成功，则目标的此次意志豁免承受 –1 状态减值。随后，该生物会暂时免疫 24 小时。

重度成功 你不慎说得太多，暴露了你自己的缺点。该生物对你下一次攻击检定获得 +1 处境加值，只要该次攻击是在 1 分钟内进行。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮}。

重度失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮，之后变为迟钝 1，持续 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮}。

Trigger You succeed at a check to Recall Knowledge to identify a foe within range of your limited telepathy.

Upon carefully analyzing a creature, you helpfully send it a telepathic lecture regarding its physiological and psychological inadequacies. For inexplicable reasons, doing so tends to aggravate the creature rather than educate it. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|against:class] save against your class DC. If you critically succeeded at the triggering check to Recall Knowledge, the target takes a –1 status penalty to its Will save. The creature is then temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Critical Success You accidentally overshare, exposing your own foibles. The creature gains a +1 circumstance bonus to its next attack roll against you, as long as that attack is made within 1 minute.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round, after which it is stupefied 1 for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Combine.name: 结合 Combine
Combine.description:
频率 每天一次

你暂时将自己的身体与一名邻近的自愿生物融合，把自己叠覆在其身上，以便更好地为其抵挡伤害。这一变形持续10分钟。你可以Dismiss此效果。如此做时，你会出现在与你所融合的目标相邻的一个空间内。处于合体状态时，你和目标照常各自进行自己的回合，并且在能力及其他效果的判定中必须分别作为独立目标。此外，你和目标获得以下益处。

  • 如果目标为中型或更小，其体型增大为大型，且其触及增加至10尺。
  • 你占据目标的空间，且不能执行具有移动特征的动作。如果目标移动，你也会随其移动。
  • 对于你拥有的每一种速度，将其与目标对应的速度比较。如果你的该速度更快，或者目标没有该速度，则其获得你的该速度。
  • 你的身体为目标抵挡伤害，给予其更高等掩护，但你不会获得掩护。你的身体不会遮蔽目标的视觉，也不会阻挡视线。

Frequency once per day

You temporarily merge your body with that of an adjacent willing creature, overlaying yourself atop them to better shield them from harm. This transformation lasts for 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this effect. When you do, you emerge in a space adjacent to the target you merged with. While combined, you and your target each take your own turns as normal and must be targeted separately for the purposes of abilities and other effects. Additionally, you and your target gain the following benefits.

  • If the target is Medium or smaller, their size increases to Large and their reach increases to 10 feet.
  • You occupy the target's space and can't take actions with the move trait. If the target moves, you move with them.
  • For each Speed you possess, compare it to that of your target. If your Speed is faster, or they lack that Speed, they gain your Speed.
  • Your body shields the target from harm, granting them greater cover, though you don't gain cover. Your body doesn't obscure the target's vision or block line of sight.

Ysoki Lore.name: 尤索基知识 Ysoki Lore
Ysoki Lore.description:
多年来生活在鼠基人社群中的经历，磨炼了你轻捷的步伐与潜行的身手。你在特技和隐匿上获得受训熟练等级。若你本会自动在这些技能之一上获得受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在自选的一项技能上获得受训。

你还获得用于鼠基人学识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 泛用专长。

Years of experience living among ysoki communities have trained your nimble steps and sneaky moves. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Acrobatics and Stealth. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Ysoki Lore.

Alluring Pheromones.name: 诱惑信息素 Alluring Pheromones
Alluring Pheromones.description:
你用信息素影响他人，即使你缺乏其他交流手段也是如此。你可以使用外交向与你不共享语言的生物 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}，并向他们提出简单的请求。这可以包括问路，或让目标从人群中认出某个特定个体。当你这样做时，留下印象和请求失去语言（特征）并获得嗅觉（特征）。

You influence others with pheromones, even when you lack other means of communication. You can use Diplomacy to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on creatures with whom you don't share a language and to make simple Requests of them. This could include getting directions or getting the target to pick a specific individual out from a crowd. When you do, Make an Impression and Request lose the linguistic trait and gain the olfactory trait.

Persistent Protection.name: 持久防护 Persistent Protection
Persistent Protection.description:
你相信你已故的誓约伙伴即使在坟墓彼岸也依然与你同在。你可以每小时使用一次“灵魂守护”，而不是每天一次。

You trust that your deceased bonded partner is with you, even from beyond the grave. You can use Spirit's Protection once per hour, rather than once per day.

Tech Crafting.name: 科技制造 Tech Crafting
Tech Crafting.description:
你可以制作1级或更高级的科技物品，尽管其中一些还有其他要求。当你选择此专长时，你获得4件2级或以下普通科技物品的配方。

You can Craft level 1 or higher tech items, though some have other requirements. When you select this feat, you gain formulas for four common tech items of 2nd level or lower.

Death Eternal.name: 永恒之死 Death Eternal
Death Eternal.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你的生命值降至 0，并将获得濒死状态。

你还没准备好前往骸骨之庭。进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:11|showDC:all]。若成功，你会以 1 点生命值继续站立，而不是降至 0 点生命值并获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死} 状态。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You are reduced to 0 Hit Points and would gain the dying condition.

You're not ready for the Boneyard. Roll a @Check[flat|dc:11|showDC:all]. On a success, you remain standing with 1 Hit Point instead of being reduced to 0 Hit Points with the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition.

Scare to Death.name: 肝胆俱裂 Scare to Death
Scare to Death.description:
你可以让敌人陷入强烈恐惧之中，甚至可能将他们吓死。尝试一次@Check[intimidation|defense:will]检定，对抗30尺内能与你互相感知到或看到的一个活物的意志DC。若目标听不到你的声音，或者不理解你说的语言，则你承受-4环境减值。该生物将在1分钟内暂时免疫此效果。

大成功 目标必须尝试@Check[fortitude|against:intimidation]豁免对抗你的威吓DC。大失败时它会死亡。取得其它结果时，它陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}并@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}1轮。大失败效果具有死亡特征。

成功 目标陷入惊惧2。

失败 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}。

大失败 目标不受影响。

Unconventional Weaponry.name: 冷门武器 Unconventional Weaponry
Unconventional Weaponry.description:
你已经熟悉了一种来自其他族裔或文化的武器。选择一种具有与某个族裔相对应特质（例如维斯克蜥人或太空鼠人）的非常见简易或军用武器，或者一种在其他文化中很常见的武器。你获得该武器的使用权限，并且在判定你的熟练度时，将其视为简易武器。

如果你受训于所有军用武器，则你可以改为选择一种具有某个族裔特质或在其他文化中很常见的非常见先进武器。你获得该武器的使用权限，并熟悉该武器。就熟练度而言，你将其视为军用武器。

You've familiarized yourself with a weapon from another ancestry or culture. Choose an uncommon simple or martial weapon with a trait corresponding to an ancestry (such as vesk or ysoki) or that's common in another culture. You gain access to that weapon, and for the purpose of determining your proficiency, you treat it as a simple weapon.

If you're trained in all martial weapons, you can instead choose an uncommon advanced weapon that has an ancestry's trait or is common in another culture. You gain access to that weapon and have familiarity with that weapon. For the purpose of proficiency, you treat it as a martial weapon.

Anchoring Strike.name: 定锚打击 Anchoring Strike
Anchoring Strike.description:
要求 你的量子场处于激活状态。

战斗可能令人迷失方向，但对你而言，打击目标时所需的强烈精神投入会让你获得额外的清晰与专注。进行一次打击。此次打击获得以下成功与重击成功效果。

重击成功 此次打击获得锚定特征。你可以重掷此次打击所掷出的伤害骰，但你必须使用第二次结果，即使更差也一样。

成功 此次打击获得锚定特征。

Requirements Your quantum field is active.

Battle can be disorienting, but for you, the intense mental effort of striking your targets lends you additional clarity and focus. Make a Strike. The Strike gains the following success and critical success effects.

Critical Success The Strike gains the anchoring trait. You can reroll the damage dice rolled for this strike, but you must use the second result, even if it's worse.

Success The Strike gains the anchoring trait.

Nimble Tail.name: 灵巧尾巴 Nimble Tail
Nimble Tail.description:
你拥有一条极其灵活的尾巴，能帮助你在零重力环境中保持平衡；这可能是你的祖先在适应太空飞行过程中遗传给你的天赋，也可能是个人增强改造的结果。你在零重力环境中可以用你的尾巴来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.FF5KgZHj345s2moq]{蹬离}，且无需空闲手。此外，当你在零重力环境中处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{未束缚的}状态时，你忽略笨拙和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}的减值。

You have an incredibly nimble tail that helps you balance in zero gravity; this could be a hereditary gift from your ancestors as they adapted to spaceflight or the result of personal augmentation. You can use your tail to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.FF5KgZHj345s2moq]{Push Off} while in zero-g without needing a free hand. In addition, you ignore the clumsy and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} penalties while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered} in zero gravity.

Protect the Pack.name: 保护族群 Protect the Pack
Protect the Pack.description:
要求 你与一名盟友相邻。

你决心保护你的盟友免受伤害——即使这会让你自己受伤！选择一名与你相邻的盟友。直到你下个回合开始时，你用自己的身体为其提供掩护；你给予其的任何较小掩护改为标准掩护，但他们不能利用你给予的标准掩护进行躲藏。

Requirements You're adjacent to an ally.

You're determined to protect your allies from harm—even if it hurts! Select one adjacent ally. Until the beginning of your next turn, you shield them with your body; any lesser cover you grant them is instead standard cover, though they can't use standard cover granted by you to Hide.

Solar Barrage.name: 星辰连射 Solar Barrage
Solar Barrage.description:
你可以用你的太阳耀斑快速连续射出多次攻击。对不同目标各进行一次太阳耀斑打击，共进行三次，每次带有 –2 状况减值。这些攻击会计入你的多重攻击减值，但在你完成这些攻击之前，该减值不会增加。

You can fire off multiple shots with your solar flare in short succession. Make three solar flare Strikes against different targets, each with a –2 circumstance penalty. These attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after you've made the attacks.

Quick Swap.name: 快速切换 Quick Swap
Quick Swap.description:
触发条件 你正持用一把双手武器，且一个敌方生物移动至与你相邻的位置。

你能在紧张局势中切换武器，从而迅速做好准备，惩戒来袭的敌人。你收起当前武器并拔出另一把双手武器。如果你有多组手臂，则你可以改为切换持握手。

Trigger You're wielding a two-handed weapon, and an enemy creature moves adjacent to you.

You can switch weapons in stressful situations so that you quickly set yourself up to punish incoming foes. You stow your current weapon and draw another two-handed weapon. If you have multiple sets of arms, you can instead Switch Hands.

Legendary Linguist.name: 传奇语言学家 Legendary Linguist
Legendary Linguist.description: 你非常精通语言，能够随时创造出一种混合语言。借助创造一种简化术语并传达基本概念的新型混合语言，你总是能够和任何有语言的生物交谈，即便你并不懂对方的语言。要做到这点，你首先必须至少理解对方使用的交流媒介（说话、手语等等）。

Legendary Sneak.name: 传奇潜行者 Legendary Sneak
Legendary Sneak.description: 除非你想被看见，否则你可以始终保持潜行，即便没有可藏身的地方。你可以在没有掩蔽或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}的情况下@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{躲藏 Hide}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{潜行 Sneak}。你在采取@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{避人耳目 Avoiding Notice}之外的探索行动时，同样可以获得避人耳目的好处，除非你不想得到其好处。

Slip From Sight.name: 脱离视线 Slip From Sight
Slip From Sight.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 你成功使用隐匿进行躲藏，并对你当前的所有敌人变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽}，或者使用隐匿来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}，并对你当前的所有敌人变为未被察觉。

借助巧妙的科技、魔法天赋、神圣祝福或不可思议的好运，你会彻底脱离视线，变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，持续1分钟，或直到你采取敌对动作，以先发生者为准。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You successfully use Stealth to Hide and become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from all your current foes, or use Stealth to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} and become undetected to all your current foes.

Using clever technology, magical talent, a divine blessing, or uncanny luck, you slip from sight completely, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} for 1 minute, or until you take a hostile action, whichever comes first.

Heart of Planets Lost.name: 失落星球之心 Heart of Planets Lost
Heart of Planets Lost.description:
你从小听着关于达米尔和伊奥沃的故事长大——这两个早已毁灭的萨瑟蝶人母星，如今只存在于传说、破碎的岩石，以及你族人民的心中。你获得关于达米尔学识、伊奥沃学识和流散带学识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 一般专长。

You grew up hearing stories about Damiar and Iovo, the long-destroyed sarcesian home worlds remembered today only in legends, shattered rock, and the hearts of your people. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Damiar Lore, Iovo Lore, and Diaspora Lore.

True Leader.name: 天生领袖 True Leader
True Leader.description:
你与一个团队共事已久，久到你已经学会只凭一个眼神、一个字，或是手（或根据族裔而定的合适附肢）最细微的一 flick，就能传达命令。每回合一次，你可以将一个 1 动作的特使训令作为自由动作发布。这个训令不计入你本回合已发布训令的总数。

You've worked with a team for so long that you've learned to convey orders with a glance, a single word, or the tiniest flick of your hand (or suitable appendage, depending on ancestry). Once per turn, you can issue a 1-action envoy directive as a free action. This directive doesn't count toward your total number of directives issued this turn.

Explosive Deflection.name: 爆炸偏转 Explosive Deflection
Explosive Deflection.description:
触发 你位于手榴弹爆炸的区域内。

需求 你察觉到了此次攻击，正持用一把枪械，且未处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

你尝试以枪械打出时机精准的一击来引爆手榴弹。从你的枪械中消耗等同于其耗用值的弹药，如同你进行了射击一般。你对触发此次反应的手榴弹进行的反射豁免获得 +4 状况加值。在为该区域内的其他任何人掷骰之前，先判定你此次豁免是否成功。若你的反射豁免成功，你会使手榴弹提前爆炸。选择一个由你决定、且恰好位于你与攻击者之间的方格。被偏转的手榴弹在所选方格内爆炸；如果你位于新的爆炸区域内，则无需再次进行豁免。

Trigger You're in the area of a grenade explosion.

Requirements You're aware of the attack, wielding a gun, and not @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}.

You attempt to detonate the grenade with a well-timed shot from your gun. Expend an amount of ammunition from your gun equal to its usage, as if you'd fired the gun. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to your Reflex save against the triggering grenade. Determine if you succeed on your save before rolling for anyone else in the area. If you succeed on your Reflex save, you cause the grenade to explode prematurely. Select a space of your choice directly between you and the attacker. The deflected grenade explodes in the selected space, and you don't need to save again if you're in the new explosion area.

Synchronized Initiative.name: 同步先攻 Synchronized Initiative
Synchronized Initiative.description:
触发条件你和你的契约伙伴为先攻掷了相同的技能，但得到了不同的结果。

你和你的契约伙伴彼此之间以完全同步的方式行动，对危险作出反应，并如同一体般进入战斗。你和你的契约伙伴在先攻检定结果之间采用较高的结果，但使用较低的察觉或技能调整值。

Trigger You and your bonded partner roll the same skill for initiative, but get different results.

You and your bonded partner act in utter synchronicity with one another, reacting to danger and entering battle as one. You and your bonded partner use the higher result between your initiative rolls, but use the lower Perception or skill modifier.

Run Hot.name: 炙热运转 Run Hot
Run Hot.description:
需求 你正持用一把区域武器。

你按住扳机，将武器推向其绝对极限，以源源不绝的火力持续倾泻。使用所需武器进行两次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击}，无视你武器的笨重特征。处于第二次区域射击攻击区域内的生物，其豁免获得 +2 状况加值。

在你使用此动作后，你的武器必须冷却，且直到你的下个回合结束后，或直到你受到任意数量的寒冷伤害之前，都无法使用。

Requirements You're wielding an area weapon.

You hold down the trigger and push your weapons to their absolute limits with a ceaseless barrage of firepower. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} twice with the required weapon, ignoring the unwieldy trait of your weapon. Creatures in the area of the second Area Fire attack gain a +2 circumstance bonus to their save.

After you use this action, your weapon must cool off and can't be used until after your next turn or until you take any amount of cold damage.

Spectrasoul.name: 灵魂幽影 Spectrasoul
Spectrasoul.description:
在与一个或多个灵光体近距离接触后，你变成了棱彩裔。你可以与 30 英尺内的灵光体以及具有科技特征的智能构装体进行心灵交流。你不需要与这类生物共享语言，也能以这种方式沟通。这不会让你获得读取它们思想的任何特殊权限，所传达的信息也不会比正常言语更多。

You became a prismeni after a close encounter with one or more spectra. You can communicate mentally with spectra and with intelligent constructs with the tech trait within 30 feet. You don't need to share a language to communicate with such creatures in this way. This doesn't give you any special access to their thoughts and communicates no more information than normal speech would.

Eager Assistant.name: 热心助手 Eager Assistant
Eager Assistant.description:
你乐于帮助朋友和盟友达成他们的目标。在你的回合开始时，你获得一个额外的反应，这个反应只能用来进行协助。

You love helping your friends and allies achieve their goals. At the start of your turn, you gain one additional reaction, which you can use only to Aid.

Unquenchable Breath.name: 不竭吐息 Unquenchable Breath
Unquenchable Breath.description:
当你使用龙人吐息时，豁免检定失败或大失败的生物会受到与其相同类型的 @Damage[2d6[persistent,@actor.flags.system.dragonkinBreath.damageType]] 伤害。若为大失败，则移除此持续性伤害的平检 DC 提高至 20（如果由于该生物获得了适当类型的帮助而使平检降低，则为 DC 15）。如果你施加了同时造成同类型持续性伤害的武器重击专精效果，则在基础持续性伤害之外，额外施加此持续性伤害。

When you use Dragonkin Breath, a creature who fails or critically fails its saving throw takes @Damage[2d6[persistent,@actor.flags.system.dragonkinBreath.damageType]] damage of the same type. On a critical failure, the flat check to remove persistent damage increases to DC 20 (or DC 15, if the flat check would be reduced because the creature has an appropriate type of help). If you apply a critical weapon specialization effect that also deals persistent damage of the same type, apply this persistent damage in addition to the base persistent damage.

Do You Know Who I Work For?.name: 你知道我为谁工作吗？ Do You Know Who I Work For?
Do You Know Who I Work For?.description:
搬出你公司的名号，会让你的威胁更有分量。当你使用威吓对一个了解你公司的目标进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{强迫} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫败意志} 时，成功改为大成功。

Throwing your corporation's name around adds weight to your threats. When you use Intimidation to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} a target who knows about your corporation, a success becomes a critical success.

Get in There!.name: 冲进去！ Get in There!
Get in There!.description:
你敦促盟友们赶紧投入战斗，或是别挡路。直到你下个回合开始前，你以及100英尺内所有能够感知到你的盟友获得+5英尺的速度状态加值。随着你的特使等级提升，在7级、12级和17级时，该加值各额外增加5英尺。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.dAcHJiPDtqxxrR4Z]{效果：冲进去！}

以身作则 若你用了两个动作，则进行一步或大步移动。你100英尺内每个能够感知到你的盟友都可以立即以反应进行一步或大步移动，移动距离至多为其速度的一半（向下取整到最接近的5英尺）。

You urge your allies to hustle into the fight or to get out of the way. Until the beginning of your next turn, you and your allies within 100 feet who can sense you gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speed. As your envoy level increases, increase the bonus by an additional 5 feet at 7th level, 12th level, and 17th level.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.dAcHJiPDtqxxrR4Z]{Effect: Get in There!}

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Step or Stride. Each of your allies within 100 feet who can sense you can immediately Step or Stride up to half their Speed (rounded down to the nearest 5 feet) as a reaction.

Dermal Spikes.name: 真皮尖刺 Dermal Spikes
Dermal Spikes.description:
尖刺状突起从你的身体上伸出，你可以用它们伤害攻击你的人。针对你的体能检定，若用于对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}，你的强韧DC提高1。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZVzoIaWpXs62QVcu]{穿刺尖刺} 反应。

Spiky protrusions jut from your body, which you can use to wound your attackers. Your Fortitude DC against Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} you increases by 1. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZVzoIaWpXs62QVcu]{Piercing Spikes} reaction.

Burst of Strength.name: 力量爆发 Burst of Strength
Burst of Strength.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{重新定位}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}的 Athletics 检定中失败。

你调动内在储备，振作自己再试一次。重掷该触发的检定，但你必须采用新的结果，即使它更差。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You fail an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}.

You draw on your inner reserves and rally yourself to try again. Reroll the triggering check, but you must use the new result, even if it's worse.

Saw it Coming.name: 早就料到了 Saw it Coming
Saw it Coming.description:
触发条件 你即将进行先攻掷骰。

你读懂敌人的神态、肢体语言和本能的小动作，就像读懂通讯器一样轻松，这让你能比周围的人早一瞬作出反应，并在即将到来的战斗中取得优势。你的先攻掷骰获得+1环境加值，并且你可以立刻执行以下一项：交互以拔出武器、[[/action step]]，或[[/action stride]]。

Trigger You're about to roll initiative.

You read the demeanor, body language, and instinctive tics of your foes as easily as you read a comm unit, allowing you to react a moment before those around you and gain an edge in the coming battle. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your initiative roll, and you can immediately do one of the following: Interact to draw a weapon, Step, or Stride.

Train Animal.name: 训练动物 Train Animal
Train Animal.description:
你花时间教一只动物执行某个行动。你可以选择该动物已经会的基础行动（通常在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.q9nbyIF0PEBqMtYe]{指挥动物 Command an Animal}行动中列出），也可以尝试教动物一个新的基础行动。GM决定需要进行的检定DC，以及训练花费的时间（通常需要一星期）。教动物需要思考判断的技巧往往不可能成功。若你在自然技能上的熟练度达到专家、大师或传奇，你或许能够训练更罕见的生物，由GM定夺。

成功 动物掌握该行动。若它是动物已经会的行动，你可以无需尝试自然检定，就指挥动物执行该行动。若它是新的基础行动，则将其加入动物被指挥时能够执行的行动中，但你依然必须掷骰。

失败 动物未学会这项技巧。

Ancestral Physiology.name: 祖传生理构造 Ancestral Physiology
Ancestral Physiology.description:
你曾花时间置身于另一副躯体之中，这让你能够将自己的身体塑造成武器。你获得一个与你所选族裔或传承相关、且会赋予徒手攻击的专长。你可以像自己是该族裔或传承的一员那样，选择将该专长列为前提条件的族裔专长。只有当你变形为该族裔成员时，你才能使用该徒手攻击。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长，每次选择不同的族裔或专长。

Your time spent in another skin has allowed you to shape your own body into a weapon. You gain a feat associated with a chosen ancestry or heritage that grants an unarmed attack. You can select ancestry feats that include that feat as a prerequisite as if you were a member of that ancestry or heritage. You can use the unarmed attack only when you're transformed into a member of that ancestry.

Special You can select this feat multiple times, choosing a different ancestry or feat each time.

Manifold Masters.name: 流形大师 Manifold Masters
Manifold Masters.description:
你拓展了自己的感知，并且更能理解你周遭无处不在的那些不可见的答案。当你在每日准备期间使用 Student of the Unseen 时，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 两次。

You've broadened your senses and are better able to comprehend the unseen answers all around you. When you use Student of the Unseen during your daily preparations, you gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} twice.

Spellsurge Ammo.name: 法术激涌弹药 Spellsurge Ammo
Spellsurge Ammo.description:
频率 每回合一次

触发 你施放一个非戏法法术。

你将法术能量导入你正持用的一件武器或一枚手榴弹中。直到你回合结束前，该武器或手榴弹造成等同于该法术环阶的额外力场伤害，且如果它原本没有，则获得魔法特征。若该法术造成伤害，则该额外伤害改为与触发法术相同的类型。

Frequency once per turn

Trigger You cast a non-cantrip spell.

You siphon spell energy into one weapon or grenade you're wielding. Until the end of your turn, the weapon or grenade deals extra force damage equal to the rank of the spell and gains the magical trait if it didn't have it already. If the spell deals damage, the extra damage becomes the same type as the triggering spell.

Relentless Endurance.name: 不屈耐力 Relentless Endurance
Relentless Endurance.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你受到伤害。

你在承受一次打击后会更强韧地恢复过来，准备继续战斗。你获得 1d8+4 点临时生命值，持续 1 分钟。在 6 级以及此后每 4 级，该数值增加 1d8+4。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You take damage.

You bounce back stronger after a hit, ready to continue the fight. You gain 1d8+4 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute. Increase this amount by 1d8+4 at 6th level and every 4 levels thereafter.

Skittermander Lore.name: 斯基特曼德知识 Skittermander Lore
Skittermander Lore.description:
你性格外向友善，同时也对自己族群的历史怀有强烈热忱，会特意去学习传统故事并发掘失落的秘密。你获得外交与社群的受训熟练等级。若你会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你自选的一项技能上成为受训。

你还获得适用于“斯基特曼德传承”的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}通用专长，并学会莫兰多曼德拉南语——这种斯基特曼德人的原始语言长期以来一直受到维斯卡里姆的压制。

You're gregarious and friendly but also passionately interested in the history of your people, going out of your way to learn traditional stories and unearth lost secrets. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Diplomacy and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Skittermander Lore, and you learn Morandomandranan, the original skittermander language that has long been suppressed by the Veskarium.

Battle Saint.name: 战斗圣徒 Battle Saint
Battle Saint.description:
你已晋升为活着的战斗圣者，并踏上了一条道路：当你在来世与戴莫力图斯相遇时，将成为他真正的神圣仆从。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BHWG0rQPTgBF5Ye1]{Rocket Dash} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} 各自每天施放一次，作为第7环神圣先天法术。

You have ascended to the rank of living battle saint and are on a path to become a true divine servant of Damoritosh when you meet him in the afterlife. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BHWG0rQPTgBF5Ye1]{Rocket Dash} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} as 7th-rank divine innate spells once per day each.

Zoomies.name: 疾冲 Zoomies
Zoomies.description:
频率 每天一次

你以一阵难以预测的动作爆发出积蓄已久的能量。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速} 状态，持续4轮。你每轮获得的额外动作只能用于疾走。

Frequency once per day

You unleash your pent up energy in a flurry of unpredictable motion. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition for 4 rounds. You can use the extra action each round only to Stride.

Destructive Dash.name: 毁灭冲刺 Destructive Dash
Destructive Dash.description:
要求 你所处的环境中有适合撕毁的材料，例如城市环境。

你冲过战场，一边撕毁周围环境，一边撞倒附近的物体，使敌人更难机动或追击。疾行，移动距离最多等于你的速度。你经过的方格变为困难地形。

位于其中一个受影响方格可及范围内的生物可以用一个互动动作清理该区域，移除你在该方格中制造的任何困难地形。

Requirements You're in an environment with suitable material to tear up, such as an urban environment.

You dash across the battlefield, tearing up your surroundings and toppling nearby objects as you go to make it harder for your foes to maneuver or to give chase. Stride up to your Speed. The squares you move through become difficult terrain.

A creature within reach of one of the affected squares can clear the area with an Interact action, removing any difficult terrain you created in the square.

Spirit-Blessed Protections.name: 灵祝防护 Spirit-Blessed Protections
Spirit-Blessed Protections.description:
阿基顿星球的精魂会保护你，使你免受自然界力量的伤害。你获得对抗原始法术时豁免检定的+1状态加值。

The spirits of the planet Akiton protect you from being harmed by the forces of the natural world. You gain a +1 status bonus to saves against primal spells.

Quantum Entanglement.name: 量子纠缠 Quantum Entanglement
Quantum Entanglement.description:
你阻止生物离开你的量子场并返回现实。直到你的下个回合开始时，任何在你的量子场内开始其回合的生物，若要移动到你的量子场之外，都必须成功通过一次对抗你巫战扭曲者职业 DC 的 @Check[will|against:witchwarper]豁免检定。若失败，该动作被扰乱。成功通过此次豁免的生物会在 24 小时内免疫你的量子纠缠。

You prevent creatures from leaving your quantum field and returning to reality. Until the start of your next turn, any creature who begins its turn inside your quantum field must succeed at a @Check[will|against:witchwarper] saving throw against your witchwarper class DC to move outside your quantum field. On a failure, the action is disrupted. A creature that succeeds at this save is immune to your Quantum Entanglement for 24 hours.

Role Repertoire.name: 角色剧目库 Role Repertoire
Role Repertoire.description:
频率 每天一次

你曾扮演过许多角色，并在为扮演他们做准备时积累了数量惊人的庞杂知识。进行任何 [[/act recall-knowledge skill=performance]] 检定时，你可以使用表演代替学识。

Frequency once per day

You've played many roles and picked up a surprising amount of eclectic knowledge while preparing to play them. Roll any [[/act recall-knowledge skill=performance]] check using Performance instead of Lore.

Adopted Talents.name: 习得天赋 Adopted Talents
Adopted Talents.description:
要求 你拥有一名联结伙伴。

自从与你的伙伴建立联结以来，你已经对他们了解了许多，并且开始逐渐染上他们的习惯、兴趣与知识。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{接纳族裔}，但你必须选择你的联结伙伴的族裔。你还会从你为“接纳族裔”所选的族裔中获得一个1级族裔专长。

特殊 你必须拥有永久性的伙伴联结才能选择此专长，这意味着你不能是反复无常的龙人。

Requirements You have a bonded partner.

Since becoming bonded with your partner, you've learned a lot about them, and you're beginning to pick up their habits, interests, and knowledge. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry}, but you must select the ancestry of your bonded partner. You also gain one 1st-level ancestry feat from the ancestry you chose for Adopted Ancestry.

Special You must have a permanent partner bond to select this feat, meaning you can't be a mercurial dragonkin.

Calm Before the Storm.name: 暴风雨前的平静 Calm Before the Storm
Calm Before the Storm.description:
即使面对致命危险，你也能保持冷静的举止。当你处于恐慌状态时，在你的回合结束时，你的恐慌状态值减少 2 而非 1。

You maintain a calm demeanor even when facing mortal peril. When frightened, at the end of your turn, reduce your frightened condition by 2 instead of 1.

Without a Trace.name: 无痕 Without a Trace
Without a Trace.description:
你非常擅长从犯罪现场销毁或移除不利证据。使用“掩盖行踪”探索活动时，任何追踪你的人都必须通过一次对抗你 @Check[perception|against:deception]{欺瞒}、@Check[perception|against:stealth]{隐匿} 或 @Check[perception|against:underworld-lore]{黑社会知识} DC（取其中最高者）的察觉检定。若你花费10分钟清理犯罪现场，任何调查该现场的人都必须通过一次对抗你欺瞒、隐匿或黑社会知识 DC（取其中最高者）的察觉检定，才能发现任何 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽} 的证据。

You're an expert at destroying or removing incriminating evidence from a crime scene. When using the Cover Tracks exploration activity, an yone tracking you must succeed at a Perception check against your @Check[perception|against:deception]{Deception}, @Check[perception|against:stealth]{Stealth}, or @Check[perception|against:underworld-lore]{Underworld Lore} DC (whichever is highest). If you spent 10 minutes cleaning up a crime scene, anyone investigating the scene must succeed at a Perception check against your Deception, Stealth, or Underworld Lore DC (whichever is highest) to uncover any @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} evidence.

Secondary Directive.name: 次级训令 Secondary Directive
Secondary Directive.description:
需求 你本回合的上一动作是发出一个 2 动作训令。

你通过攻击一个显著的敌人，以一次所有人都能理解的命令来跟进你已发出的训令。进行一次打击。若此次打击命中，目标受到一个 1 动作 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{打他们} 的影响。

Requirements Your last action this turn was issuing a 2-action directive.

You follow-up your issued directive with an understood order by attacking a notable foe. Make a Strike. If the Strike hits, the target is affected by a 1-action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em}.

Reunite.name: 重聚 Reunite
Reunite.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你和你的缔约伙伴位于同一颗行星上。

随着一次凝神定气的呼吸，你让脑海中充满对缔约伙伴的思绪，并凭借意志将自己传送到其身边。你传送到你所选择的、与缔约伙伴相邻的一个未被占据的空间中。若没有可用的相邻空间，你则传送到最近的未被占据空间中。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You and your bonded partner are on the same planet.

With a centering breath, you fill your mind with thoughts of your bonded partner and will yourself to their side. You teleport into an unoccupied space of your choice adjacent to your bonded partner. If there is no adjacent space available, you teleport into the closest unoccupied space.

Wriggling Contortionist.name: 蠕动脱逃师 Wriggling Contortionist
Wriggling Contortionist.description:
你可以相当轻松地在狭窄空间中辗转腾挪，使他人难以将你钳制。你可以无视因穿过狭窄空间而造成的困难地形，只要该空间还没有狭窄到迫使你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze}。如果你在 Squeeze 时掷出成功，则改为获得大成功。无视受压制状态对速度施加的任何减值。

You can wriggle your way around tight spaces without much difficulty, making it hard for others to pin you down. You can ignore difficult terrain caused by moving through tight spaces that aren't tight enough to force you to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze}. If you roll a success to Squeeze, you get a critical success instead. Ignore any penalties to Speeds conferred by the suppressed condition.

Don't You Die on Me.name: 别给我死了 Don't You Die on Me
Don't You Die on Me.description:
你鼓励盟友坚持住，继续撑下去，尽管他们受到了危及生命的伤势或其他可能让他们倒下的重伤。选择一名邻近的垂死盟友。使目标的垂死值降低 1。若这会将其垂死值降至 0，则其失去垂死状态，不会增加其受伤状态，并保持 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}。随后，该目标盟友在 1 小时内暂时免疫 Don't You Die on Me。

You encourage your ally to hang on and keep going, despite life-threatening wounds or other serious injuries that might take them out. Select an adjacent dying ally. Reduce the target's dying value by 1. If this would reduce their dying value to 0, they lose the dying condition, don't increase their wounded condition, and remain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}. The targeted ally then becomes temporarily immune to Don't You Die on Me for 1 hour.

Carrion Feeder.name: 食腐者 Carrion Feeder
Carrion Feeder.description:
每天一次，以一个交互动作，你可以从一具死去的生物身上汲取营养。你食用一部分死亡未超过24小时的生物，并恢复3d8生命值，且在5级之后，你每超过5级后的每2个等级额外恢复1d8（@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d8)[healing]]）。

Once per day as an Interact action, you can siphon nutrients from a dead creature. You consume part of a creature that hasn't been dead for more than 24 hours, and you heal 3d8 Hit Points, plus 1d8 for every 2 of your levels beyond 5th (@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d8)[healing]]).

Grazing Shot.name: 擦射攻击 Grazing Shot
Grazing Shot.description:
需求 你有一个标记。

你花时间瞄准，确保这一枪命中。使用你的枪对你的标记进行一次远程打击。它获得以下失败效果。

失败 你的攻击对目标造成最低伤害。（计算此伤害时，视为你本应掷出的每个骰子结果都为 1。）

Requirements You have a mark.

You take your time to line up a shot that's sure to hit. Make a ranged Strike with your gun against your mark. It gains the following failure effect.

Failure Your attack deals minimum damage to the target. (Calculate this damage as if every die you would roll has a result of 1.)

Overwhelming Assault.name: 压倒性突击 Overwhelming Assault
Overwhelming Assault.description:
你压倒受压制敌人的防御。你对受压制目标进行攻击时，在你本回合的第二次攻击上所受的多重攻击减值为–4（使用灵巧武器时为–3），而非–5；在你本回合的第三次及后续攻击上则为–8（使用灵巧武器时为–6），而非–10。

You overwhelm the defenses of suppressed foes. Your multiple attack penalty for attacks against suppressed targets is –4 (–3 with an agile weapon) on your second attack of the turn instead of –5, and –8 (–6 with an agile weapon) on your third and subsequent attacks of the turn instead of –10.

Combat Reflexes.name: 战斗反射 Combat Reflexes
Combat Reflexes.description:
你经过广泛训练，已经蜕变为一件活生生的武器，随时都能扣动扳机。在每个敌人回合开始时，你在该回合中获得一个额外反应，只能用于特工反应。

Your extensive training has transformed you into a living weapon, ready to pull the trigger at a moment's notice. At the start of each enemy's turn, you gain an additional reaction during that turn that you can use only for an operative reaction.

Hug Master.name: 拥抱大师 Hug Master
Hug Master.description:
一个结实、有力的拥抱能让一切都变得更好，而你正把拥抱带上战场。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{巨像摔角手}技能专长。此外，你在进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}的 Athletics 检定时获得 +1 处境加值，并且你的 Fortitude DC 在避免被擒抱时获得 +1 处境加值。

A good, solid hug makes everything better, and you're bringing hugs to the battlefield. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} skill feat. Additionally, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} and to your Fortitude DC to avoid being Grappled.

Spot Healing.name: 斑点治疗 Spot Healing
Spot Healing.description:
触发器 一名相邻的结契盟友受到伤害。

你迅速将活力网络中的能量消耗并导向一名结契盟友。对触发该条件的盟友施放 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality}。

Trigger An adjacent bonded ally takes damage.

You quickly expend energy from your vitality network toward a bonded ally. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} to the triggering ally.

Reach Spell.name: 及远法术 Reach Spell
Reach Spell.description:
你可以延长你的法术射程。如果你接下来使用的动作是施放一个具有射程的法术，则该法术的射程增加30英尺。按照增加法术射程的标准规则，如果该法术通常的射程为接触，则你将其射程延长至30英尺。

You can extend the range of your spells. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase that spell's range by 30 feet. As is standard for increasing spell ranges, if the spell normally has a range of touch, you extend its range to 30 feet.

Data Bond.name: 数据纽带 Data Bond
Data Bond.description:
你可以与计算机交谈。你召唤的任何构装生物都被视为你纽带的一部分，且不计入你纽带中生物的最大数量。在你每日准备期间，从以下法术中选择一个：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.dINQzhqGmIsqGMUY]{Mending}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.lKcsmeOrgHtK4xQa]{Summon Construct}或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KlJEDmAOk1ztdNFf]{Summon Robot}。你将所选法术加入你的法术 repertory 和招牌法术，直到你的下一次每日准备。

You can speak with computers. Any construct creatures you summon are considered part of your bond and don't count against the maximum number of creatures in your bond. During your daily preparations, choose one of the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.dINQzhqGmIsqGMUY]{Mending}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.lKcsmeOrgHtK4xQa]{Summon Construct}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KlJEDmAOk1ztdNFf]{Summon Robot}. You add the selected spell to your spell repertoire and signature spells until your next daily preparations.

Mental Interference.name: 精神干扰 Mental Interference
Mental Interference.description:
你强行将目标的心智与你的纽带连接，并分享你们连接的一个令人困惑的片段。对你30尺内一个你看得见的敌人的意志DC，以你的连接技能尝试一次技能检定。该目标随后会暂时免疫此能力1小时。

大成功 目标的攻击检定获得–1状态减值，意志豁免获得–2状态减值，持续1分钟。如果它使用一个带有专注特征的单动作来摆脱这种干扰的效果，或在你以敌对动作将其作为目标后立刻，此效果会提前结束。

成功 如同大成功，但意志豁免的减值为–1。

大失败 在你的下个回合结束前，目标下一次对你进行的攻击中，你会成为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.gKDw3GcOiOYMMK1k]{效果：精神干扰}

You force link the target's mind to your bond and share a confusing glimpse of your connection. Attempt a skill check with your connection skill against the Will DC of a foe you can see within 30 feet. The target is them temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Critical Success The target takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls and a –2 status penalty to Will saves for 1 minute. This effect ends early if it uses a single action with the concentrate trait to shake off the effects of the interference or immediately after you target it with a hostile action.

Success As critical success, but the penalty to Will saves is –1.

Critical Failure You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the next attack the target attempts against you before the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.gKDw3GcOiOYMMK1k]{Effect: Mental Interference}

Prototype Electroencephalon.name: 原型脑波仪 Prototype Electroencephalon
Prototype Electroencephalon.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 你被一次攻击重击。

当伊奥克斯的大气层燃烧殆尽时，死灵妖制造了名为脑波仪的装置，用以容纳他们的灵魂，并将自己转化为能够在那场灾难性事件后的漫长岁月中存活下来的不死生物。你已经学会了这项技术的基础，并制作了一个类似的装置。进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:10]。若成功，此次触发的重击改为普通命中。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Trigger You're critically hit by an attack.

When Eox's atmosphere burned, necrovites crafted devices called electroencephalons in order to house their souls and transition themselves into undead beings who could survive the eons since that cataclysmic event. You've learned the basics of this technology and have crafted a similar device. Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the triggering hit becomes a normal hit.

Solar Nimbus.name: 日冕辉光 Solar Nimbus
Solar Nimbus.description:
你获得“灵辉迸发”反应，但不会因你的调谐获得任何额外收益。

You gain the Nimbus Surge reaction, but do not gain any additional benefits based on your attunement.

Quiet Allies.name: 集体潜行 Quiet Allies
Quiet Allies.description: 你擅长带领队伍一起行动。当你执行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{避人耳目 Avoiding Notice}，而你的盟友执行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{跟随专家 Follow the Expert}时，你和这些盟友可以只骰一次隐秘检定，使用你们当中最低的调整值，不用分别掷骰。这对于先攻检定无效。

Hyper.name: 超光速 Hyper
Hyper.description:
你精力充沛，常常迅速投入行动，快得让你的朋友们都跟不上。你的速度提高 5 英尺。

You're full of energy, and you often bound into action faster than your friends can keep up. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

Aerial Dash.name: 空中疾冲 Aerial Dash
Aerial Dash.description:
无论是借助气流，还是逼迫自己超越极限，你都能以难以置信的速度向前飞行。飞行最多三次。如果你是风暴骑手龙人，则改为飞行最多四次。

Whether by catching a current or pushing yourself beyond your limits, you fly forward incredibly fast. Fly up to three times. If you are a stormrider dragonkin, instead you Fly up to four times.

Hybrid Technique.name: 混合技巧 Hybrid Technique
Hybrid Technique.description:
需求 你正持用一把范围或自动武器。

你可以将各种方法结合成一种致命的全新混合技巧。选择两个需要用 2 个动作来使用、要求你持用范围或自动武器，并使你作为其效果的一部分进行一次区域射击或自动射击攻击的士兵专长。你进行一次区域射击或自动射击，然后将所选两个专长的额外效果与收益都应用于这次攻击。

Requirements You're wielding an area or automatic weapon.

You can combine methods into a deadly new hybrid technique. Choose two soldier feats that take 2 actions to use, require you to wield an area or automatic weapon, and cause you to make an Area Fire or Auto-Fire attack as part of its effects. You Area Fire or Auto-Fire once and then apply the additional effects and benefits of both selected feats to the attack.

Eager Combatant.name: 热切的战斗者 Eager Combatant
Eager Combatant.description:
触发条件 你为先攻掷运动或威吓。

你急切地大步冲入战斗，丝毫不顾后果。你沿直线朝敌人直接进行一次Stride。

Trigger You roll Athletics or Intimidation for initiative.

You eagerly stride into battle, giving no thought to the consequences. You Stride in a straight line directly toward an enemy.

Sarcesian Weapon Familiarity.name: 萨瑟蝶人武器熟悉性 Sarcesian Weapon Familiarity
Sarcesian Weapon Familiarity.description:
你习惯于从远处作战——真的非常远！你获得对狙击手组武器以及所有具有萨瑟蝶人特征的非常见武器的使用权限。你熟悉狙击手组中的武器以及所有具有萨瑟蝶人特征的武器——就熟练项而言，你将其中任何军用武器视为简易武器，并将其中任何先进武器视为军用武器。

在5级时，每当你用这些武器之一造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

You're accustomed to fighting from afar—really far! You gain access to weapons in the sniper group and all uncommon weapons with the sarcesian trait. You have familiarity with weapons in the sniper group and all weapons with the sarcesian trait—for the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons, and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you get its critical specialization effect.

Perfectly-Attuned.name: 完美调谐的 Perfectly-Attuned
Perfectly-Attuned.description:
你对自己与宇宙恒星之力的调谐拥有绝对的掌控与理解。若你将变为引力子调谐或光子调谐，你改为变为完美调谐。当你处于完美调谐时，在使用你的任何能力时，你可以选择从哪一种调谐加值得益（引力子调谐或光子调谐）。如果你的任何能力要求你处于特定的调谐状态，则完美调谐视为你所选择的引力子调谐或光子调谐。

You have absolute control and understanding of your attunement with the stellar forces of the cosmos. If you would become graviton- or photon-attuned, you instead become perfectly-attuned. When you're perfectly-attuned, you can choose which attunement bonus to benefit from (either graviton- or photon-attuned) when using any of your abilities. If any of your abilities require you to be in a specific attunement state, being perfectly-attuned counts as your choice of graviton- or photon-attuned.

Luminous Wings.name: 辉光之翼 Luminous Wings
Luminous Wings.description:
你的能量之翼会在20英尺半径内散发明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供微光照明）。你可以用一个动作熄灭或重新点亮这道光，这个动作具有专注特征。

Your energy wings shed bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet). You can extinguish or rekindle this light using a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Improved Elebrian Magic.name: 强化灵脑人魔法 Improved Elebrian Magic
Improved Elebrian Magic.description:
选择一个3环或更低环阶的奥术法术。你可以将该法术作为一个3环奥术先天法术，每天施放一次。如果这是你的13级族裔专长，则改为选择一个5环或更低环阶的奥术法术，并且你可以将其作为一个5环奥术先天法术，每天施放一次。如果这是你的17级族裔专长，则改为选择一个7环或更低环阶的奥术法术，并且你可以将其作为一个7环奥术先天法术，每天施放一次。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。若你如此做，你必须选择一个不同的法术。

Choose one 3rd-rank or lower arcane spell. You can cast that spell as a 3rd-rank arcane innate spell once per day. If this is your 13th-level ancestry feat, instead choose a 5th-rank or lower arcane spell, and you can cast it as a 5th-rank arcane innate spell once per day. If this is your 17th-level ancestry feat, instead choose a 7th-rank or lower arcane spell, and you can cast it as a 7th-rank arcane innate spell once per day.

Special You can select this feat more than once. If you do, you must select a different spell.

Drift Hop.name: 漂流域跃迁 Drift Hop
Drift Hop.description:
频率 每天一次

你借由漂流域穿越战场。你传送至你视线范围内、最远相当于你速度的距离。如果你在漂流域中，你能够传送的距离加倍。

Frequency once per day

You travel across the battlefield via the Drift. You teleport up to a distance equal to your Speed within your line of sight. If you're in the Drift, the distance you can teleport is doubled.

Basic Distortion.name: 基础扭曲 Basic Distortion
Basic Distortion.description:
你的扰乱之力愈发强大。你获得一个1级或2级的巫战扭曲者专长。

Your disruptive powers grow. You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level witchwarper feat.

Terrifying Bravado.name: 骇人虚张声势 Terrifying Bravado
Terrifying Bravado.description:
触发条件 你在对抗一个来源为生物的恐惧效果的豁免中获得大成功，或一个生物对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓} 的威吓检定失败或大失败。

你嘲笑敌人未能霸凌你的尝试，并以一番骇人的虚张声势反将对方一军。你尝试进行一次威吓检定，对触发的生物进行威吓。

Trigger You critically succeed on a save against a fear effect whose source was a creature, or a creature fails or critically fails an Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you.

You laugh at your enemy's failed attempts to bully you, turning the tables on your foe with a display of terrifying bravado. You attempt an Intimidation check to Demoralize the triggering creature.

Khizar Lore.name: 基扎尔知识 Khizar Lore
Khizar Lore.description:
无论是独处，还是与你的同类交流相处，你都已多年沉思自己族裔的本质。你获得自然与求生的受训熟练等级。若你本会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项自选技能上成为受训。

你还获得用于克希札尔学识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长。

Whether in isolation or in communion with others of your kind, you've contemplated the nature of your ancestry for many years. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Nature and Survival. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Khizar Lore.

Stellar Shield Collapse.name: 星界护盾崩塌 Stellar Shield Collapse
Stellar Shield Collapse.description:
触发 你的太阳护盾在你将其举起时被摧毁。

需求 你在过去10分钟内未使用过“黑洞”或“超新星”。

你的太阳护盾向内坍缩。

引力子调谐 立即以自由动作使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.51dFA09erqAeMt39]{黑洞}（如果你拥有“黑洞”专长）。

光子调谐 立即以自由动作使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.71DtcZirJ9bbKMTY]{超新星}（如果你拥有“超新星”专长）。

Trigger Your Solar Shield is destroyed while you have it raised.

Requirements You haven't used Black Hole or Supernova within the last 10 minutes.

Your solar shield collapses in on itself.

Graviton-Attuned Immediately use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.51dFA09erqAeMt39]{Black Hole} as a free action (if you have the Black Hole feat).

Photon-Attuned Immediately use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.71DtcZirJ9bbKMTY]{Supernova} as a free action (if you have the Supernova feat).

Talented Tracker.name: 天赋追踪者 Talented Tracker
Talented Tracker.description:
你敏锐的鼻子让你成为出色的追踪者。你获得生存技能的受训熟练等级。若你本会自动获得生存技能的受训熟练等级（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项自选技能上获得受训熟练等级。你在进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}的生存检定时获得+1环境加值。以气味进行追踪时，该加值提高为+2。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.urQZwmzg2kS53vd5]{老练追踪者}技能专长。
