Your keen nose makes you an excellent tracker. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Survival. If you would automatically become trained in Survival (from your background of class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Survival checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}. This bonus increases to +2 when tracking by scent. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.urQZwmzg2kS53vd5]{Experienced Tracker} skill feat.

Boundless Brachiator.name: 无尽城摆臂者 Boundless Brachiator
Boundless Brachiator.description:
你可以放手一跃，而且通常能双脚着地。你可以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃}至多 30 英尺，朝任意方向移动，期间无需接触地面，也不需要进行运动学检定；如此做时，你必须落在一个你能够攀爬的表面上，或落在你 30 英尺内一个你能够抓住边缘的位置旁，否则你会在使用你的下一个动作后坠落。你在跳跃时可以超过你的通常速度。

You can take a leap of faith and usually land on your feet. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} up to 30 feet in any direction without touching the ground and without requiring an Athletics check; when doing so, you must land on a surface you can Climb or adjacent to an Edge you can Grab within 30 feet of you, or else you fall after using your next action. You can exceed your normal Speed while Leaping.

Borai Lore.name: 活尸裔知识 Borai Lore
Borai Lore.description:
自从你复活以来，你已经对自己、自己在灵魂循环中的位置，以及其他不死生物了解了很多。你在威吓和宗教上获得受训熟练等级。如果你会自动在这些技能中的一项上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项由你选择的技能上成为受训。

你还获得用于活尸裔知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 泛用专长。

Since your resurrection, you've learned a lot about yourself, your place in the cycle of souls, and other undead. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Intimidation and Religion. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Borai Lore.

Unusual Treatment.name: 特殊疗法 Unusual Treatment
Unusual Treatment.description: 你接受的医学训练让你能处理病症较不明显的状态。若你成功进行DC 20的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势 Treat Wounds}，还可以让伤患身上@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied}状态中的一项状态值降低1点。若你能够同时治疗多个生物，则选择其中一个获得这个好处。一个生物每天只能获得一次特殊疗法的好处。若该状态由一个苦难引发，该苦难不会被治愈，但状态值会在苦难的阶段未发生变动时降低。若你在医疗技能上的熟练度达到大师，将@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained}状态加入你通过DC 30的检定能够移除的状态列表中。若你在医疗技能上的熟练度达到传奇，你可以降低2点所选状态值，而非1点。

Partitioned Focus.name: 分隔专注 Partitioned Focus
Partitioned Focus.description:
频率 每天一次

你的大脑可以在潜意识中处理复杂的计算，并将答案保存起来，以备最需要时使用。你获得 1 点专注点。如果你在本回合结束前没有花费这点专注点，你就会失去它。

Frequency once per day

Your brain can process complex calculations subconsciously and save the answers for when they're needed most. You gain 1 Focus Point. If you don't spend this Focus Point by the end of this turn, you lose it.

Twisted Dark Zone.name: 扭曲黑暗区 Twisted Dark Zone
Twisted Dark Zone.description:
你将这片现实暴露于一个充满胡言乱语般低语与异界实体的纯粹黑暗领域之中。你的量子场区域如同处于 2环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{黑暗术} 的区域内一般运作。其回合开始时位于该区域内的生物必须成功通过一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[will|against:class] 豁免，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 1轮（这是一个失能效果）。随后，该生物在24小时内对此免疫。若此黑暗被成功反制，量子场的其他效果仍然保留。

You expose this reality to a realm of pure darkness filled with gibbering voices and otherworldly entities. The area of your quantum field functions as though it were an area of 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness}. Creatures that begin their turn in the area must succeed at a @Check[will|against:class] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round (this is an incapacitation effect). The creature then becomes immune for 24 hours. If this darkness is successfully counteracted, the quantum field's other effects remain.

Solar Rampart.name: 太阳壁垒 Solar Rampart
Solar Rampart.description:
你的训练帮助你适应了更厚重的护甲。你受训于重甲。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你获得中甲的专家或更高熟练等级时，你也会获得重甲的该熟练等级。你将所穿着的 2 Bulk 或更高的护甲视为轻 1 Bulk（最低为 1 Bulk）。

Your training has helped you adapt to bulkier armor. You're trained in heavy armor. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in medium armor, you also gain that proficiency in heavy armor. You treat armor you wear of 2 Bulk or higher as though it were 1 Bulk lighter (to a minimum of 1 Bulk).

Mobile Aim.name: 移动瞄准 Mobile Aim
Mobile Aim.description:
你很少停下不动，而且你已经学会了即使在移动中也能稳定地命中目标。你先疾行，然后用你持握的一把枪 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}。

You're rarely still, and you've learned to reliably hit your targets even while moving. You Stride and then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} with a gun you're wielding.

Soul Furnace.name: 灵魂熔炉 Soul Furnace
Soul Furnace.description:
频率 每种折磨每24小时一次

你的灵魂化作燃料，燃烧你的生命力来净除一种折磨。选择一个你所受到的疾病或毒素。失去等同于该折磨等级的生命值。对该折磨进行一次新的豁免检定，如同你正处于其所列间隔的末尾。若你在此次豁免中失败或大失败，不会提高该折磨的阶段。

Frequency once per affliction every 24 hours

Your soul becomes fuel, burning away your life force to purge an affliction. Choose a disease or poison you're afflicted by. Lose a number of Hit Points equal to the level of the affliction. Attempt a new saving throw against the affliction, as though you were at the end of its listed interval. If you fail or critically fail this save, don't increase the affliction's stage.

Scope Sight.name: 瞄准镜视野 Scope Sight
Scope Sight.description:
透过瞄准镜观察你的标记，就像睁开眼睛一样出于本能。每当你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}时，你都可以用一个交互动作来激活一个瞄具武器升级。

Viewing your marks through a scope is as instinctive as opening your eyes. Whenever you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim}, you can Interact to Activate a sight weapon upgrade.

Size of the Ancients.name: 远古者的体型 Size of the Ancients
Size of the Ancients.description:
频率 每天一次

你经历一次迅速的身体变化，体型增大到足以与远古时代的龙人比肩。你的体型变为超大型。你的装备会随你一同变大，但如果被移除或丢下，它会恢复为原本的大小。你的触及增加 5 英尺（如果你是船生龙人，则增加 10 英尺），并且你获得近战伤害的 +4 状态加值。此变形持续 10 分钟。你可以以一个具有专注特征的单一动作提前结束此变形。

Frequency once per day

You undergo a rapid physical change, increasing in size to rival dragonkin of the ancient past. You grow to size Huge. Your equipment grows with you, but it returns to its natural size if removed or dropped. Your reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if you are a shipborn dragonkin), and you gain a +4 status bonus to melee damage. This transformation lasts for 10 minutes. You can end this transformation early as a single action that has the concentrate trait.

Plated Deflection.name: 镀层偏转 Plated Deflection
Plated Deflection.description:
你已掌握运用自己的板甲鳞片或所穿护甲来吸收毁灭性打击。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Z8GMkB50OfXBX67a]{板甲偏斜}反应。

You've mastered using your own plate scales or worn armor to absorb devastating strikes. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Z8GMkB50OfXBX67a]{Plate Deflection} reaction.

Urchin.name: 刺球怪 Urchin
Urchin.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发条件 一个生物擒抱你，或以徒手近战打击或非触及近战武器成功对你进行打击。

你弯动沿着头后部与颈部生长的棘刺，作为防御反应。攻击你的生物受到 @Damage[(floor((@actor.level + 1) / 3 + 1))d6[piercing]] 伤害，并必须对你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免。若其重度失败，目标还会受到 @Damage[(floor((@actor.level + 1) / 3 + 1))[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。到8级时，以及此后每3级，伤害增加1d6，持续流血伤害增加1。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Trigger A creature Grabs you or successfully Strikes you with an unarmed melee strike or a non-reach melee weapon.

You flex the spines running down the back of your head and neck as a defensive response. The attacking creature takes @Damage[(floor((@actor.level + 1) / 3 + 1))d6[piercing]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher. On a critical failure, the target also takes @Damage[(floor((@actor.level + 1) / 3 + 1))[persistent,bleed]] damage. At 8th level and every 3 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d6, and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1.

Danger Zone.name: 危险区域 Danger Zone
Danger Zone.description:
你的量子场与一个更危险的现实融合，变为危险地形，使敌人每次进入该区域内的一个方格时都会受到1点伤害。你在使用 Danger Zone 时选择伤害类型，可从以下类型中选择：@Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[acid]|options:area-damage]{强酸}、@Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]{钝击}、@Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[cold]|options:area-damage]{寒冷}、@Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[electricity]|options:area-damage]{电击}、@Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[fire]|options:area-damage]{火焰}、@Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[piercing]|options:area-damage]{穿刺}、@Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[slashing]|options:area-damage]{挥砍}，或 @Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[sonic]|options:area-damage]{音波}。在12级、16级和20级时，伤害提高1点。

Your quantum field merges with a more dangerous reality, becoming hazardous terrain that deals 1 damage to an enemy each time it enters a square in the area. You choose the damage type when you use Danger Zone, selecting from the following: @Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[acid]|options:area-damage]{acid}, @Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]{bludgeoning}, @Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[cold]|options:area-damage]{cold}, @Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[electricity]|options:area-damage]{electricity}, @Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[fire]|options:area-damage]{fire}, @Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[piercing]|options:area-damage]{piercing}, @Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[slashing]|options:area-damage]{slashing}, or @Damage[(max(1,(floor(@actor.level / 4) - 1)))[sonic]|options:area-damage]{sonic}. Increase the damage by 1 at 12th, 16th, and 20th levels.

Psychic Scholar.name: 心灵学者 Psychic Scholar
Psychic Scholar.description:
你可以在转瞬之间将海量信息传输到他人的心智之中。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs]{心灵链接} 作为一个1环天生异能奥术法术每日施放两次。

You can transfer vast amounts of information to the minds of others in mere moments. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs]{Mindlink} as a 1st-rank occult innate spell twice per day.

Bloody Wounds.name: 血腥伤口 Bloody Wounds
Bloody Wounds.description:
你知道如何瞄准你标记目标的要害部位，造成流血伤口。当你对你的标记目标造成重击时，你对该目标造成持续性流血伤害，数值等于你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} 伤害骰数量。

You know how to target your mark's vital spots, leaving bloody wounds. When you critically hit your mark, you deal persistent bleed damage to your mark equal to your number of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} damage dice.

Hush.name: 噤声 Hush
Hush.description:
频率 每天一次

你完全沉默下来，竭力将注意力集中在手头的问题上。你尝试进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}，并在此次技能检定中获得+2环境加值。如果你本应获得致命失败，则改为失败；如果你本应获得成功，则改为致命成功。

Frequency once per day

You fall utterly silent and focus strenuously on a problem at hand. You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} with a +2 circumstance bonus to the skill check. If you would get a critical failure, you get a failure instead, and if you would get a success, you get a critical success instead.

Tentacle Whip.name: 触手鞭 Tentacle Whip
Tentacle Whip.description:
你长出一条能够如鞭子般抽击的触手。你获得一种触手无武装攻击，造成 1d6 钝击伤害。你的触手属于斗殴武器组，并具有飞螅族、灵巧、触及和无武装特征。

You grow a tentacle that can lash out like a whip. You gain a tentacle unarmed attack that deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage. Your tentacle is in the brawling weapon group and has the barathu, finesse, reach, and unarmed traits.

Corona.name: 日冕 Corona
Corona.description:
你释放出一圈恒星能量形成的日冕，位于一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 中，并持续到你下个回合结束。你可以维持你的日冕，最长持续 1 分钟。如果你的调谐发生变化，你的日冕的调谐效果也会相应改变。处于引力子调谐时，你的日冕具有黑暗（特征）。处于光子调谐时，你的日冕具有光亮（特征）。

引力子调谐 你的日冕是阻止光穿透该区域的黑暗。这视为一个 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness} 法术，其法术环阶等于你等级的一半。

光子调谐 你的日冕是洒下明亮光照的恒星之光，照亮该区域（并在接下来的 20 尺内提供微光）。当处于你日冕的明亮光照范围内时，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} 生物会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}，而已经处于隐蔽状态的生物将不再处于隐蔽状态。

You unleash a corona of stellar energy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10], which lasts until the end of your next turn. You can Sustain your Corona for up to 1 minute. If your attunement changes, your Corona's attunement effect changes to match. While graviton-attuned, your Corona has the darkness trait. While photon-attuned, your Corona has the light trait.

Graviton-Attuned Your Corona is darkness that prevents light from penetrating the area. This acts as a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness} spell with a spell rank equal to half your level.

Photon-Attuned Your Corona is solar light that sheds bright light in the area (and dim light for the next 20 feet). While within your Corona's bright light, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and creatures already concealed are no longer concealed.

Shy.name: 害羞的 Shy
Shy.description:
无论是通过魔法训练、科技魔法身体装备，还是卓越的脱逃与闪避训练，你都设法学会了如何从众目睽睽之下淡出。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术} 作为一个2环奥术先天法术每天施放两次，但该法术每次的持续时间只有5分钟。

Whether through magical training, a technomagical body rig, or superior escape and evasion training, you've managed to learn how to fade from plain sight. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} as a 2nd-rank arcane innate spell twice per day, but the spell has a duration of only 5 minutes each time.

Deific Obedience.name: 神祇服从 Deific Obedience
Deific Obedience.description:
你已将自己奉献给某位神祇或一整个万神殿。只要你遵循该神祇的典范与禁忌，你就会获得其赐予的1环法术，作为你每天可以施放一次的神圣先天法术，并将其升阶至3环；如果你达到传奇，该法术则升阶至4环。若你反复违背你神祇的典范或做出禁忌之举，你就会失去此能力，且只能通过一次赎罪仪式重新获得。

You've dedicated yourself to a deity or pantheon. As long as you follow the edicts and anathema of that deity, you gain their granted 1st-rank spell as a divine innate spell you can cast once per day, heightened to 3rd rank; if you're legendary, the spell is heightened to 4th rank. If you repeatedly break your deity's edicts or perform anathemas, you lose this ability, and it can only be regained with an atone ritual.

Brutal Anatomy.name: 残暴解剖学 Brutal Anatomy
Brutal Anatomy.description:
你是天生的掠食者，受过训练，能将自己身体的一部分当作武器使用。选择此专长时，你获得以下一种徒手攻击，由你选择：爪击、颚击或尾巴。这些攻击均属于搏斗武器组。

爪击徒手攻击造成 1d6 点挥砍伤害，并具有灵巧、灵动、徒手和维斯克蜥人特征。

颚击徒手攻击造成 1d6 点穿刺伤害，并具有擒抱、徒手和维斯克蜥人特征。

尾巴徒手攻击造成 1d6 点钝击伤害，并具有横扫、绊摔、徒手和维斯克蜥人特征。

在5级时，每当你以这些攻击之一造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

特殊 你可以选取此专长三次。每次选取时，从上述选项中选择一种不同的攻击。

You're a natural predator trained to use part of your body as a weapon. When you select this feat, you gain one of the following unarmed attacks of your choice: claw, jaws, or tail. Each of these attacks is in the brawling weapon group.

A claw unarmed attack deals 1d6 slashing damage and has the agile, finesse, unarmed, and vesk traits.

A jaws unarmed attack deals 1d6 piercing damage and has the grapple, unarmed, and vesk traits.

A tail unarmed attack deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and has the sweep, trip, unarmed, and vesk traits.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these attacks, you get its critical specialization effect.

Special You can take this feat three times. Each time you do, select a different attack from the options listed above.

Embrace the Magic.name: 拥抱魔法 Embrace the Magic
Embrace the Magic.description:
你明白，银河系是一个充满奥秘与奇异现象的奇妙之地。你可以随意将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法} 戏法作为奥术先天法术施放。戏法会强化至等同于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术环阶。

此外，你在辨识魔法的技能检定上获得 +1 环境加值。

You understand that the galaxy is a wondrous place full of arcane mysteries and strange phenomena. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{Detect Magic} cantrip as an arcane innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

In addition, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to skill checks to Identify Magic.

Augmented Body.name: 强化义躯 Augmented Body
Augmented Body.description:
你植入一项物品等级等于或低于你角色等级的增强件。该增强件不计入你的植入总数限制。你第一次选择此专长时，只要你获得的增强件物品等级为1或更低，它就是免费的。你可以在获得等级时将其替换为另一项增强件来升级这项增强件，或者花费停工期更换该增强件，视同重训一项专长。每次你通过替换来升级该增强件时，都必须支付原增强件与新增强件之间的差价。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长，每次选择不同的增强件。重训此专长需要支付原增强件的费用。

You implant one augmentation with an item level equal to your character level or lower. This augmentation doesn't count against your total implant limit. The first time you take this feat, the augmentation you receive is free as long as its item level is 1 or lower. You can upgrade this augmentation by swapping it out with another augmentation when you gain a level or by spending downtime replacing the augmentation as though changing out a feat. When you swap out the augmentation, you must pay the difference between the original and new augmentation each time you upgrade.

Special You can select this feat multiple times, choosing a different augmentation each time. Retraining this feat requires paying the cost of the original augmentation.

Battleblessed.name: 战佑者 Battleblessed
Battleblessed.description:
你是一位卓越的战舞者与战士，受先知赐福，经由祖传传统磨炼，并且能够施展超越同侪天生能力的壮举。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{顺风}，作为一个你每天可以施放一次的1环原始先天法术。

You're an accomplished battledancer and warrior, blessed by seers, honed by ancestral tradition, and capable of feats beyond the natural abilities of your peers. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind} as a 1st-rank primal innate spell that you can cast once per day.

Harmonic Shielding.name: 谐波护盾 Harmonic Shielding
Harmonic Shielding.description:
你已经学会补偿自己对声音的过度敏感。你获得等同于你等级一半的音波抗性。若你在对抗音波效果的豁免检定中获得成功，则改为获得重成功。

You've learned to compensate for your hypersensitivity to sound. You gain sonic resistance equal to half your level. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a sonic effect, you get a critical success instead.

Infinite Magic.name: 无尽魔法 Infinite Magic
Infinite Magic.description:
你从其他现实中借用法术。每天两次，在你已耗尽相应法术环阶的法术位后，你仍可以施放一个9环或更低环阶的法术；你用此专长施放的两个法术其法术环阶必须不同。

You borrow spells from other realities. Twice per day, you can cast a 9th-rank or lower spell after you've run out of spell slots of the appropriate spell rank; the two spells you cast with this feat must be of different spell ranks.

Unleash Hell!.name: 释放地狱！ Unleash Hell!
Unleash Hell!.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 穿着定制有地狱骑士纹章的护甲。

你的护甲喷涌出一股地狱火焰，形成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]，造成每等级 @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[@actor.flags.system.hellknight.order-damage]|options:area-damage] 伤害，伤害类型由你所选择的地狱骑士团决定（@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic|options:area-effect]）；若这样会更为不利（由 GM 判定），则生物改为受到 @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[spirit]|options:area-damage]{精神伤害}。

Frequency once per day

Requirements wearing armor customized with Hellknight regalia.

Your armor unleashes a gout of hellfire in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], dealing @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[@actor.flags.system.hellknight.order-damage]|options:area-damage] damage per level of a type determined by your chosen Hellknight order (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic|options:area-effect]); a creature takes @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[spirit]|options:area-damage]{spirit damage} instead if that would be more detrimental (as determined by the GM).

Experienced Professional.name: 熟练工 Experienced Professional
Experienced Professional.description: 你小心翼翼地维持自己的专业水准，防止把事情搞砸。在使用学识技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{赚取收入 Earn Income}时，若你骰出大失败的结果，改为获得失败。若你在学识技能上的熟练度达到专家，你赚取收入检定失败时可获得的收入翻倍，原本结果为大失败的情况除外。

Quick Break.name: 快速休息 Quick Break
Quick Break.description:
你学会了比以前更快地准备你的天生武器。从你身体上折下刀刃不再具有操作特征，并且从一个1动作活动改为自由动作，而你的徒手攻击现在被视为具有先进武器强化。

You learn to prepare your natural weapons much more quickly than before. Breaking off knives from your body loses the manipulate trait and becomes a free action instead of a 1-action activity, and your unarmed attacks are now treated as though they had the advanced weapon improvement.

Debris Zone.name: 碎片区 Debris Zone
Debris Zone.description:
无论是被残骸覆盖、部分被淹没，还是因其他原因而难以通行，你的量子场区域都会变为困难地形。

Whether it's covered in debris, partially flooded, or otherwise troublesome to traverse, the area of your quantum field becomes difficult terrain.

Big Bang.name: 大爆炸 Big Bang
Big Bang.description:
频率 每小时一次

要求 你处于光子调谐状态。

你显现出物质宇宙最初时刻的太空力量碎片，释放出一阵涤荡万物的太空烈焰爆发，将一切还原为其最基本的组成部分，甚至能突破魔法防御。这对 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的所有生物造成 @Damage[(max((@actor.level - 4),10))d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害。你以及任意数量与你相邻的盟友不会受到这次大爆炸的影响。受影响的生物可以尝试一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[reflex|against:solarian|options:area-effect] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并受到 @Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]|options:photon-attuned] 伤害。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并受到 @Damage[4d6[persistent,fire]|options:photon-attuned] 伤害，且你可以尝试反制该生物身上的一个法术，使用你等级的一半（向上取整）作为反制阶级。

等级（+1） 伤害提高 1d6。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You're photon-attuned.

You manifest a fragment of the cosmic forces from the Universe's first moments, unleashing a blast of scouring cosmic fire that reverts all things to their basic components and overcomes even magical defenses. This deals @Damage[(max((@actor.level - 4),10))d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. You and any number of adjacent allies are unaffected by this Big Bang. Affected creatures can attempt a @Check[reflex|against:solarian|options:area-effect] save against your class DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and @Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]|options:photon-attuned] damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and @Damage[4d6[persistent,fire]|options:photon-attuned] damage, and you can attempt to counteract a spell on the creature, using half your level, rounded up, as the counteract rank.

Level (+1) Increase the damage by 1d6.

Linnorm Bite.name: 林虫之咬 Linnorm Bite
Linnorm Bite.description:
你的祖先很久以前曾向一头灵蛇宣誓效忠。尽管你的家族已经不再受缚于侍奉这种生物，但它的一丝影响仍残留在你体内，表现为格外长而锋利的牙齿。你获得一个造成 @Damage[1d6[piercing]] 伤害的颚击无武装攻击。你的颚击属于搏击组，并具有灵巧和无武装特征。

Your ancestors swore allegiance to a linnorm long ago. Though your family is no longer bound to serve the creature, a bit of its influence remains in you, manifesting in particularly long and sharp teeth. You gain a jaws unarmed attack that deals @Damage[1d6[piercing]] damage. Your jaws are in the brawling group and have the finesse and unarmed traits.

Revitalized by the Drift.name: 受漂流域焕新之力 revitalized Revitalized by the Drift
Revitalized by the Drift.description:
漂流域会振奋你的精神并恢复你的活力，从生理上治愈你的伤口。若你在漂流域内休息 10 分钟，你获得等同于你的 @Damage[(@actor.level *@actor.system.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]{体质调整值 × 你的等级} 的生命值。此效果可与你从 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势} 获得的任何治疗累加。

每小时一次，你可以专注或冥想自己与漂流域的内在连接。这是一项持续 10 分钟并具有专注和探索特征的活动。如此做时，你视同于在漂流域内休息了 10 分钟，但你因该专长恢复的生命值数量减半。

The Drift revitalizes your spirit and restores your vitality, physically healing your wounds. If you rest for 10 minutes while within the Drift, you gain Hit Points equal to your @Damage[(@actor.level *@actor.system.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]{Constitution modifier × your level}. This is cumulative with any healing you receive from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.

Once per hour, you can focus or meditate on your inherent connection to the Drift. This is a 10-minute activity that has the concentrate and exploration traits. When you do, you're treated as if you'd rested for 10 minutes while in the Drift, save that the number of Hit Points you regain from this feat is halved.

Necrotized.name: 亡骸化 Necrotized
Necrotized.description:
你在死前由自己或他人进行的死灵实验中，有意成为了一名活尸裔。这样的实验强化了你对死亡的防御，但也使你看起来比起活物更像一具尸体。你获得“顽强不屈”专长，并且当死亡效果将你降至 0 生命值时，你不再因此被杀死。这使你不会被自动杀死，也不会让你的濒死值自动降低，但这并不意味着你免疫该法术或效果的其他部分。例如，你仍然会因死亡幻象法术受到精神伤害并陷入恐惧，只是不会因此立刻死亡。

You became a borai intentionally through necromantic experimentation conducted by yourself or someone else before you died. This experimentation has strengthened your defenses against death but has also made you look more like a corpse than a living being. You gain the Diehard feat, and death effects no longer kill you if they reduce you to 0 Hit Points. This keeps you from being automatically killed or from having your dying value automatically decrease, but it doesn't make you immune to other parts of the spell or effect. For example, you can still take mental damage and become frightened by a vision of death spell, you just don't instantly die from it.

Center Thoughts.name: 中心思想 Center Thoughts
Center Thoughts.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你在对抗一个精神效果的意志豁免检定中失败。

你集中思绪并专注心神，摆脱情绪上的混乱和有害的精神侵扰。重掷这次触发的豁免检定，并采用更好的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail a Will saving throw against a mental effect.

You center your thoughts and focus your mind, shaking off emotional turmoil and harmful mental intrusions. Reroll the triggering saving throw and use the better result.

Stand Aside.name: 闪开 Stand Aside
Stand Aside.description:
你利用自己的大型体型和额外肢体，迅速协助体型较小的盟友为你腾出空间。行进，移动距离最多等同于你的速度。若你在移动结束时所处的位置中，有一个或多个你所占据的方格被盟友占据，则每个这样的盟友都可以立刻以自由动作进行一步移动，使其不再与你占据同一空间。若这无法实现，则你必须如常结束你的移动，使自己不与盟友共享空间。

You use your large size and extra limbs to quickly aid your smaller allies in making room for you. Stride up to your Speed. If you end your movement in a position where one or more of your spaces are occupied by an ally, each such ally can immediately Step as a free action so that they are no longer occupying the same space as you. If this isn't possible, you must end your movement so that you aren't sharing a space with an ally, as normal.

Focus Pheromones.name: 专注信息素 Focus Pheromones
Focus Pheromones.description:
频率 每小时一次

你可以有意释放你的信息素，以操纵周围之人的反应。如果你的下一个动作是尝试进行一次 Deception 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造牵制}，一次 Diplomacy 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}，或一次 Intimidation 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{恫吓}，则将该技能检定掷两次并使用较好的结果。

Frequency once per hour

You can purposefully deploy your pheromones to manipulate the reactions of those around you. If your next action is to attempt a Deception check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, a Diplomacy check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request}, or an Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}, roll that skill check twice and use the better result.

Punishing Salvo.name: 惩戒齐射 Punishing Salvo
Punishing Salvo.description:
需求 你本回合的上一个动作是一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击} 攻击。

你知道倾泻一阵弹幕足以让大多数敌人倒下。你使用同一把武器对你的主要目标进行一次后续打击。使用此动作时，忽略你武器上的笨重特征。这不会形成一次新的区域攻击，并视为一次以主要目标为对象进行的打击。

Requirements Your last action this turn was an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} attack.

You know unleashing a barrage of gunfire can bring most enemies low. You make a follow-up Strike against your primary target using the same weapon. Ignore the unwieldy trait on your weapon when using this action. This doesn't make a new area attack and is treated as a Strike made using primary target.

Scrupulous Stalker.name: 一丝不苟的追猎者 Scrupulous Stalker
Scrupulous Stalker.description:
频率 每轮一次

你迅速扫视周围环境以寻找威胁。你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}。如果你使用电磁感应，则你在此次检定中获得 +2 情境加值。

Frequency once per round

You quickly scan your surroundings for threats. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}. If you use electromagnetic sense, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to this check.

Experienced Smuggler.name: 走私老手 Experienced Smuggler
Experienced Smuggler.description:
你经常偷带东西混过当局的检查。当GM为你暗骰隐秘检定以确定被动观察者能否注意到你藏匿的小物品时，GM使用骰出的数字与10当中较高者作为掷骰结果，加上你的隐秘调整值后得出隐秘检定结果。若你在隐秘技能上的熟练度达到大师，GM使用骰出的数字或15；若达到传奇，你对被动观察者隐藏小物品时自动成功。在有生物主动搜查你隐藏的物品，尝试察觉检定时，本专长不会提供任何好处。

PFS笔记 此专长允许你使用黑街学识进行赚取收入行动，任务等级为你的等级-1（而非通常的等级-2）

Congregant's Acumen.name: 会众的敏锐 Congregant's Acumen
Congregant's Acumen.description:
你决心积累财富，并将一部分收益寄回家乡。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外知识} 通用专长，可用于你自选的一项知识技能——你选择的知识必须与你的生意或职业相关，例如会计知识、企业知识或法律知识。你在使用所选知识进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{谋生} 检定时获得 +1 处境加值。此外，每当你成功谋生时，你还会额外获得 10%。这笔额外收入会被直接转入你家乡社群的账户，而你无法以任何方式接触或使用它。

You're determined to amass a fortune and send a portion of the profits back home. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for one Lore skill of your choice—the Lore you choose must be related to your business or profession, such as Accounting Lore, Corporate Lore, or Legal Lore. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income} with your chosen Lore. In addition, whenever you successfully Earn Income, you earn an additional 10%. This additional income is transferred directly to your home community's accounts and can't be accessed or used by you in any way.

Improved Undead Senses.name: 强化不死生物感官 Improved Undead Senses
Improved Undead Senses.description:
你感知活体与不死生物能量的能力得到提升，并学会了如何区分你在一个区域内能够感知到的实体。你的生命感知变为精确感知，范围为60尺。

Your ability to sense living and undead energies improves, and you learn how to differentiate between entities you can sense in an area. Your lifesense becomes a precise sense with a range of 60 feet.

Grandmother's Favorite.name: 祖母的最爱 Grandmother's Favorite
Grandmother's Favorite.description:
你对鼠祖母的坚定信仰带来了更多回报。你获得 divine decree，作为一个7环神圣先天法术，每天一次。此外，每月一次，每当你本应死亡时，你的身体会转而变成一群四散的老鼠。经过 [[/gmr 1d6 #days]]{1d6天} 后，这些老鼠会在由GM选择的安全地点聚集（如果可能，则是在一处献给老鼠婆的场所），并重塑你的身体。你将以最大生命值复活。

Your steadfast faith in Grandmother Rat yields more rewards. You gain divine decree as a 7th-rank divine innate spell once per day. Additionally, once per month, whenever you would die, your body instead transforms into a swarm of dispersing rats. After [[/gmr 1d6 #days]]{1d6 days}, these rats gather in a safe space of the GM's choosing (a site dedicated to Lao Shu Po, if possible) and reform your body. You're returned to life at your maximum Hit Points.

Guilt Trip.name: 负罪绊倒 Guilt Trip
Guilt Trip.description:
触发 你能看见的一个生物以一次近战 Strike 对你造成伤害。

你向攻击者投以一个彻底失望的眼神，令人心碎到足以让其为自己的行为感到羞愧。攻击者必须进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免检定，对抗你的职业 DC 或法术 DC，以较高者为准；若失败，则因愧疚而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。若其严重失败，则其未能将这次攻击贯彻到底，使此次触发对你造成的伤害减少其力量调整值。

Trigger A creature you can see damages you with a melee Strike.

You give your attacker a look of utter disappointment so heartbreaking that it causes them to feel shame for their actions. The attacker must succeed at a @Check[will|against:class-spell] saving throw against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher, or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} from the guilt. On a critical failure, they fail to follow through on the attack, reducing the triggering damage dealt to you by their Strength modifier.

Suction Cups.name: 吸盘 Suction Cups
Suction Cups.description:
你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.34E7k2YRcsOU5uyl]{变形}，使你的四肢上长出数百个吸盘。只要你穿着轻甲或不穿甲，你就获得15英尺的攀爬速度。

You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.34E7k2YRcsOU5uyl]{Change Shape} to sprout hundreds of suction cups across your limbs. You gain a 15-foot climb Speed as long as you're wearing light armor or no armor.

Creative Combat.name: 创意战斗 Creative Combat
Creative Combat.description:
通过实验、改造，或者也许只是因为你的肢体自然磨损，你能够以比单纯猛击、刺击或撕咬更具创造性的方式运用你的天生武器。从以下列表中选择两个特性，并将其添加到你族裔的徒手攻击中：背刺者、回摆、震荡、缴械、强力、招架、推撞、横扫和绊摔。

特殊 部分尸族角色可以将此专长的益处应用于他们通过其血统能力制造出的刀刃。

Through experimentation, manipulation, or perhaps just due to natural wear and tear of your limbs, you are able to use your natural weaponry in more creative ways than just bashing, stabbing, or biting. Select two of the traits from the following list and add them to your ancestry's unarmed attacks: backstabber, backswing, concussive, disarm, forceful, parry, shove, sweep, and trip.

Special Partial corpsefolk characters may apply this feat's benefit to the knives they create with their lineage ability.

Survey Wildlife.name: 荒野见识 Survey Wildlife
Survey Wildlife.description:
你可以花费10分钟评估你周围的区域，寻找生物留下的迹象。尝试进行一次生存检定，对抗由GM根据这些迹象有多明显而决定的DC。若成功，你可以尝试进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定，并承受–2减值，以仅凭这些迹象进一步了解这些生物。若你的生存熟练等级为大师，你不会承受该减值。

You can spend 10 minutes assessing the area around you for signs of creatures. Attempt a Survival check against a DC determined by the GM based on how obvious the signs are. On a success, you can attempt a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check with a –2 penalty to learn more about the creatures just from these signs. If you're a master in Survival, you don't take the penalty.

Skirmish Strike.name: 散兵打击 Skirmish Strike
Skirmish Strike.description:
你在移动时发动攻击，在战斗中保持机动，让你的敌人始终捉摸不定。要么先跨步再打击，要么先打击再跨步。

You attack as you move, staying mobile as you fight and keeping your enemies on their toes. Either Step and then Strike, or Strike and then Step.

Dive for Cover.name: 卧倒寻找掩护 Dive for Cover
Dive for Cover.description:
当受到威胁时，你可以迅速飞身扑倒并找个地方隐蔽。你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃}，以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}状态落地，并立即@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩护}，使你能够蜷伏隐蔽，并获得对远程攻击的更佳掩护。

When threatened, you can quickly take a dive and find somewhere to hunker down. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}, land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, and immediately @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}, which allows you to hunker down and gain greater cover against ranged attacks.

Brutal Blows.name: 残暴重击 Brutal Blows
Brutal Blows.description:
需求 你至少有一只空出的活动手，并且另一对手中未持有任何物品。

你毫不留情地猛击对手。对一个相邻生物进行一次拳击攻击。如果此次攻击命中，你会用未活动的手自动对目标执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}，并以以下成功条件进行第二次拳击攻击；第二次攻击如常适用你的多重攻击减值。

大成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，并在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}。

成功 目标在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。

Requirements You have at least one active hand free and are holding nothing in your other pair of hands.

You pummel an opponent mercilessly. Make a fist Strike against an adjacent creature. If the Strike hits, you automatically @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} the target in your inactive hands and make a second fist Strike with the following success conditions; the second Strike applies your multiple attack penalty as normal.

Critical Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Undying Defiance.name: 不朽抗命 Undying Defiance
Undying Defiance.description:
你嘲笑圣洁象征，并以断续祈祷的声音为乐。与许多其他尸族相比，你与自己作为不死生物的存在状态更加契合，而你现在可以利用这一点来抵御那些试图运用宗教能量将你毁灭之人。你对所有神术效果和法术的豁免检定获得+1环境加值。

You laugh at holy symbols and delight in the sound of faltering prayers. You are more in tune with your existence as an undead than many other corpsefolk are, and you can now leverage that to hold off those who would wield religious energies to try and unmake you. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to all saving throws against divine effects and spells.

Shambling Corpsefolk.name: 蹒跚尸族 Shambling Corpsefolk
Shambling Corpsefolk.description:
大多数生物都会把你误认为一具没有心智、蹒跚而行的僵尸，甚至是一具毫无生气的尸体，而你已经学会了如何利用自己坟墓般的外表为自己谋利。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Q6vXNDmTwDom59GV]{装死} 专长，即使你不满足其先决条件。若战斗开始时你正 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{伪装成} 一具尸体，则你使用欺瞒来进行先攻掷骰时获得 +2 环境加值。

Most creatures mistake you for a mindless, shambling zombie or even a lifeless corpse, and you've learned how to use your sepulchral appearance to your advantage. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Q6vXNDmTwDom59GV]{Feign Death} feat, even if you don't meet the prerequisites. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus when using Deception to roll initiative if you are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonating} a corpse when combat begins.

Phishing Expertise.name: 网络钓鱼专长 Phishing Expertise
Phishing Expertise.description:
你擅长实施数字诈骗计划。你可以用 [[/act create-forgery skill=computers]]{计算机} 而非社群 来伪造文书。数字伪造会与你的计算机 DC 进行比较。利用通过成功伪造获得的信息通常还需要额外的检定，包括欺骗和社群，而撒网过广则有可能让潜在受害者识破你的诡计，并向当局举报你。

You're skilled at running digital fraud schemes. You can Create a Forgery using [[/act create-forgery skill=computers]]{Computers} instead of Society. Digital forgeries are compared against your Computers DC. Using information gained from a successful forgery usually requires additional checks, including Deception and Society, and casting too wide a net runs the risk of a potential victim figuring out your ruse and turning you in to the authorities.

Necrogourmand.name: 食尸飨宴者 Necrogourmand
Necrogourmand.description:
无论是通过赎罪、超自然进化，还是突变，你的内脏都已重新生长，并以某种方式重新与你的灵魂连接，使你再次能够从进食和饮水中获得愉悦，让你呈现出红润健康的外表。这使你在伪装成非不死生物时进行 @Check[deception|options:necrogourmand] 检定获得+1环境加值。你现在也可以从具有命能特征且通过食用、摄入、吸收或注射使用的物品（如血清或油剂）中接受治疗，但你只获得正常治疗量的一半（向上取整）。

Whether through atonement, supernatural evolution, or mutation, your internal organs have regrown and reconnected to your soul in such a way that you can gain pleasure from eating and drinking once again, giving you a flushed, healthy appearance. This gives you a +1 status bonus on @Check[deception|options:necrogourmand] checks to appear as a non-undead creature. You can also now receive healing from items with the vitality trait that are eaten, ingested, absorbed, or injected (such as serums or oils), but you only receive half the normal amount of healing (rounded up).

Vicious Breath.name: 恶毒吐息 Vicious Breath
Vicious Breath.description:
你龙息的强烈威能会摧残环境与敌人。当你使用龙人吐息时，你吐息的区域会变为持续 1 分钟的困难地形。任何进入你龙人吐息区域的生物，或在其回合结束时处于你吐息区域内的生物，都会受到 @Damage[4d6[@actor.flags.system.dragonkinBreath.damageType]] 点相同类型的伤害（@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 对抗与你龙人吐息相同 DC 的豁免）。

The intensity of your draconic breath lays waste to the environment and your foes. When you use Dragonkin Breath, the area of your breath becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute. Any creature that enters the area of your dragonkin breath or is occupying your breath's area at the end of its turn takes @Damage[4d6[@actor.flags.system.dragonkinBreath.damageType]] damage of the same type (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the same DC as your dragonkin breath).

Toppling Shot.name: 倾倒射击 Toppling Shot
Toppling Shot.description:
需求 你正持用一把枪。

你将射击瞄准为打乱敌人的平衡，将其向后推开或击倒。你先@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后对你的标记进行一次远程打击。若此次打击命中，目标被击退5尺。若此次强制移动会导致其与一个生物或物体碰撞，则目标和该生物（若有）都受到等同于你瞄准伤害的钝击伤害。若为重击，目标还会被击倒至@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{伏卧}。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You aim your shots to unbalance your foe, pushing them back or knocking them over. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then make a ranged Strike against your mark. If the Strike hits, the target is knocked back 5 feet. If this forced movement would cause them to collide with a creature or object, both the target and the creature (if any) take bludgeoning damage equal to your Aim damage. On a critical hit, the target is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Expanded Solar Reserves.name: 扩展太阳储备 Expanded Solar Reserves
Expanded Solar Reserves.description:
你的星芒纹记能够储存更多的太阳能量储备，使你能更频繁地治疗自己。汲取太阳活力的频率提高为每小时一次，而非每天一次。

Your starburst markings can store much greater reserves of solar energy, enabling you to heal yourself more frequently. The frequency of Siphon Solar Vitality increases to once per hour, rather than once per day.

Homing Mote.name: 追踪微粒 Homing Mote
Homing Mote.description:
你已经像依赖你的太阳武器一样依赖远程微粒。将你的太阳耀斑的射程增量变为三倍。当你对位于你的第一射程增量内的目标进行一次太阳耀斑打击时，你无视该目标的隐蔽和掩护。

You've come to rely on ranged motes as much as you do your solar weapon. Triple the range increment of your solar flare. When you make a solar flare Strike against a target within your first range increment, you ignore the target's concealment and cover.

Syncretic Epiphany.name: 融汇顿悟 Syncretic Epiphany
Syncretic Epiphany.description:
深入探究你自身连接的深处，你理解了自己那部分现实如何与另一部分相互连结。你学会了该连接的先进灵悟法术，该连接会授予先决连接技能的受训。

Plumbing the depths of your own connection, you understand how your piece of reality interconnects with another. You learn the advanced epiphany spell of the connection that grants training in the prerequisite connection skill.

Trick Magic Item.name: 巧取魔法物品 Trick Magic Item
Trick Magic Item.description:
你检查一件自己通常无法使用的魔法物品，试图欺骗它并暂时将其激活。例如，这可能允许一名士兵从法术宝石或法术芯片中施放一个法术，或允许一名秘学者使用法术宝石施放一个不在其连接传统列表上的法术。你必须知道激活该物品会产生什么效果，否则你不能尝试欺骗它。

进行一次使用与该物品魔法传统相对应技能的检定；如果你正尝试从该物品中施放法术，则也可以使用与拥有该法术的传统列表相对应的技能。相关技能为：奥秘学对应奥术，自然对应原始，神秘学对应秘奥，宗教对应神圣；若物品具有魔法（特征）而没有传统特征，则上述四者中的任意一个都可以。GM根据该物品的等级决定DC（可能会根据物品或情况进行调整）。

如果你激活了一件需要法术攻击调整值或法术DC的魔法物品，而你对相关属性没有熟练度，则以你的等级作为熟练加值，并采用你的智力、感知或魅力调整值中最高的一个。如果你在该物品传统所对应的适当技能上达到大师熟练，则改为使用受训熟练加值；如果你达到传奇熟练，则改为使用专家熟练加值。

成功 在当前回合的剩余时间内，你可以花费动作来激活该物品，如同你通常能够使用它一样。

失败 你本回合不能使用该物品，也不能再次尝试欺骗它，但你可以在后续回合再次尝试。

大失败 你不能使用该物品，并且直到你的下一次每日准备之前都不能再次尝试欺骗它。

You examine a magic item you normally couldn't use in an effort to fool it and activate it temporarily. For example, this might allow a soldier to cast a spell from a spell gem or spellchip or allow a mystic to cast a spell that's not on their connection's tradition list using a spell gem. You must know what activating the item does, or you can't attempt to trick it.

Attempt a check using the skill matching the item's magic tradition, or matching a tradition that has the spell on its list, if you're trying to cast a spell from the item. The relevant skills are Arcana for arcane, Nature for primal, Occultism for occult, Religion for divine, or any of the four for an item that has the magical trait and not a tradition trait. The GM determines the DC based on the item's level (possibly adjusted depending on the item or situation).

If you activate a magic item that requires a spell attack modifier or spell DC and you don't have proficiency in the relevant statistic, use your level as your proficiency bonus and the highest of your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma modifiers. If you're a master in the appropriate skill for the item's tradition, you instead use the trained proficiency bonus; if you're legendary, you instead use the expert proficiency bonus.

Success For the rest of the current turn, you can spend actions to activate the item as if you could normally use it.

Failure You can't use the item or try to trick it again this turn, but you can try again on subsequent turns.

Critical Failure You can't use the item, and you can't try to trick it again until your next daily preparations.

Specialized Operative.name: 专业特工 Specialized Operative
Specialized Operative.description:
选择一个专长方向。你在由你的专长方向决定的一项技能上变为受训；如果你已经在该技能上受训，则你改为在另一项你自选的技能上变为受训。你获得一个与该技能相关的技能专长。你不会从你的专长方向获得任何其他益处。

Choose a specialization. You become trained in one skill determined by your specialization; if you were already trained in that skill, you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain a skill feat associated with that skill. You don't gain any other benefits from your specialization.

Menacing Laughter.name: 狞笑嘲笑 Menacing Laughter
Menacing Laughter.description:
你的笑声（或其他发声）在你的武器开火的喧嚣声中依然清晰可闻。对30英尺内每个处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态的生物尝试进行一次威吓检定，以对其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫败士气}。

Your laughter (or other vocalization) remains audible over the din of your weapons fire. Attempt an Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} each creature within 30 feet who's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed}.

Cornered Fury.name: 鼠急跳墙 Cornered Fury
Cornered Fury.description:
当你在身体对抗上处于劣势时，你会以出人意料的凶猛进行战斗。如果一个体型比你更大的敌人对你造成重击并对你造成伤害，该敌人对你而言陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续 1 轮。

When you're physically outmatched, you fight with unexpected ferocity. If a foe of a larger size than you critically hits and damages you, that foe is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to you for 1 round.

Clinging Flare.name: 黏附闪焰 Clinging Flare
Clinging Flare.description:
你的耀斑在命中时缠绕住敌人，使其受困。进行一次太阳耀斑打击。若命中，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{动弹不得}，直到其下个回合结束或其成功挣脱（对抗你的职业 DC），以先发生者为准。若重击，目标还会额外陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续至其不再处于动弹不得为止。

Your flare wraps around your foes on impact, entangling them. Make a solar flare Strike. On a hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until the end of its next turn or until it Escapes (against your class DC), whichever comes first. On a critical hit, the target is additionally @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for as long as it's immobilized.

From Hope.name: 来自霍普 From Hope
From Hope.description:
你相信，即使面对不可能之事，奇迹也会从希望中诞生。正如拉约克重燃的光芒一般，你始终将这簇希望的火花怀抱于心，并能将心神专注于它以施展魔法。你恢复 1 点专注点数，最多恢复至你的通常上限。

You believe that even in the face of the impossible, from hope spring miracles. Much like Lajok's rekindled light, you always carry this spark of hope in your heart and can focus upon it to make magic. You regain 1 Focus Point, up to your usual maximum.

Internal Compartment.name: 臂装空腔 Internal Compartment
Internal Compartment.description:
你可以把一个至多为轻负载的物体藏在你一只前臂的空腔里。以这种方式存储物品时需要三个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{交互 Interact}动作。

当其他人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k]{盗窃 Steal}你手臂内的物品时，该检定的DC获到+4环境加值。

如果你在你的手臂里藏了一把武器，你可以用一个交互动作把武器抽出到相应的空手中，然后用该武器进行一次打击。

Experienced Tracker.name: 追迹老手 Experienced Tracker
Experienced Tracker.description: 追踪是你的习性，如有必要，你在跟随一道踪迹时可以毫无间断。通过让生存检定承受-5减值，你可以在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪 Track}时保持全速移动。若你在生存技能上的熟练度达到大师，无需承受该-5减值。若达到传奇，你在追踪时不再需要每小时骰一次新的生存检定，但在踪迹出现重大变化时，你仍然需要再次检定。

Memory Shield.name: 记忆护盾 Memory Shield
Memory Shield.description:
频率 每日一次

触发条件 你受到一个造成活力伤害的效果的伤害。

你汲取自己生前的珍贵记忆，以此保护自己，抵御那些本应将不死生物从物质宇宙中净除的能量。你获得等同于你等级的、针对此次触发伤害的抗性。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You take damage from an effect that deals vitality damage.

You draw upon precious memories from your life to shield you against the energies that would nominally purge undead creatures from the universe. You gain resistance to the triggering damage equal to your level.

That'll Show 'Em.name: 让他们瞧瞧厉害 That'll Show 'Em
That'll Show 'Em.description:
当你警告一名盟友有攻击来袭时，你会紧接着向敌人开火。每轮中你第一次使用你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.60BRmtuNHT6mpJOH]{Watch Out} 反应动作时，你可以对触发该反应的生物进行一次近战或远程打击。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。若你命中，则你的目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}，直到其下一回合开始。

When you warn an ally of an attack, you follow up with a shot at your enemy. The first time each round you use your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.60BRmtuNHT6mpJOH]{Watch Out} reaction, you can make a melee or ranged Strike against the triggering creature. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike. If you hit, your target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of its next turn.

Craft Anything.name: 天工开物 Craft Anything
Craft Anything.description: 你可以突破限制，找出办法制造任何东西。只要你有相应的手艺技能专长（比如用来制作魔法物品的魔法手艺），等级达到物品等级，并且熟练度达到需求，就可以忽略其它所有条件，比如特定族裔或提供法术的需求。若某项需求会增加物品的价格，你依然必须支付该价格（包括施放本身有金钱花费的法术）。你无法忽略有专门许可和制作方法的特殊物品的需求，比如神器。由GM决定你能忽略哪些需求。

Quickened Casting.name: 快速施法 Quickened Casting
Quickened Casting.description:
频率 每天一次

你加速自己的施法。若你的下一动作是施放一个秘学者戏法，或一个环阶至少比你所拥有的最高环阶秘学者法术位低 2 环的秘学者法术，则将施放它所需的动作数减少 1（最低为 1 动作）。

Frequency once per day

You accelerate your spellcasting. If your next action is to cast a mystic cantrip or a mystic spell that's at least 2 ranks lower than the highest-rank mystic spell slot you have, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

Quantum Negation.name: 量子否定 Quantum Negation
Quantum Negation.description:
你让目标暴露于一个其并不存在的现实之中。你习得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d1weVZHIiCXhTlqg]{量子否定}扭曲法术。

You expose a target to a reality in which they don't exist. You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d1weVZHIiCXhTlqg]{Quantum Negation} warp spell.

Running Shot.name: 奔袭射击 Running Shot
Running Shot.description:
需求 你正持用一把枪。

你向前猛冲，在移动中朝敌人射出一发精准瞄准的子弹。@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}，然后疾行，移动距离最多等同于你的速度。在这次移动期间的任意时点，你都可以用你所持用的枪进行一次远程打击。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You rush forward, firing a precisely aimed shot at your enemy while you're on the move. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} and then Stride up to your Speed. At any point during this movement, you can make a ranged Strike with the gun you're wielding.

Fan the Hammer.name: 速射连击 Fan the Hammer
Fan the Hammer.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 你在本回合中的上一个动作是区域射击或自动射击。

你扣住扳机并持续扫射。你进行区域射击或自动射击，忽略你武器的笨重特征。你不为此次攻击指定主要目标，并且被此次攻击造成伤害的生物不会获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态。

Frequency once per round

Requirements Your last action this turn was an Area Fire or Auto-Fire.

You hold down the trigger and continue blasting. You Area Fire or Auto-Fire, ignoring your weapon's unwieldy trait. You don't designate a primary target with this attack, and creatures you damage with this attack don't gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} condition.

Fantastic Ferocity.name: 惊人的凶暴性 Fantastic Ferocity
Fantastic Ferocity.description:
触发条件 你使用了绍巴德狂暴。

即使身负致命伤势，你仍继续战斗。进行一次打击。若此次打击使一名敌人降至 0 生命值，则此次绍巴德狂暴的启动不计入其使用频率。

Trigger You use Shobhad Ferocity.

You continue to battle even as you acquire mortal injuries. Make a single Strike. If this Strike brings a foe to 0 Hit Points, this activation of Shobhad Ferocity doesn't count against its frequency.

Augmented Adaptation.name: 改造者适应 Augmented Adaptation
Augmented Adaptation.description:
你已调整自己的身体以适应自身需求。你可安装的植入体总数增加 2 个。

You've adapted your own body to suit your needs. The total number of augmentations you can install is increased by two.

Overcome Shame.name: 克服羞耻 Overcome Shame
Overcome Shame.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 你对一名敌人进行一次 Strike 时严重失败。

你清空思绪中的杂念，专注于你的敌人，决心克服失败带来的羞耻，以免它永远玷污你的名声。在你的回合结束前，下一次你使用与触发此次攻击相同的武器并以相同目标尝试进行 Strike 时，你掷两次攻击检定并采用较高的结果。若该次攻击未命中，你会被羞耻感压垮，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，直到你的下个回合结束。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You critically fail a Strike against an enemy.

You clear your mind of distractions and focus on your foe, determined to overcome the shame of your failure lest it forever blemish your reputation. The next time before the end of your turn that you attempt a Strike with the same weapon and target as the triggering attack, you roll the attack roll twice and use the higher result. If the attack misses, you're overwhelmed with shame, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.

Harmonic Sensitivity.name: 谐波敏感性 Harmonic Sensitivity
Harmonic Sensitivity.description:
你已发育出敏锐的器官，对声音格外敏感——而且你知道如何善加利用它们。你在表演上变为受训；如果你已经在该技能上受训，则改为获得表演的稳妥技能专长。此外，你可以准确回忆起你在过去一周内听过的旋律或歌词，使你在所有涉及模仿言语或特定声音的欺瞒和表演检定上获得+2环境加值。

You've developed keen organs that have a sensitivity to sound—and you know how to put them to use. You become trained in Performance or gain the Assurance skill feat with Performance if you're are already trained in that skill. In addition, you can accurately recall a melody or lyrics you've heard within the last week, granting you a +2 circumstance bonus to all Deception and Performance checks that involve mimicking speech or a specific sound.

Press-Gang the Soul.name: 强征灵魂帮派 Press-Gang the Soul
Press-Gang the Soul.description:
触发 你用一把相位弯刀将一名敌人打至 0 生命值。

你的相位弯刀会窃取敌人的部分生命力，强征其进入永恒的奴役。只要你正持握一把带有被窃取生命力的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.eBWGwv3rryQkHfh4]{相位弯刀}，你就可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Sqo1uzSmebVWpqoT]{灵火盟友} 作为一个神圣先天法术随意施放，其升阶后的法术环阶等于你等级的一半。以这种方式使用 灵火盟友 时，需要消耗并永久释放一个被你的相位弯刀强征的灵魂。每轮中你第一次用相位弯刀进行打击时，你会立即获得“维持法术”动作的效果，但你只能用它来延长通过那把相位弯刀施放的 灵火盟友 法术的持续时间并控制该法术。

Trigger You reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points with a phase cutlass.

Your phase cutlass steals some of the enemy's vitality, press-ganging it into eternal servitude. As long as you are wielding a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.eBWGwv3rryQkHfh4]{Phase Cutlass} with stolen vitality, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Sqo1uzSmebVWpqoT]{Wisp Ally} as a divine innate spell at will, heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level. Using wisp ally this way requires and permanently releases one soul press-ganged with your phase cutlass. The first time each round you Strike with your phase cutlass, you immediately gain the effects of the Sustain a Spell action, which you can use only to extend the duration of and control a wisp ally spell cast using that phase cutlass.

Expert Mystic Spellcasting.name: 专家秘学法术施放 Expert Mystic Spellcasting
Expert Mystic Spellcasting.description:
你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#expert-spellcasting-feat]{专家施法} 的益处。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.DOc3Pf8wmVxanTIv#expert-spellcasting-feat]{Expert Spellcasting} benefits.

Bondbearer.name: 羁约持有者 Bondbearer
Bondbearer.description:
你和你的结契伙伴已经习得了古老的驭龙术。若你的结契伙伴比你小一个体型类别（对大多数龙人而言为中型），他们就可以骑乘你，而不必像通常那样需要比你小两个体型类别。当你的结契伙伴将你作为坐骑骑乘时，你们的同步性使他们在其回合开始时获得三个动作，而不是像骑乘另一名PC时通常那样只获得两个。你在自己回合开始时仍然只获得两个动作，而非三个。

You and your bonded partner have learned the ancient art of dragonriding. Your bonded partner can ride you if they are one size category smaller than you (Medium size, for most dragonkin), rather than needing to be two size categories smaller. When your bonded partner rides you as a mount, your synchronicity enables them to gain three actions at the start of their turn, rather than the two they normally would for riding another PC. You still gain only two actions at the start of your turn, rather than three.

Flicker Strike.name: 闪烁打击 Flicker Strike
Flicker Strike.description:
你用自己的太阳武器攻击一个目标，并驾驭这次碰撞产生的能量，以光速攻击另一名敌人。使用你的太阳武器进行一次打击。若命中，你可以传送至多等同于你速度的距离，移动到另一名生物触及范围内的一个未被占据的方格中，然后立刻对其进行一次太阳武器打击。若你的初始打击失败，你不会传送，且该动作结束。

引力调谐 将范围增加至你速度的两倍。

光子调谐 若作为此动作一部分进行的某次打击获得重击成功，则被击中的目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，直到其下个回合结束。

You attack a target with your solar weapon, harnessing the collision's energy to attack another foe at the speed of light. Make a Strike with your solar weapon. On a hit, you teleport up to your Speed into an unoccupied square within reach of a different creature and then immediately make a solar weapon Strike against them. If your initial Strike fails, you don't teleport, and the action ends.

Graviton-Attuned Increase the range to double your Speed.

Photon-Attuned If a Strike made as part of this action is a critical success, the struck target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of its next turn.

Quickened Processor.name: 加速处理器 Quickened Processor
Quickened Processor.description:
你能迅速辨明周遭环境，并且在身处危险之中或在危险情境下驾驶载具时，利用这些信息为自己争取优势。你在用于先攻掷骰的察觉检定上获得 +1 环境加值，在用于先攻掷骰的驾驶检定上获得 +2 环境加值。

You can quickly identify your surroundings, and you can use that information to your advantage while in the midst of danger or while in the process of piloting vehicles in hazardous situations. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks for initiative rolls and a +2 circumstance bonus to Piloting checks for initiative rolls.

Amplify Radiance.name: 辉光增幅 Amplify Radiance
Amplify Radiance.description:
你是电磁辐射的丰富源头，会自然增强你周围光源的辉光。你所持有的光源（包括被携带的、施加在你身上的、穿戴的，或以其他方式属于你一部分的光源）会更加明亮——这些光源照亮的区域加倍。若你所持有的某个光源会基于其区域造成伤害或产生有害效果，则那些附加效果的区域不会因“放大辉光”而增加。此外，你在为对抗黑暗而进行的反制检定中获得+2环境加值。

You're an abundant source of electromagnetic radiation, which naturally amplifies the radiance of lights around you. Light sources in your possession (including those carried, cast on you, worn, or otherwise a part of you) are more luminous—double the area illuminated by these light sources. If a light source you possess would deal damage or cause a harmful effect based on its area, the area of those additional effects are not increased by Amplify Radiance. Additionally, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to counteract checks made to counteract darkness.

Advanced Stellar Attunement.name: 先进星辰调谐 Advanced Stellar Attunement
Advanced Stellar Attunement.description:
你获得一个星辉武者专长。为满足其先决条件之目的，你的星辉武者等级视为你角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次如此选择时，你都会再获得一个星辉武者专长。

You gain one solarian feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your solarian level is half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you do, you gain another solarian feat.

Tinkering Fingers.name: 修补匠之手 Tinkering Fingers
Tinkering Fingers.description:
你成长过程中学会了摆弄装置、修理物品，并把东西拆开研究。你在工艺上受训。若你已从其他来源（例如你的背景或职业）在工艺上受训，则你改为在你自选的一项技能上受训。你可以在不使用修理工具包的情况下对物品进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{修理}，且不会承受 –2 情境减值；你会就地取材，用手边现有的东西临时充当工具。当你拥有修理工具包时，你进行工艺检定以修理物品会获得 +1 情境加值。

You grew up learning to tinker with devices, repair objects, and take things apart. You're trained in Crafting. If you're trained in Crafting from another source (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{Repair} an item without using a repair toolkit without taking the –2 circumstance penalty, improvising tools from whatever you have at hand. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Crafting checks to Repair an item when you have a repair toolkit.

Envoy Dedication.name: 特使奉献 Envoy Dedication
Envoy Dedication.description:
你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.f9dNcZi9kzbaGl8M]{特使训令}职业特性，但不会获得 Get 'Em! 特使训令的“以身作则”收益。你在欺瞒、交涉或威吓中任选一项成为受训，外加你自选的另一项技能。如果你已经在欺瞒、交涉和威吓上全部受训，则你改为在另一项自选技能上成为受训。你还会在特使职业 DC 上成为受训。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.f9dNcZi9kzbaGl8M]{Envoy Directives} class feature, but do not gain the Lead by Example benefits of the Get 'Em! envoy directive. You become trained in Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation plus another skill of your choice. If you were already trained in Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation, you instead become trained in an additional skill of your choice. You also become trained in envoy class DC.

Confident Actualization.name: 自信显化 Confident Actualization
Confident Actualization.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你即将进行一次豁免检定或技能检定。

你对自身能力的绝对自信帮助你逼迫自己达成想要的目标。将触发的检定或豁免掷骰两次，并采用较好的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're about to attempt a saving throw or skill check.

Your utter confidence in your own abilities helps you push yourself to reach your desired goals. Roll the triggering check or save twice and use the better result.

Explosive Surprise.name: 爆炸惊喜 Explosive Surprise
Explosive Surprise.description:
你已经精通了臭名昭著的伊索基武术：从嘴里吐出一枚处于激活状态的手榴弹。你需要花费10分钟来安全地准备一枚手榴弹，并将其存放在你的颊囊中。作为一个单动作，你可以用嘴取出并投掷这枚经过特殊准备的手榴弹。你无需空闲手即可如此做。

You've mastered the infamous ysoki martial art of spitting a live grenade from your mouth. It takes 10 minutes to safely prepare a grenade and store it in your cheek pouch. As a single action, you can draw and throw this specially prepared grenade using your mouth. You don't need a free hand to do so.

Battle Medicine.name: 战地医疗 Battle Medicine
Battle Medicine.description:
需求 你正手持或穿戴一个医疗包。

你可以包扎伤口，即使在战斗中也是如此。进行一次 Medicine 检定，DC 与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口} 相同，并恢复相应数量的 HP；这不会移除受伤状态。如同治疗伤口一样，如果你具有最低熟练等级，你可以尝试对抗更高 DC 的检定。随后，目标会在 1 天内对你的战斗医疗 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{免疫}。这不会使其对治疗伤口免疫，也不会以其他方式被视为治疗伤口。

Requirements You're holding or wearing a medkit.

You can patch up wounds, even in combat. Attempt a Medicine check with the same DC as for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} and restore the corresponding amount of HP; this doesn't remove the wounded condition. As with Treat Wounds, you can attempt checks against higher DCs if you have the minimum proficiency rank. The target is then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2XEYQNZTCGpdkyR6]{immune} to your Battle Medicine for 1 day. This does not make them immune to, or otherwise count as, Treat Wounds.

Atmospheric Flight.name: 大气飞行 Atmospheric Flight
Atmospheric Flight.description:
你可以在大气层内于短时间内显化你的能量之翼。你的能量之翼显化出来，使你获得等同于你的陆地速度加10尺的飞行速度，持续10分钟。你可以用单一动作提前结束这一持续时间。

You can manifest your energy wings while within an atmosphere for a short time. Your energy wings manifest, granting you a fly Speed equal to your land Speed plus 10 feet for 10 minutes. You can end this duration early as a single action.

Extended Vitality.name: 延展活力 Extended Vitality
Extended Vitality.description:
无论距离多远，你都能感知并触及与你缔结纽带的盟友。只要他们与你位于同一颗行星上，你就可以对任何缔结纽带的盟友施展 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality}。

You can feel and reach out to your bonded allies regardless of range. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} to any bonded ally as long as they're on the same planet as you.

It's Who You Know.name: 看你认识谁 It's Who You Know
It's Who You Know.description:
你会借助自己广泛的人脉网络来协助进行诡计勾当。当你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{打探消息} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ftG89SjTSa9DYDOD]{伪造文书} 时，你只需花费正常一半的时间。

You call on your extensive network for help with skulduggery. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ftG89SjTSa9DYDOD]{Create a Forgery}, you do it in half the normal time.

Solar Wind.name: 太阳风 Solar Wind
Solar Wind.description:
你可以使自己的身体部分散化，化为一团由无形太阳风推动的星体物质残影。处于光子调谐状态时，你的速度获得 +10 尺环境加值，并且每次你进行 Stride 时，都可以穿过一个非自愿生物所在的空间。

You can partly discorporate your body, becoming a blur of stellar matter pushed by invisible solar winds. While photonattuned, you gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to Speed and can move through the space of a single unwilling creature each time you Stride.

Opening Roar.name: 咆哮开场 Opening Roar
Opening Roar.description:
在战斗遭遇开始时，如果你察觉到你的敌人，且没有尝试 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 或躲藏，你可以以一次威吓检定作为你的先攻掷骰，并且可以用该结果对一个你观察到的敌人进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威慑}。

At the start of a combat encounter, if you are aware of your foes and aren't attempting to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} or Hide, you can roll an Intimidation check for your initiative and can use the result to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} one observed foe.

Student of the Canon.name: 神学士 Student of the Canon
Student of the Canon.description: 你对许多信仰都有过充分的研究，能够识别出它们当中的不实观念。若在对宗教信条进行解译文书（Decipher Writing）时，你的宗教检定骰出大失败，改为获得失败。在尝试有关你自己信仰的回忆知识时，若你骰出失败，改为获得成功，若你骰出成功，改为获得大成功。

Weapon Proficiency.name: 武器擅长 Weapon Proficiency
Weapon Proficiency.description:
你在所有军用武器上的熟练度变为受训。若你已在所有军用武器上受训，则选择一种进阶武器变为受训。达到11级后，你在这些武器上的熟练度变为专家。

特殊 你可以多次选取本专长。每次都会在一种进阶武器上受训。

Constellation Vortex.name: 星座漩涡 Constellation Vortex
Constellation Vortex.description:
你显化出一把你太阳武器的复制品，使其环绕你形成一道涡旋，并在其轨迹后方留下星座图案。任何在其回合开始时与你相邻的生物，都会受到数值与类型等同于你太阳武器武器伤害的伤害，并可对抗你的职业 DC 进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:solarian|basic] 豁免。若你在使用“星座涡旋”时已经有一个处于激活状态的涡旋，则改为向该涡旋中再加入一把武器，任何时候最多可有 3 把武器。每加入一把武器，涡旋的伤害提高 1。你可以维持该涡旋至多 1 分钟。

当涡旋结束时，它会粉碎，对所有相邻生物造成等同于你等级的伤害，外加涡旋中每有一把武器再 +1。此伤害与你太阳武器的类型相同。

引力调谐 涡旋的伤害改为每把武器提高 2（包括第一把）。

光子调谐 每把武器（包括第一把）额外造成 @Damage[1[fire]] 伤害。

等级（+3） 每把额外武器提供的伤害提高值增加 2，且你的调谐效果所提供的额外伤害增加 1。

You manifest a copy of your solar weapon, causing it to circle around you in a vortex, leaving constellation patterns in its wake. A creature that starts its turn adjacent to you takes damage of an amount and type equal to the weapon damage of your solar weapon, with a @Check[reflex|against:solarian|basic] save against your class DC. If you already have an active vortex when you use Constellation Vortex, add another weapon to the vortex instead, up to a maximum of 3 weapons at any time. Each added weapon increases the damage of the vortex by 1. You can Sustain the vortex for up to 1 minute.

When the vortex ends, it shatters, dealing damage equal to your level, plus 1 for each weapon in the vortex, to all adjacent creatures. This damage is of the same type as your solar weapon.

Graviton-Attuned Increase the damage of the vortex by 2 per weapon (including the first).

Photon-Attuned Add @Damage[1[fire]] damage per weapon (including the first).

Level (+3) The damage from each additional weapon increases by 2, and the extra damage from your attunement effect increases by 1.

Defensive Formation.name: 防御阵型 Defensive Formation
Defensive Formation.description:
需求 你与至少两名盟友相邻。

你本能地理解盟友如何行动与移动，并在激烈的战斗中运用这些知识，采取一种防御阵型，从而更好地保护自己免受伤害。你获得 AC 和反射豁免检定的 +1 情境加值。如果这些相邻盟友中有一位是你的羁绊搭档，该羁绊搭档获得与你相同的增益。该增益持续，直到你不再与至少两名盟友相邻为止。

Requirements You're adjacent to at least two of your allies.

You instinctively understand how your allies act and move, and use that knowledge in the heat of combat to adopt a defensive formation that better shields you from harm. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and Reflex saving throws. If one of these adjacent allies is your bonded partner, that bonded partner gains the same benefit that you do. This benefit lasts until you are no longer adjacent to at least two of your allies.

Spectra Ascendant.name: 幽谱崛起 Spectra Ascendant
Spectra Ascendant.description:
无论是由于你的血统中的某种异变、强大星灵的干扰，还是三贤一的赐福，你的身体都被漂流域的精华所充盈，使你转变为一名星灵。你不再衰老。你获得黑暗视觉、宇宙（特征），以及等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。当你位于漂流域中时，你的飞行速度等于你陆地速度的两倍。此外，你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VQH9rEQuNb06NQ4b]{Cosmic Blast}动作。

Whether through a quirk of your bloodline, the interference of powerful spectra, or Triune's blessing, your body has been flooded by the essence of the Drift, transforming you into a spectra. You cease aging. You gain darkvision, the cosmic trait, and a fly Speed equal to your land Speed. While you're in the Drift, your fly Speed is equal to double your land Speed. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VQH9rEQuNb06NQ4b]{Cosmic Blast} action.

Whirling Swipe.name: 回旋横扫 Whirling Swipe
Whirling Swipe.description:
需求 你正持用一把双手近战武器。

你以大幅度挥动武器，制造出一道致命的弧形范围。直到回合结束前，你的武器获得区域（5英尺爆发）和笨重特征。若你的武器具有触及，爆发半径改为你的武器的触及。使用所需武器进行一次以你所占据方格的一个角为中心的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击}。你不受该爆发影响。若你使用的武器具有回摆或横扫特征，则此次攻击的豁免DC获得+1环境加值。若你具有主要目标职业特性，则你进行的主要目标打击为一次近战打击，而非远程打击。

Requirements You're wielding a two-handed melee weapon.

You swipe your weapon in a wide swing to create a deadly arc. Your weapon gains the area (burst 5 feet) and unwieldy traits until the end of the turn. If your weapon has reach, the burst radius becomes the reach of your weapon. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} with the required weapon, centering the burst on a corner of a square you occupy. You're excluded from the burst. If you're using a weapon with the backswing or sweep trait, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the save DC of the attack. If you have the primary target class feature, the primary target Strike you make is a melee Strike, rather than a ranged Strike.

Kalo Lore.name: 卡洛知识 Kalo Lore
Kalo Lore.description:
在卡洛-马霍伊的绽放与发光尖塔之间长大，使你对周围之美——无论是自然形成的还是人工建造的——怀有深切的欣赏。你在制造和自然方面受训。如果你会自动在这些技能之一上变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你自选的一项技能上受训。

你还获得用于卡洛知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 通用专长。

Growing up among the blooms and glowing spires of Kalo-Mahoi has instilled in you a deep appreciation of the beauty around you, both natural and constructed. You're trained in Crafting and Nature. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Kalo Lore.

Intimidating Glare.name: 金刚怒目 Intimidating Glare
Intimidating Glare.description: 你仅凭目光就能够@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫败士气 Demoralize}。如此做时，挫败士气失去听觉特征，获得视觉特征，并且无需因生物不理解你的语言而承受减值。

Akashic Sync.name: 阿卡西同步 Akashic Sync
Akashic Sync.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你可以短暂地连接到阿卡西记录。你可以使用 [[/act recall-knowledge skill=occultism]]{神秘学} 来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}，而非使用任何其他技能，视同神秘学适用于就该主题执行回忆知识。

大成功 你准确地回忆起内容，并获得三条信息或背景脉络。

成功 你准确地回忆起内容，并获得两条信息或背景脉络，以及一条错误信息，但你无法分辨哪些是正确的、哪些是错误的。

失败 你获得一条信息或背景脉络，以及两条错误信息。

大失败 你获得三条错误信息。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You can briefly connect to the Akashic Records. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} using [[/act recall-knowledge skill=occultism]]{Occultism} instead of any other skill as though Occultism were applicable to perform Recall Knowledge for that topic.

Critical Success You recall accurately and gain three pieces of information or context.

Success You recall accurately and gain two pieces of information or context and a piece of erroneous information, but you don't have any way to differentiate which is which.

Failure You gain a piece of information or context and two pieces of erroneous information.

Critical Failure You gain three pieces of erroneous information.

Competitive Spirit.name: 竞争精神 Competitive Spirit
Competitive Spirit.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 一名盟友尝试进行一次技能检定，且该技能你的熟练等级为受训或更高。

你通过与触发此能力的盟友竞争来激励自己做到最好。直到你的下个回合结束前，你可以尝试进行相同的技能检定，以执行该触发盟友所执行的同一动作或活动。你在此次技能检定中获得 +2 处境加值。若你的成功等级至少比该触发盟友高一级，则此次使用 Competitive Spirit 不计入其频率。若你在此次技能检定中掷出大失败，则在接下来 1 小时内，你使用该技能进行的所有技能检定都承受 –1 处境减值，因为你会尝试新技巧来改进未来的尝试。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger An ally attempts a skill check with a skill that you have trained or better proficiency rank in.

You push yourself to be the best by competing with the triggering ally. Until the end of your next turn, you can attempt the same skill check to perform the same action or activity that the triggering ally performed. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to this skill check. If you achieve at least one degree of success higher than the triggering ally, this use of Competitive Spirit doesn't count toward its frequency. If you roll a critical failure on this skill check, you take a –1 circumstance penalty to all skill checks attempted with that skill for the next hour as you try new techniques to improve your future attempts.

Magical Crafting.name: 魔法手艺 Magical Crafting
Magical Crafting.description: 你可以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制作 Craft}魔法物品，不过某些物品会有其它条件。选取此专长时，你立即将四种2级或更低级常见魔法物品的配方加入你的配方簿中。

Skyguard.name: 天空卫士 Skyguard
Skyguard.description:
你在天卫军——卡洛-马霍伊的太空海军——中练就了太空本领。你获得驾驶的受训熟练度，并且在进行驾驶检定以导航和特技飞行时获得 +1 环境加值。如果你已经拥有驾驶的受训熟练度，则改为使你自选的另一项技能获得受训熟练度。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.VPFiluVQoj8F2Ho0]{特技机动} 技能专长，即使你不满足该专长的前提条件也一样。

You earned your space legs in the Skyguard, Kalo-Mahoi's space navy. You become trained in Piloting, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Piloting checks to Navigate and Stunt. If you're already trained in Piloting, you become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.VPFiluVQoj8F2Ho0]{Stunt Maneuver} skill feat, even if you don't meet the prerequisites of the feat.

Unhindered Advance.name: 无阻推进 Unhindered Advance
Unhindered Advance.description:
当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.c0TkeJ8LytJ5A6A1]{战术推进} 时，你无视困难地形和高等困难地形。

When you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.c0TkeJ8LytJ5A6A1]{Tactical Advance}, you ignore difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain.

Off the Top of my Head.name: 我一时想到的 Off the Top of my Head
Off the Top of my Head.description:
频率 每天一次

你惊人的处理能力和近乎完美的回忆使你即使在压力情境下也能重新集中。你恢复1点专注点数，最多恢复至你平常的上限。

Frequency once per day

Your incredible processing power and near-perfect recall allow you to refocus even in stressful situations. You regain 1 Focus Point, up to your usual maximum.

Impressive Performance.name: 动人表演 Impressive Performance
Impressive Performance.description: 你的表演广受追捧，为你赢得拥趸。你可以用表演技能替代交涉技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{建立印象 Make an Impression}。若你在观众面前表演至少10分钟，就能够以至多10个观看了整段表演的观众为建立印象的目标，无需承受通常情况的减值。若表演1小时，目标数量提高到20个；若表演2小时，提高到50个。

Filtering Tentacles.name: 滤滤触须 Filtering Tentacles
Filtering Tentacles.description:
覆盖你面部下半部分的感知触须敏锐到足以察觉毒素。你在对抗摄入或吸入的毒药时进行的豁免检定获得+1环境加值。

特殊 你只能在1级时选取此专长，并且你不能将此专长重训掉，也不能重训获得此专长。

The sensory tentacles covering the lower part of your face are sensitive enough to detect toxins. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against ingested or inhaled poisons.

Special You can take this feat only at 1st level, and you can't retrain out of or into this feat.

Adaptive Defense.name: 自适应防御 Adaptive Defense
Adaptive Defense.description:
你让自己的活力网络准备好承接一部分过剩的魔法，使其回流并增强你与你纽带的防御。若你接下来使用的动作是施放一个造成伤害的法术，则无论该法术是否成功造成伤害，你和一名已建立纽带的盟友都获得对此法术伤害类型的抗性，数值等于该法术的阶级（最低为1），持续至你下个回合结束。若该法术造成一种以上类型的伤害，选择其中一种，并获得对此类型的抗性。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.qbnXMOmVMMKphIgg]{效果：自适应防御}

You prepare your vitality network to catch some of your excess magic, allowing it to flow back and bolster your bond's defenses. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that deals damage, whether or not it successfully deals damage, you and one bonded ally gain resistance to that spell's type of damage equal to the spell's rank (minimum 1) until the end of your next turn. If the spell deals more than one type of damage, choose one and gain resistance to that type.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.qbnXMOmVMMKphIgg]{Effect: Adaptive Defense}

Just the Thing....name: 正是那个东西…… Just the Thing...
Just the Thing....description:
花费 所选物品的价格

你四处奔波，将补给和装备从一地带到另一地，并在旅途中收集了不少有趣的东西。事实上，你现在就有一件有趣的物品……在这儿！你执行“交互”动作，从口袋里取出一件你先前未曾声明购买过的物品——该物品必须是任何常见、等级为你等级一半或以下，且体积值为1或更低的物品。它必须是一件冒险装备（来自《Starfinder Player Core》中的表格或其他冒险装备来源），且不能是武器、护甲、弹药、魔法物品、药物物品或其他财宝。

Cost the Price of the chosen item

You've traveled far and wide, bringing supplies and equipment from place to place and picking up interesting objects in your travels. In fact, you've got an interesting item right… here! You Interact to pull an item you hadn't previously declared that you purchased out of your pocket—this item must be any common item of half your level or less with a Bulk of 1 or less. It must be a piece of adventuring gear (from the table in Starfinder Player Core or other sources of adventuring gear) and can't be a weapon, armor, ammunition, magic item, pharmaceutical item, or other treasure.

Bioluminescence.name: 生物发光 Bioluminescence
Bioluminescence.description:
你的双眼如生物发光的灯一般闪耀，而你已学会如何将其聚焦成一道定向光束。你的双眼会沿着你所看向的任意方向发出一条30英尺长的光线。

你可以以自由动作压制或恢复这道光。此外，当这道光处于激活状态时，你可以执行“指出”动作，在你的生物发光区域内指示一个生物而不发出任何声音，此时该动作失去听觉和操作特征。最后，在你使用一个动作进行躲藏或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 之后，你可以以自由动作用你的灯光发出预先约定的信号，向所有你能看见的盟友提醒你的位置。

Your eyes glow like bioluminescent lamps, and you have learned how to focus them into a directional beam. Your eyes shed light in a 30 foot line in any direction you're looking.

You can suppress or restore this light as a free action. In addition, while this light is active you can take the Point Out action to indicate a creature within the area of your bioluminescence without making any noise, in which case it loses the auditory and manipulate traits. Finally, after you use an action to Hide or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}, you can send predetermined signals with your lights to alert all allies you can see to your location as a free action.

Soul-Soother.name: 抚魂者 Soul-Soother
Soul-Soother.description:
你对情绪与心理健康有着深刻的理解。你在以下技能中自选一项成为受训：外交或医疗。如果你本会自动在这两项技能上都成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在自选的一项技能上成为受训。此外，如果你在对抗情绪效果的意志豁免检定中掷出大失败，你改为得到失败。

You have a deep understanding of emotions and mental health. You become trained in one of the following skills of your choice: Diplomacy or Medicine. If you would automatically become trained in both of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. In addition, if you roll a critical failure on a Will save against an emotion effect, you get a failure instead.

Far-Reaching Mind.name: 远及心灵 Far-Reaching Mind
Far-Reaching Mind.description:
通过严格的精神训练或天赋异禀，你的灵能感知比常人延伸得更远。你的有限心灵感应和思想感知的范围各增加10英尺。

Through rigorous mental exercises or natural talent, your psychic senses extend farther than average. Increase the ranges of your limited telepathy and thoughtsense by 10 feet each.

Bloomguard.name: 绽卫者 Bloomguard
Bloomguard.description:
在多年功勋卓著的军旅生涯后，你被选入菁英绽卫队，并在那里接受了严格训练，使你在面对第一世界生物的诡计时更善于防御。你在对抗精神效果以及由精类制造的效果时，意志豁免检定和意志DC获得+2环境加值；此外，每天一次，当你对抗精神效果或由精类制造的效果进行豁免时，你可以掷两次并取较高结果。

After years of meritorious military service, you were chosen for the elite Bloomguard, where you underwent rigorous training that honed your defenses against the tricks of First World creatures. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Will saving throws and Will DCs against mental effects and effects created by fey, and once per day, you can roll twice and take the better on a save against a mental effect or an effect created by a fey.

Body Art.name: 身体艺术 Body Art
Body Art.description:
你的身体就是你的画布，而你已将身体改造提升到了全新的层次。你获得一个植入体，无需任何花费。该植入体的等级必须等于或低于你的等级。这个植入体不计入你可植入植入体的最大数量，而且每当你获得一个新的族裔专长时，你都可以将这个植入体免费升级为一个等级等于或低于你等级的新植入体，以体现你在身体改造上的持续探索。

Your body is your canvas, and you've taken body modification to a whole new level. You gain an augmentation at no cost. The augmentation must be your level or lower. This augmentation doesn't count against the maximum number of augmentations you can implant, and each time you gain a new ancestry feat, you can upgrade this augmentation to a new augmentation of your level or lower at no cost, representing your continued exploration in body modification.

Check it Out!.name: 看看它！ Check it Out!
Check it Out!.description:
你将自己全部的创意都倾注于让你的武器真正引人注目。选择一件你拥有的武器，按你自己的风格进行装饰。当你持握所选武器时，将该武器的追踪值作为物品加值加入对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻} 的欺瞒检定，以及对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫敌士气} 的威吓检定。你同一时间只能有一件这样的武器处于生效状态。你可以花费24小时来自定义一件新武器，此时你与之前武器的联系将会失去。

You've poured all your creativity into making your weapon truly eye-catching. Choose one weapon you own to decorate in your own style. While wielding your chosen weapon, add the weapon's tracking value as an item bonus to Deception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} and Intimidation checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}. You can only have one such weapon active at a time. You can spend 24 hours customizing a new weapon, at which point your connection with your previous weapon is lost.

Deep Diplomat.name: 深度外交官 Deep Diplomat
Deep Diplomat.description:
你研习过深流同盟的历史，也明白将敌人转化为朋友的价值。当你对一名怀有敌意的对手进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 的外交检定成功时，改为获得重大成功。

You've studied the history of the Deep Current Alliance, and you understand the value of turning an enemy into a friend. When you succeed on a Diplomacy check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} against an opponent that's hostile, you critically succeed instead.

Extreme Accuracy.name: 极度精准 Extreme Accuracy
Extreme Accuracy.description:
当你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 时，如果你的标记目标位于你的武器第四距离增量以内，则这些收益适用。此外，你无视攻击位于最多四个距离增量之外的标记目标时的减值。

When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim}, the benefits apply if your mark is within range up to your weapon's fourth range increment. Additionally, you ignore the penalty for attacking your mark at up to four range increments away.

Read Lips.name: 读唇 Read Lips
Read Lips.description: 你可以从附近清晰可见的人的嘴唇动作中读出说话内容。你读唇的语言必须是你懂的语言。当你空闲时，你可以自动读唇成功。在遭遇模式中或尝试更困难的读唇任务时，你每轮都会因为专注于嘴唇动作而陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂 Fascinated}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，并且必须成功进行社群检定（DC由GM决定）才能成功读唇。

Convert Elemental Essence.name: 转化元素精华 Convert Elemental Essence
Convert Elemental Essence.description:
