触发 敌人以具有元素特征的打击或带有攻击检定的法术为目标指定一个已建立纽带的生物，且该检定失败或大失败，或者你对敌方有害的元素法术进行豁免时获得大成功。

你的活力网络吸收了此次攻击的精华。你的活力网络每因触发该反应的法术环阶恢复 2 点生命值，或每因触发该反应的打击的武器伤害骰恢复 4 点生命值。

Trigger An enemy targets a bonded creature with a Strike or spell with an attack roll that has an elemental trait and the roll fails or critically fails, or you roll a critical success on a save against a foe's harmful elemental spell.

Your vitality network absorbs the essence of the attack. Your vitality network regains 2 Hit Points per rank of the triggering spell or 4 Hit Points per weapon die of the triggering Strike.

Ascended Stability.name: 超凡稳固 Ascended Stability
Ascended Stability.description:
触发 你将要循环或变为未调谐状态。

你短暂进入一种冥想状态，在其中你重新找回自己的中心，并忆起循环中那些暴烈极端之间不断变化的平衡。你不会变为未调谐状态，也不会循环，并且你维持当前的调谐状态。

Trigger You would cycle or become unattuned.

You briefly enter a meditative state in which you re-center yourself and remember the ever-shifting balance between the violent extremes of the cycle. You don't become unattuned or cycle, and you remain in your current attunement state.

Practiced Escape.name: 娴熟脱身 Practiced Escape
Practiced Escape.description:
触发条件 一个生物对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{抓取}、使你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动}，或使你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}。

你受过近身战斗的训练，并练习过如何挣脱擒抱或类似处境。你尝试 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}。如果你成功或大成功，你还可以站起或移步。

Trigger A creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grabs}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilizes}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrains} you.

You've trained in close quarters combat and practiced how to escape a hold, or similar situations. You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}. If you succeed or critically succeed, you can also Stand or Step.

Quick Stow.name: 快速收纳 Quick Stow
Quick Stow.description:
频率 每轮一次

你受过将物品迅速移入口颊囊袋这一技巧的训练。你执行一次【交互】以将一件手持物品存入口颊囊袋中（前提是它放得下）。

Frequency once per round

You're trained in the trick of quickly moving items into your cheek pouches. You Interact to store one held item in your cheek pouches (provided it fits).

Flashing Fit.name: 闪光发作 Flashing Fit
Flashing Fit.description:
多年来对自身外表的精心打理，让你对色彩、质地与光之间的相互作用有了深刻理解，也知道如何让你的穿着吸引任何人的目光。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RQjSQVZRG497cJhX]{鲜明图纹}，作为一个你每天可以施放一次的 6环 原始先天法术。在 17 级时，将你的鲜明图纹先天法术的区域增大为 @Template[type:burst|distance:20]。

Years of careful attention to your look have given you a deep understanding of the interplay between color, texture, and light, and you know how to make your outfit catch anyone's eye. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RQjSQVZRG497cJhX]{Vibrant Pattern} as a 6th-rank primal innate spell that you can cast once per day. At 17th level, increase the area of your vibrant pattern innate spell to a @Template[type:burst|distance:20].

Menacing Snarl.name: 威吓咆哮 Menacing Snarl
Menacing Snarl.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 你使一个生物陷入恐慌。

你在使触发生物陷入恐慌时发出咆哮、嘶嘶声、喊叫，或以其他方式用言语威吓它。将恐慌状态的值提高 1（最大为 3）。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You frighten a creature.

You snarl, hiss, shout, or otherwise verbally menace the triggering creature as you frighten them. Increase the value of the frightened condition by 1 (maximum 3).

Rocket Jump.name: 火箭跳跃 Rocket Jump
Rocket Jump.description:
需求 你正持用一把区域（爆发）武器。

你在跳跃的同时开火，利用爆炸把自己推进到新的高度，或只是脱离一个比爆炸更危险的处境。你进行一次区域射击，然后 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃}，并使用你的武器为移动距离提供等同于你武器爆发范围两倍的状态加值。你必须位于该武器区域攻击的区域内某处，但你不必针对你攻击的效果进行豁免。

作为此动作一部分进行的移动不会触发反应，不过区域射击仍会照常触发反应。

Requirements You're wielding an area (burst) weapon.

You fire your weapon as you jump, using the explosion to propel yourself to new heights or just out of a situation more dangerous than an explosion. You make an Area Fire and then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}, using your weapon to add a status bonus to the distance traveled equal to double the burst of your weapon. You must be somewhere within the area of the weapon's area attack, but you don't have to save against the effect of your attack.

Movement made as part of this action doesn't trigger reactions, though Area Fire still triggers them normally.

Sway the Heart, Stoke the Spirit.name: 撼动心灵，激扬精神 Sway the Heart, Stoke the Spirit
Sway the Heart, Stoke the Spirit.description:
你发表一段振奋人心的演说，鼓舞你的盟友，清除他们身心上的有害状态，并激发他们在持续战斗中的斗志。若你说出这段演说，Sway the Heart, Stoke the Spirit 获得听觉（特征）。若你用手语表达这段演说，Sway the Heart, Stoke the Spirit 获得视觉（特征）。你以及 @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] 内的所有盟友，获得一个4环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF]{Clear Mind} 法术和一个4环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Et8RSCLx8w7uOLvo]{Sound Body} 法术的增益。此外，你的盟友在1分钟内获得对意志豁免检定的 +1 处境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.XmdJvu33YRjQbLsz]{效果：Sway the Heart, Stoke the Spirit}

You orate an inspiring speech that rallies your allies, cleansing their body and mind of harmful conditions and stoking their spirit for the ongoing battle. If you say this speech, Sway the Heart, Stoke the Spirit gains the auditory trait. If you sign this speech, Sway the Heart, Stoke the Spirit gains the visual trait. You and all allies in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] benefit from a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF]{Clear Mind} and a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Et8RSCLx8w7uOLvo]{Sound Body} spell. Additionally, your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.XmdJvu33YRjQbLsz]{Effect: Sway the Heart, Stoke the Spirit}

Living Battery.name: 活体电池 Living Battery
Living Battery.description:
你的身体会产生过量的电能，你可以将其释放为一道闪电冲击，或用来为科技装置供能。你可以随意将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kBhaPuzLUSwS6vVf]{Electric Arc} 作为神圣先天法术施放。戏法会被强化至等于你等级一半并向上取整的法术环阶。

当你施放 electric arc 时，你还可以将电池或由电池供电的科技物品作为目标（可任意组合）。如果你将电池或由电池供电的科技物品作为目标，该物品不会受到损坏。相反，它每法术环阶恢复 2 点电荷。如果目标是需要电池但当前没有电池的科技物品，则将该物品视为拥有一块每法术环阶具有 2 点电荷的电池，持续 1 分钟。

Your body produces an overabundance of electrical energy, which you can emit as a blast of lightning or use to power technological devices. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kBhaPuzLUSwS6vVf]{Electric Arc} cantrip as a divine innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

When you cast electric arc, you can also target batteries or tech items powered by batteries (in any combination). If you target a battery or tech item powered by a battery, that item isn't damaged. Instead, it regains 2 charges per spell rank. If the target is a tech item that needs a battery but doesn't currently have one, treat the item as if it had a battery with 2 charges per spell rank for 1 minute.

Photosynthetic Regeneration.name: 光合作用再生 Photosynthetic Regeneration
Photosynthetic Regeneration.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你暴露在自然阳光下。

你的身体通过从自然阳光中吸收养分来再生。你获得再生 20，持续 1 分钟。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You're exposed to natural sunlight.

Your body regenerates by taking in nutrients from natural sunlight. You gain regeneration 20 for 1 minute.

Quantum Aura.name: 量子灵光 Quantum Aura
Quantum Aura.description:
你可以成为自己所创造的扭曲现实的枢纽。每次你使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{扭曲现实} 来激活你的量子场时，你都可以选择让你的量子场成为环绕你并随你移动的灵光。如果你如此选择，你的“扭曲现实”动作获得灵光特征，而你所创造的量子场是一个半径10英尺的散发。

You can become the nexus of the warped reality you create. Each time you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality} to activate your quantum field, you can choose for your quantum field to be an aura around you that moves with you. If you do, your Warp Reality action gains the aura trait, and the quantum field you create is a 10-foot-radius emanation.

Vitality Web.name: 活力网 Vitality Web
Vitality Web.description:
你可以将你的纽带显化为盟友之间一张由生命能量构成的网络。你学会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.6HMiN0oQzeoYR3it]{Vitality Web} 顿悟法术。

You can manifest your bond as a web of vital energy between your allies. You learn the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.6HMiN0oQzeoYR3it]{Vitality Web} epiphany spell.

Dirty Retort.name: 肮脏的回嘴 Dirty Retort
Dirty Retort.description:
触发条件 一个生物以近战打击未命中你。

你反将攻击者一军，使用一些下三滥的手段暂时妨碍它，例如朝它眼里扬沙、用光照它的脸、把它的外套扯到它头上，或者以其他方式成为一个烦人的捣乱鬼。触发该反应的生物在其下个回合结束前，变为由你选择的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}。

Trigger A creature misses you with a melee Strike.

You turn the tables on your attacker, using underhanded tactics to temporarily hinder it, such as throwing dirt in its eyes, shining a light in its face, pulling its coat over its head, or otherwise being a meddlesome nuisance. The triggering creature becomes your choice of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of its next turn.

Tripartite Mind.name: 三位一体心智 Tripartite Mind
Tripartite Mind.description:
触发 你将会获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} 状态。

你创造出能够抵御精神侵扰的意识副本。尝试反制一个你选择的、施加了上述触发状态之一的效果，使用你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制阶级，并以你的法术攻击调整值作为反制调整值。

Trigger You would gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition.

You create duplicates of your consciousness capable of fending off mental intrusion. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of the triggering conditions, using half your level rounded up as your counteract rank and your spell attack modifier as the counteract modifier.

Psychic Investigator.name: 灵能调查员 Psychic Investigator
Psychic Investigator.description:
你可以运用你的心灵感应能力，迅速评估自身处境，或巧妙地从他人的心智中探知信息。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{超认知} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{读心术} 作为 3环 天生异能 秘学法术施放。你每天可以将这些秘学天生异能法术中的每一个各施放一次。

You can use your telepathic abilities to quickly assess your circumstances or subtly glean information from the minds of others. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{Mind Reading} as 3rd-rank occult innate spells. You can cast each of these occult innate spells once per day.

Break Curse.name: 破除诅咒 Break Curse
Break Curse.description: 你花费8小时，为目标祈祷或举行神秘仪式，压制施加在其身上的诅咒之力。尝试反制诅咒，使用@Check[occultism]或@Check[religion]技能进行反制检定，反制等级为你等级的一半（向上取整）。若你在神秘或宗教技能上的熟练度达到传奇，破除诅咒仅需10分钟的祈祷或仪式。

Deathless Study.name: 不死研究 Deathless Study
Deathless Study.description:
你漫长的存在让你有时间进行训练，并积累了相当于数个凡人一生的见识。你在自选的两项技能上变为受训。

Your long existence has given you time to train and insights worth several mortal lifetimes. You become trained in two skills of your choice.

Arcane Adept.name: 奥术精修者 Arcane Adept
Arcane Adept.description:
你对魔法的深入研究教会了你如何在寻找其他事物时，也留意魔法的迹象。当你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索} 时，你也会获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Yb0C1uLzeHrVLl7a]{侦测魔法} 探索活动的益处，除非你选择不这样做。

Your intense magical studies have taught you how to watch out for signs of magic even when looking for other things. When you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Searching}, you also gain the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Yb0C1uLzeHrVLl7a]{Detect Magic} exploration activity unless you choose not to.

Unliving Memories.name: 亡骸记忆 Unliving Memories
Unliving Memories.description:
你活尸裔天性中的某种元素会让你从彼界获得片段闪现：来自你原本注定要前往、或也许有朝一日仍能抵达的来世的幻象。你获得宗教的受训熟练等级。若你已经在宗教上受训，则改为在你自选的另一项技能上受训。你获得关于与你来世相关的特定位面的一个知识子类别的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外知识} 专长（例如天堂、地狱、涅槃，或外域裂隙知识）。

Some element of your borai nature gives you flashes from the beyond: visions from the afterlife you were intended for or might still one day obtain. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Religion. If you're already trained in Religion, you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for a Lore subcategory about a specific plane tied to your afterlife (such as Heaven, Hell, Nirvana, or Outer Rifts Lore).

Reliable Grace.name: 可靠优雅 Reliable Grace
Reliable Grace.description:
你对自己的身体拥有非凡的控制力。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.GExi3NDWqhfICneX]{天生优雅}，而不是每天一次。

You have exceptional control over your body. You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.GExi3NDWqhfICneX]{Natural Grace} once per hour, rather than once per day.

Manifold Evolution.name: 流形演化 Manifold Evolution
Manifold Evolution.description:
你已将所遇到的无数族裔的遗传密码编录在案，并且可以调用其中任意一种来强化并进化你的身体。将你通过 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.YaS0LQv3YCfiBRgR]{Convergent Evolution} 可选择的族裔数量增加至六个。你获得两个你满足条件的额外族裔专长，等级为13级或以下，从以 Convergent Evolution 选择的族裔中选出。你可以在每日准备期间每天一次重训这两个所选专长中的一个或两个。

You've cataloged the genetic code from countless ancestries you've encountered, and you can draw upon any of them to enhance and evolve your body. Increase the number of ancestries you can select with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.YaS0LQv3YCfiBRgR]{Convergent Evolution} to six. You gain two additional ancestry feats you qualify for of 13th level or lower, chosen from among the ancestries selected with Convergent Evolution. You can retrain one or both of these selected feats once per day during your daily preparations.

Kasatha Lore.name: 卡萨萨学识 Kasatha Lore
Kasatha Lore.description:
你研习过卡萨森人关于平衡与和谐的传统。你在外交和社群上获得受训熟练等级。若你本会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你自选的一项技能上成为受训。

你还获得用于卡萨森人学识的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识}泛用专长。

You've studied the kasathan traditions of balance and harmony. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Diplomacy and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Kasatha Lore.

Vesk Weapon Familiarity.name: 维斯克武器熟悉 Vesk Weapon Familiarity
Vesk Weapon Familiarity.description:
你接受过所有朵什科战刃的训练。此外，你获得所有带有维斯克蜥人特征的非普通武器的使用权限。就熟练度而言，你将其中任何军用武器视为简易武器，而将任何先进武器视为军用武器。

在5级时，每当你用这些武器之一造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

You're trained with all doshkos. In addition, you gain access to all uncommon weapons with the vesk trait. For the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you get its critical specialization effect.

Touch The Sky.name: 触摸天空 Touch The Sky
Touch The Sky.description:
没有什么比在空中翱翔更让你热爱了。当你飞行时，你在向上移动（直线上升或对角上升）时，不将其视为穿越困难地形。这不适用于借助装备或载具进行的飞行，例如喷气背包和悬浮板。

There's nothing you love more than soaring through the air. When you fly, you don't count moving upward (straight up or diagonally) as moving through difficult terrain. This does not apply to flying with equipment or vehicles, such as jet packs and hover boards.

Deathly Constitution.name: 亡者体魄 Deathly Constitution
Deathly Constitution.description:
由于你那次改变人生的濒死擦肩而过，你活着的身体更能抵御血肉之躯的弱点。你在对抗疾病和毒素的强韧豁免上获得+1境遇加值。

Thanks to your life-altering brush with death, your living body is better protected against the weaknesses of the flesh. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves against disease and poison.

Intimidating Shot.name: 威吓射击 Intimidating Shot
Intimidating Shot.description:
你试图用你的远程武器朝空中开火来对一名敌人进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓}，消耗等同于该武器 expend 数值的弹药，并使用该武器的最大射程，而不是通常的30英尺射程。如果目标与你不共享语言，此次检定不会承受 –4 情境减值。

You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} a foe with your ranged weapon by firing it into the air, using ammo equal to the weapon's expend and the weapon's maximum range rather than the usual range of 30 feet. This check doesn't take a –4 circumstance penalty if the target doesn't share a language with you.

Contemplative Lore.name: 默思族学识 Contemplative Lore
Contemplative Lore.description:
经过对历史记录、传说与神话的广泛研究，你已吸收了默思族社群的核心教诲。你在奥秘学和神秘学上获得受训熟练等级。若你本会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项由你选择的技能上成为受训。

你还获得适用于默思族传承知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 通用专长。

After extensive study of historical records, legends, and myths, you have absorbed the essential teachings of contemplative society. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Arcana and Occultism. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Contemplative Lore.

Don't Touch That!.name: 别碰那个！ Don't Touch That!
Don't Touch That!.description:
频率 每天一次

触发条件 你能够观察到的一名盟友触发了一个陷阱。

你对一名粗心大意的盟友发出尖锐而惊慌的斥责。此专长获得视觉或听觉（特征），取决于哪种更适合你的警告。尝试一次探究知识检定，对抗该危害的隐匿DC。

大成功 你的警告来得正是时候。你阻止该陷阱被触发，或者将其启动延迟到你的下个回合开始或结束时（由你选择）。

成功 你的盟友在对抗该陷阱的下一次攻击时，AC获得+1环境加值，或者在对抗该陷阱效果的下一次豁免检定中获得+1环境加值。

大失败 你尖锐的警告反而只惊吓到了你的盟友，使其在应对该陷阱的下一次攻击时处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}状态。

Frequency once per day

Trigger An ally you can observe triggers a trap.

You give a sharp, panicked reprimand to an unobservant ally. This feat gains the visual or auditory trait, whichever is appropriate for your warning. Attempt a Delve Lore check against the hazard's stealth DC.

Critical Success Your warning comes just in time. You prevent the trap from being triggered, or you delay the activation until the start or end of your next turn (your choice).

Success Your ally gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against the trap's next attack, or to their next saving throw against the trap's effects.

Critical Failure Your sharp warning only startles your ally, leaving them @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the trap's next attack.

Blood Sense.name: 血液感知 Bloodsense
Blood Sense.description:
你拥有敏锐的嗅觉，能够在远处察觉流血的伤口。你获得血觉，作为一种不精确感官，范围为30英尺。这意味着你可以利用嗅觉确定未处于其满生命值的活体生物的确切位置。没有血液的生物，例如软泥怪和大多数构装体，无法被你的血觉侦测到。

You have a keen sense of smell and are capable of detecting bloody wounds at a distance. You gain blood sense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet. This means you can use your sense of smell to determine the exact location of a living creature who isn't at its full Hit Points. Creatures that don't have blood, such as oozes and most constructs, can't be detected with your blood sense.
